Quote: Dreams are not those which comes while we are sleeping, but dreams are those when u don't sleep before fulfilling them.
Author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam

Quote: Crap. It's all crap. Living is crap. Life has no meaning. None. Nowhere to be found. Crap. Why doesn't anybody realize this?
Author: K-Ske Hasegawa

Quote: Memory is a great artist. For every man and for every woman it makes the recollection of his or her life a work of art and an unfaithful record.
Author: Andre Maurois

Quote: Plato and Aristotle are my teachers. Even Kant is my teacher, but my greatest teacher is my failures.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: For me life is continuously being hungry. The meaning of life is not simply to exist, to survive, but to move ahead, to go up, to achieve, to conquer.
Author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

Quote: I've learned one thing: you can only really get to know a person after a row. Only then can you judge their true character!
Author: Anne Frank
Origin: The Diary of a Young Girl

Quote: To move, to breathe, to fly, to float, To gain all while you give, To roam the roads of lands remote, To travel is to live.
Author: Hans Christian Andersen
Origin: The Fairy Tale of My Life: An Autobiography

Quote: If it's the last kiss, we'd better make it last. I hope you don't have anywhere to be, because I have the rest of my life free.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Because I keep it real and reality is a ruthless bitch. Plus I wanna make money - you cool with that?" - Gable
Author: J.M. August

Quote: Let's be romantic and dance in the rain. I'll prove my feelings for you by bringing an umbrella, because I'm drowning in my love for you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The greatest love stories are not those in which love is only spoken, but those in which it is acted upon.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: You will see that the things you desire most are the very things that bring you the greatest sorrow.
Author: Christopher Pike

Quote: She put one hand on mine. "When someone is in your heart, they're never truly gone. They can come back to you, even at unlikely times.
Author: Mitch Albom

Quote: There are perhaps many causes worth dying for, but to me, certainly, there are none worth killing for.
Author: Albert Dietrich
Origin: Army GI, Pacifist CO: The World War II Letters of Frank and Albert Dietrich

Quote: A concept is a brick. It can be used to build a courthouse of reason. Or it can be thrown through the window.
Author: Gilles Deleuze
Origin: A Thousand Plateaus: Capitalism and Schizophrenia

Quote: If you would hit the mark, you must aim a little above it; Every arrow that flies feels the attraction of earth.
Author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

Quote: A pessimist sees the difficulty in every opportunity; an optimist sees the opportunity in every difficulty.
Author: Winston S. Churchill

Quote: Children are happy because they don't have a file in their minds called "All the Things That Could Go Wrong.
Author: Marianne Williamson

Quote: Learning isn't acquiring knowledge so much as it is trimming information that has already been acquired.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Are all caps really necessary? No need to shout at me. My hearing is perfect when the words arrive in my mind through my eyes.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I also don't trust Caribou anymore. They're out there, on the tundra, waiting... Something's going down. I'm right about this.
Author: Joss Whedon

Quote: I spoke like a spoke on a wheel, as I went around and around without actually saying what I wanted to say. I was love flustered.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Why do people play the lottery, or why do people gamble, period? You know, it's with the hope of winning something more.
Author: Derek Kilmer

Quote: Anybody who says they are a good liar obviously is not, because any legitimately savvy liar would always insist they're honest about everything.
Author: Chuck Klosterman

Quote: A wonderful thing about a book, in contrast to a computer screen, is that you can take it to bed with you.
Author: Daniel J. Boorstin

Quote: I really love to ride my motorcycle. When I want to just get away and be by myself and clear my head, that's what I do.
Author: Kyle Chandler

Quote: Every great work of art has two faces, one toward its own time and one toward the future, toward eternity.
Author: Lester Bangs

Quote: in times like the present, men should utter nothing for which they would not willingly be responsible through time and eternity.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: Without words, without writing and without books there would be no history, there could be no concept of humanity.
Author: Hermann Hesse

Quote: If you don't want anyone to know about your existence, you might as well kill yourself. You're taking up space, air.
Author: Dave Eggers
Origin: A Heartbreaking Work of Staggering Genius

Quote: We come to love not by finding a perfect person, but by learning to see an imperfect person perfectly.
Author: Sam Keen

Quote: I make fun of situations and try and find the humor in things, but it's never at the expense of the other guy.
Author: Bob Uecker

Quote: Oh, goodie, "Puck said as I stepped forward. "I'm going to have a rash in the most uncomfortable places.
Author: Julie Kagawa

Quote: What a large volume of adventures may be grasped within the span of his little life by him who interests his heart in everything.
Author: Laurence Sterne

Quote: There is no disguise which can hide love for long where it exists, or simulate it where it does not.
Author: Francois de La Rochefoucauld

Quote: If there are no stupid questions, then what kind of questions do stupid people ask? Do they get smart just in time to ask questions?
Author: Scott Adams

Quote: I find television very educating. Every time somebody turns on the set, I go into the other room and read a book.
Author: Groucho Marx

Quote: Stop waiting for the perfect day or the perfect moment... Take THIS day, THIS moment and lead it to perfection.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: The world is a dangerous place to live, not because of the people who are evil, but because of the people who don't do anything about it.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: If you find yourself drawn to an event against all logic, go. The universe is telling you something.
Author: Gloria Steinem

Quote: Do I attribute my success to hard work, or sunscreen? If you want the truth, maybe you should ask my new albino secretary.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: The demon that you can swallow gives you its power, and the greater life's pain, the greater life's reply.
Author: Joseph Campbell

Quote: People think that the opposite of success is failure, but it's not. Failure is part of the process of success.
Author: Randy Gage

Quote: In high school I barely made the rodeo team. But I wasn't good enough to start, so I just rode the bench.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: If you feel obsessed to prove something to the world, then you'd need world attention to be able to prove it.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: Betelgeuse Incident: Insiden Bait Al- Jauza

Quote: I have always thought that all philosophical debates are ultimately between the partisans of structure and the partisans of "goo.
Author: Alan W. Watts

Quote: It is an absurdity to believe that the Deity has human passions, and one of the lowest of human passions, a restless appetite for applause
Author: David Hume

Quote: In the case of good books, the point is not to see how many of them you can get through, but rather how many can get through to you.
Author: Mortimer J. Adler

Quote: The business of business is people, not products or services. Take care of the people, and the people will take care of you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Ballet is an incredibly difficult, beautiful art form that takes a lot of training, a lot of time, and a lot of hard work.
Author: Sutton Foster

Quote: I have to ask Allah's forgiveness and not get angry, because they come to me out of love, and it's not fitting that I should turn to them in hatred.
Author: Abdul Qadeer Khan

Quote: What hurts so bad about youth isn't the actual butt whippings the world delivers. It's the stupid hopes playacting like certainties.
Author: Mary Karr

Quote: there are two types of people in the world: those who prefer to be sad among others, and those who prefer to be sad alone.
Author: Nicole Krauss

Quote: The American Dream is one of success, home ownership, college education for one's children, and have a secure job to provide these and other goals.
Author: Leonard Boswell

Quote: Growing marijuana is like having a Pharmacy Farm, and of all the drugs, the ones from Mother Nature are the best.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I wondered if emotions were like menstrual cycles, if you get enough women together. Give it time, and everyone was crying.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: Kindness and a generous spirit go a long way. And a sense of humor. It's like medicine - very healing.
Author: Max Irons

Quote: I'm afraid that sometimes you'll play lonely games too. Games you can't win 'cause you'll play against you.
Author: Dr. Seuss

Quote: An eternity of wishing to speak directly to my Creator - I thought in despair - and this is how He finally contacts me? Through AOL Instant Messenger?
Author: A.M. Jenkins

Quote: Only God may be adored, because only God is unlimited goodness, truth, and beauty, and thus only God deserves unlimited love.
Author: Peter Kreeft

Quote: But the lover's power is the poet's power. He can make love from all the common strings with which this world is strung.
Author: Amelia Barr

Quote: No foreign policy - no matter how ingenious - has any chance of success if it is born in the minds of a few and carried in the hearts of none.
Author: Henry A. Kissinger

Quote: I think I got a lot of life skills; I got a lot of wisdom; I've seen a lot of bad things happen to a lot of good people.
Author: Young Jeezy

Quote: If you didn't remember something happening, was it because it never had happened? Or because you wished it hadn't?
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: I don't want to be put on a pedestal. I just want to be reasonably successful and live a normal life with all the conveniences to make it so.
Author: Althea Gibson

Quote: One measure of friendship consists not in the number of things friends can discuss, but in the number of things they need no longer mention.
Author: Clifton Fadiman

Quote: I'm old fashioned and think that reading books is the most glorious pastime that humankind has yet devised.
Author: Wisława Szymborska

Quote: The scent of honeysuckle on a Florida spring night always reminds me of her. The memories of us bloom yellow in my mind.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Happiness is your nature. It is not wrong to desire it. What is wrong is seeking it outside when it is inside.
Author: Ramana Maharshi

Quote: Existentialism's first move is to make every man aware of what he is and to make the full responsibility of his existence rest on him.
Author: Jean- Paul Sartre

Quote: There is but one good; that is God. Everything else is good when it looks to Him and bad when it turns from Him.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: Keep the faith. The vision is always for the appointed time. Be patient, prayerful and wait for the fulfillment of your visions.
Author: Lailah Gifty Akita

Quote: When we can find some humor in our upsets, they no longer seem as large or as important as they once did.
Author: Allen Klein

Quote: Accept yourself, your strengths, your weaknesses, your truths, and know what tools you have to fulfill your purpose.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: There is bound to be turbulence in the clouds of confusion before one can view the friendly skies, and an illuminated landing strip.
Author: T.F. Hodge
Origin: From Within I Rise: Spiritual Triumph Over Death and Conscious Encounters with "The Divine Presence"

Quote: I was in love one time, I said as I held up my pinky. I would have held up my index finger, but I wasn't in love that long.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: hope had become despair, protestors had become terrorists, love had become sex, music had become noise, and us had become me.
Author: Susan R. Sloan

Quote: Your words will either give you joy or give you sorrow, but if they were spoken without regret, they give you peace.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: I network like a salmon in a bear costume. Why swim upstream when the honeybee has all the flowers? Is anything more romantic than roses on a grave?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There is a line of poetry, a sentence in a fable, a word in an essay, by which my existence is justified; find that line, and immortality is assured.
Author: Alberto Manguel

Quote: All my music is inspirational. You just gotta listen to the words and get what you can get out of it.
Author: Young Jeezy

Quote: Reading the Bible will help you get to know the word, but it's when you put it down and live your life that you get to know the author.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: If you start by promising what you don't even have yet, you'll lose your desire to work towards getting it.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Sometimes it's not enough to know what things mean, sometimes you have to know what things don't mean.
Author: Bob Dylan

Quote: Madness is something rare in individuals - but in groups, parties, peoples, and ages, it is the rule.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: The past explains how I got here, but the future is up to me - and I love to live life at full throttle.
Author: Janice Dickinson

Quote: Someone I loved once gave me a box full of darkness. It took me years to understand that this too, was a gift.
Author: Mary Oliver

Quote: Faith is deliberate confidence in the character of God whose ways you may not understand at the time.
Author: Oswald Chambers

Quote: That's the duty of the old, to be anxious on behalf of the young. And the duty of the young is to scorn the anxiety of the old.
Author: Philip Pullman

Quote: Happiness is not a life without pain, but rather a life in which the pain is traded for a worthy price.
Author: Orson Scott Card
Origin: Pastwatch: The Redemption of Christopher Columbus

Quote: Don't live by my words, don't die by them, chew them slowly digest them, and smile if they give nourishment to your soul.
Author: Stanley Victor Paskavich

Quote: The day is ending. It's time for something that was beautiful to turn into something else that is beautiful. Now, Let go.
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert

Quote: We are the Bibles the world is reading; We are the creeds the world is needing; We are the sermons the world is heeding.
Author: Billy Graham

Quote: Optimists enrich the present, enhance the future, challenge the improbable and attain the impossible
Author: William Arthur Ward

Quote: There is one spectacle grander than the sea, that is the sky; there is one spectacle grander than the sky, that is the interior of the soul.
Author: Victor Hugo

Quote: People tend to criticize their spouse most loudly in the area where they themselves have the deepest emotional need.
Author: Gary Chapman
Origin: The Five Love Languages: How to Express Heartfelt Commitment to Your Mate

Quote: Words dazzle and deceive because they are mimed by the face. But black words on a white page are the soul laid bare.
Author: Guy de Maupassant

Quote: The Lord will fulfill his purpose for me; your love, O Lord, endures forever - do not abandon the works of your hands.
Author: Anonymous

Quote: I do want more. I am not content with being happy. I was not made for it. It is not my destiny. My destiny is the opposite.
Author: Hermann Hesse

Quote: There are few things more pathetic than those who have lost their curiosity and sense of adventure, and who no longer care to learn.
Author: Gordon B. Hinckley
Origin: Way to Be!: 9 Rules For Living the Good Life

Quote: Learn everything you can, anytime you can, from anyone you can, there will always come a time when you will be grateful you did.
Author: Sarah Caldwell

Quote: The greatest sweetener of human life is Friendship. To raise this to the highest pitch of enjoyment, is a secret which but few discover.
Author: Joseph Addison

Quote: No dumb bastard ever won a war by going out and dying for his country. He won it by making some other dumb bastard die for his country.
Author: George S. Patton Jr.

Quote: For love would be love of the wrong thing; there is yet faith, But the faith and the love and the hope are all in the waiting.
Author: T. S. Eliot

Quote: Success depends in a very large measure upon individual initiative and exertion, and cannot be achieved except by a dint of hard work.
Author: Anna Pavlova

Quote: This is not the end, this is not even the beginning of the end, this is just perhaps the end of the beginning.
Author: Winston S. Churchill

Quote: The moment you stop trying to become a better person, is the moment you start to become worse than what you already are.
Author: Carroll Bryant

Quote: Getting an education was a bit like a communicable sexual disease. It made you unsuitable for a lot of jobs and then you had the urge to pass it on.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: Being faithful in the smallest things is the way to gain, maintain, and demonstrate the strength needed to accomplish something great.
Author: Alex Harris

Quote: Instead of this confusion, we need the unifying force of an official language, English, which is the language of success in America.
Author: Ernest Istook

Quote: I am a believer in free will. If my dog chooses to hate the whole human race except myself, it must be free to do so.
Author: Diana Wynne Jones

Quote: The arts are an even better barometer of what is happening in our world than the stock market or the debates in congress.
Author: Hendrik Willem Van Loon

Quote: Finding a way to find humor in things that are hardcore is definitely something that, I think, the sitcom does best.
Author: Megyn Price

Quote: For in Paris, whenever God puts a pretty woman there (the streets), the Devil, in reply, immediately puts a fool to keep her.
Author: Jules Barbey d' Aurevilly

Quote: A raisin on the ground is full of hope that if it just keeps aging, it will turn into wine and get drunk on its wrinkly self.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A story to me means a plot where there is some surprise. Because that is how life is - full of surprises.
Author: Isaac Bashevis Singer

Quote: Roam abroad in the world, and take thy fill of its enjoyments before the day shall come when thou must quit it for good.
Author: Saadi

Quote: Your value lies not in status or title, but in the roots of your character and depth of your compassion.
Author: Mollie Marti

Quote: Humility is becoming a lost art, but it's not difficult to practice. It means that you realize that others have been involved in your success.
Author: Harvey Mackay

Quote: Even if things don't unfold the way you expected, don't be disheartened or give up. One who continues to advance will win in the end.
Author: Daisaku Ikeda

Quote: If you haven't confidence in self, you are twice defeated in the race of life. With confidence, you have won even before you have started.
Author: Marcus Garvey

Quote: Sparrows and cats will live in my shoe, Sooner than I will live with you. Fish will come walking out of the sea, Sooner than you will come back to me.
Author: Peter S. Beagle

Quote: I hope that I'm always struggling, really. You develop when you're struggling. When you're struggling, you get stronger.
Author: Andrew Garfield

Quote: When you re-read a classic you do not see in the book more than you did before. You see more in you than there was before.
Author: Clifton Fadiman

Quote: Her love stays with me wherever I go. That's because I have it on a leash, like a dog, and I take it for walks like I do with my pet wheelchair.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: And next time you're planning to injure yourself to get me attention, just remember that a little sweet talk works wonders.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: Everything is easier said than done. Wanting something is easy. Saying something is easy. The challenge and the reward are in the doing.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: When you gain higher consciousness, your consciousness becomes universal and you become ageless, endless, and universal.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: You were made perfectly to be loved - and surely I have loved you, in the idea of you, my whole life long.
Author: Elizabeth Barrett Browning

Quote: That is happiness; to be dissolved into something complete and great. When it comes to one, it comes as naturally as sleep.
Author: Willa Cather

Quote: In an age in which the media broadcast countless pieces of foolishness, the educated man is defined not by what he knows, but by what he doesn't know.
Author: Nicolás Gómez Dávila

Quote: An insincere and evil friend is more to be feared than a wild beast; a wild beast may wound your body, but an evil friend will wound your mind.
Author: Unknown

Quote: Real success is not on the stage, but off the stage as a human being, and how you get along with your fellow man.
Author: Sammy Davis

Quote: If Relativity Theory kills our deepest convictions, why not start by finding out why we believed in them for millennia?
Author: Felix Alba- Juez
Origin: Galloping with Light - Einstein, Relativity, and Folklore

Quote: I only seem negative to the fortunate. That's because I show the less fortunate that they aren't less fortunate after all.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Your attachment to unhealthy people and bad habits, which offer you no real control, is why you're spiritually dying and living a life out of balance.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: You know, life fractures us all into little pieces. It harms us, but it's how we glue those fractures back together that make us stronger.
Author: Carrie Jones

Quote: This is the team. We're trying to go to the moon. If you can't put someone up, please don't put them down.
Author: NASA

Quote: Never sit back and wait for a opportunity to find you, get up and search for one, it exists find it!
Author: Victoria Addino

Quote: I arose like a rose, and this is how I knew I was in love. In the garden of life, I'm better off in your neighbor's yard.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: It is very risky. But each time a child opens a book, he pushes open the gate that separates him from Elsewhere.
Author: Lois Lowry

Quote: I'm here to spread a message of hope. Follow your heart. Don't follow what you've been told you're supposed to do.
Author: J. Cole

Quote: The meaning of earthly existence lies not, as we have grown used to thinking, in prospering but in the development of the soul.
Author: Aleksandr Solzhenitsyn

Quote: Thou shalt not be a victim, thou shalt not be a perpetrator, but, above all, thou shalt not be a bystander.
Author: Yehuda Bauer

Quote: Epics are never written about libraries. They exist on whim; it depends on if the conquering army likes to read.
Author: Patricia A. McKillip

Quote: Go boldly and honestly through the world. Learn to love the fact that there is nobody else quite like you.
Author: Daniel Radcliffe

Quote: Friendship is unnecessary, like philosophy, like art.... It has no survival value; rather it is one of those things which give value to survival.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: I hope she'll be a fool -- that's the best thing a girl can be in this world, a beautiful little fool.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: Fantasy is a necessary ingredient in living, it's a way of looking at life through the wrong end of a telescope.
Author: Dr. Seuss

Quote: Two butterflies in two socks could walk faster than I can run. A love song will jog your memory like I jog like Roger Bannister in a wheelchair.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Honestly, Clary, if you don't start utilizing a bit of your natural feminine superiority I just don't know what I'll do with you.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: We shouldn't live as if [other worlds] mattered more than this life in this world, because where we are is always the most important place.
Author: Philip Pullman

Quote: Together we will build an America where hope is a new job with a paycheck, not a faded word on an old bumper sticker.
Author: Mitt Romney

Quote: Everyone gets dumped and everyone gets hurt and there's karma to love in regards to what you've done to other people.
Author: Marina and the Diamonds

Quote: My life is a monument to procrastination, to the art of putting things off until later, or much later, or possibly never.
Author: Craig Brown

Quote: Writing is like prostitution. First you do it for love, and then for a few close friends, and then for money.
Author: Molière

Quote: When someone is in your heart, they're never truly gone. They can come back to you, even at unlikely times.
Author: Mitch Albom

Quote: I'm all for all for one, especially when I'm the one. That's my philosophy when the dinner bill arrives at the table.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Positive belief in yourself will give you the energy needed to conquer the world and this belief is the power behind all creation.
Author: Stephen Richards
Origin: Think Your way to Success: Let Your Dreams Run Free

Quote: You are allowed to think whatever you want at Emory, so long as it is approved by administrators. They are watching.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: My pride shut me up, my hurt shut me down, and together they ganged up on my hope and let her get away.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: Life is too short to not have fun; we are only here for a short time compared to the sun and the moon and all that.
Author: Coolio

Quote: I loved how your cheeks had a natural rouge, like a delicate rose, and I was a rogue full of thorns. I was only a flower when I was with you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: All I want is a peaceful place where flowers can bloom, birds can sing, and the mind can fly with joy.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I was wasting my time, praying for love. For a love that never comes, from someone who does not exist.
Author: Morrissey

Quote: To not have any hope is where things start to get really bleak. Things are possible. The impossible can be possible.
Author: Sarah Paulson

Quote: Just because you are happy it does not mean that the day is perfect but that you have looked beyond its imperfections
Author: Bob Marley

Quote: It's amazing how close I have been, all this time, to my old life. And yet the distance that divides me from it is vast.
Author: Lauren Oliver

Quote: I am the archaeologist of love. I'm digging for the bones of a loved one I shot and buried decades ago.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: The wealthier I get, the more money I will have to not have, because my goal in getting is giving, and nothing is better than charity.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Celebrity doesn't have anything to do with art or craft. It's about being rich and thinking that you're better than everybody else.
Author: Joseph Gordon- Levitt

Quote: To one who has faith, no explanation is necessary. To one without faith, no explanation is possible.
Author: Thomas Aquinas

Quote: Yeah, I was thinking about taking one of those showers where you huddle in the corner fully clothed and cry, "Archer offered.
Author: Rachel Hawkins

Quote: I just like art. I get pure pleasure from it. I have a lot of wonderful paintings, and every time I look at them I see something different.
Author: Jack Nicholson

Quote: Most often people seek in life occasions for persisting in their opinions rather than for educating themselves.
Author: André Gide
Origin: Pretexts;: Reflections on literature and morality

Quote: I am shamelessly biased about the people in my life, and it makes sense to me that other people are the same.
Author: Akhil Sharma

Quote: We're constantly being told what other people think we are, and that's why it is so important to know yourself.
Author: Sarah McLachlan

Quote: I feel like I could be the best, but I'm not going to openly admit that. At least not to any of my clones.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: But when nothing in your life happens in a positive frame, it is difficult to think positively and hope for the best.
Author: Faraaz Kazi

Quote: I gave her a broken watch, to symbolize that my love for her is forever and timeless. And as an excuse to why I'm always late.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: I certainly hadn't expected to walk away from today's trip with joint custody of a miniature dragon.
Author: Richelle Mead

Quote: Don't waste your energy trying to change opinions ... Do your thing, and don't care if they like it.
Author: Tina Fey

Quote: my only complaints are two: that I didn't make myself ready for you sooner in life, that I can't give you better, Love you more.
Author: Jan Beatty

Quote: Men and women are not limited by the place of their birth, not by color of their skin, but by the size of their hope.
Author: John Johnson

Quote: It was a pity that people did not risk enough to speak out in behalf of one another's happiness and their own.
Author: Louis Zukofsky

Quote: I want that. I want that awful intense and serious unhappiness, cos then I might feel better, and then I might be happy.
Author: David Thewlis

Quote: I am not ashamed of the gospel, because it is the power of God for the salvation of everyone who believes: first for the Jew, then for the Gentile.
Author: Anonymous
Origin: Holy Bible: The New King James Version

Quote: When something undesirable grows in my soul, I ask God to give me the courage to mercilessly pluck it out.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: The real lover is the man who can thrill you by kissing your forehead or smiling into your eyes or just staring into space.
Author: Marilyn Monroe

Quote: Part of growing up is realizing you learn to love so many people. It's about forming those relationships and finding what will last forever.
Author: Dylan O'Brien

Quote: We fear men so much, because we fear God so little. One fear cures another. When man's terror scares you, turn your thoughts to the wrath of God.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: Every major question in history is a religious question. It has more effect in molding life than nationalism or a common language.
Author: Hilaire Belloc

Quote: Encouragement of higher education for our youth is critical to the success of our collective future.
Author: Charles B. Rangel

Quote: Death cannot stop true love. That's why it's pointless for me to try to murder all my adoring female fans.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: When you're screwing up and nobody says anything to you anymore, that means they've given up on you.
Author: Randy Pausch

Quote: I'm a romantic; a sentimental person thinks things will last, a romantic person hopes against hope that they won't.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: You need to love yourself and be yourself one hundred percent before you can actually love someone else.
Author: Christina Perri

Quote: Look back over the past, with its changing empires that rose and fell, and you can foresee the future too.
Author: Marcus Aurelius

Quote: There is no medicine like hope, no incentive so great, and no tonic so powerful as expectation of something tomorrow.
Author: Orison Swett Marden

Quote: Early on I set out to write the next Great American Novel, and then later on I set out the silverware and enjoyed my dinner in silence.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: The meeting of two personalities is like the contact of two chemical substances: if there is any reaction, both are transformed.
Author: C.G. Jung

Quote: Do you want to know what one of the secrets to achieving all of your goals is? You've got to be committed.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: And God is able to make all grace abound to you, so that in all things at all times, having all that you need, you will abound in every good work.
Author: Anonymous

Quote: I am a real person that cares about his art and cares about what he's doing - I have a heart and a soul and want to touch people and give.
Author: LL Cool J

Quote: I have made a ceaseless effort not to ridicule, not to bewail, not to scorn human actions, but to understand them.
Author: Baruch Spinoza

Quote: I see things, that's all. Write enough stories and every shadow on the floor looks like a footprint; every line in the dirt like a secret message.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: No matter how long you train someone to be brave, you never know if they are or not until something real happens.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: It's often just enough to be with someone. I don't need to touch them. Not even talk. A feeling passes between you both. You're not alone.
Author: Marilyn Monroe

Quote: Oh, man, if in real life I was as cool and suave as Coach Taylor and had all the answers, things would be easier.
Author: Kyle Chandler

Quote: Now you people have names. That's because you don't know who you are. We know who we are, so we don't need names.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: I know in my heart that man is good, that what is right will always eventually triumph, and there is purpose and worth to each and every life.
Author: Ronald Reagan

Quote: I don't know why it should be, I am sure; but the sight of another man asleep in bed when I am up, maddens me.
Author: Jerome K. Jerome

Quote: Only the development of compassion and understanding for others can bring us the tranquility and happiness we all seek.
Author: Dalai Lama XIV

Quote: Success soon palls. The joyous time is when the breeze first strikes your sails, and the waters rustle under your bows.
Author: Charles Buxton

Quote: If you would not be forgotten, as soon as you are dead and rotten, either write things worth reading, or do things worth writing.
Author: Benjamin Franklin

Quote: Every happening, great and small, is a parable whereby God speaks to us, and the art of life is to get the message.
Author: Malcolm Muggeridge

Quote: Love does not begin and end the way we seem to think it does. Love is a battle, love is a war; love is a growing up.
Author: James Baldwin

Quote: HUMAN BEINGS MAKE LIFE SO INTERESTING. DO YOU KNOW, THAT IN A UNIVERSE SO FULL OF WONDERS, THEY HAVE MANAGED TO INVENT BOREDOM. (Death)
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: Parents can only give good advice or put them on the right paths, but the final forming of a person's character lies in their own hands.
Author: Anne Frank

Quote: In a series of events, all of which had been a bit thick, this, in his opinion, achieved the maximum of thickness.
Author: P.G. Wodehouse

Quote: Religion is about turning untested belief into unshakable truth through the power of institutions and the passage of time.
Author: Richard Dawkins

Quote: The Federal Government pushing drugs and then punishing marijuana growers is like the pot calling the kettle green.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Pain and suffering are always inevitable for a large intelligence and a deep heart. The really great men must, I think, have great sadness on earth.
Author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

Quote: In a world where death is the hunter, my friend, there is no time for regrets or doubts. There is only time for decisions.
Author: Carlos Castaneda

Quote: What do we any of us have but our illusions? And what do we ask of others but that we be allowed to keep them?
Author: W. Somerset Maugham

Quote: Spread kindness, caring, and compassion and create your own paradise. Infuse it with joy and you've created heaven on earth.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: I did not direct my life. I didn't design it. I never made decisions. Things always came up and made them for me. That's what life is.
Author: B. F. Skinner

Quote: Most people think happiness is about gaining something, but it's not. It's all about getting rid of the darkness you accumulate.
Author: Carolyn Crane

Quote: If it's a penny for your thoughts and you put in your two cents worth, then someone, somewhere is making a penny.
Author: Steven Wright

Quote: And books, they offer one hope -- that a whole universe might open up from between the covers, and falling into that universe, one is saved.
Author: Anne Rice

Quote: She moved like water, graceful and soft and lovely. Every part of me wanted to stick out my foot and trip her, just to see her stumble.
Author: Cassandra Rose Clarke

Quote: Sometimes you have to be apart from people you love, but that doesn't make you love them any less. Sometimes you love them more.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: I believe we can accelerate our acumen, performance and success by leveraging our associations and spending time with people better than us.
Author: Robin S. Sharma

Quote: Ah, happiness courts the light so we deem the world is gay. But misery hides aloof so we deem that misery there is none.
Author: Herman Melville

Quote: No man who worships education has got the best out of education... Without a gentle contempt for education no man's education is complete.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: If you work just for money, you'll never make it, but if you love what you're doing and you always put the customer first, success will be yours.
Author: Ray Kroc

Quote: Without art, we should have no notion of the sacred; without science, we should always worship false gods.
Author: W.H. Auden

Quote: Write to your heart's content and by all means, have fun with your creation. It's your moment to do absolutely anything within those pages.
Author: Jennifer Murgia

Quote: Our only real hope for democracy is that we get the money out of politics entirely and establish a system of publicly funded elections.
Author: Noam Chomsky

Quote: Being Jewish is a big part of my artistic sensibility and my humor... I think it gives me a certain take on the world on a literary level.
Author: Adam Mansbach

Quote: Success is not determined by the outcome. The outcome is the result of having already decided that you are successful to begin with.
Author: T.F. Hodge
Origin: From Within I Rise: Spiritual Triumph Over Death and Conscious Encounters with "The Divine Presence"

Quote: Again and again I will suffer; again and again I will get back on my feet. I will not be defeated. I won't let my spirit be destroyed.
Author: Banana Yoshimoto

Quote: Learning and innovation go hand in hand. The arrogance of success is to think that what you did yesterday will be sufficient for tomorrow.
Author: William Pollard

Quote: Darkness cannot drive out darkness: only light can do that. Hate cannot drive out hate: only love can do that.
Author: Martin Luther King Jr.
Origin: A Testament of Hope: The Essential Writings and Speeches

Quote: You're going to burn in a very special level of hell. A level they reserve for child molesters and people who talk at the theater.
Author: Joss Whedon

Quote: I'm a happy person. If you want to be around me, you can either choose to be happy too, or follow the signs to the nearest exit!
Author: Sharon Swan

Quote: A book is a garden, an orchard, a storehouse, a party, a company by the way, a counselor, a multitude of counselors.
Author: Charles Baudelaire

Quote: Give up to grace. The ocean takes care of each wave 'til it gets to shore. You need more help than you know.
Author: Rumi
Origin: Words of Paradise: Selected Poems of Rumi

Quote: As the essence of courage is to stake one's life on a possibility, so the essence of faith is to believe the possibility exists.
Author: William Salter

Quote: I won't put my ignorance on an altar and call it God. It feels like idolatry, like the worst kind of idolatry.
Author: Robert Charles Wilson

Quote: But it is impossible to go through life without trust; that is to be imprisoned in the worst cell of all, oneself.
Author: Graham Greene

Quote: I define myself and grow as a person through emotional torment, so if you love me, you will inflict as much pain on me as you possibly can.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Story That Talks about Talking Is Like Chatter to Chattering Teeth, and Every Set of Dentures Can Attest to the Fact That No..

Quote: I would rather entertain and hope that people learned something than educate people and hope they were entertained
Author: Walt Disney Company

Quote: And now here is my secret, a very simple secret: It is only with the heart that one can see rightly; what is essential is invisible to the eye.
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: Let the refining and improving of your own life keep you so busy that you have little time to criticize others.
Author: H. Jackson Brown

Quote: New knowledge is the most valuable commodity on earth. The more truth we have to work with, the richer we become.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: I listened as the words became sentences and the sentences became pages and the pages became feelings and voices and places and people.
Author: Jennifer Donnelly

Quote: Hydrogenated and androgynous milky white love is all I have to offer you. Would you like me to pour it in your coffee, or directly into your soul?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: If you try and take a cat apart to see how it works, the first thing you have on your hands is a non-working cat.
Author: Douglas Adams

Quote: Each man lives in many worlds within different life. Mind can only see world in which it lived and located.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: My Ancestor Was an Ancient Astronaut

Quote: Read a good book every day. Books help to educate the soul. The mere joy of learning something new will instill the will to live in you.
Author: Sanchita Pandey

Quote: No difference, good or bad. Thoughts like birds in mind. Some fly in. Some fly out. Some stay at water hole to drink. Beware of birds that linger.
Author: Natalie Wright

Quote: It took me fifteen years to discover that I had no talent for writing, but I couldn't give it up because by that time I was too famous.
Author: Robert Benchley

Quote: Life is but a momentary glimpse of the wonder of this astonishing universe, and it is sad to see so many dreaming it away on spiritual fantasy.
Author: Andy Mulcahy

Quote: Let me never fall into the vulgar mistake of dreaming that I am persecuted whenever I am contradicted.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: Together kabobs make the world better than all the Bobs combined. Well, at least ever since Bob Ross moved on to the land of the happy trees.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: You might not understand, but I gave you the best of me, and after you left, nothing was ever the same.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: How beautiful it is to have inner peace while knowing that everyone is busy with their own battles in life.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: A wise person is silent and rarely wants to show his wisdom. A fool is always vocal and uses every opportunity to show his foolishness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Never let the future disturb you. You will meet it, if you have to, with the same weapons of reason which today arm you against the present.
Author: Marcus Aurelius

Quote: Any book that helps a child to form a habit of reading, to make reading one of his deep and continuing needs, is good for him.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: And, as always happens, and happens far too soon, the strange and wonderful becomes a memory and a memory becomes a dream. Tomorrow it's gone.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: He'd had his career, his triumphs. Success had brought him nothing but misery; he couldn't handle it. Success had thrown him in the gutter
Author: John Grisham

Quote: If you want to continue to be the best in the world, then you have to train and compete like you are second best in the world.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: Thank heaven for people who are satisfied with facts that conform to the reality they wish to believe.
Author: Gary Inbinder

Quote: Hope in the beginning feels like such a violation of the loss, and yet without it we couldn't survive.
Author: Gail Caldwell
Origin: Let's Take the Long Way Home: A Memoir of Friendship

Quote: Ideas were found by the freethinker, expressed by poet with the new words, formulated by scholar into knowledge.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: My Ancestor Was an Ancient Astronaut

Quote: Extraordinary afflictions are not always the punishment of extraordinary sins, but sometimes the trial of extraordinary graces.
Author: Matthew Henry
Origin: Matthew Henry's Commentary on the Whole Bible

Quote: We may run, walk, stumble. drive, or fly, but let us never lose sight of the reason for the journey, or miss a chance to see a rainbow on the way.
Author: Gloria Gaither

Quote: It is not what he has, nor even what he does, which directly expresses the worth of a man, but what he is.
Author: Henri- Frédéric Amiel

Quote: Me with nothing left to lose, plotting my big revenge in the spotlight. Give me violent revenge fantasies as a coping mechanism.
Author: Chuck Palahniuk

Quote: I challenge anyone to understand Islam, its spirit, and not to love it. It is a beautiful religion of brotherhood and devotion.
Author: Yann Martel

Quote: A real decision is measured by the fact that you've taken a new action. If there's no action, you haven't truly decided.
Author: Tony Robbins

Quote: When you have eliminated all which is impossible, then whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth.
Author: Arthur Conan Doyle
Origin: The Case- Book of Sherlock Holmes

Quote: I'm not waiting until my hair turns white to become patient and wise. Nope, I'm dyeing my hair tonight.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When you are able to fill your mind with tranquility and inner peace, this world becomes very peaceful.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: You can't live your life for other people. You've got to do what's right for you, even if it hurts some people you love.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: There is no short cut to achievement. Life requires thorough preparation - veneer isn't worth anything.
Author: George Washington Carver

Quote: He was contemplation and enthusiasm. Ambition and strong coffee. I could have looked at him forever.
Author: E. Lockhart

Quote: She said she'd love me forever. That was two days ago, so I should probably ask her again if she still feels the same way.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: By looking far out into space we are also looking far back into time, back toward the horizon of the universe, back toward the epoch of the Big Bang.
Author: Carl Sagan

Quote: Getting rid of poverty is not about making the rich more aware: it's about educating the poor and empowering them from within.
Author: Joseph Rain

Quote: To put yourself in another's place requires real imagination, but by doing so each Girl Scout will be able to love among others happily.
Author: Juliette Gordon Low

Quote: When you are convinced that everything that happens is the will of God, what is there to do but wait until God has mercy?
Author: Maaza Mengiste

Quote: Give a bowl of rice to a man and you will feed him for a day. Teach him how to grow his own rice and you will save his life.
Author: Confucius

Quote: A real writer learns from earlier writers the way a boy learns from an apple orchard -- by stealing what he has a taste for, and can carry off
Author: Archibald MacLeish

Quote: Are we so made that we have to take death in small doses daily or we could not go on with the business of living?
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: You've got to work hard for your success and you've got to have a steady presence. That's the secret.
Author: Kid Rock

Quote: When you trip over love, it is easy to get up. But when you fall in love, it is impossible to stand again.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: Life would be infinitely happier if we could only be born at the age of eighty and gradually approach eighteen.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: Almost all of our sorrows spring out of our relations with other people. There is no more mistaken path to happiness than worldliness.
Author: Arthur Schopenhauer

Quote: We follow the codes not because they bring gain, but because we loathe the people we would otherwise become.
Author: Brandon Sanderson

Quote: If you accept the expectations of others, especially negative ones, then you never will change the outcome.
Author: Michael Jordan

Quote: All religions are equally sublime to the ignorant, useful to the politician, and ridiculous to the philosopher.
Author: Titus Lucretius Carus
Origin: On the Nature of Things: de Rerum Natura

Quote: I'm sorry for my inability to let unimportant things go, for my inability to hold on to the important things.
Author: Jonathan Safran Foer

Quote: I never considered a difference of opinion in politics, in religion, in philosophy, as cause for withdrawing from a friend.
Author: Thomas Jefferson

Quote: If you spend your life sparing people's feelings and feeding their vanity, you get so you can't distinguish what should be respected in them.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
Origin: Tender is the Night & The Last Tycoon

Quote: One does not surrender a life in an instant. That which is lifelong can only be surrendered in a lifetime.
Author: Elisabeth Elliot

Quote: I hope that my story, I hope that my life is... an encouragement for people, especially in Brooklyn. I feel humbled and blessed.
Author: Iyanla Vanzant

Quote: It would be fun to do a reunion show. I hope we do it some day, but it better be soon. We're all getting on.
Author: William Christopher

Quote: To ugly ducklings everywhere, Don't worry about those fluffy yellow morons: They'll never get to be swans
Author: Zoë Marriott

Quote: Some days you get the bear, some days the bear gets you, and some days you cannot even find the woods.
Author: MariJo Moore

Quote: You naked in my bed is even more unbelievably beautiful than I thought it would be... and trust me I've thought about it. A lot.
Author: Abbi Glines

Quote: And maybe that was love. Being so vulnerable and allowing someone else in so far they could hurt you, but they also give you everything.
Author: Christine Feehan

Quote: The compensation of a very early success is a conviction that life is a romantic matter. In the best sense one stays young.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: Happiness,... even the smallest happiness, is like a step out of Time, and the greatest happiness is sharing in Eternity.
Author: Josef Pieper

Quote: Life was meant to be lived, and curiosity must be kept alive. One must never, for whatever reason, turn his back on life.
Author: Eleanor Roosevelt

Quote: I've been pleased to work with so many wonderful stars through the years. This has been an amazing journey. I hope it continues.
Author: Keanu Reeves

Quote: Whenever I've had success, I never learn from it. Success usually breeds a degree of hubris. When you fail, that's when you learn.
Author: Moby

Quote: We are all here to be a service to those who can't be a service to themselves. We can give people hope and more reasons for being human.
Author: Dionne Warwick

Quote: I like people too much or not at all. I've got to go down deep, to fall into people, to really know them.
Author: Sylvia Plath
Origin: The Unabridged Journals of Sylvia Plath

Quote: In old days books were written by men of letters and read by the public. Nowadays books are written by the public and read by nobody.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Whether you come from a council estate or a country estate, your success will be determined by your own confidence and fortitude.
Author: Michelle Obama

Quote: I arise in the morning torn between a desire to improve the world and a desire to enjoy the world. This makes it hard to plan the day.
Author: E. B. White

Quote: Ignorance, when voluntary, is criminal, and a man may be properly charged with that evil which he neglected or refused to learn how to prevent.
Author: Samuel Johnson
Origin: The History of Rasselas, Prince of Abissinia

Quote: Never forget the three powerful resources you always have available to you: love, prayer, and forgiveness.
Author: H. Jackson Brown

Quote: All these years of thinking, ending up like this: In front of all this beauty, understanding nothing.
Author: Bruce Cockburn

Quote: Let me rephrase." He took a seething step toward me. "When it comes to you... I don't like to share.
Author: Samantha Young

Quote: MS. THOMPSON, it said in heavy block letters, PLEASE KEEP YOUR FELINE OFF MY PROPERTY. IF I SEE IT AGAIN, I WILL EAT IT.
Author: Patricia Briggs

Quote: When you loathe yourself, a true friend will respect your honesty. And if you've been fortunate in life, he will probably share your opinion.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: Failures, repeated failures, are finger posts on the road to achievement. One fails forward toward success.
Author: C. S. Lewis

Quote: Many people come to reinvention when life changes around them, but people come in all different stripes. I'm oriented to change.
Author: Jane Pauley

Quote: To play safe, I prefer to accept only one type of power: the power of art over trash, the triumph of magic over the brute.
Author: Vladimir Nabokov

Quote: To find out what one is fitted to do, and to secure an opportunity to do it, is the key to happiness.
Author: John Dewey

Quote: If Christ taught us anything it is this -- not to let our fear of death keep us from doing the good thing.
Author: Robert Fanney

Quote: And the truth must finally lie in that which every oppressed individual feels within himself but hasn't the courage to express
Author: Wilhelm Reich

Quote: You are beautiful. Your beauty, just like your capacity for life, happiness, and success, is immeasurable.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: Success comes from knowing that you did your best to become the best that you are capable of becoming.
Author: John Wooden

Quote: But the you who you are tonight is the same you I was in love with yesterday, the same you I'll be in love with tomorrow.
Author: Gayle Forman

Quote: We must not lose hope. Hope is an anchor to the souls of men. Satan would have us cast away that anchor.
Author: Ezra Taft Benson

Quote: You will recognize your own path when you come upon it because you will suddenly have all the energy and imagination you will ever need.
Author: Sara Teasdale

Quote: I love you because I love you, and if you don't like it you can use my circular logic as a noose and hang yourself.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Do you know what breakfast cereal is made of? It's made of all those little curly wooden shavings you find in pencil sharpeners!
Author: Roald Dahl

Quote: Maybe if we stopped trying to achieve movie standards of greatness, we'd be happy with what we have.
Author: Amber L. Johnson

Quote: The ideals which have always shone before me and filled me with joy are goodness, beauty, and truth.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: I'm the most important person in the lives of almost everyone I know and a good number of the people I've never even met.
Author: David Sedaris

Quote: No single event can awaken within us a stranger whose existence we had never suspected. To live is to be slowly born.
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: I have stretched ropes from steeple to steeple; Garlands from window to window; Golden chains from star to star ... And I dance.
Author: Arthur Rimbaud

Quote: Happiness is something you lay siege to, it is a battle like a game of go. I will take hold of all the pain and snuff it out.
Author: Shan Sa

Quote: Your dreams will come true, but do not be overly demanding. Be logical - there are not enough mansions for everyone in the world, are there?
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: Sometimes when I'm talking, my words can't keep up with my thoughts. I wonder why we think faster than we speak. Probably so we can think twice.
Author: Bill Watterson

Quote: Because you have to just go with the flow. Your life is not your own, with people coming in and out all the time. You get mellow because you have to.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: When I dance, I'm so fluid you could drink my moves. And if you sip it with your morning coffee, you'll be light on your feet all day.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I want to kidnap kids and force them to take useless tests all day long. Wait, that's what our public education system already does.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Seriously delirious, but not at all serious

Quote: What she had long believed was not true, and now the world was wide open to discover what was. It is like all my life I thought the sky was green.
Author: Shannon Hale

Quote: That's the whole problem with science. You've got a bunch of empiricists trying to describe things of unimaginable wonder.
Author: Bill Watterson

Quote: Stop just cheering for others who are living their visions. Commit yourself to your own success and follow the steps required to achieve it.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: Was it animal pee or human pee? Someone asked. How would I know? What, am I an expert in the study of pee?
Author: John Green

Quote: An ocean of shimmering love exists in your heart. Tap into it today and rest in the undulating currents of the great mystery.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: Suffering is due to our disconnection with the inner soul. Meditation is establishing that connection.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: We are drowning in information but starving for knowledge and wisdom. Education ought to teach us not only how to make a living but also how to live.
Author: Shiv Khera
Origin: You Can Win: A Step by Step Tool for Top Achievers

Quote: If I were splat proof, I wouldn't be afraid of heights. Also, I wish I had a bouncy ball for a heart, so I could love fearlessly.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: From the moment of my birth, I lived with pain at the center of my life. My only purpose in life was to find a way to coexist with intense pain.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: Don't part with your illusions. When they are gone you may still exist, but you have ceased to live.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: We fell in love like two medium pizzas in one large stomach. I wish dad would have saved a few slices for us.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: If she spoke, she would tell him the truth: she was not okay at all, but horribly empty, now that she knew what it was like to be filled.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Smiling is definitely one of the best beauty remedies. If you have a good sense of humor and a good approach to life, that's beautiful.
Author: Rashida Jones

Quote: Too much action with too little intent makes for wasteful exertion of energy and the confusion between movement and progress.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: It's a wonderful world. You can't go backwards. You're always moving forward. It's the wonderful part about life. And that's terrific.
Author: Harvey Fierstein

Quote: What strikes me is that there's a very fine line between success and failure. Just one ingredient can make the difference.
Author: Andrew Lloyd Webber

Quote: It is art that makes life, makes interest, makes importance... and I know of no substitute whatever for the force and beauty of its process.
Author: Henry James

Quote: We were given the Scriptures to humble us into realizing that God is right, and the rest of us are just guessing.
Author: Rich Mullins

Quote: Many people succeed when others do not believe in them. But rarely does a person succeed when he does not believe in himself.
Author: Herb True

Quote: I can't imagine a romance novel published today where the hero rapes the heroine and she falls in love with him.
Author: Julia Quinn

Quote: Happiness is spiritual, born of truth and love. It is unselfish; therefore it cannot exist alone, but requires all mankind to share it.
Author: Mary Baker Eddy

Quote: Hard is trying to rebuild yourself, piece by piece, with no instruction book, and no clue as to where all the important bits are supposed to go.
Author: Nick Hornby

Quote: I suppose it is tempting, if the only tool you have is a hammer, to treat everything as if it were a nail.
Author: Abraham Maslow

Quote: The world is moving so fast these days that the man who says it can't be done is generally interrupted by someone doing it.
Author: Elbert Hubbard

Quote: By reading the writings of the most interesting minds in history, we meditate with our own minds and theirs as well. This is to me is a miracle.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: You can close your eyes to the things you don't want to see, but you can't close your heart to the things you don't want to feel.
Author: Jonny Depp

Quote: To be capable of steady friendship or lasting love, are the two greatest proofs, not only of goodness of heart, but of strength of mind.
Author: William Hazlitt

Quote: There are only two kinds of people who are really fascinating: people who know absolutely everything, and people who know absolutely nothing.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Everything is funnier in retrospect, funnier and prettier and cooler. You can laugh at anything from far enough away.
Author: Chuck Palahniuk

Quote: while the scientist sees everything that happens in one point of space, the poet feels everything that happens in one point of time.
Author: Vladimir Nabokov

Quote: Only bad books have good endings. If a book is any good, it's ending is always bad - because you don't want the book to end.
Author: Pseudonymous Bosch
Origin: The Name of This Book Is Secret

Quote: I believe in equality. Equality for everybody. No matter how stupid they are or how superior I am to them.
Author: Steve Martin

Quote: My favorite kind of humor is basically, if it was happening to you, it wouldn't be funny, but to observe it, it's hilarious.
Author: Bill Burr

Quote: Why is it that words like these seem dull and cold? Is it because there is no word tender enough to be your name?
Author: James Joyce

Quote: When I was growing up we didn't have a massive house and there were five women running around, so my dad and I had to stick together!
Author: Louis Tomlinson
Origin: Dare to Dream: Life as One Direction

Quote: The seed of suffering in you may be strong, but don't wait until you have no more suffering before allowing yourself to be happy.
Author: Hanh Nhat Thich
Origin: The Heart of the Buddha's Teaching: Transforming Suffering into Peace, Joy, and Liberation

Quote: Discourse on virtue and they pass by in droves. Whistle and dance and shimmy, and you've got an audience!
Author: Diogenes Laërtius

Quote: Give a man a fire and he's warm for a day, but set fire to him and he's warm for the rest of his life.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: Think of the patience God has had for you and let it resonate to others. If you want a more patient world, let patience be your motto
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: The difficulties and challenges in your life are the lessons you need to learn to grow and development.
Author: Avis J. Williams

Quote: This above all: to thine own self be true, And it must follow, as the night the day, Thou canst not then be false to any man.
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: I can't understand why people use religion to hurt each other when there's already so much pain in the world.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: We don't read and write poetry because it's cute. We read and write poetry because we are members of the human race.
Author: Tom Schulman

Quote: It is our art that has an opportunity to leave a footprint in the sand. They don't wrap fish in our work.
Author: Hugh Newell Jacobsen

Quote: I don't really like coffee, she said, but I don't really like it when my head hits my desk when I fall asleep either.
Author: Brian Andreas

Quote: I'd rather fake my own fog, than fake a steamy love scene. Can I interest you in some mist? It's homemade.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the best book I've ever written, and it still sucks

Quote: Our great human adventure is the evolution of consciousness. We are in this life to enlarge the soul, liberate the spirit, and light up the brain.
Author: Tom Robbins

Quote: I don't know what I'll do until I know what you'll do. I'm proactive with my preemptive reactive strategy.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Start telling the story of your amazing life, and the law of attraction must make sure you receive it!
Author: Rhonda Byrne

Quote: But neither infinite power nor infinite wisdom could bestow godhood upon men. For that there would have to be infinite love as well.
Author: Walter M. Miller Jr.

Quote: No one can construct for you the bridge upon which precisely you must cross the stream of life, no one but you yourself alone.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: Learning is not attained by chance, it must be sought for with ardor and attended to with diligence.
Author: Abigail Adams

Quote: You have a choice in this world, I believe, about how to tell sad stories, and we made the funny choice.
Author: John Green

Quote: I know it's not easy for you, living this life, but try to remember, always try to remember, you're not the only one with troubles.
Author: Laini Taylor

Quote: Life is short. If you doubt me, ask a butterfly. Their average life span is a mere five to fourteen days.
Author: Ellen DeGeneres

Quote: Whenever you have taken up work in hand, you must see it to the finish. That is the ultimate secret of success. Never, never, never give up!
Author: Dada Vaswani

Quote: The government will see that human spaceflight is useful - for science and the economy - and inspirational.
Author: Helen Sharman

Quote: ... what you learn today, for no reason at all, will help you discover all the wonderful secrets of tomorrow.
Author: Norton Juster

Quote: Very often we write down a sentence too early, then another too late; what we have to do is write it down at the proper time, otherwise it's lost.
Author: Thomas Bernhard

Quote: That's how you know you love someone, I guess, when you can't experience anything without wishing the other person were there to see it, too.
Author: Kaui Hart Hemmings

Quote: I think it all comes down to motivation. If you really want to do something, you will work hard for it.
Author: Edmund Hillary

Quote: Dance on the stage of life with love in your heart, a smile on your face, and a great vision in your mind.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: How wrong is it for a woman to expect the man to build the world she wants, rather than to create it herself?
Author: Anaïs Nin

Quote: Usually my form of turning someone down was shoving a stake through his heart while smirking, Gotcha!
Author: Jeaniene Frost

Quote: I want to see beauty. In the ugly, in the sink, in the suffering, in the daily, in all the days before I die, the moments before I sleep.
Author: Ann Voskamp
Origin: One Thousand Gifts: A Dare to Live Fully Right Where You Are

Quote: This place is a dream. Only a sleeper considers it real. Then death comes like dawn, and you wake up laughing at what you thought was your grief.
Author: Rumi

Quote: Of all sports, wrestling is the most like cuddling. I'm all sweaty because I'm training hard to show her how much I love her.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We are born in one day. We die in one day. We can change in one day. And we can fall in love in one day. Anything can happen in just one day.
Author: Gayle Forman

Quote: If you really want to be happy, don't just go for the money. Go for the relationship that lasts. Go for things of greater value.
Author: Tony Meloto (Your First Job by: N. Dy)

Quote: By the time you swear you're his, Shivering and sighing. And he vows his passion is, Infinite, undying. Lady make note of this --One of you is lying.
Author: Dorothy Parker

Quote: Architecture is not an inspirational business, it's a rational procedure to do sensible and hopefully beautiful things; that's all.
Author: Harry Seidler

Quote: I may not know you, but I don't see any difference between you and me. I see myself in you; we are one.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: To many people, free will is a license to rebel not against what is unjust or hard in life but against what is best for them and true.
Author: Dean Koontz
Origin: The Darkest Evening of the Year

Quote: The pessimist complains about the wind; the optimist expects it to change; the realist adjusts the sails.
Author: William Arthur Ward

Quote: Most men fear getting laughed at or humiliated by a romantic prospect while most women fear rape and death.
Author: Gavin de Becker
Origin: The Gift of Fear: Survival Signals That Protect Us from Violence

Quote: School has become the world religion of a modernized proletariat, and makes futile promises of salvation to the poor of the technological age.
Author: Ivan Illich

Quote: If you are allergic to a thing, it is best not to put that thing in your mouth, particularly if the thing is cats.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: I have a Rubik's Cube for a heart, and my love for you is no puzzle. Through twists and spins, life can only get more colorful.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A romantic man often feels more uplifted with two women than with one: his love seems to hit the ideal mark somewhere between two different faces.
Author: Elizabeth Bowen

Quote: A lot of people don't have near the amount of success as I've been blessed to have, and it's all about working hard and hoping that continues.
Author: Luke Bryan

Quote: When defeat comes, accept it as a signal that your plans are not sound, rebuild those plans, and set sail once more toward your coveted goal.
Author: Napoleon Hill

Quote: For I have learned to look on nature, not as in the hour of thoughtless youth; but hearing oftentimes the still, sad music of humanity.
Author: William Wordsworth
Origin: Lines Composed a Few Miles Above Tintern Abbey

Quote: I can choose either to be a victim of the world or an adventurer in search of treasure. It's all a question of how I view my life.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: I bet there are a lot of women out there who want to sleep with a guy who reads. And being the head of the reading foundation, I'm very well endowed.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: Our every thought reflects our level of awareness, consciousness, and love for this amazing world that we call home.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: My mother's from Thailand, and they're very strict about girls in bikinis, but I would love to do a shoot in the floating market in Thailand.
Author: Christine Teigen

Quote: Although my memory's fading, I remember two things very clearly: I am a great sinner and Christ is a great Savior.
Author: John Newton

Quote: There are no conditions to which a person cannot grow accustomed, especially if he sees that everyone around him lives in the same way.
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: One has a greater sense of intellectual degradation after an interview with a doctor than from any human experience.
Author: Alice James

Quote: A writing may be lost; a lie may be written; but what the eye has seen is truth and remains in the mind!
Author: Joseph Conrad

Quote: An ocean traveler has even more vividly the impression that the ocean is made of waves than that it is made of water.
Author: Arthur Stanley Eddington

Quote: Believe it is possible to solve your problem. Tremendous things happen to the believer. So believe the answer will come. It will.
Author: Norman Vincent Peale

Quote: You don't love a girl because of beauty. You love her because she sings a song only you can understand.
Author: L.J. Smith

Quote: To do the useful thing, to say the courageous thing, to contemplate the beautiful thing: that is enough for one man's life.
Author: T.S. Eliot
Origin: The Use of Poetry and the Use of Criticism

Quote: You can love a person dear to you with a human love, but an enemy can only be loved with divine love.
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: She had not made a decision to give up sex, only the clamor of romance, because it was exhausting her, doing her no good and too much harm...
Author: Michelle Herman

Quote: Return something not for the possibility of a reward, but for the joy of giving a gift which you did not have to pay for.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Foolish men always believe that a little knowledge will give them control over the world, but it is no more than a display of their vanity.
Author: J. P. Vinluca

Quote: I know she is going on vacation, so I knitted her a sweater. It matches the bathing suit I knitted her, and it's as revealing as my feelings for her.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The education of all children, from the moment that they can get along without a mother's care, shall be in state institutions.
Author: Karl Marx

Quote: The trick is in what one emphasizes. We either make ourselves miserable, or we make ourselves happy. The amount of work is the same.
Author: Carlos Castaneda

Quote: You're Valentine's son. I'm sure you're the one the Queen really wants to see. Besides, you're charming. Maybe not at the moment.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: Differences are not intended to separate, to alienate. We are different precisely in order to realize our need of one another.
Author: Desmond Tutu

Quote: I didn't think that anything is beyond humor - not profane humor, but a good, honest approach to humor.
Author: Mort Sahl

Quote: To be running breathlessly, but not yet arrived, is itself delightful, a suspended moment of living hope.
Author: Anne Carson

Quote: We study biology, physics, movements of glaciers... Where are the classes on envy, feeling wronged, despair, bitterness...
Author: Alain de Botton

Quote: That's all a man can hope for during his lifetime - to set an example - and when he is dead, to be an inspiration for history.
Author: William McKinley

Quote: It's been the structure of my life: you scheme and plan and try and fail and try again and accumulate and lose and win back, and then you tell.
Author: Jerry Weintraub

Quote: She looked away. Her attitude seemed to suggest that she had finished with him, and would be obliged if somebody would come and sweep him up.
Author: P.G. Wodehouse

Quote: So I find words I never thought to speak. In streets I never thought I should revisit. When I left my body on a distant shore.
Author: T.S. Eliot

Quote: ... just as food is necessary to the life of the body, so good reading is necessary to the life of the soul.
Author: Pope John XXIII

Quote: You can retire from a job, but don't ever retire from making extremely meaningful contributions in life.
Author: Stephen Covey

Quote: Death isn't peaceful; it is just nothing. Everything is gone. No more sunrises, no more hopes, no more fears. Nothing.
Author: Linda Howard

Quote: I remember watching it all and getting the tickling in my chest and thinking to myself: This is what happiness feels like.
Author: Gayle Forman

Quote: He attacked everything in life with a mix of extraordinary genius and naive incompetence, and it was often difficult to tell which was which.
Author: Douglas Adams

Quote: Imagination is the voice of daring. If there is anything godlike about God, it is that. He dared to imagine everything
Author: Henry Miller

Quote: I wanted to have premarital sex with a midget, but I was afraid the ringmaster would banish me for unlawful carnival knowledge.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: I'm not a warrior or a goddess," I said at last. Adrian leaned closer. "As far as I'm concerned, you're both.
Author: Richelle Mead

Quote: Someday you'll find someone special again. People who've been in love once usually do. It's in their nature.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: Your beliefs will be the light by which you see, but they will not be what you see and they will not be a substitute for seeing.
Author: Flannery O'Connor

Quote: He said he wanted to trade lives with me, saying he wanted what I have. He must want for nothing, because that's exactly what I have.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: And if there were a God, I think it very unlikely that He would have such an uneasy vanity as to be offended by those who doubt His existence
Author: Bertrand Russell

Quote: ... millions long for immortality who don't know what to do with themselves on a rainy Sunday afternoon.
Author: Susan Ertz

Quote: In order to write the book you want to write, in the end you have to become the person you need to become to write that book.
Author: Junot Díaz

Quote: Nurturing a feeling makes it proliferate. Choose wisely. Joy, kindness, love, & caring will illuminate your life.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: I'm not in this world to live up to your expectations and you're not in this world to live up to mine.
Author: Bruce Lee

Quote: A real decision is measured by the fact that you've taken a new action. If there's no action, you haven't truly decided.
Author: Anthony Robbins
Origin: Unlimited Power: The New Science Of Personal Achievement

Quote: I take thee at thy word: Call me but love, and I'll be new baptized; Henceforth I never will be Romeo.
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: From now on, I'm not doing anything I don't want to do! The world owes me happiness, fulfillment and success.... I'm just here to cash in.
Author: Bill Watterson

Quote: When I was growing up I always wanted to be someone. Now I realize I should have been more specific.
Author: Lily Tomlin

Quote: Courage is living by the free will that one creates for themselves, not the life of monotony determined by another.
Author: Michelle Cruz- Rosado

Quote: What is wonderful about great literature is that it transforms the man who reads it towards the condition of the man who wrote.
Author: E.M. Forster

Quote: The building of friendship, family, community and love is complicated. We are so isolated in this country, no longer supported by tribes and villages.
Author: Jasmine Guy

Quote: I love tables. And dancing. Oh, and I love table dancing, although Grandmother always says, "Wait until we're finished eating.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: There are Two Typos of People in This World: Those Who Can Edit and Those Who Can't

Quote: Your beliefs have the power to unlock your inner genius or keep you from fully achieving your greatest potential.
Author: Deborah Day

Quote: The ultimate lesson all of us have to learn is unconditional love, which includes not only others but ourselves as well.
Author: Elisabeth Kubler- Ross

Quote: To acquire the habit of reading is to construct for yourself a refuge from almost all the miseries of life.
