Author: W. Somerset Maugham

Quote: Never be bullied into silence. Never allow yourself to be made a victim. Accept no one's definition of your life, but define yourself.
Author: Harvey Fierstein

Quote: Basically, I think you need two things to get by in this world: a sense of humor and the ability to laugh when your ego is destroyed.
Author: Arlo Guthrie

Quote: Challenges are gifts that force us to search for a new center of gravity. Don't fight them. Just find a new way to stand.
Author: Oprah Winfrey

Quote: When it rains it pours. Maybe the art of life is to convert tough times to great experiences: we can choose to hate the rain or dance in it.
Author: Joan F. Marques

Quote: The month of November makes me feel that life is passing more quickly. In an effort to slow it down, I try to fill the hours more meaningfully.
Author: Henry Rollins

Quote: You're only a man! You've not our gifts! I can tell you! Why, a woman can think of a hundred different things at once, all them contradictory!
Author: Georgette Heyer

Quote: The trouble is not that I am single and likely to stay single, but that I am lonely and likely to stay lonely.
Author: Charlotte Brontë

Quote: The bullet that has hit us Muslims today left the gun centuries ago when we let the clergy decide that knowledge and education were not important.
Author: Nadeem Aslam

Quote: Every time a scientist publishes a good piece of work, she helps to maintain and raise the standards for what is true. We have to keep chipping away.
Author: Deborah M. Gordon
Origin: Ants at Work: How an Insect Society is Organized

Quote: Letting go doesn't mean that you don't care about someone anymore. It's just realizing that the only person you really have control over is yourself.
Author: Deborah Reber
Origin: Chicken Soup for the Teenage Soul

Quote: There may be times when we are powerless to prevent injustice, but there must never be a time when we fail to protest.
Author: Elie Wiesel

Quote: I'll be your Dostoevsky, if you'll be my Tolstoy. Our life together will be so full of despair that death will be like a gulag full of joy.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Time is the most precious element of human existence. The successful person knows how to put energy into time and how to draw success from time.
Author: Denis Waitley

Quote: The level of our success is limited only by our imagination and no act of kindness, however small, is ever wasted.
Author: Aesop

Quote: But even if we don't have the power to choose where we come from we can still choose where we go from there. We can still do things.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: My I love you was a measured response, like one gallon of coffee in one cup of sugar. It was just overflowing with an awakening of my soul.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Love drips like honey from the hive, constant, sweet, precious, into your heart each and every moment if you let it.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: Ignorance breeds monsters to fill up the vacancies of the soul that are unoccupied by the verities of knowledge.
Author: Horace Mann

Quote: I wonder if being sane means disregarding the chaos that is life, pretending only an infinitesimal segment of it is reality.
Author: Rabih Alameddine

Quote: It's not about what I SEE for our future, or humanity; It's about what I DO for our future and humanity.
Author: Steve Maraboli

Quote: Sometimes our light goes out, but is blown again into instant flame by an encounter with another human being.
Author: Albert Schweitzer

Quote: Books are the compasses and telescopes and sextants and charts which other men have prepared to help us navigate the dangerous seas of human life.
Author: Jesse Lee Bennett

Quote: When your family dies, that's a bummer, but that's life. When my family dies, it's a tragedy and the world is unbalanced and biased.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Grown people know that they do not always know the way of things, and even if they think they know, they do not know where and how they got the proof.
Author: Zora Neale Hurston

Quote: There's so many things that life is, and no matter how many breakthroughs, trials will exist and we're going to get through it. Just be strong.
Author: Mary J. Blige

Quote: Is it easier to get you to do what I want with a fist to your face, or a gentle pat on the back and a handshake? Let this be a lesson in power.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: It always shocked me when I realized that I wasn't the only person in the world who thought and felt such strange and awful things.
Author: John Green

Quote: Advertising is the art of convincing people to spend money they don't have for something they don't need.
Author: Will Rogers

Quote: God's word is not just to be heard and repeated, it is to be breathed, lived, and emulated with each action.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: You're alive only once, as far as we know, and what could be worse than getting to the end of your life and realizing you hadn't lived it?
Author: Edward Albee

Quote: Watch for the thing that will show itself to you. Because that thing, when you find it, will be your future.
Author: Arthur Golden

Quote: There are two kinds of truth; The truth that lights the way and the truth that warms the heart. The fist of these is science and the second is art.
Author: Raymond Chandler

Quote: Instead of focusing on how much you can accomplish, focus on how much you can absolutely love what you're doing.
Author: Leo Babauta

Quote: We sinned for no reason but an incomprehensible lack of love, and He saved us for no reason but an incomprehensible excess of love.
Author: Peter Kreeft

Quote: Living might mean taking chances, but they're worth taking. Loving might be a mistake. but its worth making
Author: Reba McEntire

Quote: The grass as bristly and stout as chives and me wondering when the ground will break and me wondering how anything fragile survives
Author: Anne Sexton

Quote: Fate, "Blue replied, glowering at her mother, "is a very weighty word to throw around before breakfast.
Author: Maggie Stiefvater

Quote: Never be bullied into silence. Never allow yourself to be made a victim. Accept no one's definition of your life; define yourself.
Author: Robert Frost

Quote: Trust is like a mirror, you can fix it if it's broken, but you can still see the crack in that mother fucker's reflection.
Author: Lady Gaga

Quote: Truth does not sit in a cave and hide like a lie. It wanders around proudly and roars loudly like a lion.
Author: Suzy Kassem
Origin: Rise Up and Salute the Sun: The Writings of Suzy Kassem

Quote: When you optimize your talents very well, you can pick money from people's pockets and nobody will ever get the guts to call you a thief.
Author: Israelmore Ayivor

Quote: Because theatre is a story-telling art form, we feel entitled to assume that the playwright got there before we got there.
Author: Tom Stoppard

Quote: He would work through the night and sleep until lunch. There wasn't really much else to do. Make something, and die.
Author: Ian McEwan

Quote: My life has been one great big joke, A dance that's walked, A song that's spoke, I laugh so hard I almost choke, When I think about myself.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: The hardest thing about depression is that it is addictive. It begins to feel uncomfortable not to be depressed. You feel guilty for feeling happy.
Author: Pete Wentz

Quote: Never hide things from hardcore thinkers. They get more aggravated, more provoked by confusion than the most painful truths.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: The only way to deal with an unfree world is to become so absolutely free that your very existence is an act of rebellion.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: Becoming fearless isn't the point. That's impossible. It's learning how to control your fear, and how to be free from it.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: I met Elton John at an Interview dinner, and we just sort of became friends. He's got such a wicked sense of humor.
Author: Moby

Quote: An artist's only concern is to shoot for some kind of perfection, and on his own terms, not anyone else's.
Author: J. D. Salinger

Quote: If you converted a water fountain into a fire fountain, then you'd have what it takes to stoke the heat I have for you in my heart.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: ...Next time you're faced with a choice, do the right thing. It hurts everyone less in the long run.
Author: Wendelin Van Draanen

Quote: With a palindrome of a name, like Bob, I'd be both right thinking and dyslexic. Would you love me more as a Bob, or as a Bob?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: When scientifically investigating the natural world, the only thing worse than a blind believer is a seeing denier.
Author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
Origin: Death by Black Hole: And Other Cosmic Quandaries

Quote: Never forget what you are, for surely the world will not. Make it your strength. Then it can never be your weakness.
Author: George R.R. Martin
Origin: A Song of Ice and Fire, 5-Book Boxed Set: A Game of Thrones, A Clash of Kings, A Storm of Swords, A Feast for Crows, A Dance with Dragons

Quote: The way into the hall of success always passes through the chamber of decision. Decide to be a success; success is deliberate!
Author: Israelmore Ayivor
Origin: The Great Hand Book of Quotes

Quote: The simple step of a courageous individual is not to take part in the lie. "One word of truth outweighs the world.
Author: Aleksandr Solzhenitsyn

Quote: Autumn is the hardest season. The leaves are all falling, and they're falling like they're falling in love with the ground.
Author: Andrea Gibson

Quote: Sometimes you can learn, even from a bad experience. By coping you become stronger. The pain does not go away, but it becomes manageable.
Author: Somaly Mam
Origin: The Road of Lost Innocence: The True Story of a Cambodian Heroine

Quote: Taking personal accountability is a beautiful thing because it gives us complete control of our destinies.
Author: Heather Schuck

Quote: With an open mind, you are the imagination of universal consciousness and the creation of the subconscious mind that wanders throughout the universe.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The homemaker has the ultimate career. All other careers exist for one purpose only - and that is to support the ultimate career.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: The person who makes a success of living is the one who sees his goal steadily and aims for it unswervingly.
Author: Cecil B. DeMille

Quote: Time was passing like a hand waving from a train I wanted to be on. I hope you never have to think about anything as much as I think about you.
Author: Jonathan Safran Foer

Quote: Your task is not to seek for love, but merely to seek and find all the barriers within yourself that you have built against it.
Author: Rumi

Quote: I just looked at her, feeling utterly empty. I didn't know what I was supposed to say to her. My life is in that bed. Please let me stay.
Author: Maggie Stiefvater

Quote: Instead of heading for a big mental breakdown, I decided to have a small breakdown every Tuesday evening.
Author: Graham Parke

Quote: That is just the way with some people. They get down on a thing when they don't know nothing about it.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: Somewhere over the rainbow, skies are blue, and the dreams that you dare to dream really do come true.
Author: E.Y. Harburg

Quote: What the soul hardly realizes is that, unbeliever or not, his loneliness is really a homesickness for God.
Author: Dom Hubert Van Zeller

Quote: Thinking only begins at the point where we have come to know that Reason, glorified for centuries, is the most obstinate adversary of thinking.
Author: Martin Heidegger

Quote: A man always finds it hard to realize that he may have finally lost a woman's love, however badly he may have treated her.
Author: Arthur Conan Doyle

Quote: For many of us, clean water is so plentiful and readily available that we rarely, if ever, pause to consider what life would be like without it.
Author: Marcus Samuelsson

Quote: Humor helps ease the tension of race and the differences in society. If there wasn't comedy I don't know if Obama could have ever become president.
Author: Marlon Wayans

Quote: To know is good, but to know how to use that knowledge is better. And to acknowledge the wisdom in this is the best.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When I compete, I leave it all on the table. That's my philosophy for the Hot Dog Eating Contest. Do you know what's in those things? Gross!
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: There is absolutely no greater high than challenging the power structure as a nobody, giving it your all, and winning!
Author: Abbie Hoffman

Quote: First person narrators is the way I know how to write a book with the greatest power and chance of artistic success.
Author: Anne Rice

Quote: To be stupid, and selfish, and to have good health are the three requirements for happiness - though if stupidity is lacking, the others are useless.
Author: Julian Barnes

Quote: Once you place that crown of liar on your head, you can take it off again, but it leaves a stain for all time.
Author: Terry Goodkind

Quote: We're so busy watching out for what's just ahead of us that we don't take time to enjoy where we are.
Author: Bill Watterson

Quote: For some people, their fear to lose is greater than their desire to succeed, so they end up doing nothing and their dreams become impossible.
Author: Rodolfo Costa
Origin: Advice My Parents Gave Me: and Other Lessons I Learned from My Mistakes

Quote: The road that is built in hope is more pleasant to the traveler than the road built in despair, even though they both lead to the same destination.
Author: Marion Zimmer Bradley

Quote: This is the Hour of Lead - Remembered, if outlived, As Freezing persons, recollect the Snow - First - Chill - then Stupor - then the letting go -
Author: Emily Dickinson

Quote: The level of consciousness determines the deepness of thoughts and the awareness of the beauty of life.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I let out a battle cry. Sure, a lot of people might have mistaken it for a sudden yelp of unmanly fear, but trust me. It was a battle cry.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: Flowers that grow where old ones have withered serve to remind us that death will one day come to us all.
Author: Arthur Golden

Quote: At some point in life if you get to a cross road and don't know where to go better figure it out sooner than later, which turn to take.
Author: Secli G.

Quote: We are given to the great, for great purpose, to great ends. We are given to the grave, for grave purposes, to grave ends.
Author: Kami Garcia

Quote: I want to be clear about this. If you wrote from experience, you'd get maybe one book, maybe three poems. Writers write from empathy.
Author: Nikki Giovanni

Quote: Spiritual pain is when you can't stand another moment not knowing the real truth, and when you finally do know you can't let go.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: I don't think life is absurd. I think we are all here for a huge purpose. I think we shrink from the immensity of the purpose we are here for.
Author: Norman Mailer

Quote: Don't wait for a light to appear at the end of the tunnel, stride down there and light the bloody thing yourself.
Author: Sara Henderson

Quote: I suspect the truth is that we are waiting, all of us, against insurmountable odds, for something extraordinary to happen to us.
Author: Khaled Hosseini

Quote: I think God has a sense of humor, and the way my lessons come from God is very funny. I have to laugh at myself even if it's a tough lesson.
Author: Yvette Nicole Brown

Quote: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it.
Author: Rodney Dangerfield

Quote: How had this happened? Everyone in the world knew more than us, about everything, and this I hated then found hugely comforting.
Author: Dave Eggers

Quote: I watered your memory every day to keep it alive, and after all this time it's like a tall cypress tree rooted deep in the St. John's River.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Many waters cannot quench love, neither can floods drown it. What then kills love? Only this: Neglect.
Author: Jeanette Winterson

Quote: It may be a cold, clammy thing to say, but those that treat friendship the same as any other selfishness seem to get the most out of it.
Author: E. W. Howe

Quote: A man must love a thing very much if he not only practices it without any hope of fame and money, but even... without any hope of doing it well.
Author: Oliver Herford

Quote: I don't like breakfast, because I like things fixed and slow. Let's just take our relationship morning by morning.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There is no such thing as a child who hates to read; there are only children who have not found the right book.
Author: Frank Serafini

Quote: She thought she was independent and strong, but she got one small taste of love and she was hungrier than anyone. She was ravenous.
Author: Ann Brashares
Origin: Girls In Pants: The Third Summer of the Sisterhood

Quote: A billion stars go spinning through the night, / glittering above your head, / But in you is the presence that will be / when all the stars are dead.
Author: Rainer Maria Rilke

Quote: I like books whose virtue is all drawn together in a page or two. I like sentences that don't budge though armies cross them.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: People often belittle the place where they were born but heaven can be found in the most unlikely places.
Author: Mitch Albom
Origin: The Five People You Meet in Heaven

Quote: In school, you're taught a lesson and then given a test. In life, you're given a test that teaches you a lesson.
Author: Tom Bodett

Quote: I like Thomas Jefferson, though he intimidated me. I thought he would have been very tough to be around. I don't know if he had such a sense of humor.
Author: Maira Kalman

Quote: When we make judgements we're inevitably acting on limited knowledge, isn't it best to ask if we seek to understand, or simply let them be?
Author: Jay Woodman

Quote: The universe doesn't give you what you want in your mind; it gives you what you demand with your actions.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: I wish I could grow swords like I can roses. Wouldn't war be so romantic then? Then the U.S. could really show the world how much it loves it.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A true friend is the greatest of all blessings, and that which we take the least care of all to acquire.
Author: Francois de La Rochefoucauld

Quote: The size of your success is measured by the strength of your desire; the size of your dream; and how you handle disappointment along the way.
Author: Robert Kiyosaki

Quote: I have found out that there ain't no surer way to find out whether you like people or hate them than to travel with them.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: God creates dinosaurs, God kills dinosaurs, God creates man, man kills God, man brings back dinosaurs.
Author: Michael Crichton

Quote: Success depends almost entirely on how effectively you learn to manage the game's two ultimate adversaries: the course and yourself.
Author: Jack Nicklaus

Quote: A happy person is not a person in a certain set of circumstances, but rather a person with a certain set of attitudes.
Author: Hugh Downs

Quote: You have played, (I think) And broke the toys you were fondest of, And are a little tired now; Tired of things that break, and- Just tired. So am I.
Author: E.E. Cummings

Quote: Not so much two ships passing in the night as two ships sailing together for a time but always bound for different ports.
Author: P.D. James

Quote: In one drop of water are found all the secrets of all the oceans; in one aspect of You are found all the aspects of existence.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: To make no mistakes is not in the power of man; but from their errors and mistakes the wise and good learn wisdom for the future.
Author: Plutarch

Quote: Love doesn't just sit there, like a stone, it has to be made, like bread; remade all the time, made new.
Author: Ursula K. Le Guin

Quote: My idea of God is not a divine idea. It has to be shattered time after time. He shatters it Himself.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: Yesterday I was sad, today I am happy! Yesterday I had a problem, today I still have the same problem! But today I changed the way I look at it!
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: If a company won't hire you, why don't you start your own company? Steve Jobs created jobs, he didn't apply for them. #Startup your dreams.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We hope that, when the insects take over the world, they will remember with gratitude how we took them along on all our picnics.
Author: Bill Vaughan

Quote: I felt the unfairness of it, the inarguable injustice of loving someone who might have loved you back but can't due to deadness.
Author: John Green

Quote: As far as we can discern, the sole purpose of human existence is to kindle a light of meaning in the darkness of mere being.
Author: C.G. Jung

Quote: I hope you're pleased with yourselves. We could all have been killed - or worse, expelled. Now if you don't mind, I'm going to bed.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone

Quote: God used my year of waiting not to frustrate me, or abandon me, but to draw me into a closer relationship with Him.
Author: Suzanne Elizabeth Anderson

Quote: I never write anything without humor, just because I like humor, but at the same time, it is a way for anything fantastical to become relatable.
Author: Joss Whedon

Quote: It's tangible, it's solid, it's beautiful. It's artistic, from my standpoint, and I just love real estate.
Author: Donald Trump

Quote: You can always tell a real friend: when you've made a fool of yourself he doesn't feel you've done a permanent job.
Author: Laurence J. Peter

Quote: Everyone knows revenge is a dish best served when you've had enough time to build up enough vitriol and fury.
Author: Sophie Kinsella

Quote: But hope is no less realistic than despair. It is still our choice whether to live in light or lie down in darkness.
Author: Rick Yancey

Quote: Because inside me is a beast that snarls, and growls, and strains toward freedom.. and as hard as I try, I cannot kill it.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: In the central place of every heart, there is a recording chamber; so long as it receives messages of beauty, hope, cheer and courage, you are young.
Author: Samuel Ullman

Quote: I saw this beautiful girl the other day. She had an ass behind her that seemed to go on for days. In fact, I'm still going on about her.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Most people overestimate what they can do in one year and underestimate what they can do in ten years.
Author: Bill Gates

Quote: It is only the great hearted who can be true friends. The mean and cowardly, Can never know what true friendship means.
Author: Charles Kingsley

Quote: It is art that makes life, makes interest, makes importance and I know of no substitute whatever for the force and beauty of its process.
Author: Max Eastman

Quote: For who would dare to assert that eternal happiness can compensate for a single moment's human suffering
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: He must trust, and he must have faith. And so he builds, because what is building, and rebuilding and rebuilding again, but an act of faith?
Author: Dave Eggers

Quote: I was a timid little guy when I was a kid. I used humor as a defense; I became the class clown. But deep inside, I felt real vulnerable.
Author: Mike Huckabee

Quote: When I hear music, I fear no danger. I am invulnerable. I see no foe. I am related to the earliest times, and to the latest.
Author: Henry David Thoreau

Quote: I want a billion people to know my name as well as they know their own. I want to clone myself to fame.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: I Want Two apply for a job at our country's largest funeral home, and then wear a suit and noose to the job interview.

Quote: For Reason, ruling alone, is a force confining; and Passion, unattended, is a flame that burns to its own destruction.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: I'm not saying I'm gonna change the world, but I guarantee that I will spark the brain that will change the world.
Author: Tupac Shakur

Quote: When you give your mind, body, and heart the message that you are worth the effort of being conscious, miraculous things start to happen.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree
Origin: The Spiritual Girl's Guide to Dating: Your Enlightened Path to Love, Sex, & Soul Mates

Quote: Too many abused beers have suffered in the name of networking. Let us find a better way to mix torture and business.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There is a God part in you. The consciousness. The pure Self. Learn to listen the voice of that Power.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: Just move to the Internet, its great here. We get to live inside where the weather is always awesome.
Author: John Green

Quote: The secret to success is good leadership, and good leadership is all about making the lives of your team members or workers better.
Author: Tony Dungy

Quote: Is there a word halfway between hello and goodbye? Because that's the word my soul is trying to say.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: One more dance along the razor's edge finished. Almost dead yesterday, maybe dead tomorrow, but alive, gloriously alive, today.
Author: Robert Jordan

Quote: If I could convert books to wine, I'd start with The Grapes of Wrath. I've never read it, but maybe tonight I'll be thirsty enough.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There's something really cool about knowing that your destiny is SO big that you're not meant to share it with anyone. At least not yet.
Author: Mandy Hale
Origin: The Single Woman: Life, Love, and a Dash of Sass

Quote: I may not always be with you But when we're far apart remember you will be with me right inside my heart
Author: Marc Wambolt

Quote: The Bible makes it clear that every time that there is a story of faith, it is completely original. God's creative genius is endless.
Author: Eugene H. Peterson

Quote: I'll fight it. I'll fight it for you. Don't you worry about me, Hazel Grace. I'm okay. I'll find a way to hang around and annoy you for a long time.
Author: John Green

Quote: I'm beginning to think that maybe it's not just how much you love someone. Maybe what matters is who you are when you're with them.
Author: Anne Tyler

Quote: Who is wise? He that learns from everyone. Who is powerful? He that governs his passions. Who is rich? He that is content. Who is that? Nobody.
Author: Benjamin Franklin

Quote: Comedy is difficult for an actor. But I think I have a good sense of humor and manage to make people laugh and make them happy.
Author: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan

Quote: Being brave enough to be alone frees you up to invite people into your life because you want them and not because you need them.
Author: Mandy Hale
Origin: The Single Woman: Life, Love, and a Dash of Sass

Quote: Supposing that originally there was nothing but one creator, how could ordinary binary sexual relations come into being?
Author: Neal Stephenson

Quote: I don't believe people are looking for the meaning of life as much as they are looking for the experience of being alive.
Author: Joseph Campbell

Quote: I'd rather be interesting, original, & unique then follow the pack. Revel in who you truly are & be liberated!
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: Stephen King has inspired me with his humor and honesty, and his admonition that the author's job is to tell the truth.
Author: Barry Eisler

Quote: We rely on faith only in the context of claims for which there is no sufficient sensory or logical evidence.
Author: Sam Harris

Quote: People don't care what I wear or don't wear, and even if I don't wear anything people will cover for me if they know that I care about them.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I believe in true love. But my opinion is tainted, because I also believe in Bigfoot, aliens, and in the existence of honest politicians.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: You can have Jesus in your spirit and have an outrageous mess in your soul, and if you don't know what that's called, it's called religion.
Author: Joyce Meyer

Quote: Training is everything. The peach was once a bitter almond; cauliflower is nothing but cabbage with a college education.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: There's something very authentic about humor, when you think about it. Anybody can pretend to be serious. But you can't pretend to be funny.
Author: Billy Collins

Quote: When you find yourself in hot water, what else can you do but make a spot of tea? I still have a spot of tea on my shirt from yesterday.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The fragrance of romance is gratitude. Nothing says I love you like saying I love you. Sure, it's better to show your love, but why not also say it?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: My view is that if your philosophy is not unsettled daily then you are blind to all the universe has to offer.
Author: Neil deGrasse Tyson

Quote: I don't feel that I'm strictly Danish; I don't feel that my sense of humor is strictly Danish or my human sensibility is strictly Danish.
Author: Susanne Bier

Quote: What does it matter? Science has achieved some wonderful things, of course, but I'd far rather be happy than right any day.
Author: Douglas Adams
Origin: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

Quote: The need for love and intimacy is a fundamental human need, as primal as the need for food, water, and air.
Author: Dean Ornish

Quote: Our love will blend together like turquoise is blue and green. There's no depression or envy when both blur into one.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When one is in love, one always begins by deceiving one's self, and one always ends by deceiving others. That is what the world calls a romance.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: When we long for life without difficulties, remind us that oaks grow strong in contrary winds and diamonds are made under pressure.
Author: Peter Marshall

Quote: Never mind those failures till yesterday. Each new day is a sequel of a wonderful life; gifted with hopes to succeed.
Author: Aniruddha Sastikar

Quote: I can hold my alcohol, just like I'm a wine bottle. I dance as fluid as glass, and my heart shatters just as easily.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: It is a good rule after reading a new book, never to allow yourself another new one till you have read an old one in between.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: Let's get romantic and head to bed and make meatloaf all night long. I'll wear my Ben Bernanke beard, because it fits me like a fur coat.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Have you ever hoped for something? And held out for it against all the odds? Until everything you did was ridiculous?
Author: Ali Shaw

Quote: Then you must teach my daughter this same lesson. How to lose your innocence but not your hope. How to laugh forever.
Author: Amy Tan

Quote: Faith can be very very dangerous, and deliberately to implant it into the vulnerable mind of an innocent child is a grievous wrong.
Author: Richard Dawkins

Quote: He was painfully shy, which, as is often the manner of the painfully shy, he overcompensated for by being too loud at the wrong times.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: Act only according to that maxim whereby you can at the same time will that it should become a universal law.
Author: Immanuel Kant

Quote: Education does not mean teaching people what they do not know. It means teaching them to behave as they do not behave.
Author: John Ruskin

Quote: In other words, our opinions and our thoughts and feelings, anything we experience, need not define us forever.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: It's always amazed me how little attention philosophers, psychologists, or anyone else actually has paid to humor.
Author: Edward de Bono

Quote: I pull a lot of the stuff that I play off the rhythm tracks - and Keith Richards has been one of the main contributors to my inspirational playing.
Author: Bobby Keys

Quote: Properly, we should read for power. Man reading should be man intensely alive. The book should be a ball of light in one's hand.
Author: Ezra Pound

Quote: Great minds have purpose, others have wishes. Little minds are tamed and subdued by misfortunes; but great minds rise above them.
Author: Washington Irving

Quote: Sure, it was your idea and your fly, but he caught the big fish. Remember, fairness is a human idea largely unknown in nature.
Author: John Gierach
Origin: Death, Taxes, and Leaky Waders: A John Gierach Fly- Fishing Treasury

Quote: Integrity without knowledge is weak and useless, and knowledge without integrity is dangerous and dreadful.
Author: Samuel Johnson
Origin: The History of Rasselas, Prince of Abissinia

Quote: I have loved to the point of madness; that which is called madness, that which to me, is the only sensible way to love.
Author: Françoise Sagan

Quote: In other words, it's one of those books you thrust on your partner with an incredulous cry of "This is me!
Author: Nick Hornby

Quote: She wasn't doing a thing that I could see, except standing there leaning on the balcony railing, holding the universe together.
Author: J.D. Salinger

Quote: What is grand is necessarily obscure to weak men. That which can be made explicit to the idiot is not worth my care.
Author: William Blake

Quote: The books - the generous friends who met me without suspicion - the merciful masters who never used me ill!
Author: Wilkie Collins

Quote: A friend once said, and I found to be true, That everyday people, they lie to God too, So what makes you think, that they won't lie to you.
Author: Lauryn Hill

Quote: It's almost as if each instant is our last and first. We are always dying, and always reborn. And that is living.
Author: Jonathan Weiner
Origin: Long For This World: The Strange Science of Immortality

Quote: There ain't no way you can hold onto something that wants to go, you understand? You can only love what you got while you got it.
Author: Kate DiCamillo

Quote: Any film which views the darker side of life, which is death with a sense of humor, is very much to my taste.
Author: Carter Burwell

Quote: It's good to be able to laugh at yourself and the problems you face in life. Sense of humor can save you.
Author: Margaret Cho

Quote: I wonder what will happen if i put a hand cream on my feet, will they get confused and start clapping?
Author: Ellen DeGeneres

Quote: We all learn lessons in life. Some stick, some don't. I have always learned more from rejection and failure than from acceptance and success.
Author: Henry Rollins

Quote: My I love yous were watered down, which was how I was able to grow such a beautiful garden. I'm a relationship farmer, and I'm growing as a person.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: People with lots of doubts sometimes find life more oppressive and exhausting than others, but they're more energetic - they aren't robots.
Author: Antonio Tabucchi

Quote: If you're not comfortable enough with yourself or with your own truth when entering a relationship, then you're not ready for that relationship.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: When it comes down to it, even on the natural plane, it is much happier and more enlivening to love than to be loved.
Author: Dorothy Day

Quote: Last Wednesday, I stupidly dropped my iPhone in the bath, and my life has sort of spiraled almost out of control.
Author: Patrick Stewart

Quote: Visualize this thing you want. See it, feel it, believe in it. Make your mental blueprint and begin.
Author: Robert Collier

Quote: The pursuit of truth and beauty is a sphere of activity in which we are permitted to remain children all our lives.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: Of course motivation is not permanent. But then, neither is bathing; but it is something you should do on a regular basis.
Author: Zig Ziglar
Origin: Raising Positive Kids in a Negative World

Quote: Our love went from fly to flower to butterfly, and it was meant to beautifully flutter, not sit still on a shelf like a trophy to be collected.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'm hanging on to her memory like Spanish moss on an ancient Florida oak, and unlike the sunset, my love won't fade.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Unless I understand the Cross, I cannot understand why my commitment to what is right must be precedence over what I prefer.
Author: Ravi Zacharias
Origin: I, Isaac, Take Thee, Rebekah: Moving from Romance to Lasting Love

Quote: I hope you live a life you're proud of. If you find that you're not, I hope you have the strength to start all over again.
Author: Eric Roth
Origin: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button Screenplay

Quote: Because sometimes you just have to dance like a madman in the Self- Help section of your local bookstore.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: Everything changed the day she figured out there was exactly enough time for the important things in her life.
Author: Brian Andreas

Quote: Creativity is the key to success in the future, and primary education is where teachers can bring creativity in children at that level.
Author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam

Quote: Poetry is an act of peace. Peace goes into the making of a poet as flour goes into the making of bread.
Author: Pablo Neruda

Quote: The world is a dangerous place, but there is no better world. Remember every one of us is responsible to make the world a joyful place.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Theology, philosophy, metaphysics, and quantum physics are merely ways for God to have his smart people believe in him
Author: Jeremy Aldana

Quote: After you have wept and grieved for your physical losses, cherish the functions and the life you have left.
Author: Morrie Schwartz

Quote: A lot of my life happened in great, wonderful bursts of good fortune, and then I would race to be worthy of it.
Author: Julie Andrews

Quote: Anyone who is capable of getting themselves made President should on no account be allowed to do the job.
Author: Douglas Adams
Origin: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

Quote: Well I certainly have learned and I hope I'm moving on and certainly two years of prison was a terrible punishment.
Author: Jeffrey Archer

Quote: Even a book can be dangerous in the wrong hands, and when that happens, you blame the hands, but you also read the book.
Author: Erika Johansen

Quote: I've changed, and she's changed, but we haven't changed together. We were in separate dressing rooms the whole time we dated.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A writer's goal is to weave the ordinary into fine silk and the truly extraordinary into diaphanous clarity ...
Author: C.J. Heck

Quote: The truth was, he now belonged only to my past, and it was time I begin to accept it, as much as it hurt to do so.
Author: Tammara Webber

Quote: It's not about whether or not someone is a bigot, but whether or not the argument which that someone is arguing is worth being a bigot about.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: When you experience permanent bliss of the Self (samadhi), then it will be considered that your entire work is completed.
Author: Dada Bhagwan

Quote: Every night I cuddle with a blob of unbaked clay I fashioned in the shape of a woman. But that's what being in love is all about.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the best book I've ever written, and it still sucks

Quote: I adore art... when I am alone with my notes, my heart pounds and the tears stream from my eyes, and my emotion and my joys are too much to bear.
Author: Giuseppe Verdi

Quote: I'm not superstitious. I'm a witch. Witches aren't superstitious. We are what people are superstitious of.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: What separates us from the animals, what separates us from the chaos, is our ability to mourn people we've never met.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: A sculptor is a person who is interested in the shape of things, a poet in words, a musician by sounds.
Author: Henry Moore

Quote: Hope is the greatest thing for moms of autism. Hope is what gets us out of bed in the morning. I'm on a mission to tell parents that there is a way.
Author: Jenny McCarthy

Quote: The ways of fate are indeed hard to understand. If there is not some compensation hereafter, then the world is a cruel jest.
Author: Arthur Conan Doyle
Origin: The Case- Book of Sherlock Holmes

Quote: Be a lamp, or a lifeboat, or a ladder. Help someone's soul heal. Walk out of your house like a shepherd.
Author: Rumi

Quote: We must free ourselves of the hope that the sea will ever rest. We must learn to sail in high winds.
Author: Aristotle Onassis

Quote: But the goal of the arts, culinary or otherwise, is not to increase our comfort. That is the goal of an easy chair.
Author: Jeffrey Steingarten

Quote: I think what is interesting in life is all the cracks and all the flaws and all the moments that are not perfect.
Author: Clemence Poesy

Quote: If you want to be a successful runner, you have to consider everything. It's no good just thinking about endurance and not to develop fine speed.
Author: Arthur Lydiard

Quote: That's what being alive is, Thing! It's being badly prepared for everything! Because you only get one chance, Thing!
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: If this humor be the safety of our race, then it is due largely to the infusion into the American people of the Irish brain.
Author: William Howard Taft

Quote: When I first met you, that's what I remember. I looked up at the sky and thought, I'm going to love this person because even the sky looks different.
Author: Margaret Stohl

Quote: Slow down and enjoy life. It's not only the scenery you miss by going too fast - you also miss the sense of where you are going and why.
Author: Eddie Cantor

Quote: Ideas are like rabbits. You get a couple and learn how to handle them, and pretty soon you have a dozen.
Author: John Steinbeck

Quote: A few weeks after the worst day, I started writing lots of letters. I don't know why, but it was one of the only things that made my boots lighter.
Author: Jonathan Safran Foer

Quote: The truth is .. I'm okay with people not liking me. I'm not okay with them pretending that they do. Keep it real. Everybody ain't for everybody.
Author: Nakia R. Laushaul
Origin: The Truth as I See It: In Poetry & Prose

Quote: ... there is no shame in not knowing. The problem arises when irrational thought and attendant behavior fill the vacuum left by ignorance.
Author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
Origin: The Sky Is Not the Limit: Adventures of an Urban Astrophysicist

Quote: I can't throw away cologne because that is Nostalgia in a Bottle, the scent of yesterday, and it reminds me of her more clearly than her picture.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I have the superhero gift of invisibility. I must be invisible, because the woman I love doesn't see me. I might as well be into Helen Keller.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I feel like a part of my soul has loved you since the beginning of everything. Maybe we're from the same star.
Author: Emery Allen

Quote: Happiness always looks small while you hold it in your hands, but let it go, and you learn at once how big and precious it is.
Author: Maxim Gorky
Origin: The Lower Depths and Other Plays

Quote: We have no more right to consume happiness without producing it than to consume wealth without producing it.
Author: George Bernard Shaw

Quote: The best part about being a writer is being able to communicate with people without moving my lips. The mouth is better used for kissing.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Keep your sense of humor, my friend; if you don't have a sense of humor it just isn't funny anymore.
Author: Wavy Gravy

Quote: The deepest wounds aren't the ones we get from other people hurting us. They are the wounds we give ourselves when we hurt other people.
Author: Isobelle Carmody

Quote: Doing what you wanted to do was the only training, and the only preliminary, needed for doing more of what you wanted to do.
Author: Kingsley Amis

Quote: I heard a definition once: Happiness is health and a short memory! I wish I'd invented it, because it is very true.
Author: Audrey Hepburn

Quote: Before I can live with other folks I've got to live with myself. The one thing that doesn't abide by majority rule is a person's conscience.
Author: Harper Lee

Quote: How dismal it is to see present day Americans yearning for the very orthodoxy that their country was founded to escape.
Author: Christopher Hitchens

Quote: Incongruity, they say, is one of the main ingredients of humor. Maybe it's because everybody can feel superior to me. I honestly don't know.
Author: Emmett Kelly

Quote: I'm trying to translate what my cat says and put it in a book, but how many homonyms are there for meow?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: That's the problem with life. You never get enough time to stare at your ceiling and try to figure out what's going on.
Author: Leila Sales
Origin: This Song Will Save Your Life

Quote: I just like playing interesting, complex, complicated characters. I like films that also have an element of humor.
Author: Steve Buscemi

Quote: All I need is a sheet of paper and something to write with, and then I can turn the world upside down.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: The trouble with Communism is the Communists, just as the trouble with Christianity is the Christians.
Author: H.L. Mencken

Quote: It is wise to direct your anger towards problems -- not people; to focus your energies on answers -- not excuses.
Author: William Arthur Ward

Quote: There is in every child at every stage a new miracle of vigorous unfolding, which constitutes a new hope and a new responsibility for all.
Author: Erik Erikson

Quote: Judging is preventing us from understanding a new truth. Free yourself from the rules of old judgments and create the space for new understanding.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: We crave for new sensations but soon become indifferent to them. The wonders of yesterday are today common occurrences
Author: Nikola Tesla

Quote: Game shows are designed to make us feel better about the random, useless facts that are all we have left of our education.
Author: Chuck Palahniuk

Quote: It is curious that the human mind could blindly accept an infinite speed but had reservations to accept a finite one, simply because it was too large!
Author: Felix Alba- Juez
Origin: Galloping with Sound - The Grand Cosmic Conspiracy

Quote: Mathematics expresses values that reflect the cosmos, including orderliness, balance, harmony, logic, and abstract beauty.
Author: Deepak Chopra

Quote: Somebody gets into trouble, then gets out of it again. People love that story. They never get tired of it.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: Love yourself first and everything else falls into line. Your really have to love yourself to get anything done in this world.
Author: Lucille Ball

Quote: If you carefully consider what you want to be said of you in the funeral experience, you will find your definition of success.
Author: Stephen Covey

Quote: If you truly want to be respected by people you love, you must prove to them that you can survive without them.
Author: Michael Bassey Johnson

Quote: Death doesn't really worry me that much, I'm not frightened about it... I just don't want to be there when it happens.
Author: Woody Allen

Quote: Why it's simply impassible! Alice: Why, don't you mean impossible? Door: No, I do mean impassible. (chuckles) Nothing's impossible!
Author: Lewis Carroll
Origin: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland & Through the Looking- Glass

Quote: There is no beauty in sadness. No honor in suffering. No growth in fear. No relief in hate. It's just a waste of perfectly good happiness.
Author: Katerina Stoykova Klemer

Quote: Tomas did not realize at the time that metaphors are dangerous. Metaphors are not to be trifled with. A single metaphor can give birth to love.
Author: Milan Kundera

Quote: A woman has to be intelligent, have charm, a sense of humor, and be kind. It's the same qualities I require from a man.
Author: Catherine Deneuve

Quote: I am not eccentric. It's just that I am more alive than most people. I am an unpopular electric eel set in a pond of catfish.
Author: Edith Sitwell

Quote: Happiness is a choice. You can choose to be happy. There's going to be stress in life, but it's your choice whether you let it affect you or not.
Author: Valerie Bertinelli

Quote: I don't ask for the meaning of the song of a bird or the rising of the sun on a misty morning. There they are, and they are beautiful.
Author: Pete Hamill

Quote: I was raised among books, making invisible friends in pages that seemed cast from dust and whose smell I carry on my hands to this day.
Author: Carlos Ruiz Zafón

Quote: The ego relies on the familiar. It is reluctant to experience the unknown, which is they very essence of life.
Author: Deepak Chopra
Origin: The Third Jesus: The Christ We Cannot Ignore

Quote: The sunset faded and blended from pink to peach to mango in a smoothie in the sky. For as long as she doesn't love me, I will love her.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Story That Talks about Talking Is Like Chatter to Chattering Teeth, and Every Set of Dentures Can Attest to the Fact That No..

Quote: One of these grand defects, as I humbly conceive, is this, that children are habituated to learning without understanding.
Author: Jonathan Edwards
Origin: The Works of Jonathan Edwards, Vol. 16: Letters and Personal Writings

Quote: The best way to insure you achieve the greatest satisfaction out of life is to behave intentionally.
Author: Deborah Day

Quote: An empowered life begins with serious personal questions about oneself. Those answers bare the seeds of success.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: There's a very positive relationship between people's ability to accomplish any task and the time they're willing to spend on it.
Author: Joyce Brothers

Quote: Living a Princely life requires that you learn to think and reason like the Prince, talk and behave like him, react like him as well.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: A writer is dear and necessary for us only in the measure of which he reveals to us the inner workings of his very soul.
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: The fact of God is necessary for the fact of man. Think God away and man has no ground of existence.
Author: A.W. Tozer

Quote: When you compare the sorrows of real life to the pleasures of the imaginary one, you will never want to live again, only to dream forever.
Author: Alexandre Dumas

Quote: It may be true that the law cannot make a man love me, but it can keep him from lynching me, and I think that's pretty important.
Author: Martin Luther King

Quote: Hope is trust in God's promises, faith that if we act now, the desired blessings will be fulfilled in the future.
Author: James E. Faust

Quote: It is in the balancing of your spirituality with your humanity that you will find immeasurable happiness, success, good health, and love.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: On Friday night, I was reading my new book, but my brain got tired, so I decided to watch some television instead.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: One's life has value so long as one attributes value to the life of others, by means of love, friendship, and compassion
Author: Simone de Beauvoir

Quote: There are two ways to get enough. One is to continue to accumulate more and more. The other is to desire less.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: But that did not stop her heart from shattering into countless pieces or her soul from shredding into slivers.
Author: Farrah Naseem

Quote: Mindfulness, also called wise attention, helps us see what we're adding to our experiences, not only during meditation sessions but also elsewhere.
Author: Sharon Salzberg
Origin: Real Happiness: The Power of Meditation

Quote: She's cute, I thought, but you don't need to like a girl who treats you like you're ten: You've already got a mom.
Author: John Green

Quote: Youth can not know how age thinks and feels. But old men are guilty if they forget what it was to be young.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix

Quote: The indefatigable pursuit of an unattainable perfection ...***...is what alone gives meaning to our life on this unavailing star.
Author: Logan Pearsall Smith

Quote: The best and most beautiful things in the world cannot be seen or even touched. They must be felt with the heart
Author: Helen Keller

Quote: Even the strongest and bravest must sometimes weep. It shows they have a great heart, one that can feel compassion for others.
Author: Brian Jacques

Quote: Education is the power to think clearly, the power to act well in the world's work, and the power to appreciate life.
Author: Brigham Young

Quote: Privatizing our public schools makes as much sense as privatizing the fire department or or the police department
Author: Diane Ravitch

Quote: A broken heart is just the growing pains necessary so that you can love more completely when the real thing comes along.
Author: J.S.B. Morse
Origin: Now and at the Hour of Our Death

Quote: We dream, we wake on a cold hillside, we pursue the dream again. In the beginning was the dream, and the work of disenchantment never ends.
Author: Kim Stanley Robinson

Quote: Equipped with his five senses, man explores the universe around him and calls the adventure Science.
Author: Edwin Hubble

Quote: It is only by not paying one's bills that one can hope to live in the memory of the commercial classes.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Poetry happens when there is nothing to say but you have a volcano hidden inside you waiting to erupt.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: God is great and God is good, "Lisa says. "But where are the Apache attack helicopters when you need them?
Author: Suzanne Finnamore

Quote: If you think God's there, He is. If you don't, He isn't. And if that's what God's like, I wouldn't worry about it.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: I love that feeling of being in love, the effect of having butterflies when you wake up in the morning. That is special.
Author: Jennifer Aniston

Quote: One day you will ask me which is more important? My life or yours? I will say mine and you will walk away not knowing that you are my life.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: I've been in love with you since the very beginning. You asked why there isn't anyone else in my life, and the reason... is you.
Author: Julie James

Quote: A broken soul is not the absence of beauty, but a cracked and torn soul reeks of the sweet incense it contains.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: The time has come to harness the blessed power within us and to use it to transcend from our current existence into a more empowered reality.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: Sometimes losing a pet is more painful than losing a human because in the case of the pet, you were not pretending to love it.
Author: Amy Sedaris
Origin: Simple Times: Crafts for Poor People

Quote: Young people everywhere have been allowed to choose between love and a garbage disposal unit. Everywhere they have chosen the garbage disposal unit.
Author: Guy Debord

Quote: CLEMENTINE: This is it, Joel. It's going to be gone soon. JOEL: I know. CLEMENTINE: What do we do? JOEL: Enjoy it.
Author: Charlie Kaufman
Origin: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind: The Shooting Script

Quote: The midsummer sun shines but dim, The fields strive in vain to look gay; But when I am happy in Him December's as pleasant as May.
Author: John Newton

Quote: A dream is a seed. Vision plants it. Imagination nurtures growth. Opportunities create blooms. Thoughts become things!
Author: Donna McGoff

Quote: Strength is Life, Weakness is Death. Expansion is Life, Contraction is Death. Love is Life, Hatred is Death.
Author: Swami Vivekananda

Quote: A performance art piece is unprecedented. It is difficult to censor since it has a good possibility of never being done before.
Author: Jack Bowman

Quote: My world is about stories that entertain; emotions that move; people you'll remember; literature that matters.
Author: M.G. Crisci

Quote: Strength is the capacity to break a Hershey bar into four pieces with your bare hands - and then eat just one of the pieces.
Author: Judith Viorst
Origin: Love & Guilt & The Meaning Of Life, Etc

Quote: I'm in love with you, and I'm not in the business of denying myself the simple pleasure of saying true things.
Author: John Green

Quote: God created philosophy for all the intellects that got bored of hearing the same bible stories every Sunday.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: Call him Voldemort, Harry. Always use the proper name for things. Fear of a name increases fear of the thing itself.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone

Quote: There are some choices you can only make once. You can't go back to where you made a choice and then take the other one.
Author: Mary Hoffman

Quote: You only get one life. Live it to the fullest. All your miseries will be forgiven when you will be dead.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: You might think I lost all hope at that point. I did. And as a result I perked up and felt much better.
Author: Yann Martel

Quote: Herodotus says, "Very few things happen at the right time, and the rest do not happen at all: the conscientious historian will correct these defects.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: Knowing how to be solitary is central to the art of loving. When we can be alone, we can be with others without using them as a means of escape.
Author: bell hooks

Quote: ...you know that a good, long session of weeping can often make you feel better, even if your circumstances have not changed one bit.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: Flowers are aromatic and romantic, and they grow exactly the way love does with plenty of light, and watered with affection.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Be thankful for what you have; you'll end up having more. If you concentrate on what you don't have, you will never, ever have enough
Author: Oprah Winfrey

Quote: A strong work of art really leaves people speechless. They feel a little angry because they don't understand it.
Author: Michael Heizer

Quote: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: Pride makes us long for a solution to things - a solution, a purpose, a final cause; but the better telescopes become, the more stars appear.
Author: Julian Barnes

Quote: You don't know her like I do, because you don't know her like I don't. It's true, I don't know her at all. What's she like?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: So many chairs, and no time to sit

Quote: We all know him to be a proud, unpleasant sort of man; but this would be nothing if you really liked him.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: As we go through life we gradually discover who we are, but the more we discover, the more we lose ourselves.
Author: Haruki Murakami
Origin: Colorless Tsukuru Tazaki and His Years of Pilgrimage

Quote: Be aware of the high notes, of the blissful faces and their soft messages, and listen for the silent message of a highly decorated gift.
Author: Dejan Stojanovic

Quote: You have within you, right now, everything you need to deal with whatever the world can throw at you.
Author: Brian Tracy

Quote: Success is neither magical nor mysterious. Success is the natural consequence of consistently applying the basic fundamentals.
Author: Jim Rohn

Quote: I had a standing agreement with god. I'd agree to believe in him, barely, so long as he let me sleep in on Sundays.
Author: Richelle Mead

Quote: Friendship... is not something you learn in school. But if you haven't learned the meaning of friendship, you really haven't learned anything.
Author: Muhammad Ali

Quote: The chief wonder of education is that it does not ruin everybody concerned in it, teachers and taught.
Author: Henry Adams

Quote: When we look up at night and view the stars, everything we see is shinning because of distant nuclear fusion.
Author: Carl Sagan

Quote: I challenge you to make your life the masterpiece you want to paint, the novel you want to read, the day you want to wake to.
Author: Toni Sorenson

Quote: A celibate clergy is an especially good idea, because it tends to suppress any hereditary propensity toward fanaticism.
Author: Carl Sagan

Quote: A nation is a detour of nature to arrive at five or six great men- yes, and then to get around them.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: Remember how far you've come, and you won't have to rely on a destiny for your future. It will come on your own.
Author: Shannon A. Thompson

Quote: Everyone should be able to do one card trick, tell two jokes, and recite three poems, in case they are ever trapped in an elevator.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: We judge others by their actions and ourselves by our intentions. We need to offer grace to all, because we all need a little grace.
Author: Jayce O'Neal

Quote: It is often said that before you die your life passes before your eyes. It is in fact true. It's called living.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: What strikes me is the fact that in our society, art has become something which is only related to objects, and not to individuals, or to life.
Author: Michel Foucault

Quote: Higher consciousness means your self consciousness ceases to exist; you become the ocean of life and a part of the universe.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Success is nothing if you don't have the right people to share it with; you're just gonna end up lonely.
Author: Selena Gomez

Quote: No matter how plain a woman may be, if truth and honesty are written across her face, she will be beautiful.
Author: Eleanor Roosevelt

Quote: He will essentially follow the language of the spectacle, for it is the only one he is familiar with.
Author: Guy Debord

Quote: Education is the key to success in life, and teachers make a lasting impact in the lives of their students.
Author: Solomon Ortiz

Quote: Improving intelligence is possible, but it is more likely to occur if children are given the right experiences at the right ages.
Author: Dennis Garlick

Quote: The advantage of a bad memory is that one enjoys several times the same good things for the first time.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: I never could have achieved the success that I have without setting physical activity and health goals.
Author: Bonnie Blair

Quote: In any art, you don't know in advance what you want to say - it's revealed to you as you say it. That's the difference between art and illustration.
Author: Aaron Siskind

Quote: I was thinking of how sometimes, trying to say the right thing to people, it's like some kind of brain surgery...
Author: M.T Anderson

Quote: Let me die the moment my love dies. Let me not outlive my own capacity to love. Let me die still loving, and so, never die.
Author: Mary Zimmerman

Quote: Being a nerd, which is to say going too far and caring too much about a subject, is the best way to make friends I know.
Author: Sarah Vowell

Quote: The feeling of friendship is like that of being comfortably filled with roast beef; love, like being enlivened with champagne.
Author: Samuel Johnson

Quote: I don't like people who have never fallen or stumbled. Their virtue is lifeless and it isn't of much value. Life hasn't revealed its beauty to them.
Author: Boris Pasternak

Quote: She had been forced into prudence in her youth, she learned romance as she grew older: the natural sequel of an unnatural beginning.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: Telephone pole wires get in the way of great photos. Communication always gets in the way of communication.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Get off the treadmill of consumption, replication, and mediocrity. Begin lifting the weights of creativity, originality, and success.
Author: Ryan Lilly

Quote: Music is a moral law. It gives soul to the universe, wings to the mind, flight to the imagination, and charm and gaiety to life and to everything.
Author: Plato

Quote: I had a dream about you last night... you were a giant slinky and I watched you fall down the stairs.
Author: Amy Summers
Origin: I Had a Dream About You

Quote: The problems are solved, not by giving new information, but by arranging what we have known since long.
Author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

Quote: I care for myself. The more solitary, the more friendless, the more unsustained I am, the more I will respect myself.
Author: Charlotte Brontë

Quote: The moment God is figured out with nice neat lines and definitions, we are no longer dealing with God.
Author: Rob Bell
Origin: Velvet Elvis: Repainting the Christian Faith

Quote: We may ignore, but we can nowhere evade the presence of God. The world is crowded with Him. He walks everywhere incognito.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: The trouble with fiction, "said John Rivers, "is that it makes too much sense. Reality never makes sense.
Author: Aldous Huxley

Quote: Ten years, she's dead, and I still find myself some mornings reaching for the phone to call her. She could no more be gone than gravity or the moon.
Author: Mary Karr

Quote: Reading is the sole means by which we slip, involuntarily, often helplessly, into another's skin, another's voice, another's soul.
Author: Joyce Carol Oates

Quote: Generally speaking, books don't cause much harm. Except when you read them, that is. Then they cause all kinds of problems.
Author: Pseudonymous Bosch
Origin: The Name of This Book Is Secret

Quote: To love someone as much as you love yourself, that is the ideal. Especially if that someone is your clone.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: I discovered after going to music festivals that I am a rock fan. I love the guitars, the phrasing, and the abandon of rock fans.
Author: Beyonce Knowles

Quote: Avoidable human misery is more often caused not so much by stupidity as by ignorance, particularly our ignorance about ourselves.
Author: Carl Sagan
Origin: The Demon- Haunted World: Science as a Candle in the Dark

Quote: Persistence, perseverance, and continuous improvement are the ingredients for forming a successful person.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Life is going to give you just what you put in it. Put your whole heart in everything you do, and pray, then you can wait.
Author: Maya Angelou
Origin: I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings

Quote: [She wasn't] a logically reasoning woman, but God is good, and hearts may count in heaven as high as heads.
Author: Charles Dickens

Quote: I think bands, when they're on the road, they keep their sanity by developing an internal sense of humor.
Author: Ric Ocasek

Quote: Great earrings would be little speakers, so she can hear better. Or maybe she just wasn't listening all those times I told her I loved her.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We can easily forgive a child who is afraid of the dark; the real tragedy of life is when men are afraid of the light.
Author: Plato

Quote: However, if you do start crying in an argument and someone asks why, you can always say, "I'm just crying because of how wrong you are.
Author: Amy Poehler

Quote: She shrugged. "You can be happy for someone else's good fortune, but that doesn't mean you forget your own bad luck.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: The unread story is not a story; it is little black marks on wood pulp. The reader, reading it, makes it live: a live thing, a story.
Author: Ursula K. Le Guin
Origin: Dancing at the Edge of the World: Thoughts on Words, Women, Places

Quote: The God I believe in believes in me and won't silence my heart or others based on a paycheck at the end of the day.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: If only they would all just leave me alone with my books and my letters, I would be content to let life, and the world pass me by
Author: Alison Weir

Quote: You are not permitted to live and die as a non-entity because you have encountered the greatness that is associated with Christ.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: Mine was a patchwork God, sewn together from bits of rag and ribbon, Eastern and Western, pagan and Hebrew, everything but the kitchen sink and Jesus.
Author: Anne Lamott
Origin: Traveling Mercies: Some Thoughts on Faith

Quote: I'm a little more reserved in person than people expect. But I warm up quickly, like leftovers. Meatloaf, anyone?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Infatuation is not quite the same thing as love; it's more like love's shady second cousin who's always borrowing money and can't hold down a job.
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert
Origin: Committed: A Skeptic Makes Peace with Marriage

Quote: You shouldn't throw stones if you live in a glass house and if you got a glass jaw, you should watch yo mouth: cause I'll break yo face.
Author: 50 Cent

Quote: Sometimes you just have to jump in a mud puddle because it's there. Never get so old that you forget about having fun.
Author: Tom Giaquinto

Quote: ...and remember my sentimental friend that a heart is not judged by how much you love, but by how much you are loved by others.
Author: L. Frank Baum

Quote: I wear a necklace of hope with pearly beads. When I met you, it broke, and the beads spilled all over the floor, into the gutters.
Author: Karen Quan
Origin: Write like no one is reading

Quote: The most important thing about art is to work. Nothing else matters except sitting down every day and trying.
Author: Steven Pressfield
Origin: The War of Art: Break Through the Blocks & Win Your Inner Creative Battles

Quote: Education will only take you so far. To go even further, I'd recommend getting a piggyback ride from a midget half your body weight.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: Friendship is unnecessary, like philosophy like art... It has no survival value; rather it is one of those things that give values to survival.
Author: Alice Duer Miller

Quote: I drink like a fish, and I swim in my thirst. I'm so parched for her love that I think I may drown in my desire.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The measure of success is not whether you have a tough problem to deal with, but whether it is the same problem you had last year.
Author: John Foster Dulles

Quote: Enjoy your sweat because hard work doesn't guarantee success, but without it you don't have a chance.
Author: Alex Rodriguez

Quote: If the great internet connects us all ... then why are so many of us becoming increasingly isolated?
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: If I waste all my charity, all I'll wind up with in the end is the wind. Still, I think I want to be the Dandelion of Love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I just bought some cargo pants, so I can deliver goods at the speed of a walk. It's an environmentally friendly #startup.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: To get him to agree, I put a gun to his head. To get him to not change his mind, I blew out his brains.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: How to construct a coffin with six karate chops

Quote: Ah, if everyone was as sensitive as you! There's no girl who hasn't gone through that. And it's all so unimportant!
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: Be careful of love. It'll twist your brain around and leave you thinking up is down and right is wrong.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: [Children] just cannot be sad too long, it is not in them, as children mourn in little bits here and there like patchwork in their lives.
Author: Nancy E. Turner
Origin: These Is My Words: The Diary of Sarah Agnes Prine, 1881-1901

Quote: One must find the source within one's own Self, one must possess it. Everything else was seeking -- a detour, an error.
Author: Hermann Hesse

Quote: Models are there to look like mannequins, not like real people. Art and illusion are supposed to be fantasy.
Author: Grace Jones

Quote: Maturity is a bitter disappointment for which no remedy exists, unless laughter could be said to remedy anything.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: Hope is like a road in the country; there was never a road, but when many people walk on it, the road comes into existence.
Author: Lin Yutang

Quote: Sure, the comedians who swear or use scatological humor can get laughs, but they're uncomfortable laughs.
Author: John Ratzenberger

Quote: Fame is a vapor, popularity is an accident, riches take wings, those who cheer today may curse tomorrow and only one thing endures - character.
Author: Harry S. Truman

Quote: God is not ecstatic about the lack you are experiencing; He is not delightful over your failures, He is not happy about your stagnancy.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: The principle of democracy is a recognition of the sovereign, inalienable rights of man as a gift from God, the Source of law.
Author: Fulton J. Sheen

Quote: And we were kissing like drowning people breathe-- like suddenly we'd discovered something that has never been so sweet before that moment.
Author: Morgan Matson

Quote: Whatever you see you gotta keep a sense of humor; you gotta be able to smile through all the bullshit.
Author: Tupac Shakur

Quote: If you ask me what I came to do in this world, I, an artist, will answer you: I am here to live out loud.
Author: Émile Zola

Quote: I am attracted to intelligence, a witty sense of humor, an adventurous outlook on life and spiritual awareness about one's self and the world.
Author: Tanit Phoenix

Quote: That would be a good thing for them to cut on my tombstone: Wherever she went, including here, it was against her better judgment.
Author: Dorothy Parker

Quote: We do not need magic to transform our world. We carry all of the power we need inside ourselves already.
Author: J.K. Rowling

Quote: You get a little moody sometimes but I think that's because you like to read. People that like to read are always a little fucked up.
Author: Pat Conroy

Quote: It's good for art to make us think, to give us a shared experience that creates a dialogue, makes us talk to each other, including strangers.
Author: Janet Echelman

Quote: I keep water in my pockets, as portable fish tanks. My love letters often get soggy with sentimentality.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Anybody who has survived his childhood has enough information about life to last him the rest of his days.
Author: Flannery O'Connor

Quote: A world without poetry and art would be too much like one without birds or flowers: bearable but a lot less enjoyable.
Author: Aberjhani
Origin: Journey through the Power of the Rainbow: Quotations from a Life Made Out of Poetry

Quote: Caring is what matters, not stuff or status, just people sharing kindness & joy in a web of the heart that spans the globe.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: Whenever I hear anyone arguing for slavery, I feel a strong impulse to see it tried on him personally.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: Just because you discover that you may like somebody after all, it doesn't necessarily mean there's any attraction.
Author: Steve Kluger

Quote: Is there a drug that will illuminate the mind and eliminate all the drugs the modern medical system will try to convince you that you need to take?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I cannot remember the books I've read any more than the meals I have eaten; even so, they have made me.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: God gives me hope that there is something greater than us, something better and bigger than the here and now, that can help us live.
Author: Mattie Stepanek

Quote: Single is not a status, it is a word that describes a person who is strong enough to live and enjoy life without depending on others.
Author: prixie

Quote: Either we shall find what it is we are seeking or at least we shall free ourselves from the persuasion that we know what we do not know.
Author: Plato

Quote: We are biology. We are reminded of this at the beginning and the end, at birth and at death. In between we do what we can to forget.
Author: Mary Roach
Origin: Stiff: The Curious Lives of Human Cadavers

Quote: Evil does not exist; once you have crossed the threshold, all is good. Once in another world, you must hold your tongue.
Author: Franz Kafka

Quote: To forgive is the highest, most beautiful form of love. In return, you will receive untold peace and happiness
Author: Robert Muller

Quote: Look on the bright side, "said Simon, "If they need a human sacrifice, you can always offer me. I'm not sure the rest of you qualify anyway.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: God gave me a second chance. I am so very glad with what is going on with my career, but I want to be a success in my relationship with my children.
Author: El DeBarge

Quote: ...all of our laments could not add a single second to her life, not one additional beat of the heart, nor a breath.
Author: Audrey Niffenegger

Quote: Stop worrying about someone taking your spot. God already have it reserved. Do the work to get there and fill it!
Author: Yvonne Pierre
Origin: The Day My Soul Cried: A Memoir

Quote: The truth is life is full of joy and full of great sorrow, but you can't have one without the other.
Author: Andre Dubus III

Quote: The boy never cried again, and he never forgot what he'd learned: that to love is to destroy, and that to be loved is to be the one destroyed.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: If you're horrible to me, I'm going to write a song about it, and you won't like it. That's how I operate.
Author: Taylor Swift

Quote: A word to the unwise. Torch every book. Char every page. Burn every word to ash. Ideas are incombustible. And therein lies your real fear.
Author: Ellen Hopkins

Quote: I am fallen, flawed and imperfect. Yet drenched in the grace and mercy that is found in Jesus Christ, there is strength
Author: Adam Young

Quote: In an age of hope men looked up at the night sky and saw the heavens. In an age of hopelessness they call it simply space.
Author: Peter Kreeft

Quote: Every man's life ends the same way. It is only the details of how he lived and how he died that distinguish one man from another.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: Wise men, when in doubt whether to speak or to keep quiet, give themselves the benefit of the doubt, and remain silent.
Author: Napoleon Hill

Quote: When it comes to life the critical thing is whether you take things for granted or take them with gratitude.
Author: Gilbert K. Chesterton

Quote: truth, like gold, is to be obtained not by its growth, but by washing away from it all that is not gold.
Author: Leo Tolstoy
