Quote: I'm a grenade and at some point I'm going to blow up and I would like to minimize the casualties, okay?
Author: John Green

Quote: Real education should educate us out of self into something far finer; into a selflessness which links us with all humanity.
Author: Nancy Astor the Viscountess Astor

Quote: Every time I thought I was being rejected from something good, I was actually being re-directed to something better.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: I know the place I know the place. It is true. Everything we do corrects the space between death and me and you.
Author: Harold Pinter

Quote: I can't decide whether I'm a good girl wrapped up in a bad girl, or if I'm a bad girl wrapped up in a good girl. And that's how I know I'm a woman!
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: Too many people realize at the end of their lives that they've taken for granted those who really love them.
Author: Lesley M.M. Blume
Origin: Cornelia and the Audacious Escapades of the Somerset Sisters

Quote: A scientist may not be sure of the answer, but he's often sure he can find one. And that's a condition which is clearly not enjoyed by philosophy.
Author: B.F. Skinner

Quote: I long to accomplish a great and noble task, but it is my chief duty to accomplish small tasks as if they were great and noble.
Author: Helen Keller

Quote: Education, n. That which discloses to the wise and disguises from the foolish their lack of understanding.
Author: Ambrose Bierce

Quote: Willpower is the key to success. Successful people strive no matter what they feel by applying their will to overcome apathy, doubt or fear.
Author: Dan Millman

Quote: First and foremost: a human being. If your definition of yourself is something else; maybe you should reconsider.
Author: Berivan Selim

Quote: Prejudice, a dirty word, and faith, a clean one, have something in common: they both begin where reason ends.
Author: Harper Lee

Quote: Human happiness is defined by the hardships and conflicts you have been through. The greater they are, the greater is your happiness.
Author: Peter Deunov

Quote: Life is a series of collisions with the future; it is not the sum of what we have been, but what we yearn to be.
Author: Jose Ortega y Gasset

Quote: Success comes to you with luck and a lot of hard work, but it doesn't give you the right to be any better than anybody else.
Author: Nick Nolte

Quote: I look at you, and I think about you, and ... I don't know. No one has ever confounded me the way you do.
Author: Stephanie Perkins
Origin: Lola and the Boy Next Door

Quote: The very essence of the creative is its novelty, and hence we have no standard by which to judge it.
Author: Carl Rogers

Quote: When God knows you're ready for the responsibility of commitment, He'll reveal the right person under the right circumstances.
Author: Joshua Harris
Origin: I Kissed Dating Goodbye: A New Attitude Toward Relationships and Romance

Quote: Our learned egocentric and judgmental consciousness is the source of unhappiness; however, universal consciousness is always blissful.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: You know, all that really matters is that the people you love are happy and healthy. Everything else is just sprinkles on the sundae.
Author: Paul Walker

Quote: You can't go back, Ever. You can't change the past. It just is. . . . This is our destiny. Not yours.
Author: Alyson Noel

Quote: Forbearance in the face of fate, beauty constant under torture, are not merely passive. They are a positive achievement, an explicit triumph.
Author: Thomas Mann
Origin: Death in Venice and Other Tales

Quote: I wish I could travel west nonstop chasing sunsets. And as the time zones move backwards, I could live forever if I just kept moving.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Never be bullied into silence. Never allow yourself to be made a victim. Accept no one's definition of your life; define yourself.
Author: Harvey Fierstein

Quote: Our lives were just beginning, our favorite moment was right now, our favorite songs were unwritten.
Author: Rob Sheffield

Quote: I like George Carlin's jokes. I like his humor. He's one of my heroes, and I like what he did with talking about everyday things.
Author: Steven Wright

Quote: The magic is only in what books say, how they stitched the patches of the universe together into one garment for us.
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: It's a fact that men make more money than women. That's why I became a man. Best decision of my life.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There are people who think that things that happen in fiction do not really happen. These people are wrong.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: What a kid I got, I told him about the birds and the bees and he told me about the butcher and my wife.
Author: Rodney Dangerfield

Quote: That would be the death of anyone - to recognize false hopes with a certainty. One mustn't know that. If it is offered, refuse!
Author: Jesse Ball

Quote: She had eyes like sunsets, and every time she blinked it felt like the end of the world, otherwise known as night.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If you need me I'll be napping in the supplies closet. The most important part of an attack is the planning.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Mum liked to say that some things happen for a reason, that sometimes obstacles were there to stop you from doing something stupid.
Author: Maggie Stiefvater

Quote: Insanity is everyone expecting you not to fall apart when you find out everything you believed in was a lie.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: A circular table that spins around is a great way to make a romantic dinner for two with three people less awkward. I'll pay for myself, I promise.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I would willingly pass my life writing and re-writing the same book - that one book every writer carries within him - the image of his own soul.
Author: Ignazio Silone

Quote: That's how I know they are dreams. Because the simple and plain and everyday things are the ones that we can never have. (Cassia Reyes)
Author: Ally Condie

Quote: Biggest mistake that people make is. That they forget that there is always next time. For any event, any situation and any circumstances.
Author: De philosopher Dj Kyos

Quote: PHOSPHORESCENCE. Now there's a word to lift your hat to... to find that phosphorescence, that light within, that's the genius behind poetry.
Author: Emily Dickinson

Quote: Pain is such a useful thing. It corrects us when we're wrong. It shapes our character. It teaches us that we're alive.
Author: C.J. Redwine

Quote: As great scientists have said and as all children know, it is above all by the imagination that we achieve perception, and compassion, and hope.
Author: Ursula K. Le Guin

Quote: I realize the thing about a guy you've spent your whole life loving from afar is that even though he's real you've really made most of him up.
Author: Kirsten Smith

Quote: It's not that some people have willpower and some don't... It's that some people are ready to change and others are not.
Author: James Gordon

Quote: Books, I don't know what you see in them. I can understand a person reading them, but I can't for the life of me see why people have to write them.
Author: Peter Ustinov

Quote: When the waves of love, extinguish the fire of resentment, then the dawn of peace on earth will begin.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The man who has done his level best... is a success, even though the world may write him down a failure.
Author: B. C. Forbes

Quote: Wisdom equals knowledge plus courage. You have to not only know what to do and when to do it, but you have to also be brave enough to follow through.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The job of the first eight pages is not to have the reader want to throw the book at the wall, during the first eight pages.
Author: David Foster Wallace

Quote: Success has always been easy to measure. It is the distance between one's origins and one's final achievement.
Author: Michael Korda

Quote: That point in the sky where yellow meets blue, that's a handshake I want to see at a #networking event. Sunglasses sold separately.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The most beautiful thing we can experience is the mysterious. It is the source of all true art and science.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: When we fulfill our function, which is to truly love ourselves and share love with others, then true happiness sets in.
Author: Gabrielle Bernstein
Origin: May Cause Miracles: A 40-Day Guidebook of Subtle Shifts for Radical Change and Unlimited Happiness

Quote: All this time I've hated myself for it. I thought I'd given it up for nothing. But if I hadn't fallen, I wouldn't have met you.
Author: Becca Fitzpatrick

Quote: Every reader exists to ensure for a certain book a modest immortality. Reading is, in this sense, a ritual of rebirth.
Author: Alberto Manguel

Quote: It [feminism] is mixed up with a muddled idea that women are free when they serve their employers but slaves when they help their husbands.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: No adolescent ever wants to be understood, which is why they complain about being misunderstood all the time.
Author: Stephen Fry

Quote: Be mindful and heart empty, because you've got no love left in it due to you having given it all away.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I used to go and flatten my nose against that window and absorb all I could of his art. It changed my life. I saw art then as I wanted to see it.
Author: Mary Cassatt

Quote: No distance of place or lapse of time can lessen the friendship of those who are thoroughly persuaded of each other's worth.
Author: Robert Southey

Quote: How is it that little children are so intelligent and men so stupid? It must be education that does it
Author: Alexandre Dumas

Quote: I want to grow old without facelifts. I want to have the courage to be loyal to the face I have made.
Author: Marilyn Monroe

Quote: If you want to succeed you should strike out on new paths, rather than travel the worn paths of accepted success.
Author: John D. Rockefeller

Quote: People see me laughing and telling jokes, but they had no idea after the show was over, I had no joy in my life, in my heart.
Author: Steve Harvey

Quote: The whole ability to look at the complexity of race and any sort of associated -ism and still find humor, that's a very interesting space.
Author: Rashid Johnson

Quote: Join us next time for Days of the Undead when Rachel learns her long lost brother is really a crown prince from outer space.
Author: Kim Harrison

Quote: Our love, that's real. Our currency, the dollar, that's imaginary. Invest in us, and I promise you that you won't lose your life's savings.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I melted into the dream as if I had always been there. I knew where I had come from; I knew where I was going.
Author: Chelsie Shakespeare

Quote: No thief, however skillful, can rob one of knowledge, and that is why knowledge is the best and safest treasure to acquire.
Author: L. Frank Baum

Quote: I'll wear a maze on a necklace, dangling over my chest, because if you want to get at my heart, you have to be ready to lose yourself.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: All bad poetry springs from genuine feeling. To be natural is to be obvious, and to be obvious is to be inartistic.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: If everyone could be a successful and rich author, there would be no point in working so hard. Where is the fun in that?
Author: L.A. Jones

Quote: When I lost her I gained the future, because she was my past, and she freed me to become who I was born to be.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The truth knocks on the door and you say, "Go away, I'm looking for the truth, "and so it goes away. Puzzling.
Author: Robert M. Pirsig
Origin: Zen and the Art of Motorcycle Maintenance: An Inquiry Into Values

Quote: As the future ripens in the past, so the past rots in the future --a terrible festival of dead leaves.
Author: Anna Akhmatova

Quote: Night always turns to day again as long as the sun shall rise, so shall it be for darkened dreams grown pale from compromise
Author: Tracy L. Conway
Origin: I Wandered from New Orleans: Poems from the South

Quote: Love is you wearing her favorite shirt of yours, just like you did yesterday and the day before. And the day before that too.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: As the light begins to intensify, so does my misery, and I wonder how it is possible to hurt so much when nothing is wrong.
Author: Tabitha Suzuma

Quote: Take responsibility for your own happiness, do not expect people or things to bring you happiness, or you could be disappointed.
Author: Rodolfo Costa
Origin: Advice My Parents Gave Me: and Other Lessons I Learned from My Mistakes

Quote: Our greatest opportunities are to let go and surrender to that which is greater than our egoistic needs and desires.
Author: Dashama Konah Gordon
Origin: Journey to Joyful: Transform Your Life with Pranashama Yoga

Quote: one of the best and the most painful things about time traveling has been the opportunity to see my mother alive.
Author: Audrey Niffenegger

Quote: You can be happy with money and you can be wretched with it. It depends on what kind of person you are. -- A Prologue to Love
Author: Taylor Caldwell

Quote: She said, "I'm having the stairs rebuilt," and I replied, "No need to get sexual with me." I'm a bring my own elevator kind of lover anyway.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Friendship is a difficult, dangerous job. It is also (though we rarely admit it) extremely exhausting.
Author: Elizabeth Bibesco

Quote: Laugh, and the world laughs with you; Weep, and you weep alone; For the sad old earth must borrow its mirth, But has trouble enough of its own.
Author: Ella Wheeler Wilcox

Quote: Pessimists never go on a voyage of discovery, equally so they never leave the shoreline in search of new horizons.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: I always say that the times in my life when I've been happiest are the times when I've seen, like, a sunset.
Author: Chris Evans

Quote: I keep my motivational book collection in the fridge. Hey, Who Moved My Cheese?! Did somebody let grandpa out of his cage again?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: In our country religion is not different from philosophy and religion & philosophy don't differ from science.
Author: Virchand Gandhi

Quote: There are wounds that never show on the body that are deeper and more hurtful than anything that bleeds.
Author: Laurell K. Hamilton

Quote: How quick and rushing life can sometimes seem, when at the same time it's so slow and sweet and everlasting.
Author: Graham Swift

Quote: No matter where we live on the planet or how difficult our situation seems to be, we have the ability to overcome and transcend our circumstances.
Author: Louise L. Hay

Quote: The things you do for yourself are gone when you are gone, but the things you do for others remain as your legacy.
Author: Kalu Ndukwe Kalu

Quote: Dear God! how beauty varies in nature and art. In a woman the flesh must be like marble; in a statue the marble must be like flesh.
Author: Victor Hugo

Quote: The wise are not wise because they make no mistakes. They are wise because they correct their mistakes as soon as they recognize them.
Author: Orson Scott Card

Quote: Because there was a hunger in me to see everything and do everything. I wanted to be everyone I saw. I wasn't enough for me. Can you understand that?
Author: Sidney Sheldon

Quote: The most beautiful experience we can have is the mysterious. It is the fundamental emotion that stands at the cradle of true art and true science.
Author: Albert Einstein
Origin: The World As I See It

Quote: The British do not expect happiness. I had the impression, all the time that I lived there, that they do not want to be happy; they want to be right.
Author: Quentin Crisp

Quote: I try to give all my characters a sense of humor, so I guess I feel like I have done comedy, but maybe I'm better known for drama.
Author: Kathy Baker

Quote: You couldn't erase the past. You couldn't even change it. But sometimes life offered you the opportunity to put it right.
Author: Ann Brashares
Origin: Girls In Pants: The Third Summer of the Sisterhood

Quote: It is forbidden to kill; therefore all murderers are punished unless they kill in large numbers and to the sound of trumpets.
Author: Voltaire

Quote: If you truly believe in the value of life, you care about all of the weakest and most vulnerable members of society.
Author: Joni Eareckson Tada

Quote: I'm sorry if any of you are catholic. I'm not sorry if you're offended, I'm actually just sorry by the fact that you're catholic
Author: Bill Hicks

Quote: Have you realized that today is the tomorrow you talked about yesterday? It is your responsibility to change your life for the better.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: As a fan of Agatha Christie, I think a brilliant mystery novel would be trying to identify the meat contents in a McDonald's hamburger.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: You get these moments in the ring that live forever. That's what Muhammad Ali accomplished, and I hope that I have, too.
Author: Sugar Ray Leonard

Quote: It is more fun to talk with someone who doesn't use long, difficult words but rather short, easy words like "What about lunch?
Author: A.A. Milne

Quote: It is reasonable to love the Absolute absolutely for the same reason it is reasonable to love the relative relatively.
Author: Peter Kreeft

Quote: Temptation is the feeling we get when encountered by an opportunity to do what we innately know we shouldn't.
Author: Steve Maraboli

Quote: I think being a parent is knowing how to love. Sometimes love is discipline, sometimes it's humor, sometimes it's listening.
Author: Melissa Etheridge

Quote: She seemed to think that one of the perks of marriage was that it gave you rights of comment and intrusion over single people's love lives.
Author: J.K. Rowling

Quote: Happiness is such a fragile thing, isn't it? So easily burst, like a bubble blown by a child, and always on the verge of being carried away.
Author: Nenia Campbell

Quote: To heal physically, one must heal the emotional aspect of the issue first or it will resurface in another way.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: Sweet is the memory of distant friends! Like the mellow rays of the departing sun, it falls tenderly, yet sadly, on the heart.
Author: Washington Irving

Quote: In every journey comes a moment... one like no other. And in that moment, you must decide between who you are... and who you want to be.
Author: J.C. Marino

Quote: I find the best way to love someone is not to change them, but instead, help them reveal the greatest version of themselves.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Let me just pause a minute and drink in this moment. And if you film it, I'll be able to get free refills for life.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Intelligence entails a strong mind, but genius entails a heart of a lion in tune with a strong mind.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: There are no forbidden questions in science, no matters too sensitive or delicate to be probed, no sacred truths.
Author: Carl Sagan

Quote: The greatest happiness of life is the conviction that we are loved; loved for ourselves, or rather, loved in spite of ourselves.
Author: Victor Hugo

Quote: How terribly sad it was that people are made in such a way that they get used to something as extraordinary as living.
Author: Jostein Gaarder

Quote: Shane dragged Eve's suitcase into the room and dumped it on the floor beside her bed. "Hey, Dark Princess? Here's your crap. Also, bite me.
Author: Rachel Caine

Quote: Who is more to be pitied, a writer bound and gagged by policemen or one living in perfect freedom who has nothing more to say?
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: There's things that happen in a person's life that are so scorched in the memory and burned into the heart that there's no forgetting them.
Author: John Boyne

Quote: The middle finger is a great body language tool for letting people know you're upset. Poetry isn't quite as effective in a fit of road rage.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A girl can wait for the right man to come along but in the meantime that doesn't mean she can't have a wonderful time with all the wrong ones
Author: Cher

Quote: There is only one sin. and that is theft... when you tell a lie, you steal someones right to the truth.
Author: Khaled Hosseini

Quote: The world is dark, and light is precious. Come closer, dear reader. You must trust me. I am telling you a story.
Author: Kate DiCamillo

Quote: Alone, alone, all, all alone, Alone on a wide wide sea! And never a saint took pity on My soul in agony.
Author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
Origin: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner

Quote: I tell you: one must still have chaos in one, to give birth to a dancing star. I tell you: you have still chaos in you.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: Moving forward implies MOTION when in all actuality it may be simply standing STILL and seeing the salvation of the Lord.
Author: John Paul Warren

Quote: I went away in my head, into a book. That was where I went whenever real life was too hard or too inflexible.
Author: Neil Gaiman
Origin: The Ocean at the End of the Lane

Quote: No one ever does live happily ever after, but we leave the children to find that out for themselves.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: Love is not the absence of logic but logic examined and recalculated heated and curved to fit inside the contours of the heart
Author: Tammara Webber

Quote: A leap of faith doesn't involve leg strength. Still, I can't take any chances, so I've been doing squats.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Zebra is the Piano of the Animal Kingdom

Quote: Animals have never betrayed me. They are an easy prey, as I have been throughout my career. So we feel the same. I love them.
Author: Brigitte Bardot

Quote: Freedom is the only worthy goal in life. It is won by disregarding things that lie beyond our control.
Author: Epictetus

Quote: Yes, it was love at first sight. I feel that after all these years, I have finally found my soul mate.
Author: Barbara Hershey

Quote: I may not be able to remember your name, but I remember your address and what time you leave in the mornings. Your name isn't Rob, is it?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The man is happiest who lives from day to day and asks no more, garnering the simple goodness of life.
Author: Euripides

Quote: It is better to lose your pride with someone you love rather than to lose that someone you love with your useless pride.
Author: John Ruskin

Quote: Life is too sweet and too short to express our affection with just our thumbs. Touch is meant for more than a keyboard.
Author: Kristin Armstrong

Quote: You are never too old to start over. Every day is a chance to make changes to create the life we want.
Author: Karon Waddell

Quote: In struggling against anguish one never produces serenity; the struggle against anguish only produces new forms of anguish.
Author: Simone Weil

Quote: I'm really happy I went to a Catholic school because a lot of the repressive tactics they use make for great senses of humor.
Author: Denis Leary

Quote: I love you, Missy girl. Even if I can't be with you, know that I'm here. So, that's it. More than the stars, Taylor. More than the stars.
Author: Chelsea M. Cameron

Quote: They should know that just because things get difficult, it's no reason to believe God is on vacation.
Author: Harry H. Harrison Jr.
Origin: 1001 Things Every Teen Should Know Before They Leave Home:

Quote: It just happens to be the way that I'm made. I have to write things down to feel I fully comprehend them.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: The calling of an author is more than just to entertain, but also to share ones experiences with the world.
Author: M.J. Stoddard

Quote: If you had hope, maybe you could find a way to make things change,. Because if you thought about it, there were so many reasons to try.
Author: Suzanne Collins
Origin: Gregor and the Code of Claw

Quote: It's a sad day when you find out that it's not accident or time or fortune, but just yourself that kept things from you.
Author: Lillian Hellman

Quote: You are the ultimate truth of your life. Everything that happens to you depends on you and your thoughts.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: A person who has been punished is not thereby simply less inclined to behave in a given way; at best, he learns how to avoid punishment.
Author: B.F. Skinner

Quote: I have a dream." "Is your dream very big?" "No." "Well is it very grand?" "Not either." "Neither?" "Neither." "What is it then?" "It is very shiny.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: We may be surprised at the people we find in heaven. God has a soft spot for sinners. His standards are quite low.
Author: Desmond Tutu

Quote: If you own the most profitable manure distribution warehouse in the world, you might not like the smell of success.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'm quite detached from failure and success. Once a shooting is done, I kind of close that chapter in my life.
Author: Ranbir Kapoor

Quote: I am never without my lyric book. If anything inspirational happens, I have it there so nothing's forgotten.
Author: Gabrielle Aplin

Quote: Acquire knowledge and enjoy its freedom or allow someone to fill you with theirs and live within the jurisdiction of theirs.
Author: Ikechukwu Izuakor

Quote: If I saw you hitchhiking, I'd smile and return your thumb's up, just for you doing such a great job of being a positive roadside influence.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Perfection of character is this: to live each day as if it were your last, without frenzy, without apathy, without pretence.
Author: Marcus Aurelius

Quote: In order to live a life of purpose, do not focus on the size of your audience; focus instead on the circle of influence God has given you.
Author: Rosette Mugidde Wamambe

Quote: Suffering just means you're having a bad dream. Happiness means you're having a good dream. Enlightenment means getting out of the dream altogether.
Author: Jed McKenna

Quote: When you write about what you dream, you become a writer. When you dream about what you write, you become haunted by a curse.
Author: A. Saleh

Quote: Civilization is only possible for deeply unpleasant animals. It is only an ape that can be truly civilized.
Author: Mark Rowlands
Origin: The Philosopher and the Wolf: Lessons from the Wild on Love, Death, and Happiness

Quote: Because horror on Earth is real and it is every day. It is like a flower or like the sun; it cannot be contained.
Author: Alice Sebold

Quote: I mean, if the relationship can't survive the long term, why on earth would it be worth my time and energy for the short term?
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: The problem is not that you have problems; the problem is that you see having problems as a problem.
Author: Maurice Makalu
Origin: The Goddess Who Lost Her Weight: Inspiration For Enlightenment With Abundance, A Spiritual Guide To Weight Loss

Quote: There will be haters, there will be doubters, there will be non-believers, and then there will be you proving them wrong.
Author: Unknown 21

Quote: If you reject the food, ignore the customs, fear the religion, and avoid the people, you might better stay home.
Author: James A. Michener

Quote: All men are created equal. Now matter how hard they try, they can never erase those words. That is what America is about.
Author: Harvey Milk
Origin: The Harvey Milk Interviews: In His Own Words

Quote: The true New Yorker secretly believes that people living anywhere else have to be, in some sense, kidding.
Author: John Updike

Quote: I've never used my weight to get a laugh. That is, used my size as the subject for humor. You never saw me stuck in a door-way or stuck in a chair.
Author: Fatty Arbuckle

Quote: Lady Gaga is the present and the future. She is the most revolutionary and inspirational artist. She is fearless and daring.
Author: Donatella Versace

Quote: For this reason I tell you: When you pray and ask for something, believe that you have received it, and you will be given whatever you ask for.
Author: Anonymous

Quote: Life is too short to worry about anything. You had better enjoy it because the next day promises nothing.
Author: Eric Davis

Quote: I still believe that love is the most powerful force in the world, even though I am yet to experience it fully.
Author: Rufus Wainwright

Quote: why can't we control our anger? because we love perfection. make a little room for imperfection in our lives.
Author: Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Quote: If someone is going down the wrong road, he doesn't need motivation to speed him up. What he needs is education to turn him around.
Author: Jim Rohn

Quote: We all know that Art is not truth. Art is a lie that makes us realize the truth, at least the truth that is given to us to understand.
Author: Pablo Picasso

Quote: A halo surrounded the grim reaper nun, Sister Maria. (By the way- I like this human idea of the grim reaper. I like the scythe. It amuses me.)
Author: Markus Zusak

Quote: Impending doom, it was a familiar sweater, we all wore it and as scratchy as it felt against our skin, we kept it on.
Author: Holly Hood

Quote: Eddie Money and Johnny Cash should have collaborated. I'd have paid good last name to see them in concert.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Merits of Marthaism, and How Being Named Susan Can Benefit You

Quote: No man is offended by another man's admiration of the woman he loves; it is the woman only who can make it a torment.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: So many believe that it is love that grows, but it is the knowing that grows and love simply expands to contain it.
Author: Wm. Paul Young

Quote: If a writer stops observing he is finished. Experience is communicated by small details intimately observed.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: Read everything. Read fiction and non-fiction, read hot best sellers and the classics you never got around to in college.
Author: Jennifer Weiner

Quote: When you are sorrowful look again in your heart, and you shall see that in truth you are weeping for that which has been your delight.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: Literature is strewn with the wreckage of those who have minded beyond reason the opinion of others.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: We do know that no person can be saved except through Christ. We do not know that only those who know Him can be saved by Him.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: A book, too, can be a star, a living fire to lighten the darkness, leading out into the expanding universe.
Author: Madeleine L'Engle

Quote: The word long is short, and so is the word short, but why is the word love as long as long? Shouldn't it be longer?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Bodily exercise, when compulsory, does no harm to the body; but knowledge which is acquired under compulsion obtains no hold on the mind.
Author: Plato

Quote: Leadership is the art of getting someone else to do something you want done because he wants to do it.
Author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

Quote: Be glad of life because it gives you the chance to love and to work and to play and to look up at the stars.
Author: Henry Van Dyke

Quote: It is not very difficult to build world peace. We just have to be kind to each other and treat each other with great care.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: You can turn painful situations around through laughter. If you can find humor in anything, even poverty, you can survive it.
Author: Bill Cosby

Quote: But instead of spending our lives running towards our dreams, we are often running away from a fear of failure or a fear of criticism.
Author: Eric Wright

Quote: I truly believe that if you have more friends than books, you have too many friends. Or not enough books. Probably both.
Author: Zoë Marriott

Quote: Do not be afraid. Do not be satisfied with mediocrity. Put out into the deep and let down your nets for a catch.
Author: Pope John Paul II

Quote: Do not try to explain feelings. Live everything intensely and treasure what you feel as a gift from God.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: The race is long, and I am sprinting. If I ever see her again, I'll probably be too out of breath to tell her I love her.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: The most confused you will ever get is when you try to convince your heart and spirit of something your mind knows is a lie.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: My father chose my name, and my last name was chosen by my ancestors. That's enough, I myself choose my way
Author: Ali Shariati

Quote: A woman may very well form a friendship with a man, but for this to endure, it must be assisted by a little physical antipathy.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: The fame of heroes owes little to the extent of their conquests and all to the success of the tributes paid to them.
Author: Jean Genet

Quote: Why, then, did I always feel as if his happiness was my responsibility? It wasn't fair for him to burden me with that. It had never been fair.
Author: Melanie Benjamin

Quote: The first stab of love is like a sunset, a blaze of color -- oranges, pearly pinks, vibrant purples...
Author: Anna Godbersen

Quote: I threw my hands in the air and said show me something. He said, "if you dare come a little closer".
Author: Rihanna

Quote: Everyone seems to have a clear idea of how other people should lead their lives, but none about his or her own.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Let love bloom like a flower with the fragrance of the garden of your heart filled with beauty, joy, and happiness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: They say sarcasm is the lowest form of wit, "Valkyrie said. China glanced at her. "They've obviously never met me.
Author: Derek Landy

Quote: Brazil is where I belong, the place that feels like home. They love their family, their country and God, and are not afraid to let anybody know it.
Author: Dionne Warwick

Quote: My dream is of a place and a time where America will once again be seen as the last best hope of earth.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: Being negative only makes a difficult journey more difficult. You may be given a cactus, but you don't have to sit on it.
Author: Joyce Meyer
Origin: Approval Addiction: Overcoming Your Need to Please Everyone

Quote: There isn't any formula or method. You learn to love by loving - by paying attention and doing what one thereby discovers has to be done.
Author: Aldous Huxley

Quote: I knew that I had been partially right in the storeroom above the bar on Christmas Day. Whoever I had become had to die.
Author: Craig Ferguson
Origin: American on Purpose: The Improbable Adventures of an Unlikely Patriot

Quote: Can you look without the voice in your head commenting, drawing conclusions, comparing, or trying to figure something out?
Author: Eckhart Tolle
Origin: A New Earth: Awakening to Your Life's Purpose

Quote: The rules of friendship are tacit, unconscious; they are not rational. In business, though, you have to think rationally.
Author: Steven Pinker

Quote: Any formal attack on ignorance is bound to fail because the masses are always ready to defend their most precious possession - their ignorance.
Author: Hendrik Willem van Loon

Quote: Every life has a destiny... the trick is to discover it before then end of your life. Otherwise, you will have too many regrets.
Author: Kevin J. Anderson

Quote: I just bought a bag of potato chips. It was a smart buy, because when this world runs out of clean air, I'll have plenty in that one little purchase.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Absence diminishes small loves and increases great ones, as the wind blows out the candle and fans the bonfire.
Author: François de La Rochefoucauld

Quote: The future was one thing that could never be broken, because it had not yet had the chance to be anything.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: I am certain of nothing but the holiness of the Heart's affections and the truth of the Imagination.
Author: John Keats

Quote: When you have seen as much of life as I have, you will not underestimate the power of obsessive love.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Half- Blood Prince

Quote: How beautiful would it be if we could just see souls instead of bodies? To see love and compassion instead of curves.
Author: Karen Quan
Origin: Write like no one is reading 2

Quote: I used to be a bumper sticker kind of writer. Now I'm more developed, and my writing often takes up whole bumpers.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: If they tell you that she died of sleeping pills you must know that she died of a wasting grief, of a slow bleeding at the soul.
Author: Clifford Odets

Quote: You say a new era in art is preparing; you sensed it coming; continue your studies without weakening. God will do the rest.
Author: Paul Cezanne

Quote: Heaven is an idea constructed by man to help him cope with the fact that life on earth is both brutally short and, paradoxically, far too long.
Author: Andrew Davidson

Quote: I'm not courageous. In fact, when I shadow box I wear boxing gloves that are outfitted with flashlights.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: ...God created the world in six days. On the seventh day, he rested. On the eighth day, he started getting complaints. And it hasn't stopped since.
Author: James Scott Bell

Quote: Hard work is what you do to make ends meet, easy work is getting others to do the hard work for you.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: But that's just it; I can either focus on what I have lost, or what I have gained, and I choose the latter.
Author: Angie Smith
Origin: Letting Go of Perfect: Women, Expectations, and Authenticity

Quote: Woe to the man whose heart has not learned while young to hope, to love - and to put its trust in life.
Author: Joseph Conrad

Quote: Good books tell the truth, even when they're about things that never have been and never will be. They're truthful in a different way.
Author: Stanisław Lem

Quote: Life is better than death, I believe, if only because it is less boring, and because it has fresh peaches in it.
Author: Alice Walker
Origin: Home Girls: A Black Feminist Anthology

Quote: There is an ancient tribal proverb I once heard in India. It says that before we can see properly we must first shed our tears to clear the way.
Author: Libba Bray

Quote: It's very simple. Liars initiate, haters carry forward, fools spread, idiots believe and mindful void.
Author: Aditya Ajmera

Quote: I have a deep love for life and my fellow human beings. I try to understand everything that everybody does, even if it seems wrong to me.
Author: Steve Vai

Quote: Love meant jumping off a cliff and trusting that a certain person would be there to catch you at the bottom.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Education is the light switch for the mind. You have to turn it on to see the world in your own way.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Life after love was possible. I was proof. Loss taught you about yourself, burrowed in the dark parts of your soul and ate you from the inside out.
Author: Hailey Edwards

Quote: I still haven't found the humor in getting hit by a cement truck. My knees still hurt when I think about it, so no jokes about that yet.
Author: Adam DeVine

Quote: Inhale when I inhale. Exhale when I exhale. Breathe with me, for two beating hearts breathing one breath together become one.
Author: Christina Westover

Quote: If a person loves only one other person and is indifferent to all others, his love is not love but a symbiotic attachment, or an enlarged egotism.
Author: Erich Fromm

Quote: Waiting for you is like waiting for rain in this drought. Useless and disappointing."~ Sam (Hilary Duff), A Cinderella Story
Author: Hilary Duff

Quote: Laughter and tears are both responses to frustration and exhaustion. I myself prefer to laugh, since there is less cleaning do to do afterward.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: The search for something permanent is one of the deepest of the instincts leading men to philosophy.
Author: Bertrand Russell

Quote: Whether we like it or not, the one justification for the existence of all religions is death, they need death as much as we need bread to eat.
Author: José Saramago

Quote: Integrity is a bugger, it really is. Lying can get you into difficulties, but to really wind up in the crappers try telling nothing but the truth.
Author: David Mitchell

Quote: It is evident as a matter of logic that, since they (world religions) disagree, not more than one of them can be true.
Author: Bertrand Russell

Quote: Don't be a fool. Don't give up something important to hold onto someone who can't even say they love you.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: If I lived a million lives, I would've felt a million feelings and I still would've fallen a million times for you.
Author: Robert M. Drake

Quote: The tricky part about discovering our giftedness is that it may be in an area that feels unexpected.
Author: Meg Meeker
Origin: The 10 Habits of Happy Mothers: Reclaiming Our Passion, Purpose, and Sanity

Quote: Going round and around inside a dryer can be fatal, whereas pasta is rarely fatal. Unless Isabelle makes it.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: Those who educate children well are more to be honored than they who produce them; for these only gave them life, those the art of living well.
Author: Aristotle

Quote: All the papers that matter live off their advertisements, and the advertisers exercise an indirect censorship over news.
Author: George Orwell

Quote: It doesn't matter who you are, where you come from. The ability to triumph begins with you - always.
Author: Oprah Winfrey

Quote: Ability is what you're capable of doing. Motivation determines what you do. Attitude determines how well you do it.
Author: Lou Holtz

Quote: A sense of the divine presence and indwelling bears the soul towards heaven as upon the wings of eagles.
Author: Charles Haddon Spurgeon

Quote: the nurse smiled and patted my arm. "Don't give up yet. Sometimes when we think God has written The End, what he really means is The Beginning.
Author: Rachel Van Dyken

Quote: What I am is how I came out. No one's perfect and you just have to accept your flaws and learn to love yourself.
Author: Kelly Brook

Quote: My love for you grows daily, and all it takes is exposure to your sunny disposition, coupled with watering it with coffee.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When the time is ripe for certain things, these things appear in different places in the manner of violets coming to light in early spring.
Author: Farkas Bolyai

Quote: The first time he'd held her hand, it felt so good that it crowded out all the bad things. It felt better than anything had ever hurt.
Author: Rainbow Rowell

Quote: Hope makes people good, a lot of the time. You hope for a brighter future, and resentment is outweighed.
Author: Daisy Ridley

Quote: All young people, regardless of sexual orientation or identity, deserve a safe and supportive environment in which to achieve their full potential.
Author: Harvey Milk

Quote: Things Happen and once they start happening you pretty much just to hold on for dear life and see where they drop you when they stop.
Author: Meg Rosoff

Quote: Using my nipples as bait, I went fishing for compliments. I got a few bites, but nothing to write about in Field & Stream.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Just remember this, my girl, when you look up in the sky you can see the stars and still not see the light.
Author: Jack Tempchin

Quote: If we thought more for ourselves we would have very many more bad books and very many more good ones.
Author: Georg Christoph Lichtenberg

Quote: I love the sound of the trees in the breeze. If the forest is so clearly musical, why can't it play the guitar while I sing Nirvana covers?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Buddha had said: Each of us is a God. Each of us knows all. We need only open our minds to hear our own wisdom.
Author: Dan Brown

Quote: The difference between you and everyone else, is everyone else. And that's a lot, so you should feel special.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I had a dream about you last night... you kept meowing at people and licking yourself it was not unlike you normally.
Author: Nicole McKay
Origin: I Had a Dream About You

Quote: I'm not after fame and success and fortune and power. It's mostly that I want to have a good job and have good friends; that's the good stuff in life.
Author: Drew Barrymore

Quote: During my darkest hour, life threw me some curves. Thankfully they were in the shape of a woman's body.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If you surround yourself with flowers of love, peace, and kindness, you will always find yourself in a garden of joy and happiness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I had a dream about you last night. We stopped telling each other about our dreams when we realized we were still inside them.
Author: Michael Summers
Origin: I Had a Dream About You

Quote: An experiment is a question which science poses to Nature and a measurement is the recording of Nature's answer.
Author: Max Planck

Quote: We as economic society are going to have to pay our whole population to go to school and pay it to stay at school.
Author: R. Buckminster Fuller
Origin: Education Automation: Freeing the Scholar to Return to His Studies

Quote: So you want me to go to a human orgy, where I will not be welcome, and you want us to leave before I get to enjoy myself? ~Eric Northman
Author: Charlaine Harris

Quote: The teacher who is indeed wise does not bid you to enter the house of his wisdom but rather leads you to the threshold of your mind.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: Ye are Blood of my Blood, and Bone of my Bone, I give ye my Body, that we Two might be One. I give ye my Spirit, 'til our Life shall be Done.
Author: Diana Gabaldon

Quote: The first glass is for myself, the second for my friends, the third for good humor, and the forth for my enemies.
Author: William Temple

Quote: Winter is the time for comfort, for good food and warmth, for the touch of a friendly hand and for a talk beside the fire: it is the time for home.
Author: Edith Sitwell

Quote: Men love women who are courageous for it means they can go all the way with him in his pursuit of his good dreams and intentions.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: Our forgiving love toward men is the evidence of God's forgiving love in us. It is a necessary condition of the prayer of faith.
Author: Andrew Murray
Origin: With Christ in the School of Prayer

Quote: That's the great thing about art. Anybody can do it if you just believe. With practice, you can make great paintings.
Author: Damien Hirst

Quote: Love and religion! thought Clarissa, going back into the drawing room, tingling all over. How detestable, how detestable they are!
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: One has to take a somewhat bold and dangerous line with this existence: especially as, whatever happens, we are bound to lose it.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: Give the pupils something to do, not something to learn; and the doing is of such a nature as to demand thinking; learning naturally results.
Author: John Dewey

Quote: If you fear rejection, you won't embrace acceptance. But don't push yourself onto others, because they won't pull you close.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I love Thanksgiving because it's a holiday that is centered around food and family, two things that are of utmost importance to me.
Author: Marcus Samuelsson

Quote: Love the world and yourself in it, move through it as though it offers no resistance, as though the world is your natural element.
Author: Audrey Niffenegger

Quote: Dance music is my love, is my passion, is my life. I live for my fans and take my art very seriously.
Author: Steve Aoki

Quote: Freddie often fold me that you've got to be happy when you can, because life won't wait for you to take the time. And she was right.
Author: April Genevieve Tucholke
Origin: Between the Devil and the Deep Blue Sea

Quote: The advance of regret can be so gradual that it is impossible to say "yesterday I was happy, today I am not.
Author: E.M. Forster

Quote: He thought that the rose was to be found in its own eternity and not in his words; and that we may mention or allude to a thing, but not express it.
Author: Jorge Luis Borges

Quote: My perfect day is sitting in a room with some blank paper. That's heaven. That's gold and anything else is just a waste of time.
Author: Cormac McCarthy

Quote: Every person, all the events of your life are there because you have drawn them there. What you choose to do with them is up to you.
Author: Richard Bach

Quote: I believe there's an inner power that makes winners or losers. And the winners are the ones who really listen to the truth of their hearts.
Author: Sylvester Stallone

Quote: A flower is a gift of love from the universe given to you. So cherish it, enjoy it with a full blissful heart.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The best index to a person's character is how he treats people who can't do him any good, and how he treats people who can't fight back.
Author: Abigail Van Buren

Quote: Your battles inspired me - not the obvious material battles but those that were fought and won behind your forehead.
Author: James Joyce

Quote: See, the problem is that God gives men a brain and a penis, and only enough blood to run one at a time.
Author: Robin Williams

Quote: [Christ] will come again. But we must look to Scripture, not human thought, for our guide to preparing.
Author: David Jeremiah
Origin: Until Christ Returns: Living Faithfully Today While We Wait for Our Glorious Tomorrow

Quote: We do learn and develop when we are exposed to those who are greater than we are. Perhaps this is the chief way we mature.
Author: Madeleine L'Engle
Origin: Two- Part Invention: The Story of a Marriage

Quote: You are mine, I am yours; you may be sure of this. You've been locked inside my heart, the key has been thrown away; within it, you must always stay.
Author: Andrew Davidson

Quote: And people who don't dream, who don't have any kind of imaginative life, they must... they must go nuts. I can't imagine that.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: Success has nothing to do with what you gain in life or accomplish for yourself. It's what you do for others.
Author: Danny Thomas

Quote: People without hope not only don't write novels, but what is more to the point, they don't read them.
Author: Flannery O'Connor

Quote: Discipline is the soul of an army. It makes small numbers formidable; procures success to the weak, and esteem to all.
Author: George Washington

Quote: You never really understand a person until you consider things from his point of view... Until you climb inside of his skin and walk around in it.
Author: Harper Lee

Quote: In the beginning there was faith - which is childish; trust - which is vain; and illusion - which is dangerous.
Author: Elie Wiesel

Quote: CUSTOMER: If I were to, say... meet the love of my life in this bookshop, what section do you think they would be standing in?
Author: Jen Campbell
Origin: Weird Things Customers Say in Bookshops

Quote: She looked like the kind of woman I could fall in love with. Trouble is, she was standing next to the kind of woman I'd like to make love to.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: The sun rose and tinted the sky rose, that floral red teeming with romance, and it filtered in thoughts of the love I used to have for her.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The line between failure and success is so fine that we scarcely know when we pass it: so fine that we are often on the line and do not know it.
Author: Elbert Hubbard

Quote: Don't let a thief into your house three times. The first time was enough. The second time was a chance. The third time means you're stupid.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: All his life, Klaus had believed that if you read enough books, you could solve any problem, but now he wasn't so sure.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: See? This is why I'm not religious. I couldn't possibly keep my mouth shut long enough to get along with everyone else.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: Your mind is the knife that cuts the continuum of space and time into neat slices of linear experience.
Author: Deepak Chopra
Origin: The Way of the Wizard: Twenty Spiritual Lessons for Creating the Life You Want

Quote: There is desire in the perfect, beauty in the imperfect. Thus I lust over the flawless, and fall amorously forceless to the flawed.
Author: Ilyas Kassam
Origin: Reminiscence of the Present: Spiritual Encounters of the Analytically Insane

Quote: Athletes who are able to stay completely focused in pursuit of their dreams are the ones that are most likely to become champions.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: I hope I'm not a tourist attraction - I'm sure that they come here really because St. Andrews is just amazing, a beautiful place.
Author: Prince William

Quote: I had a dream about you last night. The champagne was non-alcoholic. You didn't notice, and laughed at my jokes anyway.
Author: Michael Summers
Origin: I Had a Dream About You

Quote: The one ironclad rule is that I have to try. I have to walk into my writing room and pick up my pen every weekday morning.
Author: Anne Tyler

Quote: The goal of life is to make your heartbeat match the beat of the universe, to match your nature with Nature.
Author: Joseph Campbell
Origin: A Joseph Campbell Companion: Reflections on the Art of Living

Quote: Failure results from lack of focus and half trust. Success results from complete devotion and utmost trust.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I hope to use dialogue and culture as a means of bringing people of various cultures together, and using that as a way to resolve conflict.
Author: Herbie Hancock

Quote: Suffering has been stronger than all other teaching, and has taught me to understand what your heart used to be.
Author: Charles Dickens

Quote: I would be most content if my children grew up to be the kind of people who think decorating consists mostly of building enough bookshelves.
Author: Anna Quindlen

Quote: There are two kinds of fools. One says, "This is old, and therefore good." And one says, "This is new, and therefore better.
Author: John Brunner

Quote: Out of suffering have emerged the strongest souls; the most massive characters are seared with scars.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: Indeed, learning to write may be part of learning to read. For all I know, writing comes out of a superior devotion to reading.
Author: Eudora Welty

Quote: To conquer oneself is the best and noblest victory; to be vanquished by one's own nature is the worst and most ignoble defeat.
Author: Plato

Quote: It is in the thirties that we want friends. In the forties we know they won't save us any more than love did.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: I've always believed that happiness is just around the corner. The trick is fining the right corner.
Author: Eric Weiner
Origin: The Geography of Bliss: One Grump's Search for the Happiest Places in the World

Quote: The attempt to develop a sense of humor and to see things in a humorous light is some kind of a trick learned while mastering the art of living.
Author: Viktor E. Frankl

Quote: If I'm right, the only reason our species is still around is because of our friendship with the canines.
Author: Bruce Cameron

Quote: When you are kind to someone in trouble, you hope they'll remember and be kind to someone else. And it'll become like a wildfire.
Author: Whoopi Goldberg

Quote: Behind this mask there is more than just flesh. Beneath this mask there is an idea... and ideas are bulletproof.
Author: Alan Moore

Quote: I know I'm not going to be in your head all the time. But once you know me, I'll be forever in your heart.
Author: Crystal Woods
Origin: Write like no one is reading

Quote: Along every step on our journey through life, our mind is being programmed. If we are not programming it ourselves, someone else is doing it to us.
Author: Joseph Rain

Quote: Do not spoil what you have by desiring what you have not; remember that what you now have was once among the things you only hoped for.
Author: Epicurus

Quote: Rhetoric may be defined as the faculty of observing in any given case the available means of persuasion. This is not a function of any other art.
Author: Aristotle

Quote: And God help Bruce Springsteen when they decide he's no longer God... They'll turn on him, and I hope he survives it.
Author: John Lennon

Quote: My hometown I grew up in in Michigan is really tiny, and they are so excited for all of my adventures my whole life.
Author: Toni Trucks

Quote: The stupid neither forgive nor forget; the naive forgive and forget; the wise forgive but do not forget.
Author: Thomas Szasz

Quote: When people see some things as beautiful, other things become ugly. When people see some things as good, other things become bad.
Author: Lao Tzu

Quote: I hope the millions of people I've touched have the optimism and desire to share their goals and hard work and persevere with a positive attitude.
Author: Michael Jordan

Quote: He felt now that he was not simply close to her, but that he did not know where he ended and she began.
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: That was the day that I promised I'd never sing of love that does not exist. but darling, You are the only exception
Author: Hayley Williams

Quote: If you've had the right kind of education, it's amazing how many things you can find to feel guilty about.
Author: Pete McCarthy
Origin: McCarthy's Bar: A Journey of Discovery In Ireland

Quote: There is a deep sadness to American poverty, greater than the sadness of any other kind. It's because America has such an ideology of success.
Author: Will Self

Quote: Grown-ups never understand anything by themselves, and it is tiresome for children to be always and forever explaining things to them
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: Helplessness induces hopelessness, and history attests that loss of hope and not loss of lives is what decides the issue of war.
Author: B. H. Liddell Hart

Quote: I began to realize that when people experience the love of God, it casts out their fear and frees them from guilt.
Author: Joseph Prince

Quote: Change is the law of life. And those who look only to the past or present are certain to miss the future.
Author: John F. Kennedy

Quote: I just think if you don't say the honest thing, sometimes the honest thing never becomes true, you know, and I-
Author: John Green

Quote: We cannot improve ourselves or our country without improving our educational system and educating ourselves.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: If you love something so much let it go. If it comes back it was meant to be; if it doesn't it never was
Author: Albert Schweitzer

Quote: I figured anybody who talked about church as much as she did was using it a little like cocaine anyhow.
Author: Keith Ablow

Quote: The way you walk, way you talk, way you say my name; it's beautiful, wonderful, don't you ever change.
Author: Taylor Swift

Quote: Don't worry about hurting me, if that's what you're afraid of. I want to get hurt. At least I'll feel something for a change.
Author: Katie Kacvinsky

Quote: I have rubbed shoulders with the rich, the powerful, and the armless. It's how to network when handshakes aren't an option.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Norway or Switzerland are two marvelous countries, I very much admire, the most advanced countries in the world in fact with great qualities of life.
Author: Jose Manuel Barroso

Quote: Have you ever noticed that anybody driving slower than you is an idiot, and anyone going faster than you is a maniac?
Author: George Carlin

Quote: When you arise in the morning think of what a privilege it is to be alive, to think, to enjoy, to love ...
Author: Marcus Aurelius

Quote: Once upon a time there was a boy who loved a girl, and her laughter was a question he wanted to spend his whole life answering.
Author: Nicole Krauss

Quote: Genuine and true love is so rare that when you encounter it in any form, it's a wonderful thing, to be utterly cherished in whatever form it takes.
Author: Gwendoline Christie

Quote: I write entirely to find out what I'm thinking, what I'm looking at, what I see and what it means. What I want and what I fear.
Author: Joan Didion

Quote: I have lived a thousand lives and I've loved a thousand loves. I've walked on distant worlds and seen the end of time. Because I read.
Author: George R.R. Martin

Quote: I'm the kind of boy that can fall in love with any girl because I love with the heart, not the eyes.
Author: Niall Horan

Quote: Then love knew it was called love. And when I lifted my eyes to your name, suddenly your heart showed me my way
Author: Pablo Neruda
Origin: Veinte poemas de amor y una canción desesperada; Cien sonetos de amor

Quote: We're here for a reason. I believe a bit of the reason is to throw little torches out to lead people through the dark.
Author: Whoopi Goldberg

Quote: I skimmed the pond scum with a spoon like broth in a soup bowl. Why does everything have to remind me of her?
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: I'll be more enthusiastic about encouraging thinking outside the box when there's evidence of any thinking going on inside it.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: You shouldn't judge someone until you've walk a mile through an underground tunnel in her uncomfortable shoes
Author: Ally Carter
Origin: I'd Tell You I Love You, But Then I'd Have to Kill You

Quote: When things get too complicated, it sometimes makes sense to stop and wonder: Have I asked the right question?
Author: Enrico Bombieri

Quote: If A is a success in life, then A equals x plus y plus z. Work is x; y is play; and z is keeping your mouth shut
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: Peter's destiny lay along a different path from John's. And your calling is unlike anyone else's. But the call remains the same: "Follow Me!
Author: Charles R. Swindoll

Quote: I nodded, looking at Rachel with respect. "You hit the Lord of the Titans in the eye with a blue plastic hairbrush.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: Know that true change is demonstrated only by your actions around everyone, not just certain people.
Author: Tanya R. Liverman

Quote: Thought I wanted overnight success, until I achieved it through hard work and the refusal to back down! What you earn, you keep.
Author: A.M. Hudson

Quote: This first glance of a soul which does not yet know itself is like dawn in the heavens; it is the awakening of something radiant and unknown.
Author: Victor Hugo

Quote: I think I'm greedy, but I'm not greedy for money - I think that can be a burden - I'm greedy for an exciting life.
Author: David Hockney

Quote: When every situation which life can offer is turned to the profit of spiritual growth, no situation can really be a bad one.
Author: Paul Brunton

Quote: I am very close to HIM, sometimes I think I am HIM, with my mood is the weather, bright and sunny forever.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: Newspaper people, once celebrated as founts of ribald humor and uncouth fun, have of late lost all their gaiety, and small wonder.
Author: Russell Baker

Quote: I've come to believe that in everyone's life, there's one undeniable moment of change, a set of circumstances that suddenly alters everything.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: The man who has really won the love of one good woman in this world, I do not care if he dies in the ditch a beggar - his life has been a success.
Author: Robert Green Ingersoll

Quote: You're frustrated because you keep waiting for the blooming of flowers of which you have yet to sow the seeds.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: A common mistake that people make when trying to design something completely foolproof is to underestimate the ingenuity of complete fools.
Author: Douglas Adams

Quote: It would still be a long way until she was completely free, but the door had been cracked open and a smidgen of hope broke through the darkness.
Author: J.E.B. Spredemann

Quote: The more clearly we can focus our attention on the wonders and realities of the universe about us, the less taste we shall have for destruction.
Author: Rachel Carson

Quote: To hope means to be ready at every moment for that which is not yet born, and yet not become desperate if there is no birth in our lifetime.
Author: Erich Fromm

Quote: Fairy tales do not tell children the dragons exist. Children already know that dragons exist. Fairy tales tell children the dragons can be killed.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: Surround yourself with people who provide you with support and love and remember to give back as much as you can in return.
Author: Karen Kain

Quote: The children now love luxury. They have bad manners, contempt for authority; they show disrespect for elders and love chatter in place of exercise.
Author: Socrates

Quote: The safest general characterization of the European philosophical tradition is that it consists of a series of footnotes to Plato.
Author: Alfred North Whitehead

Quote: All religions have something to say about sex, and it rarely coincides with scientific knowledge of sex and sexuality.
Author: Darrel Ray
Origin: Sex & God: How Religion Distorts Sexuality

Quote: Do you think that I count the days? There is only one day left, always starting over: it is given to us at dawn and taken away from us at dusk.
Author: Jean- Paul Sartre

Quote: Imagination is a quality that was given to man compensate him from whats not. The sense of humor was given to console him from what is.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Learn from yesterday, live for today, hope for tomorrow. The important thing is not to stop questioning.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: There's no backward and no forward, no day other than this. You fill your cart as you go, and that's that.
Author: John Burnham Schwartz

Quote: There's nothing wrong with you. There's a lot wrong with the world you live in. And definitely get out of high school and make everyone sorry.
Author: Chris Colfer

Quote: When I look in the mirror, I know I'm looking at someone who isn't sure she deserves to be loved at all.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: Mulling this over, Vlad wiped her lip gloss from his lips with the back of his hand. Vampires, after all, didn't sparkle.
Author: Heather Brewer

Quote: I don't understand people who say they need more "Me Time." What other time is there? Do these people spend part of their day in someone else's body?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We sing inspirational songs, songs of praise and worship, and about how good and how big God is. We are magnifying the Lord.
Author: Fred Hammond

Quote: Begin at the beginning, "the King said, very gravely, "and go on till you come to the end: then stop.
Author: Lewis Carroll

Quote: I'd never seen anything like it. First a trial, then a few murders, then dancing. Life goes on. Or, in this case, death continues.
Author: Charlaine Harris

Quote: If you had started doing anything two weeks ago, by today you would have been two weeks better at it.
Author: John Mayer

Quote: In the end, the end of a life only matters to friends, family, and other folks you used to know. For everyone else, it's just another end.
Author: Gabrielle Zevin

Quote: White letters plus white paper equals invisibility. Just because you can't see my love for you, doesn't mean I didn't write about it.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: With all its sham, drudgery, and broken dreams, it is still a beautiful world. Be cheerful. Strive to be happy.
Author: Max Ehrmann
Origin: Desiderata: A Poem for a Way of Life

Quote: Well, I like to eat, sleep, drink, and be in love. I like to work, read, learn, and understand life.
Author: Langston Hughes

Quote: Alas, how terrible is wisdom when it brings no profit to the man that's wise! This I knew well, but had forgotten it, else I would not have come here.
Author: Sophocles

Quote: We had a lavender kind of love, so soothing and smooth, and if I could bottle up what we had, you'd want it all over your body.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Do you really want to be happy? You can begin by being appreciative of who you are and what you've got.
Author: Benjamin Hoff

Quote: Good work, like good talk or any other form of worthwhile human relationship, depends upon being able to assume an extended shared world.
Author: Stefan Collini

Quote: The secular world looks to the church and to its chagrin, finds no love, no life, no laughter, no hope and no happiness.
Author: Rod Parsley

Quote: Submission is not about authority and it is not obedience; it is all about relationships of love and respect.
Author: Wm. Paul Young

Quote: Why are old lovers able to become friends? Two reasons. They never truly loved each other, or they love each other still.
Author: Whitney Otto
Origin: How to Make an American Quilt

Quote: I love dressing up and doing the red carpet every once in a while, but I am very much a jeans kinda girl, so it's all a little embarrassing for me.
Author: Kelly Clarkson

Quote: Sleep," he says. "I'll fight the bad dreams off if they come to get you." "With what?" "My bare hands, obviously.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: When your children are teenagers, it's important to have a dog so that someone in the house is happy to see you.
Author: Nora Ephron
Origin: I Feel Bad about My Neck: And Other Thoughts on Being a Woman

Quote: One thing I hope I'll never be is drunk with my own power. And anybody who says I am will never work in this town again.
Author: Jim Carrey

Quote: Remember, happiness doesn't depend upon who you are or what you have, it depends solely upon what you think.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: I'm going to go out on a limb and say that's the best place to hang a noose. More politicians need to be sticking their necks out for us.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When comprehending how different people truly are, you also comprehend the absolute necessity of some divine authority.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Every scene should be able to answer three questions: "Who wants what from whom? What happens if they don't get it? Why now?
Author: David Mamet
Origin: Bambi vs. Godzilla: On the Nature, Purpose, and Practice of the Movie Business

Quote: [Happiness is] a ghost, it's a shadow. You can't really chase it. It's a by-product, a very pleasant side effect to a life lived well.
Author: Eric Weiner

Quote: Her gaze met his, her blue eyes filled with confusion and terror - and love. If Julian hadn't already been in love with her, that would have done it.
Author: Pamela Clare

Quote: The world keeps happening, in accordance with its rules; it's up to us to make sense of it and give it value.
Author: Sean Carroll

Quote: [Horror fiction] shows us that the control we believe we have is purely illusory, and that every moment we teeter on chaos and oblivion.
Author: Clive Barker

Quote: The happy Union of these States is a wonder; their Constitution a miracle; their example the hope of Liberty throughout the world.
Author: James Madison

Quote: My cup is full of air. I should empty it and fill it with love. Or coffee, as the two are synonymous to me.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: You will never gain anyone's approval by begging for it. When you stand confident in your own worth, respect follows.
Author: Mandy Hale
Origin: The Single Woman: Life, Love, and a Dash of Sass

Quote: I predict that love will burst forth on the Fourth of July. That's tomorrow, so I'd better prepare tonight for massive fireworks of the heart.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: I try hard not to judge anyone, and I try to bless everyone who is a part of my life, particularly anyone with whom I am having any problems
Author: Jim Henson
Origin: It's Not Easy Being Green: And Other Things to Consider

Quote: You have your way. I have my way. As for the right way, the correct way, and the only way, it does not exist.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: Trees are poems the earth writes upon the sky, We fell them down and turn them into paper, That we may record our emptiness.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: Clouds come floating into my life, no longer to carry rain or usher storm, but to add color to my sunset sky.
Author: Rabindranath Tagore

Quote: One measure of your success will be the degree to which you build up others who work with you. While building up others, you will build up yourself.
Author: James E. Casey

Quote: I turned silences and nights into words. What was unutterable, I wrote down. I made the whirling world stand still.
Author: Arthur Rimbaud
Origin: A Season in Hell/ The Drunken Boat

Quote: Education is an admirable thing, but it is well to remember from time to time that nothing that is worth knowing can be taught.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Christ did not die to save people, but to teach people how to save each other. This is, I have no doubt, a grave heresy, but it is also a fact.
Author: Oscar Wilde
Origin: The Complete Letters of Oscar Wilde

Quote: He's as tall as a tree, but he fights like a rose bush. What's with all the scratching? I should cut him down in the name of romance.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Like all parents, my husband and I just do the best we can, hold our breath and hope we've set aside enough money for our kid's therapy.
Author: Michelle Pfeiffer

Quote: She was washing all the dishes by hand, so I bought her a machine. I bought her a lawnmower. That's what you do when you're in love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Bachelorhood: all the fun of married life and more prosperity, leaving lots of descendants to boast of their father's memory to their fellow inmates.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: If superstition could contradict science, the world may as well be on the back of a turtle. But giving into turtle worship was a bridge too far.
Author: Thomm Quackenbush

Quote: I fell in love with her when we were together, then fell deeper in love with her in the years we were apart.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: Too many people spend money they haven't earned, to buy things they don't want, to impress people that they don't like.
Author: Will Rogers

Quote: I know it may not be an easy thing to do, but with the right person by their side, they can conquer anything.
Author: Stephanie Kaleto

Quote: If you love a flower that lives on a star, it is sweet to look at the sky at night. All the stars are a-bloom with flowers...
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: The prediction I can make with the highest confidence is that the most amazing discoveries will be the ones we are not today wise enough to foresee.
Author: Carl Sagan
Origin: Billions & Billions: Thoughts on Life and Death at the Brink of the Millennium

Quote: The restless spirit never loses its wings. If sometimes it cannot fly, it is because during those moments the sky vanishes.
Author: R.N. Prasher

Quote: They said that love was terrifying and tender, wild and sweet, and none of it made any sense. But now I knew that every mad word was true.
Author: Rosamund Hodge

Quote: He rose like heroes, and I rose like rows of red roses. Love grows wherever you plant it, so I try to farm it wherever I go.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: To make us feel small in the right way is a function of art; men can only make us feel small in the wrong way.
Author: E. M. Forster

Quote: Do not become someone else just because you are hurt. Be who you are & smile, it may solve, all problems you have got.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: There is a plan and a purpose, a value to every life, no matter what its location, age, gender or disability.
Author: Sharron Angle

Quote: My advice to aspiring writers is to read more, write more, and network more. More, more, and more. Then, after you've done all that, do it some more.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I think that my biggest attribute to any success that I have had is hard work. There really is no substitute for working hard.
Author: Maria Bartiromo

Quote: No man can reveal to you aught but that which already lies half asleep in the dawning of your knowledge.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: Ego stops you from getting things done and getting people to work with you. That's why I firmly believe that ego and success are not compatible.
Author: Harvey Mackay

Quote: Once you figure out who you are and what you love about yourself, I think it all kind of falls into place.
Author: Jennifer Aniston

Quote: The manlier you are, the harder it is to understand what a woman wants: there is not a hint of female brain in you.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Perhaps just to have loved was enough - just to have seen this world, and known it, through the eyes of love.
Author: Rosie Alison

Quote: I went to Hallmark, but they don't sell corridors there. I did, however, find a card that perfectly summed up our relationship. The card was blank.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: It's paradoxical that the idea of living a long life appeals to everyone, but the idea of getting old doesn't appeal to anyone.
Author: Andy Rooney

Quote: You wash the horse, and I'll wash the horse trainer. Then we'll wash the dishes while we gallop into the sunset like two dirty lovers.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I assess the power of a will by how much resistance, pain, torture it endures and knows how to turn to its advantage
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: There is nothing so disobedient as an undisciplined mind, and there is nothing so obedient as a disciplined mind.
Author: Gautama Buddha

Quote: Good writing works from a simple premise: your experience is not yours alone, but in some sense a metaphor for everyone's.
Author: Dorianne Laux
Origin: The Poet's Companion: A Guide To The Pleasures Of Writing Poetry

Quote: Laughter, and the broader category of humor, are key elements in helping us go on with our life after a loss.
Author: Allen Klein

Quote: The object of life is not to be on the side of the majority, but to escape finding oneself in the ranks of the insane.
Author: Marcus Aurelius

Quote: I love having a ceiling fan, although sometimes I wish he wouldn't cheer so loud when I'm trying to sleep.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: I hide how I feel, and I hide the fact that I hide how I feel, but I can't bury the past without having a funeral of the heart.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE
