Quote: When we are aware of our weaknesses or negative tendencies, we open the opportunity to work on them.
Author: Allan Lokos
Origin: Pocket Peace: Effective Practices for Enlightened Living

Quote: I network like a Spanish Inquisitor. I am very good at extracting relevant information. And if you resist, you'll only confirm your heresy.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Give me the positions and velocities of all the particles in the universe, and I will predict the future.
Author: Marquis Pierre Simon de Laplace

Quote: We are not people who touch each other carelessly; every point of contact between us feels important, a rush of energy and relief.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: Worthy character is best forged from a life of consistent, correct choices centered in the teachings of the Master.
Author: Richard G. Scott

Quote: When you are imprisoned by the rules of conformity, it tames your imaginative capacity and steals your free thinking abilities.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: If I can see pain in your eyes then share with me your tears. If I can see joy in your eyes then share with me your smile.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: To me, art's highest purpose is to entertain, to enlighten, to inspire, to evoke emotion and to change an audience in some way, big or small.
Author: Charity Sunshine Tillemann- Dick

Quote: The discovery of what is true and the practice of that which is good are the two most important aims of philosophy.
Author: Voltaire

Quote: At times anger will trigger harsh words. After a cooling period wisdom sets in; finally, the ability to speak from the heart with love and compassion.
Author: Ana Monnar
Origin: Relax: New And Selected Poems: New And Selected Poems

Quote: Love expands your soul with something inexplicably fulfilling. If you die without ever having experienced it, you will miss life's only true joy
Author: Adele Ashworth

Quote: Leadership is all about caring, daring and sharing! Caring for people, Daring to Act fearlessly, & Sharing the success with all!
Author: Sujit Lalwani

Quote: When you are used to the kind of life -of never getting anything you want- you stop knowing what it is you want.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: Some of the best lessons we ever learn are learned from past mistakes. The error of the past is the wisdom and success of the future.
Author: Dale Turner

Quote: After all, if you do not resist the apparently inevitable, you will never know how inevitable the inevitable was.
Author: Terry Eagleton

Quote: Scriptures, n. The sacred books of our holy religion, as distinguished from the false and profane writings on which all other faiths are based.
Author: Ambrose Bierce

Quote: I may not have proved a great explorer, but we have done the greatest march ever made and come very near to great success.
Author: Robert Falcon Scott

Quote: I know of no society in human history that ever suffered because its people became too desirous of evidence in support of their core beliefs.
Author: Sam Harris

Quote: A new day: Be open enough to see opportunities. Be wise enough to be grateful. Be courageous enough to be happy.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Procrastination is one of the most common and deadliest of diseases and its toll on success and happiness is heavy.
Author: Wayne Gretzky

Quote: The aim of science is not to open the door to infinite wisdom, but to set a limit to infinite error.
Author: Bertolt Brecht

Quote: We delight in the beauty of the butterfly, but rarely admit the changes it has gone through to achieve that beauty.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: Religion is for those who don't want to go to hell, and spirituality is for those who have already been there.
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert

Quote: I must create a system, or be enslaved by another man's. I will not reason and compare: my business is to create.
Author: William Blake

Quote: It's always about timing. If it's too soon, no one understands. If it's too late, everyone's forgotten.
Author: Anna Wintour

Quote: In my laboratory, I use science to measure love. Whatever you do, don't drink out of beaker number two.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Better to illuminate than merely to shine to deliver to others contemplated truths than merely to contemplate.
Author: Thomas Aquinas

Quote: A sofa on an elevator would be like a slow roller coaster where you get to work on your small talk skills. Oh yes, I am an adrenaline junky.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Instead of a Lemonade Stand, I should open up a "You know what I can't stand?" Stand. I'll sell rants in small, medium, and large.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: It was the sort of bone deep emotion that made him want to hold her tighter with one hand, and draw a sword against the world with the other.
Author: Jeaniene Frost

Quote: Do I dare Disturb the universe? In a minute there is time For decisions and revisions which a minute will reverse.
Author: T.S. Eliot

Quote: If girlfriends were knees, I'd love to have both of mine replaced. That way, it'd be easier to run around on them.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: I ate civilization. It poisoned me; I was defiled. And then, "he added in a lower tone, "I ate my own wickedness.
Author: Aldous Huxley

Quote: You don't know me. You know one me, just like I know one you. And you can't know every me, and I can't know every you.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: There is force in the universe, which, if we permit it, will flow through us and produce miraculous results.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: Not that she objected to solitude. Quite the contrary. She had books, thank Heaven, quantities of books. All sorts of books.
Author: Jean Rhys

Quote: Loving others always costs us something and requires effort. And you have to decide to do it on purpose. You can't wait for a feeling to motivate you.
Author: Joyce Meyer

Quote: I love Christmas, not just because of the presents but because of all the decorations and lights and the warmth of the season.
Author: Ashley Tisdale

Quote: The beauty of a living thing is not the atoms that go into it, but the way those atoms are put together.
Author: Carl Sagan

Quote: When you are able to understand the language of silence, you will be able to see the beauty of the invisible.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Chemistry can be a good and bad thing. Chemistry is good when you make love with it. Chemistry is bad when you make crack with it.
Author: Adam Sandler

Quote: I can honestly say I love getting older. Then again, I never put my glasses on before looking in the mirror.
Author: Cherie Lunghi

Quote: Hitler: Thank you, whoever you are. I think you just saved my life. The Doctor: Believe me... It was an accident.
Author: Steven Moffat

Quote: I was within and without, simultaneously enchanted and repelled by the inexhaustible variety of life.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: The presence of those seeking the truth is infinitely to be preferred to the presence of those who think they've found it.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: Language always betrays us, tells the truth when we want to lie, and dissolves into formlessness when we would most like to be precise.
Author: Jeanette Winterson

Quote: To live is to be musical, starting with the blood dancing in your veins. Everything living has a rhythm. Do you feel your music?
Author: Michael Jackson

Quote: Define yourself radically as one beloved by God. This is the true self. Every other identity is illusion.
Author: Brennan Manning
Origin: Abba's Child: The Cry of the Heart for Intimate Belonging

Quote: I've always thought people would find a lot more pleasure in their routines if they burst into song at significant moments.
Author: John Barrowman

Quote: I don't think that we're meant to understand it all the time. I think that sometimes we just have to have faith.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: When someone is rude to you, don't stoop to their level, stay calm and walk away with your head held high.
Author: Karon Waddell

Quote: A stick won't stick to a wall, so why is it called a stick? Likewise, why aren't love and ghost the same word? Both are dead and invisible.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Education: that which reveals to the wise, and conceals from the stupid, the vast limits of their knowledge.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: To be successful, you must decide exactly what you want to accomplish, then resolve to pay the price to get it.
Author: Nelson Bunker Hunt

Quote: I was bold in the pursuit of knowledge, never fearing to follow truth and reason to whatever results they led.
Author: Thomas Jefferson

Quote: I'd row a gondola like a column is not a row. My coffee may be cold, but my love is warm. When are you going to wake up and drink it?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: You know what the secret is? It's so simple. We love one another. We're nice to one another. Do you know how rare that is? - Carmen
Author: Ann Brashares
Origin: The Sisterhood of the Traveling Pants

Quote: A wonderful fact to reflect upon, that every human creature is constituted to be that profound secret and mystery to every other.
Author: Charles Dickens

Quote: Christian, you are the state lottery, the cure for cancer, and the three wishes from Aladdin's lamp all rolled into one
Author: E.L. James

Quote: It is not needful for our dreams to be very grand nor very big. It is only needful for our dreams to be very shiny.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: I've had great success and I've had catastrophic failure. It's really how you handle the rough stuff that defines you, I think.
Author: Peter Berg

Quote: Their fingers seemed to fit together in just the right way- effortlessly clasped, like perfect complements.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: She'd met Colin on a Monday. She'd kissed him on a Friday. Twelve years later. She sighed. It seemed fairly pathetic.
Author: Julia Quinn

Quote: My alma mater was books, a good library.... I could spend the rest of my life reading, just satisfying my curiosity.
Author: Malcolm X

Quote: When you chase a dream, you learn about yourself. You learn your capabilities and limitations, and the value of hard work and persistence.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: Popularity's a weird thing. You can't really define it, and it's not cool to talk about, but you know it when you see it. Like a lazy eye, or porn.
Author: Lauren Oliver

Quote: I realized then that even though I was a tiny speck in an infinite cosmos, a blip on the timeline of eternity, I was not without purpose.
Author: R.J. Anderson

Quote: I love to sleep. Do you? Isn't it great? It really is the best of both worlds. You get to be alive and unconscious.
Author: Rita Rudner

Quote: All of sudden, this shooting star went by, and all I could think was that they were listening to us somehow.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: Believe in people, they fly for a day. Teach them to believe in themselves, they soar for a lifetime.
Author: A.D. Posey

Quote: One day I'll have my appointment with death, and every day I call out to God to see if I can reschedule for a later date.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: We are all atheists about most of the gods that humanity has ever believed in. Some of us just go one god further.
Author: Richard Dawkins

Quote: Love is like a beautiful flower which I may not touch, but whose fragrance makes the garden a place of delight just the same.
Author: Helen Keller

Quote: Art is not necessary at all. All that is necessary to make this world a better place to live in is to love - to love as Christ loved, as Buddha loved.
Author: Isadora Duncan

Quote: Everyone wants to live on top of the mountain, but all the happiness and growth occurs while you're climbing it.
Author: Andy Rooney

Quote: Some men don't have the opportunity to be the type of father they need to be, and I hope my example teaches them to step up.
Author: Marvin Sapp

Quote: I went down to the river, I set down on the bank. I tried to think but couldn't, So I jumped in and sank.
Author: Langston Hughes

Quote: I've tried that love thing for the last time. My heart says no, no! Nobody's supposed to be here, but you came along and changed my mind
Author: Deborah Cox

Quote: The easy confidence with which I know another man's religion is folly teaches me to suspect that my own is also.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: I have been and still am a seeker, but I have ceased to question stars and books; I have begun to listen to the teaching my blood whispers to me.
Author: Hermann Hesse
Origin: Demian: Die Geschichte von Emil Sinclairs Jugend

Quote: To wait on love is to tie a weight on your heart and slowly drown. Why sink when you can fly by freely giving love away?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: And life is a good thing for a writer. It's where we get our raw material, for a start. We quite like to stop and watch it.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: Mocking a woman is like drinking too much wine. It may be fun for a short time, but the hangover is hell.
Author: Brandon Sanderson

Quote: I only photograph myself at poignant moments in my life as a check of where I am and how large my thighs are.
Author: Sam Taylor- Johnson

Quote: I've done it all. I'm thankful and proud of what I've accomplished in my life. I hope to keep doing it.
Author: Ralph Stanley

Quote: Fight for the only thing she knew was good enough, noble enough, powerful enough to be worth risking everything... Love.
Author: Lauren Kate

Quote: It was my father who taught me to value myself. He told me that I was uncommonly beautiful and that I was the most precious thing in his life.
Author: Dawn French

Quote: Merry hearts are vulnerable to death, don't be over-joyed to the state of oblivion, lest the enemy poison your meal.
Author: Michael Bassey Johnson

Quote: Everyone that enters through Him is secured and the person shall find pastures for himself. Jesus really cares!
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: just remember: i love you, and love yourselves. 'cause, little monsters, you were born that way baby.
Author: Lady Gaga
Origin: Lady Gaga: The Fame music book

Quote: Stories may well be lies, but they are good lies that say true things, and which can sometimes pay the rent.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: A bit of trash now and then is good for the severest reader. It provides the necessary roughage in the literary diet.
Author: Phyllis McGinley

Quote: It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: We flatter those we scarcely know, We please the fleeting guest; And deal full many a thoughtless blow, To those who love us best.
Author: Ella Wheeler Wilcox

Quote: Problems that remain persistently insoluble should always be suspected as questions asked in the wrong way.
Author: Alan W. Watts
Origin: The Book on the Taboo Against Knowing Who You Are

Quote: In the big picture, architecture is the art and science of making sure that our cities and buildings fit with the way we want to live our lives.
Author: Bjarke Ingels

Quote: No religion except ours has taught that man is born in sin; none of the philosophical sects has admitted it; none therefore has spoken the truth
Author: Blaise Pascal

Quote: There's no success story. Everybody's got a ghetto story. You always want to make it bigger than what it is.
Author: Bernie Mac

Quote: You think money can solve any problem, but all it s good for is buying the things it can, and leaving you free to pursue the things it can't.
Author: Ann Herendeen
Origin: Phyllida and the Brotherhood of Philander : a Bisexual Regency Romance

Quote: i'm your enemy, meghan. never forget that. if Mab tells me to kill you in front of the entire court, it's my duty to obey.
Author: Julie Kagawa

Quote: You don't have to disrespect and insult others simply to hold your own ground. If you do, that shows how shaky your own position is.
Author: Red Haircrow

Quote: Like roses we are born, we grow and expand, in knowledge and bliss, and when our time is due our bodies return to mother Nature.
Author: Joseph Rain

Quote: It is a good rule in life never to apologize. The right sort of people do not want apologies, and the wrong sort take a mean advantage of them.
Author: P.G. Wodehouse
Origin: The Man Upstairs and Other Stories

Quote: We must make love to find out how it's made. I don't know what the ingredients are, but I think we can make a batch or two by morning.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: When you're busy, avoid taking the quickest action. Instead make the extra effort to truly serve the customer.
Author: Marilyn Suttle

Quote: If you convert a shower curtain to a dress, I'll wear my waterproof dancing shoes. Together we'll move so fluidly people will line up to get cleansed.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If you need me I'll be sitting over there, on the ground, next to the empty chair. The emptiness always reminds me of your love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A lot of people have gone further than they thought they could because someone else thought they could
Author: Zig Ziglar

Quote: If you want to fly on the sky, you need to leave the earth. If you want to move forward, you need to let go the past that drags you down.
Author: Amit Ray
Origin: World Peace: The Voice of a Mountain Bird

Quote: You go to school everyday. Folks who think they've learned everything they need to know are usually dumber than chickens.
Author: Jodi Thomas

Quote: This is the miracle that happens every time to those who really love: the more they give, the more they possess.
Author: Rainer Maria Rilke

Quote: In all my travels, I've never seen a country's population more determined to forgive, and to build and succeed than in Rwanda.
Author: Rick Warren
Origin: The Bishop of Rwanda: Finding Forgiveness Amidst a Pile of Bones

Quote: There is nothing I would not do for those who are really my friends. I have no notion of loving people by halves, it is not my nature.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: We are flawed creatures, all of us. Some of us think that means we should fix our flaws. But get rid of my flaws and there would be no one left.
Author: Sarah Vowell

Quote: I love all things, not only the grand but the infinitely small: thimble, spurs, plates, flower vases.....
Author: Pablo Neruda

Quote: Yes, vanity is a weakness indeed. But pride - where there is a real superiority of mind, pride will be always under good regulation.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: I wonder," he said, "whether the stars are set alight in heaven so that one day each one of us may find his own again...
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: Getting divorced just because you don't love a man is almost as silly as getting married just because you do.
Author: Zsa Zsa Gabor

Quote: To live without philosophizing is in truth the same as keeping the eyes closed without attempting to open them.
Author: René Descartes

Quote: If you want your children to be intelligent, read them fairy tales. If you want them to be more intelligent, read them more fairy tales.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: I wanted change and excitement and to shoot off in all directions myself, like the colored arrows from a Fourth of July rocket.
Author: Sylvia Plath

Quote: Humor, humility, and, of course, honesty, all are qualities that work in public and cultural diplomacy.
Author: Cynthia P. Schneider

Quote: Sometimes life knocks you on your ass... get up, get up, get up!!! Happiness is not the absence of problems, it's the ability to deal with them.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: There once was a time when all people believed in God and the church ruled. This time was called the Dark Ages.
Author: Richard Lederer
Origin: Anguished English: An Anthology of Accidental Assaults Upon Our Language

Quote: If there's gold in it, then the mine is mine. And if there's no coffee in it, then the cup is yours.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Free at last, he thought. Great God Almighty, I'm free at last. Then: I believe this is redemption. And it's good, isn't it? Quite good, indeed.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: I'm a pretty tenacious person; I get that from my mom. So sometimes, I use dark humor. I can't take myself too seriously.
Author: Art Alexakis

Quote: People don't want to know. They have to be made to know. Whether they act on what they know is up to them. But they have to know.
Author: Anthony Burgess

Quote: The true soldier fights not because he hates what is in front of him, but because he loves what is behind him.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: God's extraordinary work is most often done by ordinary people in the seeming obscurity of a home and family.
Author: Neal A. Maxwell

Quote: It's not so much the journey that's important; as is the way that we treat those we encounter and those around us, along the way
Author: Jeremy Aldana

Quote: The presence of the Lord destroys a life of struggle. You will struggle until you encounter His presence.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: A women can run, hide, play and have fun but she will shine far better when she just smiles without none.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: He who binds to himself a joy does the winged life destroy; But he who kisses the joy as it flies lives in eternity's sun rise.
Author: William Blake

Quote: We need, in love, to practice only this: letting each other go. For holding on comes easily; we do not need to learn it.
Author: Rainer Maria Rilke
Origin: Translations from the Poetry of Rainer Maria Rilke

Quote: I write to give myself strength. I write to be the characters that I am not. I write to explore all the things I'm afraid of.
Author: Joss Whedon

Quote: The preparation of good food is merely another expression of art, one of the joys of civilized living...
Author: Dione Lucas

Quote: Better was it to go unknown and leave behind you an arch, then to burn like a meteor and leave no dust.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: His hands were weak and shaking from carrying far too many books from the bookshop. It was the best feeling.
Author: Joseph Gordon- Levitt
Origin: The Tiny Book of Tiny Stories, Vol. 1

Quote: Frantic orthodoxy is never rooted in faith but in doubt. It is when we are unsure that we are doubly sure.
Author: Reinhold Niebuhr

Quote: I like a man who can be a real friend, has a good sense of humor, a good pair of shoes and a healthy gold card.
Author: Victoria Beckham

Quote: Being the richest man in the cemetery doesn't matter to me. Going to bed at night saying we've done something wonderful... that's what matters to me.
Author: Steve Jobs

Quote: The rearing of children is considered too important to be left to the individual and should be the responsibility of the state.
Author: Jostein Gaarder

Quote: Whatever God requires is right, no matter what it is, although we may not see the reason there of until all of the events transpire.
Author: Joseph Smith Jr.

Quote: That is the one eternal education: to be sure enough that something is true that you dare to tell it to a child.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: The results of knowledge without application results in nothing at all. Do what you know better to do.
Author: DeWayne Owens

Quote: Poetry is the spontaneous overflow of powerful feelings: it takes its origin from emotion recollected in tranquility.
Author: William Wordsworth

Quote: You learn to speak by speaking, to study by studying, to run by running, to work by working; in just the same way, you learn to love by loving.
Author: Anatole France

Quote: To fall in love with God is the greatest romance; to seek him the greatest adventure; to find him, the greatest human achievement.
Author: Augustine of Hippo

Quote: Poetry is finer and more philosophical than history; for poetry expresses the universal, and history only the particular.
Author: Aristotle

Quote: Each new day is a blank page in the diary of your life. The secret of success is in turning that diary into the best story you possibly can.
Author: Douglas Pagels

Quote: I loved you long before you loved me. It's the only thing I have you beat at, and I'll bring it up every chance I get.
Author: Becca Fitzpatrick

Quote: Peanut butter and jelly is like the older, more serious brother to egg salad sandwich. I'm an only child, so I eat both with incredible sadness.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: In the end, the number of prayers we say may contribute to our happiness, but the number of prayers we answer may be of even greater importance.
Author: Dieter F. Uchtdorf

Quote: Every quote is like a Picasso. The meaning is different for each person and half the admirers miss the true intent and twisted humor of it all.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: We have now sunk to a depth at which restatement of the obvious is the first duty of intelligent men.
Author: George Orwell

Quote: I'm not afraid of death because I don't believe in it. It's just getting out of one car, and into another.
Author: John Lennon

Quote: God is not willing to do everything, and thus take away our free will and that share of glory which belongs to us.
Author: Niccolò Machiavelli

Quote: Stress comes from the fear of the unknown; tranquility comes from accepting the unknown with love and joy.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: But if you don't watch me, I will try and sneak in some humor. I see humor everywhere in life around me.
Author: Marion Ross

Quote: Maybe they did what they had to do to live, and tried to get a little love and have a little fun before the darkness took them.
Author: Poppy Z. Brite

Quote: With faith the size of a mustard seed, you can indeed move a mountain, but you can hardly be expected to garnish your sandwich.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: American Association for the Advancement of Aardvarks Presents: Dear Natalie

Quote: But still, I find the need to remind myself of the temporariness of a day, to reassure myself that I got through yesterday, I'll get through today.
Author: Gayle Forman

Quote: [we see that] science is eminently perfectible, and that each theory has constantly to give way to a fresh one.
Author: Jules Verne
Origin: A Journey to the Center of the Earth

Quote: She wants to teach me to dance, but how do you instruct water to flow? I'm so fluid all you can do is swim in my moves and drink my essence.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Don't bite his face, Eleanor told herself. It's disturbing and needy and never happens in situation comedies or movies that end with big kisses.
Author: Rainbow Rowell

Quote: The reason we all like to think so well of others is that we are all afraid for ourselves. The basis of optimism is sheer terror.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: There's sometimes a tugging feeling you get to push further when you aren't being challenged enough or when things get too comfortable.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Personal branding is sales, because you're selling an image of yourself, a mirage, and you are the product.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The stars up close to the moon were pale; they got brighter and braver the farther they got out of the circle of light ruled by the giant moon
Author: Ken Kesey
Origin: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest

Quote: A stereotype becomes a stereotype when a significant percentage of the population appears to conform to it.
Author: Kelley Armstrong

Quote: Athletes tend to have less of a sense of humor than most people. They are heroes to so many. That might be part of it.
Author: Jeff Ross

Quote: Success to me is being happy, truly fulfilled, being proud of myself, and doing different things all the time.
Author: Leighton Meester

Quote: Once a Ponce a time she made me feel like a conquistador. Now her memory is just a breeze seen in swaying Spanish moss.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I used to think that the worst thing in life was to end up alone. It's not. The worst thing in life is to end up with people who make you feel alone.
Author: Robin Williams

Quote: I wonder how many times people give up just before a breakthrough - when they are on the very brink of success.
Author: Joyce Meyer

Quote: Alphabet: a symbolic system used in algebra, with applications that have yet to be discovered by dyslexics and two thirds of college graduates.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: We were very different, and we disagreed about a lot of things, but he was always so interesting, you know?
Author: John Green

Quote: My mind is a lock pick always looking for another door to open. I often find those doors by exploring minds of others...
Author: Hewitt E. Moore

Quote: The direction of your focus is the direction your life will move. Let yourself move toward what is good, valuable, strong and true.
Author: Ralph Marston

Quote: I don't need to travel back in time to cause trouble. Seeing back through time finds me trouble enough!
Author: A.A. Bell

Quote: Slow down and enjoy life. It's not only the scenery you miss by going to fast - you also miss the sense of where you are going and why.
Author: Eddie Cantor

Quote: I'm a fake fact factory. The things I make are the things I make up. Also, as a side business, I make love. Actually, I just made that up.
Author: Dora J. Arod
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. And the ageless sages.

Quote: So I learned two things that night, and the next day, from him: the perfection of a moment, and the fleeting nature of it.
Author: Margaret George

Quote: Sharing your kindness sparks understanding all around. Then like fireflies in the night, twinkling love surrounds you.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: You can love somebody without it being like that. You keep them a stranger, a stranger who's a friend.
Author: Truman Capote

Quote: Your biggest opportunity probably lies under your own feet, in your current job, industry, education, experience or interests.
Author: Brian Tracy

Quote: The risk is too great. A man cannot place too much faith in any one thing, neither a woman, nor a horse, nor a weapon, nor any single thing.
Author: Michael Crichton

Quote: But grief makes a monster out of us sometimes . . . and sometimes you say and do things to the people you love that you can't forgive yourself for.
Author: Melina Marchetta

Quote: But I don't understand God. I don't understand how he could see the way people treat one another, and not chalk up the whole human race as a bad idea.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: When a girl says she wants to be friends with benefits, I always ask if that includes dental insurance.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: You were never created to live depressed, defeated, guilty, condemned, ashamed or unworthy. We were created to be victorious.
Author: Joel Osteen

Quote: We are seeds as well as parasites to the earth. We can either give or take, depending on our perception of growth.
Author: Zephyr McIntyre

Quote: ...wanting soul life without the dark, warming intelligence of personal doubt is like expecting an egg without the brooding heat of the mother hen.
Author: David Whyte

Quote: Point me out the happy man and I will point you out either extreme egotism, selfishness, evil -- or else an absolute ignorance.
Author: Graham Greene

Quote: Speak the truth do not become angered and give when asked, even be it a little. By these three conditions one goes to the presence of the gods.
Author: Gautama Buddha

Quote: Sugar, it's no parade but you'll get down the street one way or another, so you'd just as well throw your shoulders back and pick up the pace.
Author: Barbara Kingsolver

Quote: They are not mad. They're trained to believe, not to know. Belief can be manipulated. Only knowledge is dangerous.
Author: Frank Herbert

Quote: Think twice before you speak, because your words and influence will plant the seed of either success or failure in the mind of another.
Author: Napoleon Hill

Quote: I make furniture that can be used as weapons. The most dangerous piece of furniture is the Loveseat.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Every time you dive, you hope you'll see something new - some new species. Sometimes the ocean gives you a gift, sometimes it doesn't.
Author: James Cameron

Quote: But all I could think of was how when nothing made sense and hadn't for ages, you just have to grab onto anything you feel sure of.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: Set your compass to beauty, humor, and grief; stay the course no matter what, and I'll support you with everything I've got.
Author: Chris Jordan

Quote: Even if it's absurd to think you can change things, it's even more absurd to believe that it is foolish and unimportant to try.
Author: Peter C. Newman
Origin: Here Be Dragons: Telling Tales Of People, Passion and Power

Quote: Maybe the only good thing about death is that you never have to relive it. You never have to remember the pain.
Author: Pittacus Lore

Quote: You have to wait for your mind to catch up with whatever it is it's working on; then you can write a novel.
Author: James M. Cain

Quote: The stronger a culture, the less it fears the radical fringe. The more paranoid and precarious a culture, the less tolerance it offers.
Author: Joel Salatin
Origin: Everything I Want to Do Is Illegal: War Stories from the Local Food Front

Quote: As soon as you cross the county line into where all the wealthier people live, the weather is suddenly sunnier and warmer. Even at night.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Treachery and violence are spears pointed at both ends; they wound those who resort to them worse than their enemies.
Author: Emily Brontë

Quote: There has to be chemistry in a duet, but if you go beyond the point of friendship and attraction, you lose something.
Author: Kenny Rogers

Quote: Between Portland and Seattle is a mint factory, and they made sweets like we made sweet love, and America needs more manufacturers like us.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: At some point, you have to stop running and turn around and face whoever wants you dead. The hard thing is finding the courage to do it.
Author: Suzanne Collins

Quote: No sooner have you feasted on beauty with your eyes than your mind tells you that beauty is vain and beauty passes
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: I want to lose weight by eating nothing but moon pies, which have significantly less gravity than earthier foods such as fruits and vegetables.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: The surest way of concealing from others the boundaries of one's own knowledge is not to overstep them.
Author: Giacomo Leopardi

Quote: My definition of a friend is somebody who adores you even though they know the things you're most ashamed of.
Author: Jodie Foster

Quote: When we do cross paths with people whose beliefs and attitudes conflict with our own, we are rarely challenged.
Author: Thomas Gilovich
Origin: How We Know What Isn't So: The Fallibility of Human Reason in Everyday Life

Quote: I need to figure out the secret. I need to work out how to keep things flying back to me instead of always flying away.
Author: Carol Rifka Brunt

Quote: Sometimes the only reason for us to be somewhere else is to see things from a different perspective.
Author: Leila Summers

Quote: Another unsettling element in modern art is that common symptom of immaturity, the dread of doing what has been done before.
Author: Edith Wharton

Quote: In the middle of the night, there is always less hope; in the dawn of the morning, there is always more hope!
Author: Mehmet Murat ildan

Quote: At twenty a man is full of fight and hope. He wants to reform the world. When he is seventy he still wants to reform the world, but he know he can't.
Author: Rodney Dangerfield

Quote: The joy from eating does not come from the exclusivity of the food, but instead from the sensitivity that we eat it with.
Author: Nino Gruettke
Origin: BOTH of You: Behavior. Opinion. Thinking. Happiness - The more rational we are, the more emotional we can be.

Quote: Never question the power of one! Throughout history it has been the actions of only one person who has in inspired the movement of change.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: It is through imagination that we transcend understanding and travel into the world of possibilities.
Author: Danielle Pierre

Quote: No one knows for certain how much impact they have on the lives of other people. Oftentimes, we have no clue. Yet we push it just the same.
Author: Jay Asher

Quote: We ask ourselves, who am I to be brilliant, gorgeous, handsome, talented and fabulous? Actually, who are you not to be?
Author: Marianne Williamson
Origin: A Return to Love: Reflections on the Principles of "A Course in Miracles"

Quote: When the actions becomes frequent than the words, success becomes heavier than the dreams. Do more, say less.
Author: Israelmore Ayivor

Quote: You have to teach your heart and mind how to sing together... then you'll hear the sound of your soul
Author: Renee Carlino

Quote: The only way I can be angry at you is when I have thought, said, or done something that is unkind in my own opinion.
Author: Byron Katie

Quote: If the fate of the universe was decided in a single moment at the instant of the Big Bang , that was the most creative moment of all.
Author: Deepak Chopra

Quote: In vain have I struggled. It will not do. My feelings will not be repressed. You must allow me to tell you how ardently I admire and love you.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: Politics is the art of looking for trouble, finding it everywhere, diagnosing it incorrectly and applying the wrong remedies.
Author: Groucho Marx

Quote: It only takes a split second to smile and forget, yet to someone that needed it, it can last a lifetime.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: I asked if she wanted kids. She said her clock is ticking. I said, That's because I set it five minutes ahead when you weren't looking.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If you cannot inspire a woman with love of you, fill her above the brim with love of herself ~ all that runs over will be yours.
Author: Charles Caleb Colton

Quote: Must I go bound while you go free. Must I love a man who doesn't love me. Must I be born with so little art as to love a man who'll break my heart
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: The weak are dominated by their ego, the wise dominate their ego, and the intelligent are in a constant struggle against their ego.
Author: Hamza Yusuf

Quote: I also did some jail time a few years ago. Spent a whole summer in jail reading books. I pumped a ton of new knowledge and new thinking into myself.
Author: Tommy Lee

Quote: Despite his last name, I'll bet Johnny Cash never had an inflated ego, or needed a wheelbarrow full of last name to go shopping.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: You may not control all the events that happen to you, but you can decide not to be reduced by them.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: Good art is art that allows you to enter it from a variety of angles and to emerge with a variety of views.
Author: Mary Schmich

Quote: Embryonic stem cell research will prolong life, improve life and give hope for life to millions of people.
Author: Jim Ramstad

Quote: There are two infinities that confuse me: the one in my soul devours me; the one around me will crush me
Author: Gustave Flaubert

Quote: The friends you make in college are friends you'll have for life, even if you don't talk for years at a time.
Author: Jessica Park

Quote: I want to be a creature that's half bee, half the letter B. That way I can pollinate the world with my literacy.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: I Want Two apply for a job at our country's largest funeral home, and then wear a suit and noose to the job interview.

Quote: There is a great deal of difference between an eager man who wants to read a book and a tired man who wants a book to read.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: Humor is such a wonderful thing, helping you realize what a fool you are but how beautiful that is at the same time.
Author: Lynda Barry

Quote: I haven't been very impressed lately. By people, or places, or the way someone said he loved me and then slowly changed his mind.
Author: Charlotte Eriksson

Quote: Always forgive, but never forget, else you will be a prisoner of your own hatred, and doomed to repeat your mistakes forever.
Author: Wil Zeus

Quote: Never be afraid to meet to the hilt the demand of either work, or friendship - two of life's major assets.
Author: Eleanor Robson Belmont

Quote: I'm learning to play the saxophone so when you feel lonely I can come over and stand in the shadows and play it for you. Two is one too lonely for me.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I realized that conservatism was the philosophy that best suited me, with its emphasis on individual liberty, personal responsibility, and merit.
Author: Mark R. Levin

Quote: I wish I had invented blue jeans. They have expression, modesty, sex appeal, simplicity - all I hope for in my clothes.
Author: Yves Saint Laurent

Quote: Happiness is always there. You just have to choose to see it. There's no point dwelling in the dark and ignoring the light of the stars.
Author: Carrie Hope Fletcher

Quote: Losing your life is not the worst thing that can happen. The worst thing is to lose your reason for living.
Author: Jo Nesbø

Quote: Our lives were now worlds apart, separated by time, circumstance, and the unbridgeable chasm of money.
Author: Travis Luedke

Quote: I listen with attention to the judgment of all men; but so far as I can remember, I have followed none but my own.
Author: Michel de Montaigne

Quote: The words I love you form an oral floral phrase that's so fragrant it can overpower even the most flagrantly foul-mouthed utterance.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: My God, Jack - with a look like that, you two should just get a room. And try not to pick the one with a dead body next to it this time.
Author: Julie James

Quote: Small shifts in your thinking, and small changes in your energy, can lead to massive alterations of your end result.
Author: Kevin Michel
Origin: Moving Through Parallel Worlds To Achieve Your Dreams

Quote: I am the poet of the poor, because I was poor when I loved; since I could not give gifts, I gave words.
Author: Ovid

Quote: That was courage, Keller thought. Not doing something without being afraid, but doing something even though you were afraid.
Author: L.J. Smith

Quote: But then one regrets the loss even of one's worst habits. Perhaps one regrets them the most. They are such an essential part of one's personality.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: If I had a camera, I said, I'd take a picture of you every day. That way I'd remember how you looked every single day of your life.
Author: Nicole Krauss

Quote: I bleed ink for her, because her name is written on my heart. She's the author of all the love I have to give.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: You do have a story inside you; it lies articulate and waiting to be written - behind your silence and your suffering.
Author: Anne Rice

Quote: Books are love letters (or apologies) passed between us, adding a layer of conversation beyond our spoken words.
Author: Donalyn Miller
Origin: The Book Whisperer: Awakening the Inner Reader in Every Child

Quote: You can't buy love, it's true. However, I am offering mine for rent. Buy one year and get the next six months at half price.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: [A] great deal of what we believe we do not know firsthand; instead we have faith in the knowledge of specialists.
Author: Terry Eagleton
Origin: Reason, Faith, and Revolution: Reflections on the God Debate

Quote: The beauty of a woman must be seen from in her eyes, because that is the doorway to her heart, the place where love resides.
Author: Audrey Hepburn

Quote: Life is very interesting... in the end, some of your greatest pains, become your greatest strengths.
Author: Drew Barrymore

Quote: Even a happy life cannot be without a measure of darkness, and the word happy would lose its meaning if it were not balanced by sadness.
Author: C.G. Jung

Quote: I have discovered in life that there are ways of getting almost anywhere you want to go, if you really want to go.
Author: Langston Hughes

Quote: Make every effort to change things you do not like. If you cannot make a change, change the way you have been thinking. You might find a new solution.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: Yesterday I was a dog. Today I'm a dog. Tomorrow I'll probably still be a dog. Sigh! There's so little hope for advancement.
Author: Charles M. Schulz

Quote: Develop success from failures. Discouragement and failure are two of the surest stepping stones to success.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: Most of us go through each day looking for what we saw yesterday And, not surprisingly, that is what we find.
Author: James A. Kitchens

Quote: You are not your body. You are the sum of all your actions, and they live on after your body dies. You may be mortal, but your brand is eternal.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Freedom is not having everything we crave, it's being able to go without the things we crave and being OK with it.
Author: Rob Bell

Quote: I am a lover of truth, a worshiper of freedom, a celebrant at the altar of language and purity and tolerance.
Author: Stephen Fry

Quote: My dad always says, some people will treat you badly and you can't help that. But how you handle it and how it makes you feel, that's up to you.
Author: Elise Broach

Quote: I try to find humor in everything I do, because I think all great plays - even great tragedies - have enormous humor in them.
Author: Marian Seldes

Quote: Love flows like flowers, and grows like water. I'm so thirsty for romance I could drink a dozen roses.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Truth ain't be in secret site to be found. It lies within certain levels of understanding and knowledge.
Author: Toba Beta

Quote: If there is such a thing as a good marriage, it is because it resembles friendship rather than love.
Author: Michel de Montaigne

Quote: Don't walk behind me; I may not lead. Don't walk in front of me; I may not follow. Just walk beside me and be my friend.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: We live in a system that espouses merit, equality, and a level playing field, but exalts those with wealth, power, and celebrity, however gained.
Author: Derrick A. Bell
Origin: Ethical Ambition: Living a Life of Meaning and Worth

Quote: A scaly lizard in soapy water makes a great scrubber. I'd wash my hands of her, if I didn't enjoy being treated like a dishrag so much.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: A strong man does not succumb to pressures, he knows that without pressures he will not find pleasures and so he will not be made.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: What greater aspiration and challenge are there for a mother than the hope of raising a great son or daughter?
Author: Rose Kennedy

Quote: You can't stay in your corner of the Forest waiting for others to come to you. You have to go to them sometimes.
Author: A.A. Milne

Quote: We made love like two coiled up fire hoses. When there's no fire in the romance, why not act like a couple of sleeping snakes?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: India- Seychelles relations have been characterized by close friendship, understanding and cooperation.
Author: Pratibha Patil

Quote: There are two insults no human being will endure: that he has no sense of humor, and that he has never known trouble.
Author: Sinclair Lewis

Quote: The hardest thing to find in life is balance - especially, the more success you have, the more you look to the other side of the gate.
Author: Celine Dion

Quote: For marriage to be a success, every woman and every man should have her and his own bathroom. The end.
Author: Catherine Zeta- Jones

Quote: I need a woman to have a quirky sense of humor. There's a bunch of jokes I use, and if she doesn't get them, she's probably not for me.
Author: Matthew Perry

Quote: That's the thing about life. A lot of the time, it isn't easy at all. We just have to try to make the best of it.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: All the great things are simple, and many can be expressed in a single word: freedom, justice, honor, duty, mercy, hope.
Author: Winston Churchill

Quote: Snow is not microwave friendly. In fact, snow is not too friendly at all, unless you first buy it a few beers. Then it's just downright slutty.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The most important reason for going from one place to another is to see what's in between, and they took great pleasure in doing just that.
Author: Norton Juster

Quote: I see when men love women. They give them but a little of their lives. But women when they love give everything.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: My parents armed me with an amazing sense of humor, and it's what you need when, well, it's what anyone needs in this world.
Author: Warwick Davis

Quote: From the moment I picked up your book until I put it down, I was convulsed with laughter. Some day I intend reading it.
Author: Groucho Marx

Quote: Man is solid, not liquid. But with the fluid nature of networking, my personal brand would grow faster if I would just go with the flow.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Among the many answers I have found, I believe love is the most beautiful and simple art that reflects the beauty of life.
Author: Mabel Iam

Quote: Lady, I do not make up things. That is lies. Lies are not true. But the truth could be made up if you know how. And that's the truth.
Author: Lily Tomlin

Quote: A race is a work of art that people can look at and be affected in as many ways they're capable of understanding.
Author: Steve Prefontaine

Quote: Whoever has My commandments and keeps them loves Me. And he who loves Me will be loved by My Father, and I will love him and show Myself to him.
Author: Anonymous

Quote: I don't want to do anything. I don't even want to start this day because then I'll just be expected to finish it.
Author: Rainbow Rowell

Quote: If you do not respect your own wishes, no one else will. You will simply attract people who disrespect you as much as you do.
Author: Vironika Tugaleva

Quote: Nothing is predestined. The obstacles of your past can become the gateways that lead to new beginnings.
Author: Ralph H. Blum

Quote: Start by doing what's necessary; then do what's possible; and suddenly you are doing the impossible.
Author: Francis of Assisi

Quote: We have all known the long loneliness and we have learned that the only solution is love and that love comes with community.
Author: Dorothy Day
Origin: The Long Loneliness: The Autobiography of the Legendary Catholic Social Activist

Quote: People are strange: They are constantly angered by trivial things, but on a major matter like totally wasting their lives, they hardly seem to notice.
Author: Charles Bukowski

Quote: Man is the candle light and a woman is the moonlight. They live far away but can grow together during lonesome nights.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: Life is a drama full of tragedy and comedy. You should learn to enjoy the comic episodes a little more.
Author: Jeannette Walls

Quote: The sudden disappointment of a hope leaves a scar which the ultimate fulfillment of that hope never entirely removes.
Author: Thomas Hardy

Quote: To be happy you must have taken the measure of your powers, tasted the fruits of your passion, and learned your place in the world.
Author: George Santayana

Quote: I believe the way to master my destiny is to serve others. If I raise up others, am I not also raised up?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Let me love you, but don't love me back. Do love me and let me hate you for a while. Let me feel like I have some control, because I know I never do.
Author: Ann Brashares

Quote: Singleness of purpose is one of the chief essentials for success in life, no matter what may be one's aim.
Author: John D. Rockefeller

Quote: To force oneself to believe and to accept a thing without understanding is political, and not spiritual or intellectual.
Author: Gautama Buddha

Quote: On your birthday you should throw me a party. This is my advice for everybody, especially my clones.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: You were born with a song in the seat of your soul; let the life that you live be the singing of it.
Author: LaShaun Middlebrooks Collier

Quote: This is what it means to live on. When granted hope, a person uses it as fuel, as a guidepost to life. It is impossible to live without hope.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: Every day I'm growing as a man. I'm not growing in height, but rather I'm growing in love, which makes me seem taller than I really am.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Mirrors are perpetually deceitful. They lie and steal your true self. They reveal only what your mind believes it sees
Author: Dee Remy

Quote: Every human being is searching for a deep sense of meaning, and yet we're all chasing success. We've confused one for the other.
Author: Donald Miller

Quote: I want to thank you, Lord, for life and all that's in it. Thank you for the day and for the hour, and the minute.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: Writing is a job, a talent, but it's also the place to go in your head. It is the imaginary friend you drink your tea with in the afternoon.
Author: Ann Patchett

Quote: Everything is political. I will never be a politician or even think political. Me just deal with life and nature. That is the greatest thing to me.
Author: Bob Marley

Quote: A person without a sense of humor is like a wagon without springs. It's jolted by every pebble on the road.
Author: Henry Ward Beecher

Quote: There are times in life when we're called to forget who we thought we were in order to become who we really are.
Author: Elle Sommer

Quote: Your soul is the priestess of memory, selecting, sifting, and ultimately gathering your vanishing days toward presence.
Author: John O'Donohue
Origin: Anam Cara: A Book of Celtic Wisdom

Quote: If you have to ask if you've done enough, you haven't. Each day brings with it the opportunity to do more than you did yesterday.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: Architecture is basically a container of something. I hope they will enjoy not so much the teacup, but the tea.
Author: Yoshio Taniguchi

Quote: Without continual growth and progress, such words as improvement, achievement, and success have no meaning.
Author: Benjamin Franklin

Quote: Why, if it was an illusion, not praise the catastrophe, whatever it was, that destroyed illusion and put truth in it's place?
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: A friend is a friend who continues to love you and like you when you don't love him or like him any more.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Where music thundered let the mind be still, Where the will triumphed let there be no will, What light revealed, now let the dark fulfill.
Author: May Sarton

Quote: Death is the easy part, the hard part is living and knowing you could be so much more then you're willing to be.
Author: Robert M. Drake

Quote: The road ahead is long and there will be many setbacks. Success is not assured... but the price of failure has never been this high.
Author: Charles Lee Lesher

Quote: I do my best thinking at night when everyone else is sleeping. No interruptions. No noise. I like the feeling of being awake when no one else is.
Author: Jennifer Niven

Quote: He's turned his life around. He used to be depressed and miserable. Now he's miserable and depressed.
Author: David Frost

Quote: If I have the belief that I can do it, I shall surely acquire the capacity to do it even if I may not have it at the beginning.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: If you want to be successful, it's just this simple. Know what you are doing. Love what you are doing. And believe in what you are doing.
Author: Will Rogers

Quote: You will be a great queen when you come back, you know. And someday you'll love me the way you love your wolf.
Author: Carrie Jones

Quote: I don't like my circle of friends, so I'm changing them to a square. Love shapes our lives, so why not shape who we love?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We must never stop dreaming. Dreams provide nourishment for the soul, just as a meal does for the body.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: It is sound judgment to hope that in the not too distant future we shall be competent to understand so simple a thing as a star.
Author: Arthur Eddington

Quote: Always listen to the voice of your conscience. If your conscience conflicts with your faith, question everything.
Author: Suzy Kassem
Origin: Rise Up and Salute the Sun: The Writings of Suzy Kassem

Quote: I'd rather strive for the kind of interview where instead of me asking to introduce myself to society, society asks me to introduce myself to society.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: It is therefore senseless to think of complaining since nothing foreign has decided what we feel, what we live, or what we are.
Author: Jean- Paul Sartre

Quote: Death, I had discovered long ago, was available in varying flavors, and none of them particularly palatable.
Author: Jasper Fforde

Quote: God allows us to experience the low points of life in order to teach us lessons that we could learn in no other way.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: Anyone with half a mind could see that, "said Tiffany. Miss Tick sighed. "Yes. But sometimes it's so hard to find half a mind when you need one.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: My happiness grows in direct proportion to my acceptance, and in inverse proportion to my expectations.
Author: Michael J. Fox

Quote: When its gone, you'll know what a gift love was. you'll suffer like this. So go back and fight to keep it.
Author: Ian McEwan

Quote: The clearest way to show what the rule of law means to us in everyday life is to recall what has happened when there is no rule of law.
Author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

Quote: If one's bowels move, one is happy, and if they don't move, one is unhappy. That is all there is to it.
Author: Lin Yutang

Quote: Friendship is held to be the severest test of character. It is easy, we think, to be loyal to a family and clan, whose blood is in your own veins.
Author: Charles Eastman

Quote: Eleanor was right. She never looked nice. She looked like art, and art wasn't supposed to look nice; it was supposed to make you feel something.
Author: Rainbow Rowell

Quote: You don't need to have a fight before great sex. I can keep my cool and still bring the heat every time.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Hopes are like hair ornaments. Girls want to wear too many of them. When they become old women they look silly wearing even one.
Author: Arthur Golden

Quote: Trying to get more learning out of the present system is like trying to get the Pony Express to compete with the telegraph by breeding faster ponies.
Author: Edward Fiske

Quote: One needs more than ambition and talent to make a success of anything, really. There must be love and a vocation.
Author: Jessye Norman

Quote: As is a tale, so is life: not how long it is, but how good it is, is what matters. I wish you all very good lives.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Very Good Lives: The Fringe Benefits of Failure and the Importance of Imagination

Quote: One day, she ventured to the palace library and was delighted to find what good company books could be.
Author: E. Lockhart

Quote: I give you this to take with you: Nothing remains as it was. If you know this, you can begin again, with pure joy in the uprooting.
Author: Judith Minty

Quote: He smiled in a way that made me want to kiss him right on the spot. Or the lips. Whichever was closer.
Author: Shannon Hale

Quote: If you want to achieve things in life, you've just got to do them, and if you're talented and smart, you'll succeed.
Author: Juliana Hatfield

Quote: With my eyes closed, I would touch a familiar book and draw its fragrance deep inside me. This was enough to make me happy.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: Flaming enthusiasm, backed by horse sense and persistence, is the quality that most frequently makes for success.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: The secret of a happy marriage is finding the right person. You know they're right if you love to be with them all the time.
Author: Julia Child

Quote: She knew then that white was more than a color: It was a cold, pale shade of understanding that seems to take all of your hope away.
Author: Vannetta Chapman

Quote: Everything is good as it comes from the hands of the Maker of the world, but degenerates once it gets into the hands of man
Author: Jean- Jacques Rousseau

Quote: Dusty, dark, cold, and hard, coal has no beauty of its own, but when it is consummated by fire it is beautiful and becomes what it was designed to be.
Author: Frederica Mathewes- Green
Origin: At the Corner of East and Now: A Modern Life in Ancient Christian Orthodoxy

Quote: The hope of a secure and livable world lies with disciplined nonconformists who are dedicated to justice, peace and brotherhood.
Author: Martin Luther King

Quote: It was a mistake, "you said. But the cruel thing was, it felt like the mistake was mine, for trusting you.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: I love mankind, he said, "but I find to my amazement that the more I love mankind as a whole, the less I love man in particular.
Author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

Quote: Michael could never remember his father ever having uttered a word about death, as if the Don respected death too much to philosophize about it.
Author: Mario Puzo

Quote: This body is fragile. It is just flesh. Listen to the heartbeat. Life depends on the pumping of a muscle.
Author: Stephen Batchelor
Origin: Buddhism without Beliefs: A Contemporary Guide to Awakening

Quote: Love one another, but make not a bond of love: Let it rather be a moving sea between the shores of your souls.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: A man can know his father, or his son, and there might still be nothing between them but loyalty and love and mutual incomprehension.
Author: Marilynne Robinson

Quote: Never cry because you have mountains of problem in your hands to solve. Always smile because each problems will someday resolve.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: I have trouble with modern art. But in general, all art forms fascinate me - art is the way human beings express what we can't say in words.
Author: Andrea Bocelli

Quote: That was the last cruel irony of Tobias's life: that he doomed the woman he would have died to save.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: The choice is yours. Don't let your pronouncements destroy your destiny rather let them build your future up!
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: New Yorkers love it when you spill your guts out there. Spill your guts at Wimbledon and they make you stop and clean it up.
Author: Jimmy Connors

Quote: My mother used to tell me that when push comes to shove, you always know who to turn to. That being a family isn't a social construct but an instinct.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Let every man feel that he is the architect and builder of his own life, and that he proposes to make a success of it by working.
Author: Heber J. Grant

Quote: I believe that being happy is the only important thing. Happiness. Simple as a glass of chocolate or torturous as the heart. Bitter. Sweet. Alive.
Author: Joanne Harris

Quote: Nature never appeals to intelligence until habit and instinct are useless. There is no intelligence where there is no need of change.
Author: H.G. Wells

Quote: She asked if I loved another woman, so I answered honestly and said, "Dinner was great, but I could go for dessert.
Author: Dark Jar Tin Zoo
Origin: Love Quotes for the Ages. Specifically Ages 19-91.

Quote: The boundaries which divide Life from Death are at best shadowy and vague. Who shall say where the one ends, and where the other begins?
Author: Edgar Allan Poe

Quote: It's hard to communicate anything exactly and that's why perfect relationships between people are difficult to find.
Author: Gustave Flaubert

Quote: Nevertheless, in this sea of human wretchedness and malice there bloomed at times compassion, as a pale flower blooms in a putrid marsh.
Author: Henryk Sienkiewicz

Quote: How can one change one's entire life and build a new one on one moment of love? And yet, that's what you make me want to close my eyes and do.
Author: Greta Garbo

Quote: You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.
Author: R. Buckminster Fuller

Quote: I cried so hard after I put my cat to sleep. I guess I shouldn't have cried so hard, because with all my sobbing, I ended up waking it up.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Art and life are subjective. Not everybody's gonna dig what I dig, but I reserve the right to dig it.
Author: Whoopi Goldberg

Quote: Whoever said that the past isn't dead had it backward. It's the future that's already dead, already played out.
Author: Gayle Forman

Quote: If you are in difficulties with a book, try the element of surprise: attack it at an hour when it isn't expecting it.
Author: H.G. Wells

Quote: The philosopher is a person who refuses no pleasures which do not produce greater sorrows, and who knows how to create new ones.
Author: Giacomo Casanova

Quote: I have long enjoyed the friendship and companionship of Republicans because I am by instinct a teacher, and I would like to teach them something.
Author: Woodrow Wilson

Quote: She plants love, and she grows roses. The fragrance of romance comes from the blossom that blooms in the heart.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I always pass on good advice. It is the only thing to do with it. It is never of any use to oneself.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: I've always felt that the best place to hide a body is in the trunk of a cop car, with a note affixed to the body that reads, "I'm sorry.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: There are Two Typos of People in This World: Those Who Can Edit and Those Who Can't

Quote: So India's problem turns out to be the world's problem. What happened in India has happened in God's name. The problem's name is God.
Author: Salman Rushdie

Quote: Foolishly romantic, yeah, sure, maybe: but she'd rather have dreams of Prince Charming than the reality of Mr. Wrong.
Author: Lisa Cach

Quote: When you face a new challenge, remember the skills, talent, guts and resources that got you through before.
Author: Lynn A. Robinson

Quote: I'm telling you a lie in a vicious effort that you will repeat my lie over and over until it becomes true
Author: Lady Gaga

Quote: No matter how much water a sink takes on, it never lives up to its name. The Titanic would never have sunk if it were made out of a sink.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Titanic would never have sunk if it were made out of a sink.

Quote: You cannot hope to sweep someone else away by the force of your writing until it has been done to you.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: People wrap themselves in their beliefs. And they do it in such a way that you can't set them free. Not even the truth will set them free.
Author: Michael Specter

Quote: If there never was a night or day and memories could fade away, then we'd be nothing left but the dreams we made
Author: Selena Gómez

Quote: Without leaps of imagination or dreaming, we lose the excitement of possibilities. Dreaming, after all is a form of planning.
Author: Gloria Steinem

Quote: People get stupid when they're in love; people want what they can't have; and the years between ages twelve and eighteen always, always suck.
Author: Claudia Gray

Quote: The small wisdom is like water in a glass: clear, transparent, pure. The great wisdom is like the water in the sea: dark, mysterious, impenetrable.
Author: Rabindranath Tagore

Quote: That night when you kissed me, I left a poem in your mouth, and you can hear some of the lines every time you breathe out.
Author: Andrea Gibson

Quote: As an outside; don't worry about failure, because failure will take care of itself. Focus on success.
Author: Henry Cavill

Quote: In these times I don't, in a manner of speaking, know what I want; perhaps I don't want what I know and want what I don't know.
Author: Marsilio Ficino
Origin: The Letters of Marsilio Ficino, Vol. 3

Quote: Don't avoid extremes, and don't choose any one extreme. Remain available to both the polarities - that is the art, the secret of balancing.
Author: Rajneesh

Quote: I don't remember who said this, but there really are places in the heart you don't even know exist until you love a child.
Author: Anne Lamott
Origin: Operating Instructions: A Journal of My Son's First Year

Quote: Perhaps wisdom is simply a matter of waiting, and healing a question of time. And anything good you've ever been given is yours forever.
Author: Rachel Naomi Remen

Quote: His lips tasted cool and sharp, peppermint, winter, but his hands, soft on the back of my neck, promised long days and summer and forever.
Author: Maggie Stiefvater

Quote: Suspense is very important. Even though this is humor and they're short stories, that theory of building suspense is still there.
Author: Sergio Aragones

Quote: It is wisdom to recognize necessity when all other courses have been weighed, though as folly it may appear to those who cling to false hope.
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien

Quote: Beauty of whatever kind, in its supreme development, invariably excites the sensitive soul to tears.
Author: Edgar Allan Poe

Quote: We are barely conscious. With a higher consciousness we can open the door between infinite possibilities.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: You will have five hundred million little bells, and I shall have five hundred million springs of fresh water...
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: How to duplicate yourself: hang out with the same people and say the same things all the time. The you of today is a clone of the you from yesterday.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: One press account said I was an overnight success. I thought that was the longest night I've ever spent.
Author: Sandra Cisneros

Quote: If art is to nourish the roots of our culture, society must set the artist free to follow his vision wherever it takes him.
Author: John F. Kennedy

Quote: Every normal man must be tempted, at times, to spit on his hands, hoist the black flag, and begin slitting throats.
Author: H.L. Mencken

Quote: Can miles truly separate you from friends... If you want to be with someone you love, aren't you already there?
Author: Richard Bach

Quote: Digression is the soul of wit. Take the philosophic asides away from Dante, Milton or Hamlet's father's ghost and what stays is dry bones.
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: Pluto will always be a planet in my book. That's because my book was published before Pluto was blacklisted by planetary scientists.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: I've got a lot of dreams I want to achieve, and I hope someone can cheer me on as I'll cheer them on in their dreams.
Author: Hunter Hayes

Quote: The worst part of holding the memories is not the pain. It's the loneliness of it. Memories need to be shared.
Author: Lois Lowry

Quote: A banker is a fellow who lends you his umbrella when the sun is shining, but wants it back the minute it begins to rain.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: Just remember that the only question in a house is who is to rule. The rest is only dancing around that, trying not to look it in the eye.
Author: Catherynne M. Valente

Quote: Women, as they grow older, rely more and more on cosmetics. Men, as they grow older, rely more and more on a sense of humor.
Author: George Jean Nathan

Quote: The tower of success stands on the pillars of vision, action, patience and the character to withstand criticisms.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: When you sit down to write, write. Don't do anything else except go to the bathroom, and only do that if it absolutely cannot be put off.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: It is when those who are not strong enough have made some moderate amount of progress that they fail and give up...
Author: Confucius

Quote: I know now, Lord, why you utter no answer. You are yourself the answer. Before your face questions die away. What other answer would suffice?
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: The heart may freeze, or it can burn. The pain will ease and I can learn. There is no future, there is no past. I live this moment as, my last.
Author: Jonathan Larson
Origin: Rent: The Complete Book and Lyrics of the Broadway Musical

Quote: You are where you are right now because of the actions you've taken, or maybe, the inaction you've taken.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: When you take risks you learn that there will be times when you succeed and there will be times when you fail, and both are equally important.
Author: Ellen DeGeneres

Quote: Success is a little like wrestling a gorilla. You don't quit when you're tired. You quit when the gorilla is tired.
Author: Robert Strauss

Quote: Your ordinary acts of love and hope point to the extraordinary promise that every human life is of inestimable value.
Author: Desmond Tutu

Quote: We are never allowed to forget that some books are badly written; we should remember that sometimes they're badly read, too.
Author: Nick Hornby

Quote: To invent your own life's meaning is not easy, but it's still allowed, and I think you'll be happier for the trouble.
Author: Bill Watterson

Quote: Anybody who succeeds is helping people. The secret to success is find a need and fill it; find a hurt and heal it; find a problem and solve it.
Author: Robert H. Schuller

Quote: I am lonely, yet not everybody will do. I don't know why, some people fill the gaps and others emphasize my loneliness.
Author: Anaïs Nin

Quote: I'm telling you this for one reason and one reason only: No matter how sure you are of someone's love, it's always nice to hear it.
Author: Mike Gayle

Quote: A man is like a novel: until the very last page you don't know how it will end. Otherwise it wouldn't be worth reading.
Author: Yevgeny Zamyatin

Quote: I didn't have a fireworks moment for my salvation. I had a falling in love with Jesus in Sunday school when I was a very young child.
Author: Beth Moore

Quote: Education is the preparation of a child intellectually, emotionally, spiritually, and physically for life and for eternity.
Author: Kevin Swanson
Origin: Upgrade: 10 Secrets to the Best Education for Your Child

Quote: You were put on this earth to achieve your greatest self, to live out your purpose, and to do it courageously.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: When it comes down to it, I let them think what they want. If they care enough to bother with what I do, then I'm already better than them.
Author: Marilyn Monroe

Quote: I hate to hear you talk about all women as if they were fine ladies instead of rational creatures. None of us want to be in calm waters all our lives.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: One's life has value so long as one attributes value to the life of others, by means of love, friendship, indignation and compassion.
Author: Simone de Beauvoir

Quote: Beauty is when you can appreciate yourself. When you love yourself, that's when you're most beautiful.
Author: Zoe Kravitz

Quote: You must not lose faith in humanity. Humanity is like an ocean; if a few drops of the ocean are dirty, the ocean does not become dirty.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: You must give everything to make your life as beautiful as the dreams that dance in your imagination.
Author: Roman Payne

Quote: So, I must be taken as I have been made. The success is not mine, the failure is not mine, but the two together make me.
Author: Charles Dickens

Quote: It was the first time I was ever in love, and I learned a lot. Before that I'd never even thought about killing myself.
Author: Steven Wright

Quote: Because I was a television writer for many years, I write very conversationally. I put things straight, and with a lot of humor.
Author: Tracy McMillan

Quote: Whatever you vividly imagine, ardently desire, sincerely believe, and enthusiastically act upon... must inevitably come to pass!
Author: Paul J. Meyer

Quote: Not enough, "he said, letting her hair slip through his fingers. "If I kiss you all day, everyday, for the rest of my life, it won't be enough.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: It's not something he can do anything about, being a bleeder, anymore than a guy with a glass jaw can do something about not having whiskers.
Author: F.X. Toole

Quote: Success seems to be connected with action. Successful people keep moving. They make mistakes, but they don't quit.
Author: Conrad Hilton

Quote: Many of the most powerful things in life are not tangible. All it takes is for you to close your eyes to see.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: Knowledge grows exponentially. The more we know, the greater our ability to learn, and the faster we expand our knowledge base.
Author: Dan Brown

Quote: Religious doctrines ... are all illusions, they do not admit of proof, and no one can be compelled to consider them as true or to believe in them.
Author: Sigmund Freud

Quote: A lot of the conflict you have in your life exists simply because you're not living in alignment; you're not be being true to yourself.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Wit and playfulness represent a desperately serious transcendence of evil. Humor is both a form of wisdom and a means of survival.
Author: Tom Robbins

Quote: Like time suspended, a wound unmended-- you and I.  We had no ending, no said goodbye;  For all my life, I'll wonder why.
Author: Lang Leav

Quote: Every moment is an opportunity to become more enlightened, more open and expanded. Continually choose that path and you will be free.
Author: Dashama Konah Gordon
Origin: Journey to Joyful: Transform Your Life with Pranashama Yoga

Quote: The children are intrigued by these invitation, and it's only a matter of minutes before they find themselves engaged in a new world of possibilities.
Author: Rachelle Doorley

Quote: Drinking coffee is like drinking an inverse yawn. I prefer mine with two spoonfuls of "I'm listening.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I was going to say the beginning is the good part, when it's all sparks and sparkles, before they are inevitably unmasked as assholes.
Author: Laini Taylor

Quote: Pop Art looks out into the world. It doesn't look like a painting of something, it looks like the thing itself.
Author: Roy Lichtenstein

Quote: You don't dare think whole even to yourself the entirety of a dear hope or wish let alone a desperate one else you yourself have doomed it.
Author: William Faulkner

Quote: I don't want to be married to someone who feels inferior to my success or because I make more money than he does.
Author: Grace Kelly

Quote: No one can sum up all God is able to accomplish through one solitary life, wholly yielded, adjusted, and obedient to Him.
Author: D.L. Moody
