Quote: Someday, somewhere - anywhere, unfailingly, you'll find yourself, and that, and only that, can be the happiest or bitterest hour of your life.
Author: Pablo Neruda

Quote: Saw a little girl touch a big bug and shout, "I conquered my fear! YES!" and calmly walk away. I was inspired.
Author: Nathan Fillion

Quote: [N]ow we have a clearer idea what this story is all about: The world was made for man, and man was made to rule it.
Author: Daniel Quinn
Origin: Ishmael: An Adventure of the Mind and Spirit

Quote: No you sick, stupid creep, I love you. I shouldn't. I shouldn't. You're sick inside, Caine, sick! But I love you. - Diana
Author: Michael Grant

Quote: The only way a woman can ever reform a man is by boring him so completely that he loses all possible interest in life.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: I've learned that you shouldn't go through life with a catcher's mitt on both hands; you need to be able to throw some things back.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: You lead with direction, and you try to lead by example. I try to be there when things are not good and obviously share the spoils of success.
Author: Roger Penske

Quote: My songs have always had hope and perseverance in them - I never write songs that have no escape hatch, no positivity.
Author: Jakob Dylan

Quote: The scientist only imposes two things, namely truth and sincerity, imposes them upon himself and upon other scientists.
Author: Erwin Schrödinger
Origin: What Is Life? with Mind and Matter and Autobiographical Sketches

Quote: Read over your compositions, and wherever you meet with a passage which you think is particularly fine, strike it out.
Author: Samuel Johnson
Origin: The Life of Samuel Johnson LL.D. Vol 2

Quote: If there are two men, Rod and Rob, and you can only steal from one, which one would you choose? The answer is: Whichever one is a banker.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: Lighthouses don't go running all over an island looking for boats to save; they just stand there shining.
Author: Anne Lamott

Quote: Bitter your acts, bitter am I, Kindness your deeds, kindness am I, Pleasant and gentle, so you are, Fine honeyed lips and sweet talker.
Author: Rumi
Origin: Love: The Joy That Wounds: The Love Poems of Rumi

Quote: I do hope that our spring will be starting shortly and we will all be able to enjoy some sunshine again.
Author: Lesley Garrett

Quote: He liked women with little butts and big tits? Someone had played with one too many barbie dolls as a kid.
Author: Kelley Armstrong

Quote: Morning dew upon the grass, glistening in the sun. Yesterday's gone, tomorrow may come, but this day has begun.
Author: Calvin W. Allison

Quote: One goes through school, college, medical school and one's internship learning little or nothing about goodness but a good deal about success.
Author: Ashley Montagu

Quote: I have friends in overalls whose friendship I would not swap for the favor of the kings of the world.
Author: Thomas A. Edison

Quote: Expose yourself to your deepest fear; after that, fear has no power, and the fear of freedom shrinks and vanishes. You are free.
Author: Jim Morrison

Quote: Government exists to protect us from each other. Where government has gone beyond its limits is in deciding to protect us from ourselves.
Author: Ronald Reagan

Quote: If we cannot comprehend God in his visible works, how then in his inconceivable thoughts, that call the works into being?
Author: Edgar Allan Poe

Quote: I'm still like a butterfly going from one job to another job. But it's quite lovely - I hope to keep this freedom, to have fun.
Author: Carine Roitfeld

Quote: Flowers and fear are a lot alike. For one, flowers and fear have a distinct smell, and two, I'm currently trying to grow both in my garden.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: There are Two Typos of People in This World: Those Who Can Edit and Those Who Can't

Quote: Our prime purpose in this life is to help others. And if you can't help them, at least don't hurt them.
Author: Dalai Lama

Quote: I had learned that every patient has the right to hope, despite long odds, and it was my role to help nurture that hope.
Author: Jerome Groopman

Quote: Success is very ephemeral. You depend entirely on the desire of others, which makes it difficult to relax.
Author: Eva Green

Quote: Any fool can hope when success lies plainly in view. It wants genuine strength to hope when matters are hopeless.
Author: Michael Flynn

Quote: Thinking there is something better out there in the world, something worth more than you already have- of all my mistakes, that was my biggest.
Author: Louise Candlish

Quote: Love at first sight is easy to understand; it's when two people have been looking at each other for a lifetime that it becomes a miracle.
Author: Amy Bloom

Quote: We should not judge people by their peak of excellence; but by the distance they have traveled from the point where they started.
Author: Henry Ward Beecher

Quote: The question is not, who uses faith and who uses reason? Everyone uses both. The question instead should be, who has the most reasonable faith?
Author: J.F. Baldwin

Quote: And, you know, I liked writing humor. Well, I should say, I wanted to write seriously, but it kept turning funny.
Author: Roseanne Barr

Quote: We will not be able to find peace if our minds are burning with the fires of resentment. Let us forgive and forget to create peace.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I have found the paradox, that if you love until it hurts, there can be no more hurt, only more love.
Author: Mother Teresa

Quote: Fortunately analysis is not the only way to resolve inner conflicts. Life itself still remains a very effective therapist.
Author: Karen Horney

Quote: Everything was too sharp and clear, so that I could never tell where to start- the way a map that shows too much can sometimes be useless.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: Sometimes letting go is simply changing the labels you place on an event. Looking at the same event with fresh eyes.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: All I ever wanted was to reach out and touch another human being not just with my hands but with my heart.
Author: Tahereh Mafi

Quote: Dare to be different. Represent your maker well and you will forever abide in the beautiful embrace of his loving arms.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: We'll meet at the theater tonight. I'll hold your seat 'til you get there. Once you get there; you're on your own.
Author: Groucho Marx

Quote: A poem for Beth: Roses are red, Violets are blue, I didn't know what love meant, until I looked it up in the dictionary.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Story That Talks about Talking Is Like Chatter to Chattering Teeth, and Every Set of Dentures Can Attest to the Fact That No..

Quote: Making benches is no walk in the park. It takes one a lot of love to make a bench, and then it takes two to make love on that bench.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Those were strange days, now that I look back at them. In the midst of life, everything revolved around death.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: Regardless of how black the page, he had always managed to turn it and move on to a new chapter in his life.
Author: Robert Masello

Quote: The Prince is the only option to a better living. His arm is reliable and dependable. Get to Him, stay glued and remain on Top!
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: The whole problem with the world is that fools and fanatics are always so certain of themselves, and wiser people so full of doubts.
Author: Bertrand Russell

Quote: I wish my school days could have dragged on a little longer, or that I could go back and do it later in life.
Author: Cara Delevingne

Quote: The irony is that while God doesn't need us but still wants us, we desperately need God but don't really want Him most of the time.
Author: Francis Chan

Quote: Success is neither magical nor mysterious. Success is the natural consequence of consistently applying basic fundamentals.
Author: Jim Rohn

Quote: The trouble about jumping was that if you didn't pick the right number of storeys, you might still be alive when you hit bottom.
Author: Sylvia Plath

Quote: The purpose of education should not to be to fill you with knowledge, but education should make you hungry for knowledge.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: It's not about what you've done; it's how you've experienced whatever has happened to you. Matt Lawrence in The Overachievers
Author: Alexandra Robbins

Quote: Listen, real poetry doesn't say anything; it just ticks off the possibilities. Opens all doors. You can walk through anyone that suits you.
Author: Jim Morrison

Quote: If you place your head in a lion's mouth, then you cannot complain one day if he happens to bite it off.
Author: Agatha Christie

Quote: . . . owning a dog always ended with this sadness because dogs just don't live as long as people do.
Author: John Grogan
Origin: Marley and Me: Life and Love With the World's Worst Dog

Quote: You have to take your own bold approach, and if you do you will be rewarded with success. Or calamitous failure. That can happen too.
Author: Steven Moffat

Quote: Life doesn't make any sense without interdependence. We need each other, and the sooner we learn that, the better for us all.
Author: Erik Erikson

Quote: A lot of people go searching for "Truth." But they can't be searching too hard, because very few of them ever think to look under my bed.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: There are Two Typos of People in This World: Those Who Can Edit and Those Who Can't

Quote: Between men and women there is no friendship possible. There is passion, enmity, worship, love, but no friendship.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Friendship with ones self is all important, because without it one cannot be friends with anyone else in the world.
Author: Eleanor Roosevelt

Quote: I don't listen to what art critics say. I don't know anybody who needs a critic to find out what art is.
Author: Jean- Michel Basquiat

Quote: I suppose the secret of his success is in his tremendous idleness which almost approaches the supernatural.
Author: Lawrence Durrell

Quote: This year I vow to learn how to garden. I will be the Farmer of Love and grow in understanding and forgiveness.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: She's ignoring my texts. Maybe she's dead. Oh, I certainly hope so. I'd hate to think she's being deliberately unresponsive.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Since then, at an uncertain hour, That agony returns: And till my ghastly tale is told, This heart within me burns.
Author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
Origin: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner

Quote: Focus on faith and grow your roots strong and deep so no one can make you believe in something that is not good for your soul.
Author: Molly Friedenfeld

Quote: But no matter how much evil I see, I think it's important for everyone to understand that there is much more light than darkness.
Author: Robert Uttaro

Quote: a dog is not considered a good dog because he is a good barker. a man is not considered a good man because he is a good talker.
Author: Gautama Buddha

Quote: We're only instruments of love, flowing through heaps of pain hoping one day we'd hatch a passion of our own.
Author: Robert M. Drake

Quote: The man who kills a man kills a man. The man who kills himself kills all men. As far as he is concerned, he wipes out the world.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: I have no responsibility to live up to what others expect of me. That's their mistake, not my failing.
Author: Richard Feynman

Quote: Everybody is special. Everybody. Everybody is a hero, a lover, a fool, a villain. Everybody. Everybody has their story to tell.
Author: Alan Moore

Quote: Every life has death and every light has shadow. Be content to stand in the light and let the shadow fall where it will.
Author: Mary Stewart

Quote: Madam, I have been looking for a person who disliked gravy all my life; let us swear eternal friendship.
Author: Sydney Smith

Quote: I'm a big illustration and comic book fan. In my eyes, comic books and illustration are the same kind of art forms.
Author: Mika

Quote: The First Splendid Truth: To be happy, I need to think about feeling good, feeling bad, and feeling right, in an atmosphere of growth.
Author: Gretchen Rubin
Origin: The Happiness Project: Or Why I Spent a Year Trying to Sing in the Morning, Clean My Closets, Fight Right, Read Aristotle, and Generally Have More Fun

Quote: I certainly do care for you Jeff Campbell less than you are always thinking and much more than you are ever knowing
Author: Gertrude Stein

Quote: There is nothing noble in being superior to your fellow man; true nobility is being superior to your former self.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: We think to dance, and dance in thought. But to hibernate in the mind, is to bring upon us an apocalypse of the Soul.
Author: Ilyas Kassam

Quote: How many a man has thrown up his hands at a time when a little more effort, a little more patience would have achieved success.
Author: Elbert Hubbard

Quote: A successful life is one that is lived through understanding and pursuing one's own path, not chasing after the dreams of others.
Author: Chin- Ning Chu

Quote: God wants my life to be about being successful and being happy and blessing other people and being blessed.
Author: Miley Cyrus

Quote: Nothing's perfect, the world's not perfect. But it's there for us, trying the best it can; that's what makes it so damn beautiful.
Author: Hiromu Arakawa

Quote: Wit is a weapon. Jokes are a masculine way of inflicting superiority. But humor is the pursuit of a gentle grin, usually in solitude.
Author: Frank Muir

Quote: I love power. But it is as an artist that I love it. I love it as a musician loves his violin, to draw out its sounds and chords and harmonies.
Author: Napoleon Bonaparte

Quote: All mankind... being all equal and independent, no one ought to harm another in his life, health, liberty or possessions.
Author: John Locke

Quote: I have never understood why people who can swallow the enormous improbability of a personal God boggle at a personal Devil.
Author: Graham Greene

Quote: You make the rest of the beautiful things in the world cry for even trying at all. You make it hard for me to breathe.
Author: Debra Anastasia

Quote: She looked, but she couldn't see. She was wearing an emotional blindfold, and though she heard me say I love you, she just didn't listen.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Every book has a soul, the soul of the person who wrote it and the soul of those who read it and dream about it.
Author: Carlos Ruiz Zafón

Quote: Never make friends with people who are above or below you in status. Such friendships will never give you any happiness.
Author: Chanakya

Quote: Doubt thou the stars are fire; Doubt that the sun doth move; Doubt truth to be a liar; But never doubt I love .
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: I was a veritable Johnny Appleseed of grand expectations, and all I reaped for my trouble was a harvest of bitter fruit.
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert
Origin: Committed: A Skeptic Makes Peace with Marriage

Quote: Peace, sweet peace finally comes to men when they humbly yield to the gentle pressure of the Spirit.
Author: Spencer W. Kimball

Quote: O, it's die we must, but it's live we can, And the marvel of earth and sun Is all for the joy of woman and man And the longing that makes them one.
Author: William Ernest Henley
Origin: Hawthorn and Lavender: With Other Verses

Quote: It is suicide to be abroad. But what it is to be at home, ... what it is to be at home? A lingering dissolution.
Author: Samuel Beckett
Origin: All That Fall and Other Plays for Radio and Screen. by Samuel Beckett

Quote: You need to spend time crawling alone through shadows to truly appreciate what it is to stand in the sun.
Author: Shaun Hick

Quote: I crossed a thousand leagues to come to you, and lost the best part of me along the way. Don't tell me to leave.
Author: George R.R. Martin

Quote: I planned my death carefully, unlike my life, which meandered along from one thing to another, despite my feeble attempts to control it.
Author: Margaret Atwood

Quote: I'm going to sell Flash Bang Wow Fuzz (not a drill) in a bottle, but I'm not sure how to market it. Maybe as a drinkable alternative to love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: I hope I have helped to raise the profile of science and to show that physics is not a mystery but can be understood by ordinary people.
Author: Stephen Hawking

Quote: Relationships are so much like the United States - they only really thrive when faced with an external threat.
Author: Laura Pedersen

Quote: Part of him wanted to weep... but his purpose was rigid within him. He felt he could not bend to gentleness without breaking.
Author: Stephen R. Donaldson
Origin: The Chronicles of Thomas Covenant, the Unbeliever

Quote: Unless our conception of patriotism is progressive, it cannot hope to embody the real affection and the real interest of the nation.
Author: Jane Addams

Quote: I wrote you a love letter, and I sent it snail mail. Love is forever, and that's about how long it'll take to get to you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Sooner or later in life, we will all take our own turn being in the position we once had someone else in.
Author: Ashly Lorenzana

Quote: Cheekbones that cut like ice and eyes like liquid scotch. Loren Hale is an alcoholic beverage and he doesn't even know it.
Author: Krista Ritchie

Quote: Only when we give joyfully, without hesitation or thought of gain, can we truly know what love means.
Author: Leo Buscaglia

Quote: For a long time now I have tried simply to write the best I can. Sometimes I have good luck and write better than I can.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: It is with the soul that we grasp the essence of another human being, not with the mind, nor even with the heart.
Author: Henry Miller

Quote: In any compromise between food and poison, it is only death that can win. In any compromise between good and evil, it is only evil that can profit.
Author: Ayn Rand

Quote: Each morning when I open my eyes I say to myself: I, not events, have the power to make me happy or unhappy today.
Author: Groucho Marx

Quote: Every beginning has an end and every end has a new beginning, don't worry, broken soul, life will one day come to an end.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: The good writers touch life often. The mediocre ones run a quick hand over her. The bad ones rape her and leave her for the flies.
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: I could scarf down a scarf faster than I could eat any other throat warmer, with the possible exception of your clenched hands around my neck.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The point is, it didn't really matter what the book was about. It was what it meant that was important.
Author: Markus Zusak

Quote: If you live gladly to make others glad in God, your life will be hard, your risks will be high, and your joy will be full.
Author: John Piper
Origin: Don't Waste Your Life Study Guide

Quote: A passion for politics stems usually from an insatiable need, either for power, or for friendship and adulation, or a combination of both.
Author: Fawn M. Brodie

Quote: I am not the moon orbiting around your planet; I am the sun that will burn through your frozen mind.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: The first step toward success is taken when you refuse to be a captive of the environment in which you first find yourself.
Author: Mark Cain

Quote: Humor was not important only for me, humor was important for this nation for centuries, to survive, you know.
Author: Milos Forman

Quote: As I hope it doesn't come to the point where I need to take a day off. I feel pretty good right now and I'm not resting or saving for any other game.
Author: Tim Duncan

Quote: Everyone suffers some injustice in life, and what better motivation than to help others not suffer in the same way.
Author: Bella Thorne

Quote: To turn your dreams into reality, all your resources, efforts and concentration should be aligned in the same direction.
Author: Roopleen

Quote: I drank her essence, and it's like she never existed and now I'm thirsty again. Let this be a lesson in love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I think a funny picture would have a caption that read, "Believe in yourself," with an accompanying image of a wilting flower.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'm the one that has to die when it's time for me to die, so let me live my life, the way I want to.
Author: Jimi Hendrix

Quote: As long as we have faith in our own cause and an unconquerable will to win, victory will not be denied us.
Author: Winston Churchill

Quote: I was seen spotted with an older woman and a girl half my height in age. A leopard was also spotted.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: One should never trust a woman who tells one her real age. A woman who would tell one that would tell one anything.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: I love how babies look like old people. I saw a baby the other day that looked exactly like my grandpa, only taller.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I love to go to the zoo. But not on Sunday. I don't like to see the people making fun of the animals, when it should be the other way around.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: sometimes you don't need a goal in life, you don't need to know the big picture. you just need to know what you're going to do next!
Author: Sophie Kinsella

Quote: The nuclear arms race is like two sworn enemies standing waist deep in gasoline, one with three matches, the other with five.
Author: Carl Sagan

Quote: I hope to see the bringing together of all the best educated people of the earth into a worldwide Congress of Scientists.
Author: Marquis de Condorcet

Quote: Your coffin reached the monstrous hole. And a part of me went down into the muddy earth with you and lay down next to you and died with you.
Author: Rosamund Lupton

Quote: Many people think excitement is happiness.... But when you are excited you are not peaceful. True happiness is based on peace.
Author: Hanh Nhat Thich

Quote: I think about my mother singing after lunch on a Summer afternoon, twirling in blue dress across the floor of her dressing room
Author: Audrey Niffenegger

Quote: The only sea I saw Was the seesaw sea With you riding on it. Lie down, lie easy. Let me shipwreck in your thighs.
Author: Dylan Thomas

Quote: Education, boy, is not something to prepare you for life. That is a vulgar American error.... It's something to take you out of life.
Author: John Horne Burns

Quote: The pupil dilates in darkness and in the end finds light, just as the soul dilates in misfortune and in the end finds God.
Author: Victor Hugo

Quote: Imagination doesn't always make you long for what you cannot have, but rather thrive in what you do not have.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: The day science begins to study non-physical phenomena, it will make more progress in one decade than in all the previous centuries of its existence.
Author: Nikola Tesla

Quote: There are trivial truths and there are great truths. The opposite of a trivial truth is plainly false. The opposite of a great truth is also true.
Author: Niels Bohr

Quote: If you can love someone with your whole heart, even one person, then there's salvation in life. Even if you can't get together with that person.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: When you live your life by poor standards, you inflict damage on everyone who crosses your path, especially those you love.
Author: Jordan Belfort

Quote: Stand up for your conscience. Use light to reveal what is concealed in the darkness. Use truth to fight the lies, and the heart to fight the mind.
Author: Suzy Kassem
Origin: Rise Up and Salute the Sun: The Writings of Suzy Kassem

Quote: Waking up is not a selfish pursuit of happiness, it is a revolutionary stance, from the inside out, for the benefit of all beings in existence.
Author: Noah Levine

Quote: To live only for some future goal is shallow. It's the sides of the mountain that sustain life, not the top.
Author: Robert M. Pirsig

Quote: Peace and friendship with all mankind is our wisest policy, and I wish we may be permitted to pursue it.
Author: Thomas Jefferson

Quote: There may be a great fire in our soul, yet no one ever comes to warm himself at it, and the passers-by see only a wisp of smoke.
Author: Vincent van Gogh

Quote: Emotion, which is suffering, ceases to be suffering as soon as we form a clear and precise picture of it.
Author: Baruch Spinoza

Quote: He said the truth is like that water: it doesn't matter how hard you try to bury it; it'll always find some way back to the surface. It's resilient.
Author: K.A. Tucker

Quote: Nourishing yourself in a way that helps you blossom in the direction you want to go is attainable, and you are worth the effort.
Author: Deborah Day

Quote: All should be laid open to you without reserve, for there is not a truth existing which I fear, or would wish unknown to the whole world.
Author: Thomas Jefferson
Origin: Writings: Autobiography/ Notes on the State of Virginia/ Public & Private Papers/ Addresses/ Letters

Quote: The secret of a good sermon is to have a good beginning and a good ending; and to have the two as close together as possible.
Author: George Burns

Quote: Go sip on gossip, and leave the coffee talk for me to chug. I'll be in the kitchen, giggling like a schoolgirl if you need me.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I believe success is preparation, because opportunity is going to knock on your door sooner or later but are you prepared to answer that?
Author: Omar Epps

Quote: If time heals all wounds, and a book can hold a person's entire life, then you can speed up the process with a pulp time warp.
Author: Deb Caletti

Quote: Education leads to enlightenment. Enlightenment opens the way to empathy. Empathy foreshadows reform.
Author: Derrick A. Bell
Origin: Faces At The Bottom Of The Well: The Permanence Of Racism

Quote: The most enjoyable book in the world is the phone book, because think of all the sex that went into creating the content.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: There is only one language, the language of the Heart. There is only one religion, the religion of Love.
Author: Sri Sathya Sai Baba

Quote: The rule of the universe is that others can do for us what we cannot do for ourselves, and one can paddle every canoe except one's own.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: Once you can let go of illusion and draw upon a more universal source of motivation then you will re connect with your true purpose on Earth.
Author: Gary Markwick

Quote: The life of the enemy . Whoever lives for the sake of combating an enemy has an interest in the enemy's staying alive.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: Anyone who imagines they can work alone winds up surrounded by nothing but rivals, without companions. The fact is, no one ascends alone.
Author: Lance Armstrong
Origin: It's Not About the Bike: My Journey Back to Life

Quote: Don't fear challenges. They often give us the opportunity to strengthen our courage, faith, and inner strength.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The ultimate reason for setting goals is to entice you to become the person it takes to achieve them
Author: Jim Rohn

Quote: If you see me pushing a wheelbarrow full of animal balloons up a hill, it may be a Zen koan, or it may be buy two get a third for FREE.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The more humble and obedient to God a man is, the more wise and at peace he will be in all that he does.
Author: Thomas à Kempis

Quote: Friendship is unnecessary, like philosophy, like art... It has no survival value; rather it is one of those things that give value to survival.
Author: C. S. Lewis

Quote: It's time to get real, folks. Hope and change ain't working. Hope and change is not a solution. Hope and change is not a job.
Author: Herman Cain

Quote: In the battle that is philosophy all the techniques of war, including looting and camouflage, are permissible.
Author: Louis Althusser
Origin: Philosophy and the Spontaneous Philosophy of the Scientists: And Other Essays

Quote: Just because someone desires you, it does not mean that they value you. Read it over. Again. Let those words resonate in your mind.
Author: Nayyirah Waheed

Quote: Life has but one true charm: the charm of the game. But what if we're indifferent to whether we win or lose?
Author: Charles Baudelaire

Quote: Waiting is painful. Forgetting is painful. But not knowing which to do is the worst kind of suffering.
Author: Paulo Coelho
Origin: By the River Piedra I Sat Down and Wept

Quote: Happiness is a state of mind, a choice, a way of living; it is not something to be achieved, it is something to be experienced.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Breath is the bridge that connects us with the mysteries of the universe and universal consciousness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I saw that all the things I feared and which feared me had nothing good or bad in them save in so far as the mind was affected by them.
Author: Baruch Spinoza
Origin: On the Improvement of the Understanding

Quote: One of the best times for figuring out who you are & what you really want out of life? Right after a break-up.
Author: Mandy Hale
Origin: The Single Woman: Life, Love, and a Dash of Sass

Quote: You backbiting, poisonous, treacherous, deceitful, wicked, clever girl. If this works I'll buy you a pony.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: Death didn't bother me much. Strong Christian and all that. Method of death did. Being eaten alive. One of my top three ways not to go out.
Author: Laurell K. Hamilton

Quote: Anyone who stops learning is old, whether at twenty or eighty. Anyone who keeps learning stays young.
Author: Henry Ford

Quote: If you can spend a perfectly useless afternoon in a perfectly useless manner, you have learned how to live
Author: Lin Yutang

Quote: I won't be affected by your charm nor I will trap you into marriage. I've been there once, never again.- Kristine
Author: Martha Cecilia

Quote: It is said that God has created man in his own image. But it may be that humankind has created God in the image of humankind.
Author: Hanh Nhat Thich
Origin: Going Home: Jesus and Buddha as Brothers

Quote: In visual perception a color is almost never seen as it really is - as it physically is. This fact makes color the most relative medium in art.
Author: Josef Albers

Quote: I can tell if two people are in love by how they hold each other's hands, and how thick their sanitation gloves are.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I love like a leaf in the wind. Please, hold your applause until the end of the performance (the last day of fall).
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the best book I've ever written, and it still sucks

Quote: Success is not what you have done compared to what others have done. Success is what you have done compared to what you were supposed to do.
Author: Tony Evans

Quote: The problem with the world is that the intelligent people are full of doubts, while the stupid ones are full of confidence.
Author: Charles Bukowski

Quote: Think left and think right and think low and think high. Oh, the thinks you can think up if only you try!
Author: Dr. Seuss

Quote: I hope people start to look at their lives as the most powerful, creative act they will ever offer this world.
Author: Tom Shadyac

Quote: I learned early in my career to not let myself get in the way of humor but, instead, find what is great in a talented person.
Author: Tamra Davis

Quote: The world is perishing for lack of the knowledge of God and the Church is famishing for want of His Presence.
Author: A.W. Tozer

Quote: Do you know the difference between education and experience? Education is when you read the fine print; experience is what you get when you don't.
Author: Pete Seeger

Quote: We're here, and then we're gone, and it's not about the time we're here, but what we do with the time.
Author: Rick Yancey

Quote: First, I thought, almost despairing, This must crush my spirit now; Yet I bore it, and am bearing- Only do not ask me how.
Author: Heinrich Heine

Quote: To so enter into it in nature and art that the enjoyed meanings of life may become a part of living is the attitude of aesthetic appreciation.
Author: George Herbert Mead

Quote: Develop the winning edge; small differences in your performance can lead to large differences in your results.
Author: Brian Tracy

Quote: If in thirst you drink water from a cup, you see God in it. Those who are not in love with God will see only their own faces in it.
Author: Rumi

Quote: I wanted to see the place where Margaret grew to what she is, even at the worst time of all, when I had no hope of ever calling her mine...
Author: Elizabeth Gaskell

Quote: Some of the most powerful speeches I have given have been delivered in the dedicated silence of my actions.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Children must early learn the the beauty of generosity. They are taught to give what they prize most, that they may taste the happiness of giving.
Author: Charles Alexander Eastman

Quote: There is hope in dreams, imagination, and in the courage of those who wish to make those dreams a reality.
Author: Jonas Salk

Quote: If you claim to be a real friend then be real in your soul. If you claim to be fake then be an enemy instead.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: You may lie with your mouth, but with the mouth you make as you do so you none the less tell the truth.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: When today fails to offer the justification for hope, tomorrow becomes the only grail worth pursuing.
Author: Christopher Bigsby

Quote: If an apology is followed by an excuse or a reason, it means they are going to commit same mistake again they just apologized for.
Author: Amit Kalantri

Quote: Friendship is almost always the union of a part of one mind with the part of another; people are friends in spots.
Author: George Santayana

Quote: Sometimes you deal with the devil not because you want to, but because if you don't, someone else will.
Author: Laurell K. Hamilton

Quote: A kiss without a moustache, they said then, is like an egg without salt; I will add to it: and it is like Good without Evil.
Author: Jean- Paul Sartre

Quote: Opportunities? They are all around us ... There is power lying latent everywhere waiting for the observant eye to discover it.
Author: Orison Swett Marden

Quote: Caring about someone isn't complicated. It isn't easy. But it isn't complicated, either. Kinda like lifting the engine block out of a car.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: People think that at the top there isn't much room. They tend to think of it as an Everest. My message is that there is tons of room at the top.
Author: Margaret Thatcher

Quote: Grace is the pleasure of God to magnify the worth of God by giving sinners the right and power to delight in God without obscuring the glory of God.
Author: John Piper

Quote: He felt that his whole life was some kind of dream and he sometimes wondered whose it was and whether they were enjoying it.
Author: Douglas Adams
Origin: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

Quote: Over time, any deception destroys intimacy, and without intimacy couples cannot have true and lasting love.
Author: Bonnie Eaker Weil
Origin: Financial Infidelity: Seven Steps to Conquering the #1 Relationship Wrecker

Quote: In order to move on, you must understand why you felt what you did and why you no longer need to feel it.
Author: Mitch Albom
Origin: The Five People You Meet in Heaven

Quote: The firmest friendships have been formed in mutual adversity, as iron is most strongly united by the fiercest flame
Author: Charles Caleb Colton

Quote: These are the people who will encourage you to go after your dreams and will inspire you to succeed. Stick to them like a barnacle to a rock.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: She has been to the compound before. She remembered this hallway. She knows about the initiation process. My mother was Dauntless.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: Don't be afraid of death; be afraid of an unlived life. You don't have to live forever, you just have to live.
Author: Natalie Babbitt

Quote: Vital lives are about action. You can't feel warmth unless you create it, can't feel delight until you play, can't know serendipity unless you risk.
Author: Joan Erickson

Quote: The light of compassion opens the petals of the heart. When the petals of the heart unfold fragrance spreads across the valley.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: While differing widely in the various little bits we know, in our infinite ignorance we are all equal.
Author: Karl Popper

Quote: Let each man take the path according to his capacity, understanding and temperament. His true guru will meet him along that path.
Author: Sivananda Saraswati

Quote: The more of your private life you put into the public domain, the smaller your private life becomes.
Author: Kevin McCloud

Quote: Just when you think it can't get any worse, it can. And just when you think it can't get any better, it can.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: One is seldom unchanged by the death of those one loves. It gives me a deeper knowledge of them, and so of oneself in regard to them.
Author: Elizabeth Goudge

Quote: stand often in the company of dreamers: they tickle your common sense & believe you can achieve things which are impossible.
Author: Mary Anne Radmacher

Quote: When the stars threw down their spears, and watered heaven with their tears, did he smile his work to see? Did he who made the Lamb make thee?
Author: William Blake
Origin: Songs of Innocence and of Experience

Quote: Even though your thinking might not be right for others, just so long as it's right for you then that's all what matters.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: You don't write about the horrors of war. No. You write about a kid's burnt socks lying in the road.
Author: Richard Price

Quote: He that has doctrinal knowledge and speculation only, without affection, never is engaged in the business of religion.
Author: Jonathan Edwards

Quote: How can they say my life is not a success? Have I not for more than sixty years got enough to eat and escaped being eaten?
Author: Logan Pearsall Smith

Quote: Dear refuge of my weary soul, On thee, when sorrows rise, On thee, when waves of trouble roll, My fainting hope relies.
Author: Anne Steele

Quote: Life is truly known only to those who suffer, lose, endure adversity and stumble from defeat to defeat.
Author: Anais Nin

Quote: Just because I flap my arms, that doesn't make me a bird. No, I'm a bird because I believe myself to be. That's the power of faith.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Zebra is the Piano of the Animal Kingdom

Quote: Since I became a knitting humor writer, I seem to be understood a little better - at least for the purposes of social discourse.
Author: Stephanie Pearl- McPhee

Quote: I don't need your money, I don't need your belonging, all I need from you is to make me feel that I'm valuable and significant to the world!
Author: Lydor Brunice

Quote: We would not be interested in human beings if we did not have the hope of someday meeting someone worse off than ourselves.
Author: Emile M. Cioran

Quote: She brews a bruise on my heart, and drinks it like a beer. She calls it love, but she would, because she's drunk on my torment.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: It is not God that is worshipped but the authority that claims to speak in His name. Sin becomes disobedience to authority not violation of integrity.
Author: Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan

Quote: Love is the only energy I've ever used as a writer. I've never written out of anger, although anger has informed love.
Author: Athol Fugard

Quote: The foundation of adult trust is not "You will never hurt me." It is "I trust myself with whatever you do.
Author: David Richo
Origin: Daring to Trust: Opening Ourselves to Real Love and Intimacy

Quote: Those who have never known the deep intimacy and the intense companionship of mutual love have missed the best thing that life has to give.
Author: Bertrand Russell

Quote: Yearning for love made her feel like a cat that was always twining around ankles, meowing Pet me, pet me, look at me, love me.
Author: Laini Taylor

Quote: Cultural confinement takes place when a curator imposes his own limits on an art exhibition, rather than asking an artist to set his limits.
Author: Robert Smithson

Quote: It is simply wrong to begin with a theme, symbol or other abstract unifying agent, and then try to force characters and events to conform to it.
Author: Thomas Pynchon

Quote: I'm satisfied with making true choices and finding the woman I love, Angie, and building a family that I love so much.
Author: Brad Pitt

Quote: What was the point of trying to run away if people were going to insist on reminding you of what you were running from?
Author: Morgan Matson

Quote: As a fiction writer, let me make it up, and let me make it up to you. I'll pen our love story, if you'll be my co-author.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We're born with success. It is only others who point out our failures, and what they attribute to us as failure.
Author: Whoopi Goldberg

Quote: I chased the chaste, and they got scared and scurried. Then I stood still and loved where I was at, and all approached without fear of reproach.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'll never second guess the things that I have done. I've got too much left to say and too much to become.
Author: Alex Gaskarth

Quote: It's easy to get caught up in where the world is going and lose sight of the direction we were headed.
Author: Terry A. O'Neal

Quote: Parents are always more knowledgeable than their children, and children are always smarter than their parents.
Author: Jonathan Safran Foer

Quote: Friendship is something that creates equality and mutuality, not a reward for finding equality or a way of intensifying existing mutuality.
Author: Rowan Williams

Quote: A #startup is as fragile as a flower, and it needs a garden and a gardener to help it grow. Those gardens are called Business Incubators.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: People are always complaining that life's not fair, but that simply isn't true. Life is extraordinarily fair. It's just not centered on you.
Author: Lynn Marie Sager

Quote: The good, the admirable reader identifies himself not with the boy or the girl in the book, but with the mind that conceived and composed that book.
Author: Vladimir Nabokov

Quote: There's nothing wrong with stretching the truth. We stretch taffy, and that just makes it more delicious.
Author: Stephen Colbert

Quote: He wastes his time over his writing, trying to accomplish what geniuses and rare men with college educations sometimes accomplish.
Author: Jack London

Quote: In this world, it's not enough to have a fine education. You need a piece of paper to prove you got it.
Author: Jeannette Walls

Quote: In scientific thinking are always present elements of poetry. Science and music requires a thought homogeneous.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: When all is said and done all anyone has left is their integrity at their core... Don't give that away too.
Author: Solange nicole

Quote: The most telling and profound way of describing the evolution of the universe would undoubtedly be to trace the evolution of love.
Author: Pierre Teilhard de Chardin

Quote: The longer I live, the more I observe that carrying around anger is the most debilitating to the person who bears it.
Author: Katharine Graham

Quote: A process cannot be understood by stopping it. Understanding must move with the flow of the process, must join it and flow with it.
Author: Frank Herbert

Quote: Even in the common affairs of life, in love, friendship, and marriage, how little security have we when we trust our happiness in the hands of others!
Author: William Hazlitt

Quote: Life is and will ever remain an equation incapable of solution, but it contains certain known factors.
Author: Nikola Tesla

Quote: As a rule of thumb, hitchhiking is no fun. If you're going to stand around waiting to move, you may as well get paid to hold a pawnshop sign.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Do you realize how hard it is to keep your mind clear when somebody's telling you to keep your mind clear?
Author: Tom Upton

Quote: Common sense will nearly always stand you in better stead than a slavish adherence to the conventions.
Author: M.M. Kaye

Quote: What we think determines what happens to us, so if we want to change our lives, we need to stretch our minds.
Author: Wayne Dyer

Quote: Truth is stranger than fiction, but it is because Fiction is obliged to stick to possibilities; Truth isn't.
Author: Mark Twain
Origin: Following the Equator: A Journey Around the World

Quote: Hope is the thing with feathers That perches in the soul And sings the tune without the words And never stops at all.
Author: Emily Dickinson

Quote: You were you, and I was I; we were two before our time. I was yours before I knew, and you have always been mine too.
Author: Lang Leav

Quote: Since there is no real silence, Silence will contain all the sounds, All the words, all the languages, All knowledge, all memory.
Author: Dejan Stojanovic

Quote: Seek first the kingdom of heaven WITHIN, whereby lies an abundance of treasures and resources that you need
Author: Lisa Washington

Quote: Success is no accident. It is hard work, perseverance, learning, studying, sacrifice and most of all, love of what you are doing or learning to do.
Author: Pele

Quote: Every search begins with beginner's luck. And every search ends with the victor's being severely tested.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: There is no friend like an old friend who has shared our morning days, no greeting like his welcome, no homage like his praise.
Author: Oliver Wendell Holmes

Quote: If ruining the only religious icon I have leaves me vulnerable to Martian vampires, I'll have to risk it.
Author: Andy Weir

Quote: A big enough artist, I say, can eat anything, must eat everything and then alchemize it. Only the feeble writer is afraid of expansion.
Author: Anaïs Nin
Origin: The Diary of Anaïs Nin, Vol. 1: 1931-1934

Quote: I have a dream that one day little black boys and girls will be holding hands with little white boys and girls.
Author: Martin Luther King Jr.

Quote: Speak against unconscious oppression, Speak against the tyranny of the unimaginative, Speak against bonds.
Author: Ezra Pound

Quote: Drugs are the enemies of ambition and hope - and when we fight against drugs we are fighting for the future.
Author: Bob Riley

Quote: The best scientist is open to experience and begins with romance - the idea that anything is possible.
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: When you're good at something, you'll tell everyone. When you're great at something, they'll tell you.
Author: Walter Payton

Quote: Well, I don't like the first bit and I don't know the last bit. So I'm really hoping the middle bit is exceptional.
Author: Eoin Colfer

Quote: In the way this strange gentleman was going on, he would leave the world without having done any good to himself or anybody else.
Author: Jules Verne

Quote: Many people will find this book disrespectful. There is nothing amusing about being dead, they will say. Ah, but there is.
Author: Mary Roach
Origin: Stiff: The Curious Lives of Human Cadavers

Quote: God creates out of nothing. Wonderful you say. Yes, to be sure, but he does what is still more wonderful: he makes saints out of sinners.
Author: Søren Kierkegaard

Quote: You can start to change your luck today. Begin believing that you can have what you desire and superior things will arrive.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: The heart dies a slow death, shedding each hope like leaves until one day there are none. No hopes. Nothing remains.
Author: Arthur Golden

Quote: If we assume that man actually does resemble God, then we are forced into the impossible theory that God is a coward, an idiot and a bounder.
Author: H.L. Mencken

Quote: Carve your name on hearts, not tombstones. A legacy is etched into the minds of others and the stories they share about you.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: A lot of my humor does come from anger. It's like, you're not gonna pull one over on me - which is pretty much my motto anyways.
Author: Courteney Cox

Quote: I want to be thoroughly used up when I die, for the harder I work the more I live. I rejoice in life for its own sake.
Author: George Bernard Shaw

Quote: It is in vain to say human beings ought to be satisfied with tranquility: they must have action; and they will make it if they cannot find it.
Author: Charlotte Brontë

Quote: To be invisible, paint yourself with the direct shade of zero. Leave nothing to chance, by taking nothing with you wherever you go.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I was dead, then alive. Weeping, then laughing. The power of love came into me, and I became fierce like a lion, then tender like the evening star.
Author: Rumi

Quote: Luckily, I always travel with a book, just in case I have to wait on line for Santa, or some such inconvenience.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: A work of art when placed in a gallery loses its charge, and becomes a portable object or surface disengaged from the outside world.
Author: Robert Smithson

Quote: Be careful whom you choose to love. This decision will impact your future life and happiness in ways you cannot yet imagine.
Author: Toni Coleman

Quote: Soldiers live. He dies and not you, and you feel guilty, because you're glad he died, and not you. Soldiers live, and wonder why.
Author: Glen Cook

Quote: The Bible is the greatest of all books; to study it is the noblest of all pursuits; to understand it, the highest of all goals.
Author: Charles C. Ryrie

Quote: I want to write a book so long that it will take the average person their whole life to read. It will be exactly the same length as the Bible.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: My words and my ideas are my property, and I'll keep and protect them as surely as I do my stable of unicorns.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I told him I had once lost everything I had, too, and that I think that can be God's way of building walls around us to force us to look up at Him.
Author: Kimberly Novosel

Quote: The progress of the world can certainly never come at all save by the modified action of the individual beings who compose the world.
Author: George Eliot

Quote: My handshake is as firm as cooked spaghetti. So, do you prefer your introductions with Alfredo or marinara sauce?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Oh, you hate your job? Why didn't you say so? There's a support group for that. It's called EVERYBODY, and they meet at the bar.
Author: Drew Carey

Quote: Man is able to decide for or against reason, he is able to create beyond reason or to destroy below reason
Author: Paul Tillich

Quote: I am not a great cook, I am not a great artist, but I love art, and I love food, so I am the perfect traveller.
Author: Michael Palin

Quote: Thousands of candles can be lighted from a single candle, and the life of the candle will not be shortened. Happiness never decreases by being shared.
Author: Buddha

Quote: The more I know of the world, the more I am convinced that I shall never see a man whom I can really love. I require so much!
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: Success needs vision to see, passion to transcend, patience to withstand and the character to overcome failures.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: An artist must be free to choose what he does, certainly, but he must also never be afraid to do what he might choose.
Author: Langston Hughes

Quote: We photograph things in order to drive them out of our minds. My stories are a way of shutting my eyes.
Author: Franz Kafka

Quote: It's strange how things can change back as suddenly as they changed originally. When one thing happens and suddenly, things are back to normal.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: I don't really want people looking to me for inspiration. I just want to be a sign along the way that points toward Heaven.
Author: Bethany Hamilton
Origin: Soul Surfer: A True Story of Faith, Family, and Fighting to Get Back on the Board

Quote: The thing with your heart's desire is that your heart doesn't even know what it desires until it turns up.
Author: Daniel Handler

Quote: I had a dream about you last night. We were plug sockets in the bedroom. We saw only a short part of their day, but we knew everything of it.
Author: Michael Summers
Origin: I Had a Dream About You

Quote: The aim of life is to live, and to live means to be aware, joyously, drunkenly, serenely, divinely aware.
Author: Henry Miller

Quote: It's impossible to go through life unscathed. Nor should you want to. By the hurts we accumulate, we measure both our follies and our accomplishments.
Author: Christopher Paolini

Quote: Be not afraid of greatness. Some are born great, some achieve greatness, and others have greatness thrust upon them.
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: I slept and I dreamed that life is all joy. I woke and I saw that life is all service. I served and I saw that service is joy.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: I know I love her, because when I see her my heart beats like a drum. If she played guitar and sang, we could start a band.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love Quotes for the Ages. Specifically Ages 19-91.

Quote: Dumped doesn't even begin to describe it. If you're going to use a trash metaphor, incinerated is more like it.
Author: Rachel Cohn
Origin: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List

Quote: My eyes are bronze, my hair is turning silver, and my heart is gold. Oh, and my love for you belongs in the Olympics, because it's Special.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Death is a challenge. It tells us not to waste time... It tells us to tell each other right now that we love each other.
Author: Leo Buscaglia

Quote: I was always looking outside myself for strength and confidence, but it comes from within. It is there all the time.
Author: Anna Freud

Quote: What you're supposed to do when you don't like a thing is change it. If you can't change it, change the way you think about it. Don't complain.
Author: Maya Angelou
Origin: Wouldn't Take Nothing for My Journey Now

Quote: So many other planets & stars -- could all those stars set over barren planets, beauty wasted? Or, are sunsets witnessed throughout the universe?
Author: David Self

Quote: An expert is someone who knows some of the worst mistakes that can be made in his subject, and how to avoid them.
Author: Werner Heisenberg

Quote: The future will be what it will, and fretting about it will only make your fears more likely to come true.
Author: Christopher Paolini

Quote: The human heart is not unchanging (nay, changes almost out of recognition in the twinkling of an eye)...
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: I feel like someone breathed new air into my lungs. I am not Abnegation. I am not Dauntless. I am Divergent.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: We always see our worst selves. Our most vulnerable selves. We need someone else to get close enough to tell us we're wrong. Someone we trust.
Author: David Levithan
Origin: Naomi and Ely's No Kiss List

Quote: When you come out of the storm, you won't be the same person who walked in. That's what this storm's all about.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: What art is, in reality, is this missing link, not the links which exist. It's not what you see that is art; art is the gap.
Author: Marcel Duchamp

Quote: Be courteous to all, but intimate with few, and let those few be well tried before you give them your confidence.
Author: George Washington

Quote: A relationship needs constant attention. It's a living thing, not just a habit. You've got to keep on top of it.
Author: Matt Dunn

Quote: But understanding will always require some effort. You probably wouldn't admire a friend who was good at everything if it cost her no effort.
Author: Jostein Gaarder

Quote: Is there a difference between happiness and inner peace? Yes. Happiness depends on conditions being perceived as positive; inner peace does not.
Author: Eckhart Tolle

Quote: I am not worried, Harry, "said Dumbledore, his voice a little stronger despite the freezing water. "I am with you.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Half- Blood Prince

Quote: Husband: a man with hopes of being a lover who settles for being a provider, causing his wife to grow suspicious of her depleting jewelry box.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: To enhance your experience and consciousness, your mind is always trying to understand everything that is going on around you.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Friendship ... is born at the moment when one man says to another "What! You too? I thought that no one but myself . . .
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: I had a dream about you last night... I was a brick and you were a blanket. Damn that improbability drive.
Author: Nicole McKay
Origin: I Had a Dream About You

Quote: The pity of it was that this discovery, if such it was, now seemed so stale, so profitless to me. What good was it? What good did thinking ever do?
Author: Jed Rubenfeld

Quote: The difference between me as Brian Warner or Marilyn Manson is just words. Same personality, sensibility, sense of humor, behavior. He is me.
Author: Marilyn Manson

Quote: My motivation for being a good drummer was born out of fear, which, in a way, seems so antithetical to what art should be.
Author: Damien Chazelle

Quote: Being a senior doesn't automatically make one wise but the wise & foolish alike have things to teach us.
Author: Allan Lokos
Origin: Pocket Peace: Effective Practices for Enlightened Living

Quote: Your assumptions are your windows on the world. Scrub them off every once in a while, or the light won't come in.
Author: Isaac Asimov

Quote: You have to remember one thing about the will of the people: it wasn't that long ago that we were swept away by the Macarena.
Author: Jon Stewart

Quote: Some people grow vegetables by day, but I grow shadows by night. Right now my only customer is the US government, but the profit is unbelievable.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: What can we see, read, acquire, but ourselves. Take the book, my friend, and read your eyes out, you will never find there what I find.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: People make mistakes in life through believing too much, but they have a damned dull time if they believe too little.
Author: James Hilton

Quote: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, today is a gift of God, which is why we call it the present.
Author: Bil Keane

Quote: The command of our language is crucial to focusing our thoughts and communicating them with precision to others.
Author: Felix Alba- Juez
Origin: Galloping with Light - Einstein, Relativity, and Folklore

Quote: Even as a kid I was never the generator of humor, but I always knew who was funny, who to hang out with.
Author: Andrew Stanton

Quote: A white wedding dress, once worn, is like the ghost of a moment, trapping feelings of forever into fabric that's never to be tried on again.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When your back is to the wall and you are facing fear head on, the only way is forward and through it.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: Friendship is one of our most treasured relationships, but it isn't codified and celebrated; it's never going to give you a party.
Author: Hanya Yanagihara

Quote: Do you want some fresh tomato soup to go? I'll put it in a mesh strainer. Oh, if only love were as easy to contain as soup in a strainer.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Politics is not a bad profession. If you succeed there are many rewards, if you disgrace yourself you can always write a book.
Author: Ronald Reagan

Quote: Can a mortal ask questions which God finds unanswerable? Quite easily, I should think. All nonsense questions are unanswerable.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: I love the solitude of reading. I love the deep dive into someone else's story, the delicious ache of a last page.
Author: Naomi Shihab Nye

Quote: As we learn, grow and prosper, consciousness takes on new expressions and intrinsically searches for purpose and meaning.
Author: Joseph Rain

Quote: If I told you I've worked hard to get where I'm at, I'd be lying, because I have no idea where I am right now.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We evaluate, measure, and describe this world from our own point of view, but how does a tree see the world?
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The good is the Enemy of the best. Until you depart from the good, you cannot enter God's best for your life.
Author: Pedro Okoro
Origin: Crushing the Devil: Your Guide to Spiritual Warfare and Victory in Christ

Quote: Let failure be your workshop. See it for what is is: the world walking you through a tough but necessary semester, free of tuition. (from Workbook)
Author: Steven Heighton

Quote: Give time, give space to sprout your potential. Awaken the beauty of your heart - the beauty of your spirit. There are infinite possibilities.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: I'll finish the bottle of wine, while you finish what you were saying about how good it is. If you waste no words, I'll waste no time.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Do not lose hold of your dreams or aspirations. For if you do, you may still exist but you have ceased to live.
Author: Henry David Thoreau

Quote: No rational argument will have a rational effect on a man who does not want to adopt a rational attitude.
Author: Karl Popper

Quote: Real art is basic emotion. If a scene is handled with simplicity - and I don't mean simple - it'll be good, and the public will know it.
Author: John Wayne

Quote: Love is the most precious gift you could ever possibly hope to steal. Some women foolishly do not leave their rib cages locked at night.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Since we cannot know all there is to be known about anything, we ought to know a little about everything.
Author: Blaise Pascal

Quote: When faith in our freedom gives way to fear of our freedom, silencing the minority view becomes the operative protocol.
Author: Joel Salatin
Origin: Everything I Want to Do Is Illegal: War Stories from the Local Food Front

Quote: By the way, when Oprah Winfrey is suggesting you may have overextended yourself, you need to examine your fucking life.
Author: Tina Fey

Quote: God, who foresaw your tribulation, has specially armed you to go through it, not without pain but without stain.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: Some people feel love in their hearts, Julie. Some of us feel it all way into our souls. We're the ones who can't forget.
Author: Judith McNaught

Quote: When you are lonely for a while don't get restless, if you had born alone, you are going to die alone then for sometime you can certainly live alone.
Author: Amit Kalantri

Quote: Words are tears that have been written down. Tears are words that need to be shed. Without them, joy loses all its brilliance and sadness has no end.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Because love, love is never finished. It circles and circles, the memories out of order and not always complete.
Author: Sara Zarr

Quote: Consciousness is a transformational dynamic force which transforms us by changing our imaginations and perceptions.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The more credit you give away, the more will come back to you. The more you help others, the more they will want to help you.
Author: Brian Tracy

Quote: Write what you love. Love will hold you through the hard times and hold the world during the good times.
Author: Mark Z. Danielewski

Quote: Sometimes, we are so attached to our way of life that we turn down wonderful opportunities simply because don't know what to do with it.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Do your little bit of good where you are; it's those little bits of good put together that overwhelm the world.
Author: Desmond Tutu

Quote: Love is our true destiny. We do not find the meaning of life by ourselves alone - we find it with another.
Author: Thomas Merton

Quote: Don't be afraid of your fears. They're not there to scare you. They're there to let you know that something is worth it.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: In the darkness, he is invisible, but I can still feel him beside me. Sometimes you don't have to see something to know it is there.
Author: Maggie Stiefvater

Quote: Stairs, are they going up or are they going down? They're so confusing! If love were a physical thing, it would be stairs.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Of course there is no formula for success, except perhaps an unconditional acceptance of life, and what it brings
Author: Arthur Rubinstein

Quote: A family is a risky venture, because the greater the love, the greater the loss... That's the trade-off. But I'll take it all.
Author: Brad Pitt

Quote: Give me books, French wine, fruit, fine weather and a little music played out of doors by somebody I do not know.
Author: John Keats

Quote: I would rather make mistakes in kindness and compassion than work miracles in unkindness and hardness.
Author: Mother Teresa
Origin: A Gift for God: Prayers and Meditations

Quote: Children know by instinct that hell is an absence of love, and they can pick out theirs without missing.
Author: Flannery O'Connor
Origin: The Habit of Being: Letters of Flannery O'Connor

Quote: I accepted the face that as much as I want to lead others, and love to be around other people, in some essential way, I am something of a loner.
Author: Arthur Ashe

Quote: I had no desire to hear another woman tell my boyfriend how hot he was. If I wanted him to know, I'd damn well tell him myself.
Author: Rachel Vincent

Quote: The figures looked more or less human. And they were engaged in religion. You could tell by the knives (it's not murder if you do it for a god).
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: I like working on stories where I can explore the darker corners of childhood without illustrations but with humor.
Author: Kate Klise

Quote: It is an occupational hazard that anyone who has spent her life learning how to lie eventually becomes bad at telling the truth.
Author: Ally Carter

Quote: Reading a book is like having the ability to dip a straw into the author's soul and sip and slurp without lowering the water table of wisdom.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: We're all to driven by materialism. Obsessed with success. With money. With trying to impress people who'll never be impressed.
Author: Sophie Kinsella

Quote: Essence of any creature encompasses more than one realm. Here now this body, is a vehicle of my essence in this universe.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: My Ancestor Was an Ancient Astronaut

Quote: Read her poetry before you make love to her. That way she'll be asleep when you do. I'm as romantic as a rocking chair with wheels.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: At times, it can feel like the loneliest place on Earth, because it's just us. Alone with our unanswered prayers
Author: Suzanne Elizabeth Anderson

Quote: I think... if it is true that there are as many minds as there are heads, then there are as many kinds of love as there are hearts.
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: Someone is always going to try to knock you down and take your place. It is up to you to fight for what you want.
Author: Teresa Mummert

Quote: A word is not the same with one writer as it is with another. One tears it from his guts. The other pulls it out of his overcoat pocket.
Author: Charles Péguy

Quote: Our battered suitcases were piled on the sidewalk again; we had longer ways to go. But no matter, the road is life
Author: Jack Kerouac

Quote: It s amazing that the amount of news that happens in the world every day always just exactly fits the newspaper.
Author: Jerry Seinfeld

Quote: life is truly known only to those who suffer, lose, endure adversity, & stumble from defeat to defeat.
Author: Anaïs Nin

Quote: I come here with no expectations, only to profess, now that I am at liberty to do so, that my heart is and always will be yours.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: Don't let mental blocks control you. Set yourself free. Confront your fear and turn the mental blocks into building blocks.
Author: Roopleen
Origin: Words to inspire the winner in YOU

Quote: Prayer is not an old woman's idle amusement. Properly understood and applied, it is the most potent instrument of action.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: Love knows no limit to its endurance, no end to its trust, no fading of its hope; it can outlast anything. Love still stands when all else has fallen.
Author: Blaise Pascal

Quote: The Prince came to give life unto those whose lives were almost being snuffed out by the devil via the cares of this world.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: The mother art is architecture. Without an architecture of our own we have no soul of our own civilization.
Author: Frank Lloyd Wright

Quote: Maybe who we are isn't so much about what we do, but rather what we're capable of when we least expect it.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Only by showing the world the cataclysmic cost of a world divided can it appreciate the wonders of life and endless possibilities of a world united.
Author: William Bailey
Origin: Great Ship of Knowledge: Learning Earth's Deathly History

Quote: Don't despair: despair suggests you are in total control and know what is coming. You don't - surrender to events with hope.
Author: Alain de Botton

Quote: Oh! kangaroos, sequins, chocolate sodas! / You really are beautiful! Pearls, / harmonicas, jujubes, aspirins!
Author: Frank O'Hara

Quote: Religion is never more tested than when our emotions are ablaze. At such a time, the timeless grandeur of the Law and its ethics stand at our mercy.
Author: Timothy J. Winter - Abdal Hakim Murad

Quote: A handsome prince, such as yourself, deserves someone who is no less than one hundred percent dedicated to him.
Author: Colleen Houck

Quote: An entrepreneur assumes the risk and is dedicated and committed to the success of whatever he or she undertakes.
Author: Victor Kiam

Quote: What I know is, is that if you do work that you love, and the work fulfills you, the rest will come.
Author: Oprah Winfrey

Quote: Your body is a physical representation of the cumulative effect of all the experiences you've had throughout your life.
Author: Dashama Konah Gordon
Origin: Journey to Joyful: Transform Your Life with Pranashama Yoga

Quote: See, as much as you want to hold on to the bitter sore memory that someone has left this world, you are still in it
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Wine comes in at the mouth And love comes in at the eye; That's all we shall know for truth Before we grow old and die.
Author: William Butler Yeats

Quote: I was in my bed trying to figure out why sometimes you can wake up and go back to sleep and other times you can't
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: I once saw two endangered species about to have sex, but I had to put a stop to it because I suspected one of them of being a prostitute.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Laugh all you want and cry all you want and whistle at pretty men in the street and to hell with anybody who thinks you're a damned fool!
Author: Armistead Maupin

Quote: I mean, really. Who sends their kid to boarding school? It's so Hogwarts. Only mine doesn't have cute boy wizards or magic candy or flying lessons.
Author: Stephanie Perkins

Quote: Happiness can only be achieved by looking inward & learning to enjoy whatever life has and this requires transforming greed into gratitude.
Author: John Chrysostom

Quote: Do not read as children do to enjoy themselves, or, as the ambitious do to educate themselves. No, read to live.
Author: Gustave Flaubert

Quote: In my opinion, I think sarcasm and humor in a song, without turning it into a novelty song, is really charming.
Author: Alanis Morissette

Quote: There is nothing more majestic than the determined courage of individuals willing to suffer and sacrifice for their freedom and dignity.
Author: Martin Luther King Jr.
Origin: The Autobiography of Martin Luther King, Jr.

Quote: You see, nothing matters except pleasure - which is the opposite of happiness, its tragic part, I expect.
Author: Lawrence Durrell

Quote: I've often wondered why more science textbooks don't tell teenagers that the only thing sharks like to eat more than fish, are dead prostitutes.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: There are Two Typos of People in This World: Those Who Can Edit and Those Who Can't

Quote: People will always have opinions about your decision because they're not courageous enough to take action on their opinion.
Author: Steve Maraboli

Quote: Yes, well I really hope I can make a difference, even in the smallest way. I am looking forward to helping as much as I can.
Author: Kate Middleton

Quote: I will bathe in your warmth ma petite. Roll you around me until my heart beats only for you. My breath will grow warm from your kiss.
Author: Laurell K. Hamilton

Quote: After all, Ginger Rogers did everything that Fred Astaire did. She just did it backwards and in high heels.
Author: Ann Richards

Quote: To love someone with all of your heart requires reaching them where they are with the only words they can understand.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: The road to success is not easy to navigate, but with hard work, drive and passion, it's possible to achieve the American dream.
Author: Tommy Hilfiger

Quote: An unread book does nobody any good. Stories happen in the mind of a reader, not among symbols printed on a page.
Author: Brandon Mull

Quote: Tomorrow is promised to no man, though I'm under the impression I have an earthly meeting with God on the day after tomorrow. So that's nice.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the best book I've ever written, and it still sucks

Quote: please believe that things are good with me, and even when they're not, they will be soon enough. And i will always believe the same about you.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: Here's how I've lived my life: I've never been late to a set. I make films I believe in. I feel privileged to be able to do what I love.
Author: Tom Cruise

Quote: Women united can create movements. We can empower entire generations. We can build peace one action at a time. Together we rise. The time is now.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: To know that you do not know is the best. To think you know when you do not is a disease. Recognizing this disease as a disease is to be free of it.
Author: Lao Tzu

Quote: Properly practiced, knitting soothes the troubled spirit, and it doesn't hurt the untroubled spirit either.
Author: Elizabeth Zimmermann

Quote: A soul that becomes the place where divine grace is harbored and encouraged joins the class of the immortals and lives on into eternal greatness.
Author: Garey Gordon
Origin: The Values Pursued Life: Excellence and Greatness from Within

Quote: Love is a flower that should never cease to grow. Nurture it, and it will outlive you. Neglect it, and it will wilt away and die.
Author: Suzy Kassem
Origin: Rise Up and Salute the Sun: The Writings of Suzy Kassem

Quote: All things, even the deepest sorrow or the most profound happiness are all temporary. Hope is fuel for the soul, without hope, forward motion ceases.
Author: Landon Parham

Quote: I have my own theory: ignorance is bliss. The less you know, the more confident you can be in tackling things.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: A life spent making mistakes is not only more honorable, but more useful than a life spent doing nothing.
Author: George Bernard Shaw

Quote: There is only one all pervading God. It has only one message - Love all, encompass all and transcend the limits of the selfish gene.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: Read not to contradict and confute, nor to believe and take for granted ...but to weigh and consider.
Author: Francis Bacon

Quote: Everybody is a genius. But if you judge a fish by its ability to climb a tree, it will live its whole life believing that it is stupid.
Author: Anonymous

Quote: The only way to avoid being miserable is not to have enough leisure to wonder whether you are happy or not.
Author: George Bernard Shaw

Quote: Hating hurts the hater the most. Hating is not a salve for the wounded soul, it is an abrasive that keeps the soul wounded and raw and oversensitive.
Author: Jack R. Rose

Quote: The reason most people give up so fast is that they look at how far they still have to go, instead of how far they have come.
Author: Anonymous

Quote: Take what comes and live life without complaint. What will be, will be. Life is a woman's gift; death is God's.
Author: Nancy McKenzie

Quote: I would say, then, that you are faced with a future in which education is going to be number one amongst the great world industries.
Author: R. Buckminster Fuller
Origin: Education Automation: Freeing the Scholar to Return to His Studies

Quote: Like when you sit in front of a fire in winter - you are just there in front of the fire. You don't have to be smart or anything. The fire warms you.
Author: Desmond Tutu

Quote: No matter how far or long you carry it, my love doesn't weigh a lot. But if you aren't carrying it with you, it will weigh heavy on your mind.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: My advice is to write in the nude. Unless you do your writing in a public restroom, and in that case, I'd recommend wearing flip flops.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Who Moved My Choose?: An Amazing Way to Deal With Change by Deciding to Let Indecision Into Your Life

Quote: My love is like the shape your mouth makes while you whistle. Would you mind if I accompanied you on my harmonica?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Titanic would never have sunk if it were made out of a sink.

Quote: Without man and his potential for moral progress, the whole of reality would be a mere wilderness, a thing in vain, and have no final purpose.
Author: Immanuel Kant

Quote: Life is only precious because it ends, kid. Take it from a god. You mortals don't know how lucky you are
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: Never pity missionaries; envy them. They are where the real action is -- where life and death, sin and grace, Heaven and Hell converge.
Author: Robert C. Shannon

Quote: Christian hands never clasp and he doesn't give gifts for gain because a gift can never stop being a gift - it is always meant to be given.
Author: Ann Voskamp
