Origin: One Thousand Gifts: A Dare to Live Fully Right Where You Are

Quote: Love is of all passions the strongest, for it attacks simultaneously the head, the heart and the senses.
Author: Lao Tzu

Quote: Previous journeys in search of treasure have taught me that a zigzag strategy is the best way to get ahead.
Author: Tahir Shah
Origin: House of the Tiger King: The Quest for a Lost City

Quote: Infinite is a meaningless word: except - it states / The mind is capable of performing / an endless process of addition.
Author: Louis Zukofsky

Quote: The man of wisdom is never of two minds; the man of benevolence never worries; the man of courage is never afraid.
Author: Confucius

Quote: Comedy is a necessity to get through life with the fewest scars. Humor is the best antidote to help relieve all struggles.
Author: Suzy Kassem
Origin: Rise Up and Salute the Sun: The Writings of Suzy Kassem

Quote: The art of war is simple enough. Find out where your enemy is. Get at him as soon as you can. Strike him as hard as you can, and keep moving on.
Author: Ulysses S. Grant

Quote: And to all this she must yet add something more substantial, in the improvement of her mind by extensive reading.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: Successful people are always looking for opportunities to help others. Unsuccessful people are always asking, "What's in it for me?
Author: Brian Tracy

Quote: The process of falling in love at first sight is as final as it is swift in such a case, but the growth of true friendship may be a lifelong affair.
Author: Sarah Orne Jewett

Quote: Just because you're in a situation, doesn't mean you have to be that situation. You're not the situation you're in!
Author: K.M. Johnson

Quote: It's a funny thing about life; if you refuse to accept anything but the best, you very often get it.
Author: W. Somerset Maugham

Quote: You don't have to be a genius or a visionary or even a college graduate to be successful. You just need a framework and a dream.
Author: Michael Dell

Quote: When you like someone, you like them in spite of their faults. When you love someone, you love them with their faults.
Author: Hermann Hesse
Origin: Wer lieben kann, ist glücklich. Über die Liebe

Quote: A faith that does not result in activity of any kind is a dead faith; it is empty, worthless, insincere.
Author: Derek Prince

Quote: I don't want to hurt you or anybody so please forget about me. Just try. Find yourself a better friend.
Author: Nina LaCour

Quote: Be careful to leave your sons well instructed rather than rich, for the hopes of the instructed are better than the wealth of the ignorant.
Author: Epictetus

Quote: Stop waiting for someone else to run your life. Get into the driver's seat and choose your destination.
Author: Karon Waddell

Quote: If I had to describe my sense of humor, I would say it's contemporary wit, you know what I'm saying?
Author: Tracy Morgan

Quote: The dream was always running ahead of me. To catch up, to live for a moment in unison, was the miracle.
Author: Anaïs Nin

Quote: Do not give way to useless alarm; though it is right to be prepared for the worst, there is no occasion to look on it as certain.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: Everyone has his own reality in which, if one is not too cautious, timid or frightened, one swims. This is the only reality there is.
Author: Henry Miller

Quote: I think humor is used a lot of the time to keep people from getting too close. Humor side-steps and shifts the meaning.
Author: Bruce Nauman

Quote: They may try to stop you by their words and deeds, but like air you will rise above it all. You are unstoppable
Author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

Quote: Now I'd rather be infected with love for the tiniest sliver of a second than live a hundred years smothered by a lie.
Author: Lauren Oliver

Quote: My only regrets are the moments when i doubted myself and took the safe route. Life is too short to waste time being unhappy.
Author: Dan Howell

Quote: Men have two greatest fears: the first fear is the fear of being needed, and the second fear is the fear of not being needed.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: Love doesn't just sit there, like a stone; it has to be made, like bread, remade all the time, made new.
Author: Ursula K. Le Guin

Quote: I say what I want to say and do what I want to do. There's no in between. People will either love you for it or hate you for it.
Author: Eminem

Quote: I am irritated by my own writing. I am like a violinist whose ear is true, but whose fingers refuse to reproduce precisely the sound he hears within.
Author: Gustave Flaubert

Quote: A woman can't do anything about her appearance. Either she's pretty or she isn't. But her character is quite another matter.
Author: Julie Garwood

Quote: Life had stepped into the place of theory and something quite different would work itself out in his mind.
Author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

Quote: Your success and happiness lies in you. Resolve to keep happy, and your joy and you shall form an invincible host against difficulties.
Author: Helen Keller

Quote: The negative side of the American Dream comes when people pursue success at any cost, which in turn destroys the vision and the dream.
Author: Azar Nafisi

Quote: The satirist shoots to kill while the humorist brings his prey back alive and eventually releases him again for another chance.
Author: Peter De Vries

Quote: Once, he hadn't been able to touch her without causing himself pain. Now, it only hurt when he didn't touch her.
Author: Nalini Singh

Quote: She was not too young to be wise, but she was too young to know that wisdom shouldn't be spoken aloud when you are happy.
Author: Graham Greene

Quote: Real courage is doing the right thing when nobody's looking. Doing the unpopular thing because it's what you believe, and the heck with everybody.
Author: Justin Cronin

Quote: Using my thumb and middle finger, I tend to make snap decisions. Right away I know whether I like a song or not.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: It would be better for us to have some doubts in an honest pursuit of truth, than it would be for us to be certain about something that was not true.
Author: Daniel Wallace

Quote: You seem to think you have a choice, Cam said. But you have it backwards. Love chooses you. The shadow moves as the sun commands.
Author: Lisa Kleypas

Quote: If the town were a black hole, I was the helpless star being sucked into oblivion. It was an oblivion I craved.
Author: J.D. Stroube

Quote: Kindred spirits are not so scarce as I used to think. It's splendid to find out there are so many of them in the world.
Author: L.M. Montgomery

Quote: One of the greatest journeys in life is overcoming insecurity and learning to truly not give a shit.
Author: J.A. Konrath

Quote: The reason a writer writes a book is to forget a book and the reason a reader reads one is to remember it.
Author: Tom Wolfe

Quote: ...he felt God the same way arthritic monks felt rain coming in their joints. He felt only a hint of him.
Author: Sue Monk Kidd

Quote: I wrapped your birthday present in carpet, because I bought you a floor. It's so you have something other than me to walk all over.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Behold, my friends, the spring is come; the earth has gladly received the embraces of the sun, and we shall soon see the results of their love!
Author: Sitting Bull

Quote: The moon will guide you through the night with her brightness, but she will always dwell in the darkness, in order to be seen.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: Many people pray to be kept out of unexpected problems. Some people pray to be able to confront and overcome them.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: Betelgeuse Incident: Insiden Bait Al- Jauza

Quote: It is not the failure of others to appreciate your abilities that should trouble you, but rather your failure to appreciate theirs.
Author: Confucius

Quote: I can imagine no more comfortable frame of mind for the conduct of life than a humorous resignation.
Author: W. Somerset Maugham

Quote: We are often insane with happiness. We are also very unhappy for reasons neither of us can do anything about. Like being separated.
Author: Audrey Niffenegger

Quote: An attempt to achieve the good by force is like an attempt to provide a man with a picture gallery at the price of cutting out his eyes.
Author: Ayn Rand

Quote: Everything hurts right now and nothing is helping because as the pain is getting worse - so is the love.
Author: Jennifer Elisabeth

Quote: You don't have to have anything in common with people you've known since you were five. With old friends, you've got your whole life in common.
Author: Lyle Lovett

Quote: I know half, and I know two guys who each know half of half, so together we're altogether. Let this be a lesson in networking.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The fishermen know that the sea is dangerous and the storm terrible, but they have never found these dangers sufficient reason for remaining ashore.
Author: Vincent van Gogh

Quote: The educator must believe in the potential power of his pupil, and he must employ all his art in seeking to bring his pupil to experience this power.
Author: Alfred Adler

Quote: Anarchism is founded on the observation that since few men are wise enough to rule themselves, even fewer are wise enough to rule others.
Author: Edward Abbey

Quote: Love never reasons, but profusely gives; it gives like a thoughtless prodigal its all, and then trembles least it has done to little.
Author: Hannah More

Quote: YOU are your own guru. YOU are your own soul mate. YOU are powerful. Take the reigns and drive your carriage home to love.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: The quality of a person's life is in direct proportion to their commitment to excellence, regardless of their chosen field of endeavor.
Author: Vince Lombardi

Quote: Cynicism is when a small mind and a hurt heart rejects the hope, love, and truth of a big and caring God.
Author: Jayce O'Neal

Quote: We are all born sexual creatures, thank God, but it's a pity so many people despise and crush this natural gift.
Author: Marilyn Monroe

Quote: One general law, leading to the advancement of all organic beings, namely, multiply, vary, let the strongest live and the weakest die.
Author: Charles Darwin

Quote: Hope itself is like a star- not to be seen in the sunshine of prosperity, and only to be discovered in the night of adversity.
Author: Charles Haddon Spurgeon

Quote: Any man's death diminishes me, because I am involved in mankind, and therefore never send to know for whom the bells tolls; it tolls for thee.
Author: John Donne

Quote: Clocks slay time... time is dead as long as it is being clicked off by little wheels; only when the clock stops does time come to life.
Author: William Faulkner

Quote: To oppose something is to maintain it... You must go somewhere else; you must have another goal; then you walk a different road.
Author: Ursula K. Le Guin

Quote: Solid character will reflect itself in consistent behavior, while poor character will seek to hide behind deceptive words and actions.
Author: Myles Munroe

Quote: March on. Do not tarry. To go forward is to move toward perfection. March on, and fear not the thorns, or the sharp stones on life's path.
Author: Khalil Gibran

Quote: The challenge is to resist circumstances. Any idiot can be happy in a happy place, but moral courage is required to be happy in a hellhole.
Author: Joyce Carol Oates

Quote: Never let go of a good thing without a fight. Especially if that good thing is a pair of boxing gloves.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Learning is by nature curiosity... prying into everything, reluctant to leave anything, material or immaterial, unexplained.
Author: Philo of Alexandria

Quote: So long as you write what you wish to write, that is all that matters; and whether it matters for ages or only for hours, nobody can say.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: Doubt thou the stars are fire, Doubt that the sun doth move. Doubt truth to be a liar, But never doubt I love.
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: If you have it [love], you don't need to have anything else, and if you don't have it, it doesn't matter much what else you have.
Author: J.M. Barrie

Quote: It ought to make us feel ashamed when we talk like we know what we're talking about when we talk about love.
Author: Raymond Carver

Quote: It's sometimes funny to watch some people doing something the wrong way but doing it confidently. Even more funny, they succeeded.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: Betelgeuse Incident: Insiden Bait Al- Jauza

Quote: There is nothing more important to true growth than realizing that you are not the voice of the mind - you are the one who hears it.
Author: Michael A. Singer
Origin: The Untethered Soul: The Journey Beyond Yourself

Quote: If you believe what you like in the Gospel, and reject what you don't like, it is not the Gospel you believe, but yourself.
Author: Augustine of Hippo

Quote: The essence of Hinduism is the same essence of all true religions: Bhakti or pure love for God and genuine compassion for all beings.
Author: Radhanath Swami

Quote: One of the convenient things about literature is that, despite copyrights [...] a book belongs to the reader as well as to the writer.
Author: Anne Fadiman
Origin: At Large and at Small: Familiar Essays

Quote: Wake up, Shake up, Make up and Break up; life is all about moving like ant in search of sugar not sand.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: No matter what happened yesterday it is insignificant when compared to what lies within the core of your being today.
Author: Sandy Brewer
Origin: Pursuit of Light: An Extraordinary Journey

Quote: I think and think and think, I've thought myself out of happiness one million times, but never once into it.
Author: Jonathan Safran Foer

Quote: All the tales of miracles, with which the Old and New Testament are filled, are fit only for impostors to preach and fools to believe.
Author: Thomas Paine

Quote: Hotel hallways should have conveyer belts for floors, so I can feel like a grocery item on vacation. I guess I'm just a romantic.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I like my coffee like Colfax Avenue mixed with Atlantic Boulevard, and if you're buying then I'm driving. Let's sip this romance slowly.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: One of the penalties of refusing to participate in politics is that you end up being governed by your inferiors.
Author: Plato

Quote: Drink my Distraction Juice (not from concentrate). It tastes like love, only not so focused on just one ingredient.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: We all have same beginning (BIRTH), and we will have same ending (DEATH). So how different can we be?
Author: Mitch Albom

Quote: Like anybody, I would like to have a long life. Longevity has its place. But I'm not concerned about that now. I just want to do God's will.
Author: Martin Luther King Jr.

Quote: A man who has never gone to school may steal a freight car; but if he has a university education, he may steal the whole railroad.
Author: Theodore Roosevelt

Quote: I want to replace my knees with miniature Rube Goldberg machines. That way you'll know how difficult it is for me to simply walk out of your life.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: I Want Two apply for a job at our country's largest funeral home, and then wear a suit and noose to the job interview.

Quote: Writing is magic, as much the water of life as any other creative art. The water is free. So drink. Drink and be filled up.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: May I kiss you then? On this miserable paper? I might as well open the window and kiss the night air.
Author: Franz Kafka

Quote: The universal mind acts as an advisor or guide. When you abide by its advice then you will get another opportunity to alter your destiny.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: I think the discomfort that some people feel in going to the monkey cages at the zoo is a warning sign.
Author: Carl Sagan
Origin: The Varieties of Scientific Experience: A Personal View of the Search for God

Quote: when you feel like hope is gone, look inside you and be strong and you'll finally see the truth- that hero lies in you.
Author: Mariah Carey

Quote: Just like your body and lifestyle can be healthy or unhealthy, the same is true with your beliefs. Your beliefs can be your medicine or your poison.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Some people say, "Never let them see you cry." I say, if you're so mad you could just cry, then cry. It terrifies everyone.
Author: Tina Fey

Quote: The best and most beautiful things in the world cannot be seen or even touched - they must be felt with the heart.
Author: Helen Keller

Quote: Love is a Heaven Cake, with clouds for icing. If there are two pieces left, I guess I can have seconds.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Birth and death: there was the same consciousness of heightened existence and of her own elevated importance
Author: J.K. Rowling

Quote: We all look for happiness, but without knowing where to find it: like drunkards who look for their house, knowing dimly that they have one
Author: Voltaire

Quote: Art is the imposing of a pattern on experience, and our aesthetic enjoyment is recognition of the pattern.
Author: Alfred North Whitehead

Quote: Compassion is the signature of Higher Consciousness. Non-violence is the tool to evolve into the Higher Consciousness.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: In the end these things matter most: How well did you love? How fully did you live? How deeply did you let go?
Author: Gautama Buddha

Quote: She has a sly smile, and eyes that seem to see my essence as they explore my soul and implore my spirit to enter her. I look at her and I see love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Silence make the real conversations between friends. Not the saying, but the never needing to say that counts.
Author: Margaret Lee Runbeck

Quote: You know someone's right for you when the things they don't have to say are even more important than the things they do.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: When you love someone, its never over. You move on, because you have to but you take them with you in your heart
Author: Elizabeth Chandler

Quote: Silences make the real conversations between friends. Not the saying but the never needing to say is what counts.
Author: Margaret Lee Runbeck

Quote: Keep good company, read good books, love good things and cultivate soul and body as faithfully as you can
Author: Louisa May Alcott

Quote: ...Nobody knows like a woman how to say things that are both sweet and profound. Sweetness and depth, this is all of woman; this is Heaven.
Author: Victor Hugo

Quote: But I love your feet only because they walked upon the earth and upon the wind and upon the waters, until they found me.
Author: Pablo Neruda

Quote: Love yourself first and everything else falls into line. You really have to love yourself to get anything done in this world.
Author: Lucille Ball

Quote: Success is something you experience when you act accordingly. Success is not something you have, it's something you do.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: Ink is drinkable and printable. The words "I love you" don't take up much space, but they can quench your thirst forever.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I was, if you like, a successful schoolboy in that I had a degree of talent in all the required things that make you a success at school.
Author: Damian Lewis

Quote: I wish I could know everything ever, like that would be my wish - that's what I hope heaven is, that they tell you who shot JFK and all that stuff.
Author: Louis C. K.

Quote: When the silent flamingo dances pink with desire, I'll be there, sipping on owl stares and kitten curls.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Whenever You're Gone, I'm Here For You

Quote: With the truth, all given facts harmonize; but with what is false, the truth soon hits a wrong note.
Author: Aristotle

Quote: I don't feel a lack of hope. It's just disappointment that after all these years we're still fighting meaningless wars for a handful of people.
Author: Geezer Butler

Quote: It is not courage that makes us speak the truth, but it is a hunger for truth that makes us courageous
Author: Agona Apell
Origin: The Success Genome Unravelled: Turning Men from Rot to Rock

Quote: I think prime numbers are like life. They are very logical but you could never work out the rules, even if you spent all your time thinking about them
Author: Mark Haddon
Origin: The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night- Time

Quote: To be successful, one has to be one of three bees - the queen bee, the hardest working bee, or the bee that does not fit in.
Author: Suzy Kassem
Origin: Rise Up and Salute the Sun: The Writings of Suzy Kassem

Quote: Humor is very interesting to me. My films are not comedies, but there's comedy in them from time to time, absurdities, just like in real life.
Author: David Lynch

Quote: Had I been in love, I could not have been more wretchedly blind. But vanity, not love, has been my folly.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: Why don't we break up? I guess I stay with her because she stays with me. And that's not an easy thing to do.
Author: John Green

Quote: Miracles are a retelling in small letters of the very same story which is written across the whole world in letters too large for some of us to see.
Author: C. S. Lewis

Quote: Accidental sex. He made it sound like I fell down, and there just happened to be an erection in the way.
Author: Laurell K. Hamilton

Quote: That was one of the virtues of being a pessimist: nothing was ever as bad as you thought it would be.
Author: James Jones

Quote: Any faith that admires truth, that strives to know God, must be brave enough to accommodate the universe.
Author: Carl Sagan

Quote: When her boyfriend broke his leg, I knew it was my chance to ask her to dance. So I put down my baseball bat and approached her like Babe Ruth.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I have a theory that as long as you have one good friend, one real friend, you can get through anything.
Author: Dana Reinhardt

Quote: Take me to the land of lovers where flowers bloom with love, birds sing with love, and hearts long for hearts.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Childhood should be carefree, playing in the sun; not living a nightmare in the darkness of the soul.
Author: Dave Pelzer

Quote: If you didn't grow up like I did then you don't know, and if you don't know it's probably better you don't judge.
Author: Junot Díaz
Origin: The Brief Wondrous Life of Oscar Wao

Quote: It is my observations, though, that happiness limits the amount of suffering one is willing to inflict upon others
Author: Jacqueline Carey

Quote: Professional comedians, surprisingly, have a lack of humor. They're insensitive to the insanity of our times.
Author: Mort Sahl

Quote: When the creative impulse sweeps over you, grab it. You grab it and honor it and use it, because momentum is a rare gift.
Author: Justina Chen

Quote: I cannot say this too strongly: Do not compare yourselves to others. Be true to who you are, and continue to learn with all your might.
Author: Daisaku Ikeda

Quote: Strangely enough, they have a mind to till the soil, and the love of possessions is a disease in them.
Author: Sitting Bull

Quote: He loved her, of course, but better than that, he chose her, day after day. Choice: that was the thing.
Author: Sherman Alexie
Origin: The Toughest Indian in the World

Quote: Success is knowing your God given life purpose and pursuing it Passionately, Persistently, and Consistently until you die.
Author: Tom Cunningham
Origin: Adversity to Advantage: 3 Epic Stories of Transforming Life's Obstacles into Opportunity

Quote: It is a curious thought, but it is only when you see people looking ridiculous that you realize just how much you love them.
Author: Agatha Christie

Quote: I admire Shakespeare enormously. But since I can't be him, I'm glad that his marriage was unhappy and he's dead.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: They knew many things but had no idea why. And strangely this made them more, rather than less, certain that they were right.
Author: Neal Stephenson

Quote: Some guys are the type of people who bring brass knuckles to a fight. I've always thought it prudent to bring some running shoes.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: My heart, which is so full to overflowing, has often been solaced and refreshed by music when sick and weary.
Author: Martin Luther

Quote: The greatest risk to man is not that he aims too high and misses, but that he aims too low and hits.
Author: Michaelangelo

Quote: Do something you really like, and hopefully it pays the rent. As far as I'm concerned, that's success.
Author: Tom Petty

Quote: I don't think of myself as funny - I don't fill up a room with my humor... I would fail miserably as a stand-up comedian.
Author: Steve Carell

Quote: Most painting in the European tradition was painting the mask. Modern art rejected all that. Our subject matter was the person behind the mask.
Author: Robert Motherwell

Quote: I believe it is in my nature to dance by virtue of the beat of my heart, the pulse of my blood and the music in my mind.
Author: Robert Fulghum

Quote: Wonderful things happen due to positive beliefs and good karma. Change your mind set to earn good karma and to make your life beautiful.
Author: Hina Hashmi
Origin: Your Life A Practical Guide to Happiness Peace and Fulfilment

Quote: Sex could be a blissful communion,. But it could also be a weapon, and its absence, sometimes, was required for the establishment of peace.
Author: Ann Brashares
Origin: Girls In Pants: The Third Summer of the Sisterhood

Quote: Decision decides destiny. What God wants you to become is the positive person you decide to become when led by God's spirit.
Author: Israelmore Ayivor
Origin: The Great Hand Book of Quotes

Quote: They had applied their doubts to the very head that had introduced doubt as a tool for advancing knowledge. And in the end they gave the head a nod.
Author: Russell Shorto
Origin: Descartes' Bones: A Skeletal History of the Conflict Between Faith and Reason

Quote: I have loved to the point of madness; that which is called madness, that which to me, is the only sensible way to love.
Author: Francois Sagon

Quote: I love life. There's so much to learn and see all the time, and nothing nicer for me than to wake up, and the sky is blue.
Author: Pattie Boyd

Quote: To prohibit the reading of certain books is to declare the inhabitants to be either fools or slaves.
Author: Claude Adrien Helvétius

Quote: If you can understand the humor in the drawing part you'll probably get the humor in the audio part.
Author: Eric San

Quote: Shock is a merciful condition. It allows you to get through disaster with a necessary distance between you and your feelings.
Author: Lisa Kleypas

Quote: If I could bronze my love, it'd be worthy of a silver medal. I would pour you a large glass of Michael Phelps, but I don't have that much water.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'll think of it tomorrow, at Tara. I can stand it then. Tomorrow, I'll think of some way to get him back. After all, tomorrow is another day.
Author: Margaret Mitchell

Quote: We lusty bibliophiles know that reading, unlike just about anything else, is both good for you and loads of fun.
Author: Kevin Smokler
Origin: Bookmark Now: Writing in Unreaderly Times: A Collection of All Original Essays from Today's (and Tomorrow's) Young Authors on the State of the Art --and the Art of the Hustle--in the Age of Information Overload

Quote: I like to set my dreams high. That way, even if I only make it half way there, it's still pretty darned good.
Author: Elizabeth O. Dulemba

Quote: I carry a shower curtain folded up neatly in my wallet, because you never know when you'll never know.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Zebra is the Piano of the Animal Kingdom

Quote: A man will be imprisoned in a room with a door that's unlocked and opens inwards; as long as it does not occur to him to pull rather than push.
Author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

Quote: I wear gloves, because I don't want to tease people with my naked body. I've got to leave something to the imagination.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: You are what happiness means to me. And I would rather have today with you than forever with anyone else.
Author: Michelle Hodkin

Quote: Too bad that all the people who know how to run the country are busy driving taxicabs and cutting hair.
Author: George Burns

Quote: I didn't want the sun to rise. I didn't want the world to continue turning. I wanted the whole planet put into stasis until I could catch up.
Author: Anna Sheehan

Quote: I'm a master of encouragement. Why should I do work myself when the price of getting others to do it for me is as cheap as cheering them on?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Like most modern people, I don't believe in prophecy or magic and then spend half my time practicing it.
Author: John Steinbeck

Quote: Does your love reach this far, God? And if it extends to heaven and beyond... why can't it seem to find me?
Author: Jenny B. Jones

Quote: The unconditional love of God leads to a life of freedom and transforms each day into a potentially wild adventure.
Author: Randy Elrod

Quote: I observe Stand Still Day. I also observe whatever I'm standing in front of at the time. I hope on that day I see how much you love me.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A bud has to bloom to unfold her beauty. A child has to become educated to unfold her incredible potential.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Your mother won a special reward, "she told me, "because everyone had a head in her pictures. We all applauded.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: You can believe in whatsoever you like, but the truth remains the truth, no matter how sweet the lie may taste.
Author: Michael Bassey Johnson

Quote: You can forget trying to climb the success ladder, all you will ever need in life is brought to you in the Cosmic Ordering elevator.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: The truth about life and lie about life is not measured by others but by your intuition, which never lies.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: A bank is a place where they lend you an umbrella in fair weather and ask for it back when it begins to rain.
Author: Robert Frost

Quote: If you have a success you have it for the wrong reasons. If you become popular it is always because of the worst aspects of your work.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: EVERYONE NEED EDUCATION, ITS THE NEED OF A NATION, IN IT IS FUTURE'S FOUNDATION, IT LEADS TO HEARTS ASPIRATION, AND TOMORROWS INSPIRATION.
Author: merlin8thomas

Quote: The beautiful part of writing is that you don't have to get it right the first time, unlike, say, a brain surgeon.
Author: Robert Cormier

Quote: The thing about Mumbai is you go five yards and all of human existence is revealed. It's an incredible cavalcade of life, and I love that.
Author: Julian Sands

Quote: But who prays for Satan? Who, in eighteen centuries, has had the common humanity to pray for the one sinner that needed it most?
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: Above all shadows rides the Sun and Stars for ever dwell: I will not say the Day is done, nor bid the Stars farewell.
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien

Quote: I believe that people who are devoutly religious, within any specific religion, have no true respect for the ultimate vastness that is God.
Author: Clair Huffaker

Quote: Painting, n.: The art of protecting flat surfaces from the weather, and exposing them to the critic.
Author: Ambrose Bierce

Quote: Stop pointing fingers and placing blame on others. Your life can only change to the degree that you accept responsibility for it.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Because it's much more pleasant to be obsessed over how the hero gets out of his predicament than it is over how I get out of mine.
Author: Woody Allen

Quote: Dexter, I love you so much. So, so much, and I probably always will. I just don't like you anymore. I'm sorry.
Author: David Nicholls

Quote: Don't try to understand consciousness. Just try to be deeply conscious and it will reveal its secret to you.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I think the attempt to defend belief can unsettle it, in fact, because there is always an inadequacy in argument about ultimate things.
Author: Marilynne Robinson

Quote: She doesn't want me to leave, and she doesn't want me to stay. That's a double helping of Doesn't Want Me, and one big I'm Not Hungry back at her.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The first step is the most important. It is the most crucial and the most effective as it will initiate the direction you have chosen.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: Love yourself. Forgive yourself. Be true to yourself. How you treat yourself sets the standard for how others will treat you.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Real life? Well, I just hope mine isn't investigated. They might find that I don't really exist - that I'm just a hologram.
Author: Steven Wright

Quote: The number of those who have nothing to recommend them and of those in whom nothing but good can be found is probably equal
Author: Murasaki Shikibu

Quote: I hate to say it but I hate black humor. I feel like a Klan member saying it, but it's just not funny.
Author: Issa Rae

Quote: The most total opposite of pleasure is not pain but boredom, for we are willing to risk pain to make a boring life interesting.
Author: Peter Kreeft

Quote: Only with the wings of love can you fly. Only with the light of love can you see the star in a moonlit sky.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Do not go gentle into that good night, Old age should burn and rave at close of day; Rage, rage against the dying of the light.
Author: Dylan Thomas
Origin: Do Not Go Gentle Into That Good Night

Quote: I don't get high, but sometimes I wish I did. That way, when I messed up in life I would have an excuse. But right now there's no rehab for stupidity.
Author: Chris Rock

Quote: Reading is like travel, allowing you to exit your own life for a bit, and to come back with a renewed, even inspired, perspective.
Author: Laurie A. Helgoe
Origin: Introvert Power: Why Your Inner Life Is Your Hidden Strength

Quote: There is no truth on this island of yours. Rather, there are as many truths as there are stars in the sky; and every one of them different.
Author: Juliet Marillier

Quote: Every science begins as philosophy and ends as art; it arises in hypothesis and flows into achievement.
Author: Will Durant

Quote: The only real limitation on your abilities is the level of your desires. If you want it badly enough, there are no limits on what you can achieve.
Author: Brian Tracy

Quote: Never stop just because you feel defeated. The journey to the other side is attainable only after great suffering.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: I have a fear of palindromes. Maybe because the only person to ever beat the hell out of me was a man named Bob.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: The greatest lesson we should learn is that from the moment we are born we already have everything we need within ourselves.
Author: George Pornaris

Quote: When something seems wrong in your life, the only way to have resolution with it is to let it go. Trying to make it right keeps it wrong.
Author: Beth Johnson

Quote: I'm going to follow this invisible red thread until I find myself again... until I finally figure out... who I'm meant to be.
Author: Jennifer Elisabeth
Origin: Born Ready: Unleash Your Inner Dream Girl

Quote: Don't walk in front of me, I may not follow. Don't walk behind me, I may not lead. There is only one happiness in life, to love and be loved.
Author: George Sand

Quote: God is really only another artist. He invented the giraffe, the elephant and the cat. He has no real style, He just goes on trying other things.
Author: Pablo Picasso

Quote: Today well lived makes every yesterday a dream of happiness and every tomorrow a vision of hope. Look well therefore to this day.
Author: Francis Gray

Quote: My own inclination is to skew towards humor. They say that some people view life as a comedy, others as a tragedy. Me? Comedy all the way.
Author: Lauren Willig

Quote: The art of healing comes from nature, not from the physician. Therefore the physician must start from nature, with an open mind.
Author: Paracelsus

Quote: So I walked back to my room and collapsed on the bottom bunk, thinking that if people were rain, I was drizzle and she was a hurricane.
Author: John Green

Quote: Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
Author: Thomas A. Edison

Quote: The bat is not a toy, it's a weapon. It gives me everything in life, which helps me to do everything on the field.
Author: Virat Kohli

Quote: Everything here is edible; even I'm edible. But that, dear children, is cannibalism, and is in fact frowned upon in most societies.
Author: Johnny Depp

Quote: What can oppose the decline of the west is not a resurrected culture but the utopia that is silently contained in the image of its decline.
Author: Theodor W. Adorno

Quote: When all is said and done, the life of faith is nothing if not an unending struggle of the spirit with every available weapon against the flesh.
Author: Dietrich Bonhoeffer

Quote: There is one other reason for dressing well, namely that dogs respect it, and will not attack you in good clothes.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: I've often wondered what makes a relationship last. I guess the best answer is it's the one right after the next to the last one.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Writers fish for the right words like fishermen fish for, um, whatever those aquatic creatures with fins and gills are called.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the best book I've ever written, and it still sucks

Quote: I am very interested and fascinated how everyone loves each other, but no one really likes each other.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: Life goes on, and I'm moving on to the next thing, but I hope the soaps that are still running will thrive. They have millions of loyal viewers.
Author: Susan Lucci

Quote: People who love themselves, don't hurt other people. The more we hate ourselves, the more we want others to suffer.
Author: Dan Pearce

Quote: Success is not only one thing. It's not only having a nice house in Beverly Hills and driving a nice Mercedes.
Author: Malik Bendjelloul

Quote: When you can write music that endures, bravo. Until then, keep quiet and study the work of those who can.
Author: Jennifer Donnelly

Quote: God has abandoned you. Fear does not serve you. Your heart has betrayed you. Only the music can guide you.
Author: Noah Levine

Quote: There are three qualities that every individual must have to achieve success: a Monk's patience, a Warrior's courage, a Child's imagination.
Author: Sharad Vivek Sagar

Quote: I think any artist that's going to become anything in this world faces humility: with great humility comes great success.
Author: Yelawolf

Quote: I'd rather die on my own terms than live on theirs. I'd rather die loving Alex than live without him.
Author: Lauren Oliver

Quote: No one person can possibly combine all the elements supposed to make up what everyone means by friendship.
Author: Francis Marion Crawford

Quote: Man needs, for his happiness, not only the enjoyment of this or that, but hope and enterprise and change.
Author: Bertrand Russell

Quote: After you find out all the things that can go wrong, your life becomes less about living and more about waiting.
Author: Chuck Palahniuk

Quote: There is no future without a past, because what is to be cannot be imagined except as a form of repetition.
Author: Siri Hustvedt

Quote: I am not bound to win, but I am bound to be true. I am not bound to succeed, but I am bound to live up to what light I have.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: A sin is nothing more than regret. Not for doing it once, but doing it again when you know you're going to regret it.
Author: Carroll Bryant

Quote: A good night sleep, or a ten minute bawl, or a pint of chocolate ice cream, or all three together, is good medicine.
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: Associate with the noblest people you can find; read the best books; live with the mighty; but learn to be happy alone.
Author: Saul Bellow

Quote: My spirit is healthy, yes. But I tell you, my flesh is healthy too. I am enlightened and free, but I am also lustful and carnal.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: Money won't buy happiness, but it will pay the salaries of a huge research staff to study the problem.
Author: Bill Vaughan

Quote: It costs me never a stab nor squirm / To tread by chance upon a worm. / Aha, my little dear, / I say, Your clan will pay me back one day.
Author: Dorothy Parker

Quote: But nothing in India is identifiable, the mere asking of a question causes it to disappear and merge into something else.
Author: E.M. Forster

Quote: Speak the truth, do not yield to anger; give, if thou art asked for little; by these three steps thou wilt go near the gods.
Author: Confucius

Quote: If cats looked like frogs we'd realize what nasty, cruel little bastards they are. Style. That's what people remember.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: In essence, we are deeper than being; we are character, which contains the conscious forces of love, justice, kindness, faith, and forgiveness.
Author: Garey Gordon
Origin: The Values Pursued Life: Excellence and Greatness from Within

Quote: Happiness is not achieved by the conscious pursuit of happiness; it is generally the by-product of other activities.
Author: Aldous Huxley

Quote: Even if you don't have all the things you want, be grateful for the things you don't have that you don't want (Bob Dylan's dad)
Author: Bob Dylan

Quote: You are forgiven for your happiness and your successes only if you generously consent to share them.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: I just invented a device that eliminates vice. It looks like a bottle of booze, only it's empty, because I just drank it.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Love cannot be reduced to a catalogue of reasons why, and a catalogue of reasons cannot be put together into love.
Author: Eleanor Catton

Quote: How was I supposed to know what's real and what's not? It feels like I'm the only one who doesn't know the difference.
Author: Jenny Han
Origin: To All the Boys I've Loved Before

Quote: That's the funny thing about religion: it doesn't matter what you say, you're going to upset someone.
Author: Lewis Black

Quote: Either you repeat the same conventional doctrines everybody is saying, or else you say something true, and it will sound like it's from Neptune.
Author: Noam Chomsky

Quote: Most scars are invisible. Damn transparent knives. Does anything cut deeper than love? I need to get some new body armor.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If you have good thoughts they will shine out of your face like sunbeams and you will always look lovely.
Author: Roald Dahl

Quote: That knowledge which purifies the mind and heart alone is true Knowledge, all else is only a negation of Knowledge.
Author: Ramakrishna

Quote: There is no time to waste in life and there is no cut and paste as well, only copy and paste - you can only emulate others
Author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

Quote: The fact is not kill entire populations is able to infect entire regions of land and control the only cure.
Author: Ted Dekker

Quote: The sole philosophy open to those who doubt the possibility of truth is absolute silence -- even mental.
Author: Jacques Maritain

Quote: Reason is, and ought only to be the slave of the passions, and can never pretend to any other office than to serve and obey them.
Author: David Hume

Quote: If you go back to the Greeks and Romans, they talk about all three - wine, food, and art - as a way of enhancing life.
Author: Robert Mondavi

Quote: Art, as far as it is able, follows nature, as a pupil imitates his master; thus your art must be, as it were, God's grandchild.
Author: Dante Alighieri

Quote: Always try to be joyful and proactively benign to the people. By doing so everyday, people have no control at all over my mood.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: Betelgeuse Incident: Insiden Bait Al- Jauza

Quote: All of the stories, all of the beauty, all of the songs and events of this life will vanish in the ocean of time.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The simplest strategy for bouts of noxious flatus is to not care. Or perhaps to take advantage of a gastroenterologist I know: get a dog. (To blame.)
Author: Mary Roach
Origin: Gulp: Adventures on the Alimentary Canal

Quote: The road to enlightenment is long and difficult, and you should try not to forget snacks and magazines.
Author: Anne Lamott
Origin: Traveling Mercies: Some Thoughts on Faith

Quote: Education is education. We should learn everything and then choose which path to follow. Education is neither eastern or western, it is human
Author: Malala Yousafzai
Origin: I Am Malala: The Girl Who Stood Up for Education and Was Shot by the Taliban

Quote: When faith replaces doubt, when selfless service eliminates selfish striving, the power of God brings to pass His purposes.
Author: Thomas S. Monson

Quote: This is how you do it: you sit down at the keyboard and you put one word after another until its done. It's that easy, and that hard.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: If you fill your mind with a beautiful thought, there will be no room in it for an ugly one. - King Amor
Author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
Origin: The Land of the Blue Flower

Quote: How we relate with other people is dependent on how we rate ourselves and what we think about ourselves.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: I'm a disciple of Raymond Chandler, who said in his essays that there's a quality of redemption in anything that can be called art.
Author: Michael Connelly

Quote: Beware of the man who works hard to learn something, learns it, and finds himself no wiser than before.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: What's the opposite of start? Would the average person think stop or finish? The answer may reflect the difference between a winner and a loser.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: Humanity takes itself too seriously. It is the world's original sin. If the cave-man had known how to laugh, History would have been different.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: For he who loves God without faith reflects on himself, while the person who loves God in faith reflects on God.
Author: Søren Kierkegaard

Quote: I've had a tense couple of days. And I've got to tell you, burning someone's face off sounds like a great way to relax.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: I'm on a government watch list. But I'm not interested, because government watches only work twenty minutes out of every hour.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: Every parent is at some time the father of the unreturned prodigal, with nothing to do but keep his house open to hope.
Author: John Ciardi

Quote: If there is one thing I dislike, it is the man who tries to air his grievances when I wish to air mine.
Author: P.G. Wodehouse

Quote: Love can change a person the way a parent can change a baby- awkwardly, and often with a great deal of mess.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: When you study great teachers... you will learn much more from their caring and hard work than from their style.
Author: William Glasser

Quote: Quit being so hard on yourself. We are what we are; we love what we love. We don't need to justify it to anyone... not even to ourselves.
Author: Scott Lynch

Quote: A lady's imagination is very rapid; it jumps from admiration to love, from love to matrimony in a moment.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: Still, he figured, sometimes you've got to do what you've got to do, and then sometimes you've just got to run like hell after it's done.
Author: Derek Landy

Quote: I feel very adventurous. There are so many doors to be opened, and I'm not afraid to look behind them.
Author: Elizabeth Taylor

Quote: If you are looking for true happiness, you have to change your level of consciousness and deepness of awareness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Nothing had changed. I was the stupid one again. I was the girl who never understood who she was to people.
Author: Carol Rifka Brunt

Quote: The truly cultured are capable of owning thousands of unread books without losing their composure or their desire for more.
Author: Gabriel Zaid
Origin: So Many Books: Reading and Publishing in an Age of Abundance

Quote: I was an anorexic, beer drinking, class cutting, doodling, shoplifting, skater chick that was into nature, art class, and the beach.
Author: Rebecca Miller

Quote: I knew I could do it all this time," said Harry, "Because I'd already done it... does that make sense?
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

Quote: If two heads are better than one, then what about double chins? On that note, I will help myself to seconds.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If I read a book and it makes my whole body so cold no fire can ever warm me, I know that is poetry.
Author: Emily Dickinson

Quote: Management is efficiency in climbing the ladder of success; leadership determines whether the ladder is leaning against the right wall.
Author: Stephen Covey

Quote: I didn't want to kiss you goodbye - that was the trouble - I wanted to kiss you good night - and there's a lot of difference.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: But the past cannot be changed, and we carry our choices with us, forward, into the unknown. We can only move on.
Author: Libba Bray

Quote: What you perceive as a failure today may actually be a crucial step towards the success you seek. Never give up.
Author: Richelle E. Goodrich
Origin: Smile Anyway: Quotes, Verse, & Grumblings for Every Day of the Year

Quote: Let them call me a rebel and welcome. I feel no concern from it. But should I suffer the misery of devils, were I to make a whore of my soul.
Author: Thomas Paine

Quote: Love lets us ride on its back as if it were a camel. But you've got to water it, or it won't grow into a healthy rose bush.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Titanic would never have sunk if it were made out of a sink.

Quote: Employ your time in improving yourself by other men's writings so that you shall come easily by what others have labored hard for.
Author: Socrates

Quote: Sexual living is a reflection of God's love for us. It has two key qualities, which is faithfulness and creativity of new life.
Author: Vincent Nichols

Quote: Let us tenderly and kindly cherish therefore, the means of knowledge. Let us dare to read, think, speak, and write .
Author: John Adams
Origin: The Works Of John Adams, Second President Of The United States

Quote: Your children will smash your understanding, knowledge and reality. You will be better off. Then they will leave. You'll miss them forever.
Author: Tibor Kalman

Quote: Have you ever noticed how parents can go from the most wonderful people in the world to totally embarrassing in three seconds?
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: Most people are other people. Their thoughts are someone else's opinions, their lives a mimicry, their passions a quotation.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: My love has a flow like a flower, so it's best if you water it with the fragrance of romance, which has the aroma of loyalty.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Lord save us all from old age and broken health and a hope tree that has lost the faculty of putting out blossoms.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: It's one thing to fall in love. It's another to feel someone else fall in love with you, and to feel a responsibility toward that love.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: You can't win in love. But if you could, I'd be the clear victor. Vodka is also clear, and I must be drunk.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Venice is the perfect place for a phase of art to die. No other city on earth embraces entropy quite like this magical floating mall.
Author: Jerry Saltz

Quote: The more we see ourselves as a vibrant, successful, inspiring person who boldly declares and manifests her vision, the more we become just that.
Author: Kristi Bowman

Quote: All situations in which the interrelationships between extremes are involved are the most interesting and instructive.
Author: Wilhelm von Humboldt

Quote: I feel as though my life is bathed in golden sunlight. And the really wonderful thing is that I know it.
Author: Helen McCrory

Quote: The best way to show that a stick is crooked is not to argue about it or to spend time denouncing it, but to lay a straight stick alongside it
Author: D.L. Moody

Quote: People who work in an environment where doing their best is recognized have a better chance of feeling good about their work.
Author: Marilyn Suttle

Quote: People who lean on logic and philosophy and rational exposition end by starving the best part of the mind.
Author: W.B. Yeats

Quote: Friendship marks a life even more deeply than love. Love risks degenerating into obsession, friendship is never anything but sharing.
Author: Elie Wiesel

Quote: You know how writers are... they create themselves as they create their work. Or perhaps they create their work in order to create themselves.
Author: Orson Scott Card

Quote: True love comes quietly, without banners or flashing lights. If you hear bells, get your ears checked.
Author: Erich Segal

Quote: They don't understand it. They're not old enough to know the first instinct of irritation should be avoided in order to keep an open mind.
Author: Amelia Gray

Quote: Now this might disturb you, but I find I'm OK by myself; and I don't need you or your benevolence to make sense.
Author: Morrissey

Quote: Here's what I'd love to see: A vending machine that dispenses cats for petting on your lunch break. Instead of money, the machine accepts hugs.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: If you want to steal my heart, you must realize it's not a one-time heist. This theft will take every minute of the rest of your life.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There are only really a few stories to tell in the end, and betrayal and the failure of love is one of those good stories to tell.
Author: Sean Lennon

Quote: Consider the Lichen. Lichens are just about the hardiest visible organisms on Earth, but the least ambitious.
Author: Bill Bryson
Origin: A Short History of Nearly Everything

Quote: They're just words. And words alone don't really mean anything. It's what you feel and what you believe when you say them that matter.
Author: Dana Reinhardt

Quote: Religion is excellent stuff for keeping common people quiet. Religion is what keeps the poor from murdering the rich.
Author: Napoléon Bonaparte

Quote: Keeping or holding on to a concept shows belief but building or adding to it shows confidence and depth of character.
Author: Delma Pryce
Origin: ABOVE AND BEYOND: My Spiritual Journey

Quote: My mission in life is not merely to survive, but to thrive; and to do so with some passion, some compassion, some humor, and some style
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: I had found my religion: nothing seemed more important to me than a book. I saw the library as a temple.
Author: Jean- Paul Sartre

Quote: Some people feel like they don't deserve love. They walk away quietly into empty spaces, trying to close the gaps of the past.
Author: Jon Krakauer

Quote: When I am attacked by gloomy thoughts, nothing helps me so much as running to my books. They quickly absorb me and banish the clouds from my mind.
Author: Michel de Montaigne

Quote: My mission in life is not merely to survive, but to thrive; and to do so with some passion, some compassion, some humor, and some style.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: The secret of happiness is to see all the marvels of the world, and never to forget the drops of oil on the spoon.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Everyone has choices to make; no one has the right to take those choices away from us. Not even out of love..
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: Faith is the highest passion in a human being. Many in every generation may not come that far, but none comes further.
Author: Søren Kierkegaard

Quote: My argument would be that I don't think there is much that's genuinely political art that is good art.
Author: Thom Yorke

Quote: ...but I still think that to the unprejudiced, the fossil record of plants is in favor of special creation.
Author: E.J.H. Corner

Quote: In a universe of ambiguity, this kind of certainty comes only once, and never again, no matter how many lifetimes you live.
Author: Robert James Waller

Quote: education is one thing and instruction, however worthy, necessary and incidentally or monetarily educative, another.
Author: Kingsley Amis
Origin: The King's English: A Guide to Modern Usage

Quote: Hope is something that can never be taken from you unless you allow someone to take it. If you never lose hope, you will never truly be poor.
Author: John M. Simmons

Quote: You will never be entirely comfortable. This is the truth behind the champion - he is always fighting something. To do otherwise is to settle.
Author: Julien Smith

Quote: It was the nicest thing she could imagine. It made her want to have his babies and give him both of her kidneys.
Author: Rainbow Rowell

Quote: You can still be cool when you're dead. In fact, it's much easier, because you aren't getting old and fat and losing your hair.
Author: Audrey Niffenegger

Quote: If you also thinks it means I wake up every morning wondering what I did to deserve having you back in my life, well, you'd be right about that too.
Author: Julie James

Quote: I spoke of the irony of the Taliban wanting female teachers and doctors for women yet not letting girls go to school to qualify for these jobs
Author: Malala Yousafzai
Origin: I Am Malala: The Girl Who Stood Up for Education and Was Shot by the Taliban

Quote: I know every book of mine by its smell, and I have but to put my nose between the pages to be reminded of all sorts of things.
Author: George Gissing

Quote: If anyone stops us, as long as we mumble something pretentious about the glory of death, we should be fine.
Author: Derek Landy

Quote: Always watch where you are going. Otherwise, you may step on a piece of the Forest that was left out by mistake.
Author: A.A. Milne

Quote: The most satisfying thing in life is to have been able to give a large part of one's self to others.
Author: Pierre Teilhard de Chardin

Quote: Death, therefore, the most awful of evils, is nothing to us, seeing that, when we are, death is not come, and, when death is come, we are not.
Author: Epicurus

Quote: Deep in each man is the knowledge that something knows of his existence. Something knows, and cannot be fled nor hid from.
Author: Cormac McCarthy

Quote: I believe God spoke to you at cliffs. Her hand came to rest on the top of my head. But perhaps you weren't truly listening
Author: Jenny B. Jones

Quote: Science of happiness lies in our understanding. The secrets of happiness lie in our capacity to expand our heart.
Author: Amit Ray
Origin: Yoga and Vipassana: An Integrated Life Style

Quote: Manipulation, fueled with good intent, can be a blessing. But when used wickedly, it is the beginning of a magician's karmic calamity.
Author: T.F. Hodge
Origin: From Within I Rise: Spiritual Triumph Over Death and Conscious Encounters with "The Divine Presence"

Quote: People are, generally speaking, either dead certain or totally indifferent (Both types are crawling around deep down in the rabbit's fur!)
Author: Jostein Gaarder

Quote: You can't just plan a moment when things get back on track, just as you can't plan the moment you lose your way in the first place.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: Home was not a perfect place. But it was the only home they had and they could hope to make it better.
Author: Dean Koontz

Quote: In our life there is a single color, as on an artist's palette, which provides the meaning of life and art. It is the color of love.
Author: Marc Chagall

Quote: You are a wonderful creation. You know more than you think you know, just as you know less than you want to know.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: When hope is not pinned wriggling onto a shiny image or expectation, it sometimes floats forth and opens.
Author: Anne Lamott

Quote: Family, friends and relationships are the blessings of the God. They are the best way to access God.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: I just hope I remember to tell my kids that they are as happy as I look in my old photographs. And I hope that they believe me.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: Nobody wants to believe that existence carries on without at least taking a stumble from their departure of this world.
Author: Nenia Campbell

Quote: You are what your creators and experiences have made you, like every other being in this universe. Accept that and be done; I tire of your whining.
Author: N.K. Jemisin

Quote: I could just remember how my father used to say that the reason for living was to get ready to stay dead a long time.
Author: William Faulkner

Quote: The Church of England is the only church in the world that interferes neither with your politics nor your religion
Author: Anthony Trollope

Quote: A poet is a man who manages, in a lifetime of standing out in thunderstorms, to be struck by lightning five or six times.
Author: Randall Jarrell

Quote: I sent the club a wire stating, PLEASE ACCEPT MY RESIGNATION. I DON'T WANT TO BELONG TO ANY CLUB THAT WILL ACCEPT ME AS A MEMBER.
Author: Groucho Marx

Quote: If you think someone or something other than yourself is responsible for your happiness or success, I'd guess you're not that happy or successful.
Author: Rob Liano

Quote: I want my wardrobe to be full of good clothes, so that when I'm deciding what to wear, I don't run out of options. I love shopping!
Author: Virat Kohli

Quote: At the end of the day your ability to connect with your readers comes down to how you make them feel.
Author: Benjamin J. Carey

Quote: The past is a source of knowledge, and the future is a source of hope. Love of the past implies faith in the future.
Author: Stephen Ambrose

Quote: Humor is a serious thing. I like to think of it as one of our greatest earliest natural resources, which must be preserved at all cost.
Author: James Thurber

Quote: All those who try to unveil the mysteries always have tragic lives. At the end they are always punished.
Author: Anaïs Nin

Quote: Whenever you find yourself on the side of the majority, it is time to reform (or pause and reflect).
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: I think if you show up and you work hard and you're straightforward, you can always create your own opportunities. I hope I'm right.
Author: Cory Monteith

Quote: There are many rivers that we cross in our lifetime, unfortunately some of those rivers just don't have bridges.
Author: John R. Gouin

Quote: Pointing to another world will never stop vice among us; shedding light over this world can alone help us.
Author: Walt Whitman

Quote: If you are lazy, and accept your lot, you may live in it. If you are willing to work, you can write your name anywhere you choose.
Author: Gene Stratton- Porter

Quote: Some things are private. Some things needed to be said, even when the person who needed to hear them couldn't hear anything. Ever again.
Author: Rachel Vincent

Quote: Imagination does not become great until human beings, given the courage and the strength, use it to create.
Author: Maria Montessori

Quote: The worst thing that can happen in a democracy - as well as in an individual's life - is to become cynical about the future and lose hope.
Author: Hillary Clinton

Quote: Teaching kids how to feed themselves and how to live in a community responsibly is the center of an education.
Author: Alice Waters

Quote: Love life. Live your life with joy so you may fill the world with joy. Let no one leave your presence without feeling the joy of life.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: So. You get handed a holy sword by an archangel, told to go fight the forces of evil, and you somehow remain an atheist. Is that what you're saying?
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: That's what came from having romance in your soul. You believe in things like love at first sight and perfect presents.
Author: Dorothy Koomson

Quote: The heart pumps blood, a fluid, but it also pulses love, which is as liquid as a wave, and everyone wants a refill. My goal is to be a server.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: It was a subtle refinement of God to learn Greek when he wished to write a book - and that he did not learn it better.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: The value of a moment is immeasurable. The power of just ONE moment can propel you to success and happiness or chain you to failure and misery.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: You are not Atlas carrying the world on your shoulder. It is good to remember that the planet is carrying you.
Author: Vandana Shiva

Quote: The element of chance in basic research is overrated. Chance is a lady who smiles only upon those few who know how to make her smile.
Author: Hans Selye

Quote: It took less than an hour to make the atoms, a few hundred million years to make the stars and planets, but five billion years to make man!
Author: George Gamow

Quote: You are happy when you are enthusiastic and action oriented, not when you are luxury and pleasure oriented.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I would lay down everything I possess, even my soul, for you. If that isn't love, it's the best I have.
Author: Becca Fitzpatrick

Quote: The truth is that love smashes into your life like an ice floe, and even if your heart is built like the Titanic you go down.
Author: Jeanette Winterson

Quote: A clear vision, backed by definite plans, gives you a tremendous feeling of confidence and personal power.
Author: Brian Tracy

Quote: Flower petals in the breeze look like a butterfly flapping its wings. My love for you takes flight like a white orchid blushing pink.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Not matter what your sacred or religious book is, it's not how well you know the book, it's how well you're in alignment with the author.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Never did she find anything so difficult as to keep herself from losing her temper when she was suddenly disturbed while absorbed in a book.
Author: Frances Hodgson Burnett

Quote: The secret of Buddhism is to remove all ideas, all concepts, in order for the truth to have a chance to penetrate, to reveal itself.
Author: Hanh Nhat Thich
Origin: Buddha Mind, Buddha Body: Walking Toward Enlightenment

Quote: God our Lord would have us look to the Giver and love Him more than His gift, keeping Him always before our eyes, in our hearts, and in our thoughts.
Author: Saint Ignatius

Quote: It's much easier on the emotions when one sees life as an experiment rather than a struggle for popularity.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: My love is powdered sunshine. Just add water. (Warning: Do NOT attempt to snort it or distribute as a healthy cocaine substitute.)
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A woman with an education may be able to spend more time sitting in a chair instead of lying on her back. A sound advantage, I should think.
Author: Anne Bishop

Quote: I wake to sleep, and take my waking slow. I feel my fate in what I cannot fear. I learn by going where I have to go.
Author: Theodore Roethke

Quote: I am a conduit of happiness and abundance. It comes to me effortlessly so I can give it away with love.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I should say, one of the things about being a widow or a widower, you really, really need a sense of humor, because everything's going to fall apart.
Author: Joyce Carol Oates

Quote: I stare at her for a long moment. I want to kiss her. I want to kiss her more than I've ever wanted anything in my life.
Author: Sara Gruen

Quote: In the land of Gibberish, the man who makes sense, the man who speaks clearly, clearly speaks nonsense.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Limitless undying love which shines around me like a million suns it calls me on and on across the universe.
Author: John Lennon

Quote: I am Clap Man. It's a reverse super power, because instead of me doing the heavy lifting, I just applaud and encourage and others do all the work.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If what you wear says more about who you are then what you say when you speak, then my advice is to keep quiet and wear loud clothing.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I think friendship is more important than love, but that love that grows out of friendship is the very best of all.
Author: Jane Green

Quote: There are two kinds of people I don't trust: people who don't drink and people who collect stickers.
Author: Chelsea Handler
Origin: My Horizontal Life: A Collection of One- Night Stands

Quote: I love these pet names, "she said, gazing soulfully up into his eyes, "Nitwit. Sap skull. Termagant. How they make my heart flutter!
Author: Loretta Chase

Quote: Just the knowledge that a good book is awaiting one at the end of a long day makes that day happier.
Author: Kathleen Thompson Norris

Quote: Make rules and follow rules as needed, but don't focus on riles. Focus on faith. Focus on grace. Focus on Jesus.
Author: Judah Smith
Origin: Jesus Is: Find a New Way to Be Human

Quote: Believe in yourself and there will come a day when others will have no choice but to believe with you.
Author: Cynthia Kersey

Quote: We must go out into a desert of some kind (your backyard will do) and come into a personal experience of the awesome love of God.
Author: Brennan Manning
Origin: The Ragamuffin Gospel: Good News for the Bedraggled, Beat- Up, and Burnt Out

Quote: Nature is always talking to you, smiling to you, and singing to you. To understand, you just have to be open to listen with your heart and soul.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Phones are distracting. The internet is distracting. The way he looked at you? He wasn't distracted. He was consumed.
Author: Stephanie Perkins
Origin: Isla and the Happily Ever After

Quote: Never mind what others do; do better than yourself, beat your own record from day to day, and you are a success.
Author: William J. H. Boetcker

Quote: I inherited a pound from my British uncle. I'd have rather gotten a dollar, because what do I want with an animal shelter?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: Music is God's gift to man, the only art of Heaven given to earth, the only art of earth we take to Heaven.
Author: Walter Savage Landor

Quote: There is only one day left, always starting over: It is given to us at dawn and taken away from us at dusk.
Author: Jean- Paul Sartre

Quote: Achieve success in any area of life by identifying the optimum strategies and repeating them until they become habits.
Author: Charles J. Givens

Quote: Nothing so fortifies a friendship as a belief on the part of one friend that he is superior to the other.
Author: Honoré de Balzac

Quote: Believe there is a great power silently working all things for good, behave yourself and never mind the rest.
Author: Beatrix Potter

Quote: Those who are enslaved to their sects are not merely devoid of all sound knowledge, but they will not even stop to learn!
Author: Claudius Galenus

Quote: Hope founded upon a human being, a man-made philosophy or any institution is always misplaced... because these things are unreliable and fleeting.
Author: Charles Stanley

Quote: There comes a time in your life when you have to choose to turn the page, write another book or simply close it.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: What is happening to me happens to all fruits that grow ripe. It is the honey in my veins that makes my blood thicker, and my soul quieter.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: If you cannot inspire a woman with love of you, fill her above the brim with love of herself; all that runs over will be yours.
Author: Charles Caleb Colton

Quote: Books swept me away, this way and that, one after the other; I made endless vows according to their lights for I believed them.
Author: Annie Dillard

Quote: Famous people steal my quotes all of the time without knowing; none of it is ever very interesting though.
Author: Robert DeCoteau
Origin: The New Days: The First Son

Quote: If one of two lovers is loyal, and the other jealous and false, how may their friendship last, for Love is slain!
Author: Marie de France

Quote: Things are not always what they seem; the first appearance deceives many; the intelligence of a few perceives what has been carefully hidden.
Author: Phaedrus

Quote: If having a soul means being able to feel love and loyalty and gratitude, then animals are better off than a lot of humans.
Author: James Herriot

Quote: That's part of what I like about the book in some ways. It portrays death truthfully. You die in the middle of your life, in the middle of a sentence
Author: John Green

Quote: Earth is sad, Moon is shy, Sun is happy but wait a moment, I just forgot to tell you that I am the child of open sky.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: A sense of calm came over me. More and more often I found myself thinking, "This is where I belong. This is what I came into this world to do.
Author: Jane Goodall

Quote: You gotta run more than your mouth to escape the treadmill of mediocrity. A true hustler jogs during the day, and sleepwalks at night.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The difference between greed and ambition is a greedy person desires things he isn't prepared to work for.
Author: Habeeb Akande

Quote: In rough times, pathfinders rely on work, friends, humor and prayer. They develop a support network.
Author: Gail Sheehy

Quote: No matter what, I want to continue living with the awareness that I will die. Without that, I am not alive.
Author: Banana Yoshimoto

Quote: If you are a Christian, you are not a citizen of this world trying to get to heaven; you are a citizen of heaven making your way through this world.
Author: Vance Havner

Quote: When I was in my twenties and broke, I'd buy books before food. A meal will sustain you for a few hours, a good book will sustain you for life.
Author: Gabrielle Zevin

Quote: I think it would be neat to meet a man who slept with one eye open, especially if that man was a Cyclops.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Would you rather live one perfect day over and over or live your life with no perfect days but just decent ones?
Author: Jenny Han

Quote: Our Age of Anxiety is, in great part, the result of trying to do today's jobs with yesterday's tools!
Author: Marshall McLuhan

Quote: Hiding how you really feel and trying to make everyone happy doesn't make you nice, it just makes you a liar.
Author: Jenny O'Connell

Quote: Neatness begets order; but from order to taste there is the same difference as from taste to genius, or from love to friendship.
Author: Johann Kaspar Lavater

Quote: I lock my door upon myself, And bar them out; but who shall wall Self from myself, most loathed of all?
Author: Christina Rossetti

Quote: I didn't come here of my own accord, and I can't leave that way. Whoever brought me here will have to take me home.
Author: Rumi

Quote: How satisfying it is to leave a mark on a blank surface. To make a map of my movement - no matter how temporary.
Author: Craig Thompson

Quote: The only thing more unthinkable than leaving was staying; the only thing more impossible than staying was leaving.
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert

Quote: It was never about the world being too big, it was more like she was too much for the world to handle.
Author: Robert M. Drake

Quote: We're miserable because we think that we are mere individuals, alone with our fears and flaws and resentment and mortality.
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert

Quote: Oh, of course, "said Ron, clapping a hand to his forehead. "I forgot we'll be hunting down Voldemort in a mobile library.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows

Quote: You may tend to get cancer from the thing that makes you want to smoke so much, not from the smoking itself.
Author: William Saroyan

Quote: Hearts are breakable, "Isabelle said. "And I think even when you heal, you're never what you were before".
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: Losing your mind is preferable to losing your woman, because if you lose your woman you will also lose your mind, and then you're left with nothing.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Good acting is thinking in front of the camera. I just do that and apply a sense of humor to it. You have to trust the audience to get it.
Author: Charles Grodin

Quote: We made love like two folding lawn chairs. We were both motionless, but the possibility of movement permeated the moment.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: The boundaries which divide Life from Death are at best shadowy and vague. Who shall say where the one ends, and where the other begins?
Author: Edgar Allan Poe

Quote: A man should never be ashamed to own that he has been in the wrong, which is but saying in other words that he is wiser today than he was yesterday.
Author: Alexander Pope

Quote: Life is too short to spend in negativity. So I have made a conscious effort to not be where I don't want to be.
Author: Hugh Dillon

Quote: Death is not the greatest loss in life. The greatest loss is what dies inside while still alive. Never surrender.
Author: Tupac Shakur

Quote: Hope is necessary in every condition. The miseries of poverty, sickness and captivity would, without this comfort, be insupportable.
Author: William Samuel Johnson

Quote: Above all things physical, it is more important to be beautiful on the inside - to have a big hear and an open mind and a spectacular spleen.
Author: Ellen DeGeneres

Quote: It is not true that people stop pursuing dreams because they grow old, they grow old because they stop pursuing dreams.
Author: Gabriel Garcí­a Márquez

Quote: I want to find that defining moment that you're satisfied and you've done what you want to do in your life.
Author: Tyson Gay

Quote: Wisdom is nothing more than confirmed imagination: just because one did not study for his exam does not mean that he should leave it blank.
Author: Criss Jami
