Quote: The world is bad but not without hope. It is only hopeless when you look at it from an ideal viewpoint.
Author: Friedrich Durrenmatt

Quote: Patience and persistence are the keys... The keys to unlock doors of success... With these two virtues, you grow in reasoning and experience.
Author: Ogwo David Emenike

Quote: We have been moving along at such a fast pace that we no longer know what we are doing. Now we have to wait until our soul catches up with us.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: I knocked on her door twice. The second time was from the inside. That's how love works. At first you want in, and then you want out.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: File under "Hard Truths": the creative muse is fiction. If you sit around waiting for the right moment to create, you will die waiting.
Author: Antony Johnston

Quote: When you look for a man- what you want to look for is a man with the heart of a poor boy and the mind of a conqueror.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: She lends her pen, to thoughts of him, that flow from it, in her solitary. For she is his poet, And he is her poetry.
Author: Lang Leav

Quote: I find the whole business of religion profoundly interesting. But it does mystify me that otherwise intelligent people take it seriously.
Author: Douglas Adams

Quote: One learns from books and example only that certain things can be done. Actual learning requires that you do those things.
Author: Frank Herbert

Quote: Personal branding is crucial in today's society. Just remember to wait until the metal is red hot before pressing it into your flesh.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: You're better than seven years of food. You're better than windows. You're even better than the sky.
Author: Shannon Hale

Quote: Have you ever felt the longing for someone you could admire? For something, not to look down at, but up to?
Author: Ayn Rand

Quote: A letter is a soul, so faithful an echo of the speaking voice that to the sensitive it is among the richest treasures of love.
Author: Honoré de Balzac

Quote: Sometimes opportunities float right past your nose. Work hard, apply yourself, and be ready. When an opportunity comes you can grab it.
Author: Julie Andrews Edwards

Quote: With my last breath, I'll exhale my love for you. I hope it's a cold day, so you can see what you meant to me.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the best book I've ever written, and it still sucks

Quote: Nothing is miserable unless you think it so; and on the other hand, nothing brings happiness unless you are content with it.
Author: Boethius

Quote: If values are woven into the very concept of education, where is the need for separate value education?
Author: Vijaya Bharathy

Quote: There was the smell of old books, a smell that has a way of making all libraries seem the same. Some say that smell is asbestos.
Author: Scott Douglas
Origin: Quiet, Please: Dispatches From A Public Librarian

Quote: He's dozed off again, but I kiss him awake, which seems to startle him. Then he smiles as if he'd be happy to lie there gazing at me forever.
Author: Suzanne Collins

Quote: His right ear still held both studs, and I wondered who had the missing earring. I would have asked, but was afraid he'd tell me Ivy had it.
Author: Kim Harrison

Quote: It is questionable, for that matter, whether success is an adequate response to life. Success can eliminate as many options as failure.
Author: Tom Robbins

Quote: It takes a great deal of bravery to stand up to our enemies, but just as much to stand up to our friends.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone

Quote: I make naked, and I make it by hand. I also make it using the rest of my body. Coming soon to a Walmart near you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Dance above the surface of the world. Let your thoughts lift you into creativity that is not hampered by opinion.
Author: Red Haircrow

Quote: The care of human life and happiness, and not their destruction, is the first and only object of good government.
Author: Thomas Jefferson

Quote: When you cut pieces out of the truth to avoid looking like a fool you end up looking like a moron instead.
Author: Robin Hobb

Quote: I don't know what's worse: to not know what you are and be happy, or to become what you've always wanted to be, and feel alone.
Author: Daniel Keyes

Quote: My education was the liberty I had to read indiscriminately and all the time, with my eyes hanging out.
Author: Dylan Thomas

Quote: I believe a strong woman may be stronger than a man, particularly if she happens to have love in her heart. I guess a loving woman is indestructible.
Author: John Steinbeck

Quote: Three grand essentials to happiness in this life are something to do, something to love, and something to hope for.
Author: Joseph Addison

Quote: Sometimes I'll forget a utensil's name, and I'll say, "Give me that pointy thing," as I point with my pointy finger.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Mismatches destroy us all, even the most tender ones, and most never have the courage to break someone else's heart to follow their own.
Author: Amy Guth

Quote: It is better to remain silent at the risk of being thought a fool, than to talk and remove all doubt of it.
Author: Maurice Switzer

Quote: Having children is like living in a frat house - nobody sleeps, everything's broken, and there's a lot of throwing up.
Author: Ray Romano

Quote: My great hope is to laugh as much as I cry; to get my work done and try to love somebody and have the courage to accept the love in return.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: Let us not seek to satisfy our thirst for freedom by drinking from the cup of bitterness and hatred.
Author: Martin Luther King Jr.

Quote: Philosophy, from the earliest times, has made greater claims, and achieved fewer results, than any other branch of learning.
Author: Bertrand Russell
Origin: Our Knowledge of the External World

Quote: One day you will wake up & there won't be any more time to do the things you've always wanted. Do it now.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Real success is being totally indulgent about your own trip. You put your blinders on about the garbage and go full speed ahead.
Author: Betsey Johnson

Quote: why are we here? where do we come from? traditionally, these are questions for philosophy, but philosophy is dead
Author: Stephen Hawking

Quote: Emma turned to him, bottom lip trembling. "For me?" "Always for you. All things for you. He coughed into his fist "All your own.
Author: Kresley Cole

Quote: The primary source of the appeal of Christianity was Jesus - His incarnation, His life, His crucifixion, and His resurrection.
Author: Kenneth Scott Latourette

Quote: You cannot separate passion from pathology any more than you can separate a person's spirit from his body.
Author: Richard Selzer

Quote: Every time a champion makes a decision they have a chance to learn something new, regardless of the outcome.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: The biggest void that people can have in their lives is a sense of humor. Spending your life with someone who doesn't have that wouldn't be palatable.
Author: Howie Mandel

Quote: Sometimes you have to kind of die inside in order to rise from your own ashes and believe in yourself and love yourself to become a new person.
Author: Gerard Way

Quote: The greatest day in your life and mine is when we take total responsibility for our attitudes. That's the day we truly grow up.
Author: John C. Maxwell

Quote: That is the eternal folly of man. To be chasing after the sweet flesh, without realizing that it is simply a pretty cover for the bones.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: To realize one's destiny is a person's only real obligation and when you want something, all the universe conspires in helping you to achieve it.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: I am a bit of a hopeless romantic. I really do have a faith and a belief in love, and when I love, I love hard.
Author: Melanie Fiona

Quote: There are hurdles, there are handicaps, hardships you have to face in life, but you hope for a great future.
Author: Anil Kapoor

Quote: Everyone here has the sense that right now is one of those moments when we are influencing the future.
Author: Steve Jobs

Quote: It's never an insult to be called what somebody thinks is a bad name. It just shows you how poor that person is, it doesn't hurt you.
Author: Harper Lee

Quote: And then he gives me a smile that just seems so genuinely sweet with just the right touch of shyness that unexpected warmth rushes through me.
Author: Suzanne Collins

Quote: I am a master of logic and a powerfully convincing debater. In fact, against my better judgment, I can talk myself out of doing anything.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: The day we put an end to believing in hope will be the day we stop existing, for without hope, we are nothing.
Author: Kale Lawrence

Quote: You used to love me. Let me help jog your memory by buying you some running shoes. The shoes will be wooden, and nailed to the floor.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Breathe. Let go. And remind yourself that this very moment is the only one you know you have for sure.
Author: Oprah Winfrey

Quote: Personally, love is very important for me. There are lots of ordinary things in life, so love should be extraordinary. I hope I achieve that.
Author: Ranbir Kapoor

Quote: Times change, as do our wills, What we are - is ever changing; All the world is made of change, And forever attaining new qualities.
Author: Luís Vaz de Camões

Quote: If love came in a cardboard tube, I'd probably send it priority mail. But I'd make you pay for shipping.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If humor and rumor are needed more than faith and truth, then it tells me something about the kind of world we live today.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: Betelgeuse Incident: Insiden Bait Al- Jauza

Quote: I want to write my own eulogy, and I want to write it in Latin. It seems only fitting to read a dead language at my funeral.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Do you wish to rise? Begin by descending. You plan a tower that will pierce the clouds? Lay first the foundation of humility.
Author: Saint Augustine

Quote: What we do in every other area of our lives (other than religion), is, rather than respect somebody's beliefs, we evaluate their reasons.
Author: Sam Harris

Quote: If every library is in some sense a reflection of its readers, it is also an image of that which we are not, and cannot be.
Author: Alberto Manguel

Quote: It wasn't science and technology that cause a slow progress, but collective knowledge of the society and market demands.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: Betelgeuse Incident: Insiden Bait Al- Jauza

Quote: Success is something you experience when you act accordingly. Success is not something you have, it's something you do.
Author: Steve Maraboli

Quote: If you don't know history, then you don't know anything. You are a leaf that doesn't know it is part of a tree.
Author: Michael Crichton

Quote: I always felt that the great high privilege, relief and comfort of friendship was that one had to explain nothing.
Author: Katherine Mansfield

Quote: So many tangles in life are ultimately hopeless that we have no appropriate sword other than laughter.
Author: Gordon W. Allport

Quote: My goal is to be as forgiving as a man with amnesia, but love as if I remember and cherish all the things you do that make me smile.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: No one invites you to the top - you have to claw your way up. When you get there, you will sit with the others who were also uninvited - giggling.
Author: Staness Jonekos

Quote: When I make love, I make extra, and then I keep it in my pants pockets. Well, not all of it. I give an inappropriate amount to the tax collectors.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: With my career I want to either make something or make an impact. Writers both make something, and make an impact.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Don't only practice your art, but force your way into its secrets; art deserves that, for it and knowledge can raise man to the Divine.
Author: Ludwig van Beethoven

Quote: Real magic can never be made by offering someone else's liver. You must tear out your own, and not expect to get it back.
Author: Peter S. Beagle

Quote: You don't love someone because they're perfect, you love them in spite of the fact that they're not.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: The minute you get a religion you stop thinking. Believe in one thing too much and you have no room for new ideas.
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: Real life is messy, inconsistent, and it's seldom when anything ever really gets resolved. It's taken me a long time to realize that.
Author: Alan Moore

Quote: when we are powerless to do a thing, it is a great joy that we can come and step inside the ability of Jesus
Author: Corrie ten Boom

Quote: Humor is really one of the hardest things to define, very hard. And it's very ambiguous. You have it, or you don't. You can't attain it.
Author: Heinrich Boll

Quote: Her love was like cigarette smoke stirred into coffee. I drank it so fast it made me cough, but she's not offering a refill at any price.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: When you stop existing and you start truly living, each moment of the day comes alive with the wonder and synchronicity.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: A nation which expects to be ignorant and free, in a state of civilization, expects that which never was and never will be.
Author: Thomas Jefferson

Quote: Fair means everyone gets what they need. And the only way to get what you need is to make it happen yourself.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: Everyone discusses my art and pretends to understand, as if it were necessary to understand, when it is simply necessary to love.
Author: Claude Monet

Quote: Just remember, the difference between being good versus being great is just a few points, inches, or seconds.
Author: Bruce H. Jackson

Quote: Material wealth can be bad for your health. Because when you're in the soil it'll make your blood boil, that you couldn't keep it all for your self.
Author: Benny Bellamacina

Quote: But I have my life, I'm living it. It's twisted, exhausting, uncertain, and full of guilt, but nonetheless, there's something there.
Author: Banana Yoshimoto

Quote: Arrogance on the part of the meritorious is even more offensive to us than the arrogance of those without merit: for merit itself is offensive.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: We really feel happier when things look bleak. Hope is endurance. Hope is holding on and going on and trusting in the Lord.
Author: Michael Novak

Quote: Doubt thou the stars are fire; Doubt that the sun doth move; Doubt truth to be a liar; But never doubt I love.
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: Love tames the benumbed beast. A man is put to use regarding a woman's physical safety, but a woman is put to use regarding a man's mental safety.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Do your little bit of good where you are; its those little bits of good put together that overwhelm the world.
Author: Desmond Tutu

Quote: You are the prettiest flower in the garden of my love. As the moon longs for the night, my heart longs for your heart.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Holding Eleanor's hand was like holding a butterfly. Or a heartbeat. Like holding something complete, and completely alive.
Author: Rainbow Rowell

Quote: I shouldn't have to be a liar to make someone love me. I shouldn't be so afraid of losing someone that I'll do anything to make them stay.
Author: Deb Caletti

Quote: Do not yearn to be popular; be exquisite. Do not desire to be famous; be loved. Do not take pride in being expected; be palpable, unmistakable.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: I am planting a tree in this bomb crater to remind us that in the midst of death, there is life... and hope.
Author: Robert S. Graetz

Quote: There are only two ways to live your life. One is as though nothing is a miracle. The other is as though everything is a miracle.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: Success is full of promise till one gets it, and then it seems like a nest from which the bird has flown.
Author: Henry Ward Beecher

Quote: The harder you fall, the heavier your heart; the heavier your heart, the stronger you climb; the stronger you climb, the higher your pedestal.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Your greatest responsibility in your life is to be the best version of yourself. When you feel for what the soul believes that is who you become.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: Freedom is indivisible; the chains on any one of my people were the chains on all of them, the chains on all of my people were the chains on me.
Author: Nelson Mandela
Origin: Long Walk to Freedom: The Autobiograpy of Nelson Mandela with Connections

Quote: You can't always judge people by the things they done. You got to judge them by what they are doing now.
Author: Kate DiCamillo

Quote: the free soul is rare, but you know it when you see it - basically because you feel good, very good, when you are near or with them.
Author: Charles Bukowski

Quote: Beauty is in the eye of the beholder and it may be necessary from time to time to give a stupid or misinformed beholder a black eye.
Author: Jim Henson

Quote: Art is the reason I get up in the morning, but the definition ends there. It doesn't seem fair that I'm living for something I can't even define.
Author: Ani DiFranco

Quote: If you want small changes in your life, work on your attitude. But if you want big and primary changes, work on your paradigm.
Author: Stephen Covey

Quote: I'm not a particularly dark individual. I have my moments, it's true, but I do have a sense of humor.
Author: Alan Moore

Quote: Last year, millions of students didn't graduate from high school. They didn't drop out, they were simply in elementary and middle schools.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: The wind is my favorite color. It reminds me of the love she painted on my life as she blew past me.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I peered deeper and found my soul. A little tattered and with some holes, but there all the same. It had always been there, I realized with shock.
Author: Maria V. Snyder

Quote: Success is a beast. And it actually puts the emphasis on the wrong thing. You get away with more instead of looking within.
Author: Brad Pitt

Quote: The President has a wonderful sense of humor, which is one of the reasons it is so much fun to work for him.
Author: Karen Hughes

Quote: Hope knows no fear. Hope dares to blossom even inside the abysmal abyss. Hope secretly feeds and strengthens promise.
Author: Sri Chinmoy

Quote: Always be like a water. Float in the times of pain or dance like waves along the wind which touches its surface.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: The hour of departure has arrived, and we go our separate ways, I to die, and you to live. Which of these two is better only God knows.
Author: Socrates

Quote: the depth of a person's character is not measured by his or her physical strength, but by the depth of his or her nobility.
Author: Frank E. Peretti

Quote: Better not to invent her in her absence. Better to wait until she's actually here. Then he can make her up as she goes along.
Author: Margaret Atwood

Quote: We are in the process of disabling our most distinctive achievement - our educational system - in the name of making the country more like itself.
Author: Marilynne Robinson

Quote: Marriage, for a woman at least, hampers the two things that made life to me glorious - friendship and learning.
Author: Jane Harrison

Quote: There is no scent so pleasant to my nostrils as that faint, subtle reek which comes from an ancient book.
Author: Arthur Conan Doyle

Quote: Few among men are they who cross to the further shore. The others merely run up and down the bank on this side.
Author: Gautama Buddha

Quote: It isn't what you have, or who you are, or where you are, or what you are doing that makes you happy or unhappy. It is what you think about.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: Using your talent, hobby or profession in a way that makes you contribute with something good to this world is truly the way to go.
Author: Simon Zingerman
Origin: We All Need Heroes: Stories of the Brave and Foolish

Quote: I wish I could climb the corporate ladder like I could climb a tree, but I can't, because I'm afraid of heights. And bark.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I liked the humor of it, I've always enjoyed a sense of humor in God and in religion and in spirituality.
Author: Amber Tamblyn

Quote: Love is a fire. But whether it is going to warm your hearth or burn down your house, you can never tell.
Author: Joan Crawford

Quote: Throw your dreams into space like a kite, and you do not know what it will bring back, a new life, a new friend, a new love, a new country.
Author: Anais Nin

Quote: I've seen the ticket, and I still can't believe it. When I see the money, I hope I don't hit the floor.
Author: Judy Garland

Quote: I look back to where my life had been. It's always risky to think of letting go. That's why this is the perfect ending. Nothing left to reconcile.
Author: Loretta Ellsworth

Quote: Nobody likes being alone that much. I don't go out of my way to make friends, that's all. It just leads to disappointment.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: When you struggle with your partner, you are struggling with yourself. Every fault you see in them touches a denied weakness in yourself.
Author: Deepak Chopra

Quote: I'm not saying that love always takes you to heaven. Your life can become a nightmare. But that said, it is worth taking the risk.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Love isn't always a physical emotion. Sometimes it's the ones who never got to actually hold you in their arms that appreciate you for who you are
Author: Sarah Sprague

Quote: While the art of printing is left to us science can never be retrograde; what is once acquired of real knowledge can never be lost.
Author: Thomas Jefferson

Quote: Every blade in the field - Every leaf in the forest - lays down its life in its season as beautifully as it was taken up.
Author: Henry David Thoreau

Quote: I hate the smell of success, because most of the time it smells like sweat. Maybe that's why I'm poor, because every pore on my body is dry.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Disappointment is a sort of bankruptcy - the bankruptcy of a soul that expends too much in hope and expectation.
Author: Eric Hoffer

Quote: If people cannot write well, they cannot think well, and if they cannot think well, others will do their thinking for them.
Author: George Orwell

Quote: He leaned upon her as if there was no other support anywhere in the world, and she held him as if she would undertake no other task for all eternity.
Author: Sharon Shinn

Quote: Some people think driving is speeding the car. Only to find out. Driving is not speeding the car but is being able to control the car.
Author: De philosopher Dj Kyos

Quote: People usually asked her if she had a belly button. Of course she had a belly button. She couldn't explain how. She didn't really want to know.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: Death alone gives meaning to life, and you will never fully live until you know you must die. And make your peace with that knowledge.
Author: Alice Borchardt

Quote: Every individual has a place to fill in the world and is important in some respect, whether he chooses to be so or not.
Author: Nathaniel Hawthorne

Quote: Knowledge is of two kinds. We know a subject ourselves, or we know where we can find information on it.
Author: Samuel Johnson

Quote: The advantage of the emotions is that they lead us astray, and the advantage of science is that it is not emotional.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Not thinking about anything is Zen. Once you know this, walking, sitting, or lying down, everything you do is Zen.
Author: Bodhidharma

Quote: When you have lost hope, you have lost everything. And when you think all is lost, when all is dire and bleak, there is always hope.
Author: Pittacus Lore

Quote: If I had to choose between betraying my country and betraying my friend, I hope I should have the guts to betray my country.
Author: E. M. Forster

Quote: I'll let you in on a secret: I can't stand Jay Ward. I hate being compared to Rocky and Bullwinkle. It's just a different style of humor.
Author: John Kricfalusi

Quote: To like many people spontaneously and without effort is perhaps the greatest of all sources of personal happiness.
Author: Bertrand Russell

Quote: Escalators are the offspring of elevators and stairs. Love is the progeny of passion and admiration.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: If you want to get rich from writing, write the sort of thing that's read by persons who move their lips when they're reading to themselves.
Author: Don Marquis

Quote: You climbed into my window in the middle of the night. So, either you're some kind of Vampire or some kind of Perv. Which is it?
Author: Kami Garcia

Quote: Aerodynamically, the bumble bee shouldn't be able to fly, but the bumble bee doesn't know it so it goes on flying anyway.
Author: Mary Kay Ash

Quote: Just living is not enough, "said the butterfly, "one must have sunshine, freedom, and a little flower.
Author: Hans Christian Andersen

Quote: One of the few good things about modern times: If you die horribly on television, you will not have died in vain. You will have entertained us.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: Don't set a goal to avoid pain or escape suffering; set a goal to live in joy and bliss to make this world joyful and blissful.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Separation Your absence has gone through me Like thread through a needle. Everything I do is stitched with its color.
Author: W.S. Merwin

Quote: ...the face has limited space. My mother used to say, if you fill your face with laughing, there will be no more room for crying.
Author: Rohinton Mistry

Quote: Oh, aye, Sassenach. I am your master . . . and you're mine. Seems I canna possess your soul without losing my own.
Author: Diana Gabaldon

Quote: Love is like a forest, I think as I kill trees by squandering toilet paper while "decorating" my ex girlfriend's front yard.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: I have gone to [this bookshop] for years, always finding the one book I wanted - and then three more I hadn't known I wanted.
Author: Mary Ann Shaffer
Origin: The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society

Quote: The Guide says there is an art to flying", said Ford, "or rather a knack. The knack lies in learning how to throw yourself at the ground and miss.
Author: Douglas Adams

Quote: I believe in the healing power of the arts, and whenever anyone can bring art into anyone's life, it's a special thing.
Author: Austin Nichols

Quote: It's the fire in my eyes, And the flash of my teeth, The swing in my waist, And the joy in my feet. I'm a woman Phenomenally.
Author: Maya Angelou
Origin: Phenomenal Woman: Four Poems Celebrating Women

Quote: My hope is that countries like Morocco will have investment to create work, so people don't have to leave.
Author: Tahar Ben Jelloun

Quote: A reformer exhorted children that they would succeed where he and his colleagues had failed with the charge: "Live for that better day.
Author: Barbara W. Tuchman
Origin: A Distant Mirror: The Calamitous 14th Century

Quote: I love you, in my mind where my thoughts reside, in my heart where my emotions live, and in my soul where my dreams are born. I love you.
Author: Dee Henderson

Quote: Pasta isn't just for Italian food anymore. Now there are tasty pasta recipes found in Asian cuisine, and it's emerging as a newfound love for vegans.
Author: Marcus Samuelsson

Quote: The highest education is that which does not merely give us information but makes our life in harmony with all existence.
Author: Rabindranath Tagore

Quote: It isn't what you have or who you are or where you are or what you are doing that makes you happy or unhappy. It is what you think about it.
Author: Dale Carnegie
Origin: How to Win Friends and Influence People

Quote: Let us realize that: the privilege to work is a gift, the power to work is a blessing, the love of work is success!
Author: David O. McKay

Quote: People are never so completely and enthusiastically evil as when they act out of religious conviction.
Author: Umberto Eco

Quote: I'm feeling pretty good right now, but I hope we can just win the whole thing and I can run off into the sunset and say good-bye.
Author: David Wells

Quote: She couldn't avoid being serious about things she cared for, and happiness made her grave at the thought of all the things which might destroy it.
Author: Graham Greene

Quote: I used to advertise my loyalty and I don't believe there is a single person I loved that I didn't eventually betray.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: When you laugh, laugh like hell. And when you get angry, get good and angry. Try to be alive. You will be dead soon enough.
Author: William Saroyan

Quote: When you know you can do something, and you feel good about yourself, you do not have to devalue others.
Author: John Patrick Hickey
Origin: Oops! Did I Really Post That

Quote: It may help us, in those times of trouble, to remember that love is not only about relationship, it is also an affair of the soul.
Author: Thomas Moore
Origin: Care of the Soul: Guide for Cultivating Depth and Sacredness in Everyday Life

Quote: Once You keep Aside the Emotional side Of yours, Is when You stop using the phrase "This was a BAD PHASE" of life..
Author: Sujit Lalwani

Quote: I shall take the heart. For brains do not make one happy, and happiness is the best thing in the world.
Author: L. Frank Baum

Quote: I fall in love with you four times a year: winter, spring, summer, and fall. The leaves may change, but how I feel about you does not.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Freedom in capitalist society always remains about the same as it was in ancient Greek republics: Freedom for slave owners.
Author: Vladimir Lenin

Quote: If you have a sister and she dies, do you stop saying you have one? Or are you always a sister, even when the other half of the equation is gone?
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Being a star has made it possible for me to get insulted in places where the average Negro could never hope to go and get insulted.
Author: Sammy Davis

Quote: We never know the quality of someone else's life, though we seldom resist the temptation to assume and pass judgement.
Author: Tami Hoag

Quote: As fallible humans, we usually slip too far over one edge or the other - all wrath and judgment or all grace and love.
Author: Eric Wilson

Quote: Here's an easy way to figure out if you're in a cult: If you're wondering whether you're in a cult, the answer is yes.
Author: Stephen Colbert

Quote: There are many people who can do big things, but there are very few people who will do the small things.
Author: Mother Teresa

Quote: Why do I and everyone I love pick people who treat us like we're nothing"; - "We accept the love we think we deserve,
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: Death is a stripping away of all that is not you. The secret of life is to "die before you die"--- and find that there is no death.
Author: Eckhart Tolle

Quote: Tell your friend that in his death, a part of you dies and goes with him. Wherever he goes, you also go. He will not be alone.
Author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

Quote: The man who writes about himself and his own time is the only man who writes about all people and all time.
Author: George Bernard Shaw

Quote: I meet people in my daily life, people who seem to experience some change and some growth on a personal level, and that gives me hope.
Author: Tracy Chapman

Quote: Let whoever can do so deceive me, he will never bring it about that I am nothing, so long as I continue to think I am something.
Author: René Descartes

Quote: Money is like gasoline during a road trip. You don't want to run out of gas on your trip, but you're not doing a tour of gas stations.
Author: Tim O'Reilly

Quote: I accept the Organic Trinity of Mineral, Vegetable, and Animal with as much authority as I accept the Holy Trinity. Both are sacred.
Author: Terry Tempest Williams

Quote: Hope lies in dreams, in imagination, and in the courage of those who dare to make dreams into reality.
Author: Jonas Salk

Quote: I am not the Bird of Love I once thought I was. But my silence suggests I may be the Pterodactyl of Love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Story That Talks about Talking Is Like Chatter to Chattering Teeth, and Every Set of Dentures Can Attest to the Fact That No..

Quote: Instead of a vow of silence, I took a vow of invisibility. At that time you were looking for someone to love, and that's why you couldn't see me.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Formal education teaches how to stand, but to see the rainbow you must come out and walk many steps on your own.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: We judge ourselves by what we feel capable of doing, while others judge us by what we have already done.
Author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

Quote: I read somewhere... how important it is in life not necessarily to be strong, but to feel strong... to measure yourself at least once.
Author: Jon Krakauer

Quote: Leave the cage open. If you love someone, give them a chance to leave. You can always lock them up again should they return to you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Story That Talks about Talking Is Like Chatter to Chattering Teeth, and Every Set of Dentures Can Attest to the Fact That No..

Quote: I did an A Level in Theatre Studies and had a really inspirational teacher, and then I just went on to university.
Author: Jessica Raine

Quote: When we feel unsafe with someone and still stay with him, we damage our ability to discern trustworthiness in those we will meet in the future.
Author: David Richo

Quote: Hope is the struggle of the soul, breaking loose from what is perishable, and attesting her eternity.
Author: Herman Melville

Quote: If I knew what you'd do, exactly when you knew what you'd do, then I'd either be you or I'd be God. And we both know I'm not you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the best book I've ever written, and it still sucks

Quote: No one disputes that seeming order can come out of the application of simple rules. But who wrote the rules?
Author: Robert J. Sawyer

Quote: To find out if she really loved me, I hooked her up to a lie detector. And just as I suspected, my machine was broken.
Author: Dark Jar Tin Zoo
Origin: Love Quotes for the Ages. Specifically Ages 19-91.

Quote: I spent the rest of the day in someone else's story. The rare moments that I put the book down, my own pain returned in burning stabs.
Author: Amy Plum

Quote: She was a beautiful dreamer. The kind of girl, who kept her head in the clouds, loved above the stars and left regret beneath the earth she walked on.
Author: Robert M. Drake

Quote: Success is not to discover what others like, it is to acquire and practise the skills that help one gain their love.
Author: محمد عبد الرحمن العريفي

Quote: These woods are lovely, dark and deep, But I have promises to keep, And miles to go before I sleep, And miles to go before I sleep.
Author: Robert Frost
Origin: Stopping by Woods on a Snowy Evening

Quote: True friendship is a plant of slow growth, and must undergo and withstand the shocks of adversity, before it is entitled to the appellation.
Author: George Washington

Quote: It is difficult to say what is impossible, for the dream of yesterday is the hope of today and the reality of tomorrow.
Author: Robert H. Schuller

Quote: I've seen women who don't have great relationships with their dads, and it all comes down to this: You have to tell girls you love them every day.
Author: Chris Rock

Quote: The only thing more dangerous than ignorance is the pretense of intelligent ignorance. The former is teachable; the latter is not.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: If sharks really can smell blood, then I'd imagine they're all salivating over my erection right now.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Once you understand how powerful you are within, you exponentially increase the power and potentiality of everything outside of you.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: When I was little I bragged about my firefighting father: my father would go to heaven, because if he went to hell he would put out all the fires
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Every day is a journey filled with twists and turns. Every day, if you smile, you will feel alive, my son.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: You can't destroy knowledge. You can stamp it under and burn it up and forbid it to be, but somewhere it will survive.
Author: Leigh Brackett

Quote: I don't want anyone to look to me, not for protection, not for happiness, not for love, not for anything.
Author: P.D. James

Quote: I morphed from a fly to a flower to a butterfly, which is like a combination flower and fly. I thought I was in love, but I was merely asleep.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Sometimes it's better to stop trying to make sense of things. Life isn't clear cut, there are always gray areas.
Author: Alexandra Adornetto

Quote: I think that perhaps if I had had to slow down the ideas so that I could capture them on paper I might have stifled some of them.
Author: J.K. Rowling

Quote: I felt as if I were riding a pendulum. Just as I would swing into the abyss of hopelessness, the pendulum would swing back with some small goodness.
Author: Ruta Sepetys

Quote: You can't have living without dying. So you can't call it living, what we got. We just are, we just be, like rocks beside the road.
Author: Natalie Babbitt

Quote: The ultimate measure of a man is not where he stands in moments of comfort and convenience, but where he stands at times of challenge and controversy.
Author: Martin Luther King Jr.

Quote: I believe that just because something didn't go the way you planned it once, it's no reason not to try again.
Author: Chantelle Shaw

Quote: Life's greatest tragedy is not that it will someday end, but that most only live to follow directions and sometimes we end up totally lost.
Author: Alex Gaskarth

Quote: Happiness consists in always aspiring perfection, the pause in any level in perfection is the pause of happiness
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: I think the Canadian sense of humor is dryer than America's and juicier than Britain's. I think it's a cross between the two of them, really.
Author: Scott Thompson

Quote: To feel more fulfilled your actions and activities need to be in alignment with what you deem important.
Author: Deborah Day

Quote: Like a ballet dancer, she keeps me on my toes. This dance we're doing, it keeps me so fit I know she's a perfect fit for me.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If you're not making someone else's life better, then you're wasting your time. Your life will become better by making other lives better.
Author: Will Smith

Quote: I still love you. I will always love you, and that is all that matters. I will forgive you anything, and I will forgive you this.
Author: Melissa de la Cruz

Quote: Percy was getting tired of water. If he said that aloud, he would probably get kicked out of Poseidon's Junior Sea Scouts, but he didn't care.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: The trouble with having an open mind, of course, is that people will insist on coming along and trying to put things in it.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: It's not always what we don't know that gets in our way; sometimes it's what we think we know that keeps us from learning.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: I had a dream about you last night.. You were playing with chicken livers and told me everyone was in quarantine.
Author: Amy Summers
Origin: I Had a Dream About You

Quote: I never wanted to do observational humor because I never wanted to tell people what they were seeing.
Author: Richard Lewis

Quote: I have tried to keep on with my striving because this is the only hope I have of ever achieving anything worthwhile and lasting.
Author: Arthur Ashe

Quote: I try not to make plans. God always laughs at your plans. I'm going to keep the door open, and keep the page blank, and see what gets painted upon it.
Author: Tom Hiddleston

Quote: I know that I shall meet my fate somewhere among the clouds above; those that I fight I do not hate, those that I guard I do not love.
Author: W.B. Yeats

Quote: It may not always be easy, convenient or politically correct to stand for truth and right, but it is the right thing to do. Always.
Author: M. Russell Ballard

Quote: I hope I shall possess firmness and virtue enough to maintain what I consider the most enviable of all titles, the character of an honest man.
Author: George Washington

Quote: Nothing lasts forever. But the thing is, you can reuse some. Use your mind. - Leo's Mother, The Lost Hero
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: What I know about auto racing could be inscribed with a dry Magic Marker on the lip of a Coke bottle.
Author: David Foster Wallace
Origin: A Supposedly Fun Thing I'll Never Do Again: Essays and Arguments

Quote: He will one day meet his true love... A fellow traveler on the road... Her eyes will be his ocean... In her ocean he will sail forever....
Author: Kem
Origin: Tales of a Chocolate Smuggler: My Life with Dragons

Quote: Because in some other universe, you are me, I am you, and we are perfectly happy together. Or perhaps not... and just like this...
Author: Abhimanyu Jha
Origin: A Dilli- Mumbai Story ...when Love Won Over Terror

Quote: The curious mind embraces science; the gifted and sensitive, the arts; the practical, business; the leftover becomes an economist
Author: Nassim Nicholas Taleb
Origin: The Bed of Procrustes: Philosophical and Practical Aphorisms

Quote: I would like to be the air that inhabits you for a moment only. I would like to be that unnoticed and that necessary.
Author: Margaret Atwood

Quote: The grand essentials of happiness are: something to do, something to love, and something to hope for.
Author: allan chaimers

Quote: Persecution is not an original feature in any religion; but it is always the strongly marked feature of all religions established by law.
Author: Thomas Paine

Quote: Well sure, who doesn't need a boyfriend? but realistically, those exotic creatures are hard to come by. At least a quality one.
Author: Rachel Cohn

Quote: We're never called on to do what hurts. We just do what hurts out of ignorance and habit. Once we see what we're doing, we can stop.
Author: Steve Hagen

Quote: All I'm writing is just what I feel, that's all. I just keep it almost naked. And probably the words are so bland.
Author: Jimi Hendrix

Quote: Don't get me wrong, I admire elegance and have an appreciation of the finer things in life. But to me, beauty lies in simplicity.
Author: Mark Hyman

Quote: I have the choice of being constantly active and happy or introspectively passive and sad. Or I can go mad by ricocheting in between.
Author: Sylvia Plath
Origin: The Unabridged Journals of Sylvia Plath

Quote: Which came first, the mind or the idea of the mind? Have you never wondered? They arrived together. The mind is an idea.
Author: Bernard Beckett

Quote: Merely having an open mind is nothing. The object of opening the mind, as of opening the mouth, is to shut it again on something solid.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: The believer in magic and miracles reflects on how to impose a law on nature--: and, in brief, the religious cult is the outcome of this reflection.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: I drive a motorbike, so there is the whiff of the grim reaper round every corner, especially in London.
Author: Benedict Cumberbatch

Quote: Children should be able to live a life free from bullying and harassment and it is time that we all took a stand against this.
Author: Katherine Jenkins

Quote: When I type a title page, I hold it and I look at it and I think, I just need four thousand sentences to go with this and I'll have a book.
Author: Betsy Byars

Quote: My grandpa died yesterday. I ought to know, because I shot him. So come, join me in the fight against patricide by killing your father's father.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: Writing is not necessarily something to be ashamed of, but do it in private and wash your hands afterwards.
Author: Robert A. Heinlein

Quote: The person who makes a success of living is the one who sees his goal steadily and aims for it unswervingly. That is dedication.
Author: Cecil B. DeMille

Quote: Sometimes, just saying that you hate something, and having someone agree with you, can make you feel better about a terrible situation.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: You're not to be so blind with patriotism that you can't face reality. Wrong is wrong, no matter who does it or says it.
Author: Malcolm X

Quote: The failure to read good books both enfeebles the vision and strengthens our most fatal tendency -- the belief that the here and now is all there is.
Author: Allan Bloom
Origin: The Closing of the American Mind

Quote: Men will confess to treason, murder, arson, false teeth, or a wig. How many of them will own up to a lack of humor?
Author: Frank Moore Colby

Quote: I have learned now that while those who speak about one's miseries usually hurt, those who keep silence hurt more.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: Every adversity, every failure, every heartache carries with it the seed of an equal or greater benefit.
Author: Napoleon Hill

Quote: I've got many close friends, but there's an awful lot about friendship that is not demonstrative in my case.
Author: Warren Christopher

Quote: I breathe onto a mirror just to make sure I'm still alive, and to see how good looking my breath is.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Mirrors that hide nothing hurt me. But this is the hurt of purging and precious renewal - and these are the mirrors of dangerous grace.
Author: Walter Wangerin Jr.

Quote: I'd love to create a personal profile on a dating site with a headline that reads, "Great Listener Seeks Mute Woman.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: When we are open, strong and fluid in our body, we are experiencing the best that life has to offer with very little limitation or constraints.
Author: Dashama Konah Gordon
Origin: Journey to Joyful: Transform Your Life with Pranashama Yoga

Quote: Growing up happens when you start having things you look back on and wish you could change -Clary Fray
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: If I didn't try to eavesdrop on every bus ride I take or look for the humor when I go for a walk, I would just be depressed all the time.
Author: Lynda Barry

Quote: Collect books, even if you don't plan on reading them right away. Nothing is more important than an unread library.
Author: John Waters

Quote: Everything else has vanished, so you take them now. Maybe if you're the one keeping them, I'll be the one feeling better.
Author: Daniel Handler

Quote: The nice part about being a pessimist is that you are constantly being either proven right or pleasantly surprised.
Author: George F. Will

Quote: Stop wasting your time looking for the key to happiness... the door is open and unlocked... just walk through it.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Philosophy begins in wonder. And at the end when philosophic thought has done its best the wonder remains.
Author: Alfred North Whitehead

Quote: I hope it is true that a man can die and yet not only live in others but give them life, and not only life, but that great consciousness of life.
Author: Jack Kerouac

Quote: The thing about getting older is that you don't need everything to be possible any more, you just need things to be certain.
Author: Monica Ali

Quote: Learning how to be still, to really be still and let life happen - that stillness becomes a radiance.
Author: Morgan Freeman

Quote: There is never a time or place for true love. It happens accidentally, in a heartbeat, in a single flashing, throbbing moment.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: My candle burns at both ends; It will not last the night; But ah, my foes, and oh, my friends - It gives a lovely light!
Author: Edna St. Vincent Millay

Quote: Prophesies are dark and don't need a flashlight to illuminate. I'm a bring my own lighthouse kind of lover.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Learn to deal with the fact that you are not a perfect person but you are a person that deserves respect and honesty.
Author: Pandora Poikilos
Origin: Excuse Me, My Brains Have Stepped Out

Quote: It's delicious to have people adore you, but it's exhausting, too. Particularly when your own feelings don't match theirs.
Author: Tasha Alexander

Quote: I intend to live in the beauty of past memories for I know them the best. At this moment, the future is unknown so it will be an adventure for me.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Once, poets were magicians. Poets were strong, stronger than warriors or kings - stronger than old hapless gods. And they will be strong once again.
Author: Greg Bear

Quote: I haven't had that one great love, which is good. I don't want that to be in the past, I want it to be in the future.
Author: Taylor Swift

Quote: I wanted to be an independent woman, a woman who could pay for her bills, a woman who could run her own life - and I became that woman.
Author: Diane von Furstenberg

Quote: The morning always has a way of creeping up on me and peeking in my bedroom windows. The sunrise is such a pervert.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Who Moved My Choose?: An Amazing Way to Deal With Change by Deciding to Let Indecision Into Your Life

Quote: If you love somebody, let them go, for if they return, they were always yours. And if they don't, they never were.
Author: Khalil Gibran

Quote: Free yourself from the burden of feeling the need to hold on to anything. Let go... you are a part of everything.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: There is no tomorrow and there was no yesterday; if you truly want to accomplish your goals you must engulf yourself in today.
Author: Noel DeJesus

Quote: Friends confront each other sometimes, and sometimes the friendship lasts, and sometimes it doesn't.
Author: Brooke Elliott

Quote: I love you, Marks. My heart is completely and utterly yours. And unfortunately for you, the rest of me comes with it.
Author: Lisa Kleypas

Quote: Because you are beautiful. I enjoy looking at beautiful people, and I decided a while ago not to deny myself the simpler pleasures of existence
Author: John Green

Quote: In questions of science, the authority of a thousand is not worth the humble reasoning of a single individual.
Author: Galileo Galilei

Quote: When someone is suffering from anxieties, depression, and stress, the only treatment is to change awareness and consciousness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I think humor can be an effective way of getting the point across, but there are definitely times where I just write very earnestly.
Author: Alex Pareene

Quote: Those who really love you don't mean to hurt you and if they do, you can't see it in their eyes but it hurts them too.
Author: Holly Black

Quote: It's paradoxical, that the idea of living a long life appeals to everyone, but the idea of getting old doesn't appeal to anyone.
Author: Andy Rooney

Quote: The day he moved out was terrible - That evening she went through hell. His absence wasn't a problem but the corkscrew had gone as well.
Author: Wendy Cope

Quote: Peace is not happenstance. It is a living fire that must be fed constantly. It must be tended to with vigilance, else it dies out.
Author: Libba Bray

Quote: Just keep moving forward and don't give a shit about what anybody thinks. Do what you have to do, for you.
Author: Johnny Depp

Quote: Absence makes the heart grow fonder, until it stops beating. Getting ripped out of the chest tends to have that effect.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: All the lives I could live, all the people I will never know, never will be, they are everywhere. That is all that the world is.
Author: Aleksandar Hemon

Quote: It was only a sunny smile, and little it cost in the giving, but like morning light it scattered the night and made the day worth living.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: The Vietnamese people deeply love independence, freedom and peace. But in the face of United States aggression they have risen up, united as one man.
Author: Ho Chi Minh

Quote: I am one of those who think, like Nobel, that humanity will draw more good than evil from new discoveries.
Author: Marie Curie

Quote: I have a hobby. I have the world's largest collection of sea shells. I keep it scattered on beaches all over the world. Maybe you've seen some of it.
Author: Steven Wright

Quote: We are all too often told by someone that we are too old, too young, too different, too much the same, and those comments can be devastating.
Author: Sharon Salzberg
Origin: The Force of Kindness: Change Your Life with Love & Compassion

Quote: You have to believe what you're saying if you're going to convince me. I just can't break that rule, even if I want to.
Author: Ashly Lorenzana

Quote: Gods don't like people not doing much work. People who aren't busy all the time might start to think.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: I prefer a world with many beliefs and religions. It stimulates my faith to keep growing day by day.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: My Ancestor Was an Ancient Astronaut

Quote: It's a bizarre but wonderful feeling, to arrive dead center of a target you didn't even know you were aiming for.
Author: Lois McMaster Bujold

Quote: There's only one racing strategy that matters. It's the one I run by: Get in the lead and don't let anyone pass you.
Author: Megan McCafferty

Quote: I think you don't grow up until you stop worrying about other people's purposes or lack of them and find the purposes you believe in for yourself.
Author: Orson Scott Card

Quote: Anyone who thinks sitting in church can make you a Christian must also think that sitting in a garage can make you a car.
Author: Garrison Keillor

Quote: The thirst for knowledge is like a piece of ass you know you shouldn't chase; in the end, you chase it just the same.
Author: George Pelecanos
Origin: Down by the River Where the Dead Men Go

Quote: I define nothing. Not beauty, not patriotism. I take each thing as it is, without prior rules about what it should be.
Author: Bob Dylan

Quote: Hope is some extraordinary spiritual grace that God gives us to control our fears, not to oust them.
Author: Vincent McNabb

Quote: We have always held to the hope, the belief, the conviction that there is a better life, a better world, beyond the horizon.
Author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

Quote: Life gives us choices. You either grab on with both hands and just go for it, or you sit on the sidelines.
Author: Christine Feehan

Quote: Friendship is the source of the greatest pleasures, and without friends even the most agreeable pursuits become tedious.
Author: Thomas Aquinas

Quote: Your life will be no better than the plans you make and the action you take. You are the architect and builder of your own life, fortune, destiny.
Author: Alfred A. Montapert

Quote: There are good books which are only for adults. There are no good books which are only for children.
Author: W.H. Auden

Quote: Imagination was given to man to compensate him for what he isn't. A sense of humor was provided to console him for what he is.
Author: Horace Walpole

Quote: It was such an unexpected and genuine smile that if I only had a soul I'm sure I would have felt quite guilty.
Author: Jeff Lindsay

Quote: Only that day dawns to which we are awake. There is more day to dawn. The sun is but a morning star.
Author: Henry David Thoreau

Quote: I would rather entertain and hope that people learned something than educate people and hope they were entertained.
Author: Walt Disney

Quote: those of us who read because we love it more than anything, who feel about bookstores the way some people feel about jewelers...
Author: Anna Quindlen

Quote: None of us will ever accomplish anything excellent or commanding except when he listens to this whisper which is heard by him alone.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: Absurdity is one of the most human things about us: a manifestation of our most advanced and interesting characteristics.
Author: Thomas Nagel

Quote: Commitment mixed with drive and sprinkled with imagination creates sustained results. Stay focused and you will make your mark!
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: But shortcuts are dangerous; we cannot delude ourselves that our knowledge is further along than it actually is.
Author: Mihaly Csikszentmihalyi
Origin: Finding Flow: The Psychology Of Engagement With Everyday Life

Quote: Still, she knows one thing for certain: never judge a relationship unless you are the one wrapped up in its arms.
Author: Alice Hoffman

Quote: In my many years I have come to a conclusion that one useless man is a shame, two is a law firm, and three or more is a congress.
Author: Peter Stone

Quote: Temporary success can be achieved in spite of lack of other fundamental qualities, but no advancements can be maintained without hard work.
Author: William Feather

Quote: Stars open among the lilies. Are you not blinded by such expressionless sirens? This is the silence of astounded souls.
Author: Sylvia Plath

Quote: She had two lips like strawberries, and the seeds gave her kisses texture. I preferred kissing her over two scoops of vanilla ice cream.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Each friend represents a world in us, a world possibly not born until they arrive, and it is only by this meeting that a new world is born.
Author: Anaïs Nin
Origin: The Diary of Anaïs Nin, Vol. 1: 1931-1934

Quote: Haters never win. I just think that's true about life, because negative energy always costs in the end.
Author: Tom Hiddleston

Quote: I had a dream about you last night.. You were balancing ten tiny footballs on your nose while dancing with a turquoise unicorn.
Author: Amy Summers
Origin: I Had a Dream About You

Quote: A little talent is a good thing to have if you want to be a writer. But the only real requirement is the ability to remember every scar.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: You will find, that when you have someone to love, that the face is less important than the brain, and the body is less important than the heart.
Author: Adrian Tan

Quote: Life is not about waiting for the storms to pass... It's about learning how to dance in the rain.- Vivian Greene
Author: Vivian Greene

Quote: I love Amsterdam. The city is vibrant and alive. It's fresh and so open. It's definitely one of my favorite places.
Author: Stefon Harris

Quote: excuse my enthusiasm or rather madness, for I am really drunk with intellectual vision whenever I take a pencil or graver into my hand.
Author: William Blake

Quote: Let me give you a tip on a clue to men's characters: the man who damns money has obtained it dishonorably; the man who respects it has earned it.
Author: Ayn Rand

Quote: Expectations make people miserable, so whatever yours are, lower them. You'll definitely be happier.
Author: Simone Elkeles
Origin: How to Ruin Your Boyfriend's Reputation

Quote: Romance is thinking about your significant other, when you are supposed to be thinking about something else.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: Men occasionally stumble over the truth, but most of them pick themselves up and hurry off as if nothing ever happened.
Author: Winston S. Churchill

Quote: Our eyes see only that which language can explain, but our hearts see that which is invisible and unexplainable.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Every man has his secret sorrows which the world knows not; and often times we call a man cold when he is only sad.
Author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

Quote: They say philosophers and wise men are indifferent. Wrong. Indifference is a paralysis of the soul, a premature death.
Author: Anton Chekhov

Quote: I actually like how doctors talk. I like the sound of science. I like how words you don't understand explain things you can't understand.
Author: R.J. Palacio

Quote: Plant seeds of happiness, hope, success, and love; it will all come back to you in abundance. This is the law of nature.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: When you see a man with a great deal of religion displayed in his shop window, you may depend upon it he keeps a very small stock of it within.
Author: Charles Haddon Spurgeon

Quote: When you can do the common things of life in an uncommon way, you will command the attention of the world.
Author: George Washington Carver

Quote: It's better to have a million small religions with each one containing a great truth. Than one great religion containing a million small truths.
Author: Carla VanKoughnett

Quote: There is no passion to be found playing small - in settling for a life that is less than the one you are capable of living.
Author: Nelson Mandela

Quote: When one person suffers from a delusion, it is called insanity. When many people suffer from a delusion it is called a Religion.
Author: Robert M. Pirsig
Origin: Zen and the Art of Motorcycle Maintenance: An Inquiry Into Values

Quote: I do not fear death. I had been dead for billions and billions of years before I was born, and had not suffered the slightest inconvenience from it.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: . . . when it comes down to it, that's what life is all about: showing up for the people you love, again and again, until you can't show up anymore.
Author: Rebecca Walker
Origin: Baby Love: Choosing Motherhood After a Lifetime of Ambivalence

Quote: I don't want to accidentally end up looking back on my life to find that I'm ashamed of myself, I want to live a life I can be proud of.
Author: Alice Bag

Quote: This morning my girlfriend was so loud in bed that we woke up the neighbors. So I told them to roll over and go back to sleep.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: It may be inevitable that mankind has to suffer so that it may gain experience to transcend and transform her collective consciousness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: In middle school, I got picked on a lot. But boy, it sure felt good to get picked, because who doesn't like to get chosen and called out as special?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'm a godmother, that's a great thing to be, a godmother. She calls me god for short, that's cute, I taught her that.
Author: Ellen DeGeneres

Quote: Trying to fall out of love is like trying to climb a mountain. Blindfolded, on crutches, naked in a hail storm.
Author: Louise Caiola

Quote: Be a craftsman in speech that thou mayest be strong, for the strength of one is the tongue, and speech is mightier than all fighting.
Author: Ptahhotep

Quote: It is difficult to make a man miserable while he feels worthy of himself and claims kindred to the great God who made him.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: You know that I know you know, but I want you to know that I know you know I know you know I know. It's important for you to know that, you know?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Days of Yay are Here! Wake Me Up When They're Over.

Quote: Sickness, insanity and death were the angels that surrounded my cradle and they have followed me throughout my life.
Author: Edvard Munch

Quote: But Dumbledore says he doesn't care what they do as long as they don't take him off the Chocolate Frog cards.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix

Quote: There are two primary choices in life: to accept conditions as they exist, or accept the responsibility for changing them
Author: Denis Waitley

Quote: Polarity exists so that we may discover the truth beyond this world of duality, which is the ultimate purpose of life.
Author: Dashama Konah Gordon
Origin: Journey to Joyful: Transform Your Life with Pranashama Yoga

Quote: That which we persist in doing becomes easier to do, not that the nature of the thing has changed, but our power to do so is increased.
Author: Heber J. Grant

Quote: Because there's no way on earth she's going to make it through college unless she grows some serious ovaries and turns this train wreck around
Author: Lisa McMann

Quote: In our time together, you claimed a special place in my heart, one I'll carry with me forever and that no one can ever replace.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: I AM IGNORANT of absolute truth. But I am humble before my ignorance and therein lies my honor and my reward.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: I want to be in a relationship where you telling me you love me is just a ceremonious validation of what you already show me.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: In life, there are those relationships where you really love someone, but they're just not right for you and there's a little bittersweet feel to it.
Author: Jennifer Morrison

Quote: and all I could think was that I would like to spend every morning for the rest of my life waking up beside her
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: To be convinced in our hearts that we have forgiveness of sins and peace with God by grace alone is the hardest thing.
Author: Martin Luther

Quote: I love you now for what we've already shared, and I love you now in anticipation of all that's to come.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: One of life's most painful moments comes when we must admit that we didn't do our homework, that we are not prepared.
Author: Merlin Olsen

Quote: I saw how greatly he suffered the requirement of being clever. It separated him from his soul, and it didn't get him anything other than a living.
Author: Mark Helprin
Origin: A Soldier of the Great War

Quote: A hero is not know by the number of battles he has won, but rather by the kind of battles he chooses to fight.
Author: Tonny K. Brown

Quote: Two roads diverged in a wood and I - I took the one less traveled by, and that has made all the difference.
Author: Robert Frost

Quote: Science, where would scientists be without it? They'd probably still be in my basement, where I left them a few minutes ago.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Seriously delirious, but not at all serious

Quote: Often, it's not about becoming a new person, but becoming the person you were meant to be, and already are, but don't know how to be.
Author: Heath L. Buckmaster
Origin: Box of Hair: A Fairy Tale

Quote: When you are up against a wall, put down roots like a tree, until clarity comes from deeper sources to see over that wall and grow.
Author: C.G. Jung

Quote: Knowledge is merely brilliance in organization of ideas and not wisdom. The truly wise person goes beyond knowledge.
Author: Confucius

Quote: If your enemy is hungry, feed him; if he is thirsty, give him something to drink. In doing this, you will heap burning coals on his head.
Author: Anonymous

Quote: Part of my humor is the fact that I love coming out of left field. I don't want people to expect what is going to happen next.
Author: Howie Mandel

Quote: Glendower: I can call the spirits from the vasty deep. Hotspur: Why, so can I, or so can any man; But will they come, when you do call for them?
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: For me, it is far better to grasp the Universe as it really is than to persist in delusion, however satisfying and reassuring.
Author: Carl Sagan
Origin: The Demon- Haunted World: Science as a Candle in the Dark

Quote: Down there between our legs, it's like an entertainment complex in the middle of a sewage system. Who designed that?
Author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
Origin: Space Chronicles: Facing the Ultimate Frontier

Quote: The highest use of capital is not to make more money, but to make money do more for the betterment of life.
Author: Henry Ford

Quote: I question the equation like an equestrian, and I realize it's horseshit. What is the equation? Vote= Change.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I maintain that the cosmic religious feeling is the strongest and noblest motive for scientific research.
Author: Albert Einstein
Origin: The World As I See It

Quote: Memories were fine but you couldn't touch them, smell them or hold them. They were never exactly as the moment was, and they faded with time.
Author: Cecelia Ahern

Quote: You can defeat fear through humor, through pain, through honesty, bravery, intuition, and through love in the truest sense.
Author: John Cassavetes

Quote: Love's core purpose is to always inspire us to become more wholesomely ourselves because of love's experience.
Author: H.L. Balcomb

Quote: I must admit that I personally measure success in terms of the contributions an individual makes to her or his fellow human beings.
Author: Margaret Mead

Quote: To feel most beautifully alive means to be reading something beautiful, ready always to apprehend in the flow of language the sudden flash of poetry.
Author: Gaston Bachelard

Quote: Tell the truth. Sing with passion. Work with laughter. Love with heart. 'Cause that's all that matters in the end.
Author: Kris Kristofferson

Quote: A focused Mind is a result Of a little Effort To tell Your Distractions To sleep for A couple of hours While you are at WORK.
Author: Sujit Lalwani

Quote: If a person holds no ambitions in this world, he suffers unknowingly. If a person holds ambitions, he suffers knowingly, but very slowly.
Author: Alan Lightman

Quote: ...What you fear will not go away; it will take you into yourself and bless you and keep you. That's the world, and we all live there.
Author: William Stafford

Quote: We got into an argument over the color of love. I said it was pink, and he said it was red. So you see, I had no other choice but to stab him.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: My love can only occupy one person at a time

Quote: The only way to get through life is to laugh your way through it. You either have to laugh or cry. I prefer to laugh. Crying gives me a headache.
Author: Marjorie Pay Hinckley

Quote: Whatever you want to do, if you want to be great at it, you have to love it and be able to make sacrifices for it.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: Things end. People leave. And you know what? Life goes on. Besides, if bad things didn't happen, how would you be able to feel the good ones?
Author: Elizabeth Scott

Quote: Kerouac: You're ruining American poetry, O'Hara. O'Hara: That's more than you ever did for it, Kerouac
Author: Frank O'Hara

Quote: Loyalty and friendship, which is to me the same, created all the wealth that I've ever thought I'd have.
Author: Ernie Banks

Quote: Tucker strokes my hair. There's something so tender about the gesture. It might as well have been him whispering I love you.
Author: Cynthia Hand

Quote: Sometimes you can see things happen right in front of your eyes and still jump to the wrong conclusions.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Whoever educates himself and improves his own morals & character is superior to the man who tries to teach & train others.
Author: Hazrat Ali ibn Abu- Talib

Quote: My capacity for happiness, "he added, "you could fit into a matchbox without taking out the matches first
Author: Douglas Adams
Origin: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

Quote: The most authentic thing about us is our capacity to create, to overcome, to endure, to transform, to love and to be greater than our suffering.
Author: Ben Okri

Quote: I didn't know what to call it, what was happening between us, but I liked it. It felt silly and fragile and good.
Author: Ransom Riggs
Origin: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children

Quote: If I had my life to live over again, I would have made a rule to read some poetry and listen to some music at least once every week.
Author: Charles Darwin

Quote: How many times can a heart be shattered and still be pieced back together? How many times before the damage is irreparable?
Author: Gwenn Wright

Quote: The internet is a knowledge omelet. Sometimes I just want the purity of scrambled eggs that only a book can provide.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: It's been my experience that you can nearly always enjoy things if you make up your mind firmly that you will.
Author: L.M. Montgomery

Quote: Friendship is the complete explanation of what a Cheetah Girl is - if you have that true friendship, you can conquer anything you want.
Author: Sabrina Bryan

Quote: He does something to me, that boy. Every time. It's his only detriment. He steps on my heart. He makes me cry.
Author: Markus Zusak

Quote: People resist a census, but give them a profile page and they'll spend all day telling you who they are.
Author: Max Barry

Quote: Last time I saw you, I said that it hurt too much to love you. But I was wrong about that. The truth is it hurts too much not to love you.
Author: P.C. Cast

Quote: Not only did I lie about lying, but I lied about lying about lying. And you'd better believe that's the truth.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Titanic would never have sunk if it were made out of a sink.

Quote: Share your aspirations only with those who will support you, not those who will respond with doubt or lack of interest.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: I saw him do a No More Potatoes Dance, after he saw me stuff the last of the mashed potatoes in my pocket.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: When all is said and done, the weather and love are the two elements about which one can never be sure.
Author: Alice Hoffman

Quote: Look. Art knows no prejudice, art knows no boundaries, art doesn't really have judgement in it's purest form. So just go, just go.
Author: K. D. Lang

Quote: I know a woman loves me when she leaves me leftovers in the fridge from the date she went on the night before.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: If you have the woman you love, what more do you need? Well, besides an alibi for the time of her husband's murder.
Author: Dark Jar Tin Zoo
Origin: Love Quotes for the Ages. Specifically Ages 19-91.

Quote: A man, whilst he is dreaming, believes in his dream; he is undeceived only when he is awakened from his slumber.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi
Origin: Hind Swaraj or Indian Home Rule

Quote: I love my daddy. My daddy's everything. I hope I can find a man that will treat me as good as my dad.
Author: Lady Gaga

Quote: If you contemplate the Golden Rule, it turns out to be an injunction to live by grace rather than by what you think other people deserve.
Author: Deepak Chopra
Origin: The Third Jesus: The Christ We Cannot Ignore

Quote: Grace doesn't depend on suffering to exist, but where there is suffering you will find grace in many facets and colors.
Author: Wm. Paul Young

Quote: Be creative enough to dream, brave enough to try, persistent enough to succeed, and humble enough to thank those who helped you along the way.
Author: Elizabeth Parker
Origin: Bark Out Loud! Motivational Quotes Inspired by Dogs

Quote: The real purpose of the scientific method is to make sure nature hasn't misled you into thinking you know something you actually don't know.
Author: Robert M. Pirsig
Origin: Zen and the Art of Motorcycle Maintenance: An Inquiry Into Values

Quote: The soul hardly ever realizes it, but whether he is a believer or not, his loneliness is really a homesickness for God.
Author: Hubert Van Zeller

Quote: I hadn't been in proper school in three years. My parents were my two best friends. My third best friend was an author who did not know I existed.
Author: John Green

Quote: It takes great courage to see the world in all its tainted glory, and still to love it. And even more courage to see it in the one you love
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: The Internet is so big, so powerful and pointless that for some people it is a complete substitute for life.
Author: Andrew Brown

Quote: A story has no beginning or end: arbitrarily one chooses that moment of experience from which to look back or from which to look ahead.
Author: Graham Greene

Quote: Science, my lad, is made up of mistakes, but they are mistakes which it is useful to make, because they lead little by little to the truth.
Author: Jules Verne
Origin: A Journey to the Center of the Earth

Quote: When we create hope and opportunity in the lives of others, we allow love, decency and promise to triumph over cowardice and hate.
Author: Kirsten Gillibrand

Quote: She was not sorry. And if it was the wine telling her that, then she would tell the wine the same thing tomorrow. She was not sorry.
Author: Mary Balogh

Quote: Just start off with the same goals in mind. If you have the same values, same goals then you'll be on track for the same future.
Author: Angelina Jolie

Quote: The only person who can pull me down is myself, and I'm not going to let myself pull me down anymore.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: I could never figure out why photography and art had separate histories. So I decided to explore both.
Author: John Baldessari

Quote: Eating a plain bagel with no cream cheese is like eating the inner tube of a bicycle tire, and I'd rather ride my roller skates to work.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: To be heroic is to be courageous enough to die for something; to be inspirational is to be crazy enough to live a little.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Just don't give up trying to do what you really want to do. Where there is love and inspiration, I don't think you can go wrong.
Author: Ella Fitzgerald

Quote: The Bible tells us to love our neighbors, and also to love our enemies; probably because generally they are the same people.
Author: G.K. Chesterton

Quote: Remain true to yourself, child. If you know your own heart, you will always have one friend who does not lie.
Author: Marion Zimmer Bradley

Quote: To believe that what has not occurred in history will not occur at all, is to argue disbelief in the dignity of man.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: Some days are like this. And the only way to get through them is to remember that they are only one day, and that every day ends.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: Live Today! Do not allow your spirit to be softened of your happiness to be limited by a day you cannot have back or a day that does not yet exist.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: the moment you don't feel like praying, get on your knees. And the moment you don't feel like reading your bible, you'd better get that Book open.
Author: Lori Wick

Quote: I love being in love, but I also love other things, like not being jealous, overly sensitive, or needy.
Author: Dark Jar Tin Zoo
Origin: Love Quotes for the Ages. Specifically Ages 19-91.

Quote: It is clear that the individual who persecutes a man, his brother, because he is not of the same opinion, is a monster.
Author: Voltaire
