Quote: The knowledge that she would never be loved in return acted upon her ideas as a tide acts upon cliffs.
Author: Thornton Wilder
Origin: The Bridge of San Luis Rey

Quote: Every decent con man knows that the simplest truth is more powerful than even the most elaborate lie.
Author: Ally Carter

Quote: This isn't the road home. This is a road littered with questions that will inevitably lead to an answer.
Author: Meryl S. Fortney

Quote: There's a period of life when we swallow a knowledge of ourselves and it becomes either good or sour inside.
Author: Pearl Bailey

Quote: I know that I will never find my father in any other man who comes into my life, because it is a void in my life that can only be filled by him.
Author: Halle Berry

Quote: It's impossible," he snapped. "Why?" "Because I'm Sebastian, Lord St. Vincent. I can't be celibate. Everyone knows that.
Author: Lisa Kleypas

Quote: The flower bloomed and faded. The sun rose and sank. The lover loved and went. And what the poets said in rhyme, the young translated into practice.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: I've found that luck is quite predictable. If you want more luck, take more chances, Be more active, Show up more often.
Author: Brian Tracy

Quote: For a woman to deny the necessity of true love in her life would be to deny herself, and her creator.
Author: Dwain K. White Sr.

Quote: Even celebrities, most people have a sense of humor. Most of the people we meet who we've done on the show, like it.
Author: Matt Stone

Quote: You know that when I hate you, it is because I love you to a point of passion that unhinges my soul.
Author: Julie de Lespinasse

Quote: Fashion does not have to prove that it is serious. It is the proof that intelligent frivolity can be something creative and positive
Author: Karl Lagerfeld

Quote: Education is a fundamental principle of what made America a success. We can't afford to throw any young people away.
Author: Ben Carson

Quote: At the potluck, I brought two dishes: knowledge and mashed potatoes and gravy. Guess which one got cleaned out and which one hardly got touched.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When the world caves in still my hope will cling to Your promise where my courage ends let my heart find strength in your presence
Author: Hillsong

Quote: Of all the means to insure happiness throughout the whole life, by far the most important is the acquisition of friends.
Author: Epicurus

Quote: In the conditions of modern life the rule is absolute, the race which does not value trained intelligence is doomed.
Author: Alfred North Whitehead

Quote: There is only one thing in the world worse than being talked about, and that is not being talked about.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Sorrow is knowledge: they who know the most must mourn the deepest o'er the fatal truth, the Tree of Knowledge is not that of Life.
Author: George Gordon Byron

Quote: ...whether he stayed or left, whether they walked the same path or not. They could live on opposite sides of the world, and she would still be his.
Author: Lisa Kleypas

Quote: You've got to ask! Asking is, in my opinion, the world's most powerful - and neglected - secret to success and happiness.
Author: Percy Ross

Quote: You take away all the other luxuries in life, and if you can make someone smile and laugh, you have given the most special gift: happiness.
Author: Brad Garrett

Quote: What we become depends on what we read after all of the professors have finished with us. The greatest university of all is a collection of books.
Author: Thomas Carlyle

Quote: Deep in my heart I'm concealing things that I'm longing to say. Scared to confess what I'm feeling - frightened you'll slip away.
Author: Madonna

Quote: Wit is the sudden marriage of ideas which before their union were not perceived to have any relation.
Author: Mark Twain

Quote: Without humor, I cannot go on and I doubt many of my readers would go on either. Humor is so important. I am here to have fun here with my work.
Author: Gary Shteyngart

Quote: Even when I'm dead, I'll swim through the Earth, like a mermaid of the soil, just to be next to your bones.
Author: Jeffrey McDaniel

Quote: Plato says that the unexamined life is not worth living. But what if the examined life turns out to be a clunker as well?
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: Quit making shade while I'm trying to make noon. Go put on a blindfold and act like midnight. There's leftover love in the freezer if you get cold.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There is no surprise more magical than the surprise of being loved: It is God's finger on man's shoulder.
Author: Charles Morgan

Quote: The fascination of shooting as a sport depends almost wholly on whether you are at the right or wrong end of the gun.
Author: P.G. Wodehouse

Quote: I had spent my whole life feeling homesick. The only difference between the two of us was that I didn't know what or where home was.
Author: Marian Keyes

Quote: I imagine what would happen if everyone turned their regrets into wishes, went around shouting them.
Author: Nina LaCour

Quote: ...ducks and geese are foolish things, and must be looked after, but girls can take care of themselves.
Author: Washington Irving

Quote: The fuse is lit. You can run all you want to but you leave a trail of gunpowder in your wake. There's going to be a reckoning eventually.
Author: Colleen Houck

Quote: When you achieve higher consciousness you will not achieve anything, but you will lose everything that is not important and is not yours.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I stared up at the sky and raised my middle finger, just in case God was watching. I don't like being spied on.
Author: Annabel Pitcher
Origin: My Sister Lives on the Mantelpiece

Quote: I'm a good person, I hope. But I'm never as good as I want to be, never as nice as I want to be, never as generous as I want to be.
Author: David Tennant

Quote: Of course it is happening inside your head, Harry, but why on earth should that mean that it is not real?
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows

Quote: Hope is not the conviction that something will turn out well, but the certainty that something makes sense, regardless of how it turns out.
Author: Václav Havel

Quote: Lord, may the pain be ours, And the weakness that it brings, But at least give us the strength, Of not showing it to anyone!
Author: Fernando Pessoa

Quote: Education shouldn't be the prison of known knowledge, but it should be the bridge to find the yet unknown universe of knowledge.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The logic of worldly success rests on a fallacy: the strange error that our perfection depends on the thoughts and opinions and applause of other men!
Author: Thomas Merton

Quote: It is easy to love people in memory; the hard thing is to love them when they are there in front of you.
Author: John Updike
Origin: My Father's Tears and Other Stories

Quote: Love is the only reality and it is not a mere sentiment. It is the ultimate truth that lies at the heart of creation.
Author: Rabindranath Tagore

Quote: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood. Now is the time to understand more, so that we may fear less.
Author: Marie Curie

Quote: Being the light of the world is about being a broken, exploding, scarred star and shining a light of hope and inspiration to everyone around you.
Author: Ricky Maye

Quote: Most often a country is poor when its educational system is poor and individuals do not strive to become educated.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: God, grant me the serenity to accept the things I cannot change, the courage to change the things I can, and the wisdom to know the difference.
Author: Reinhold Niebuhr

Quote: The beginning of love is the will to let those we love be perfectly themselves, the resolution not to twist them to fit our own image.
Author: Thomas Merton

Quote: Success is to be measured not so much by the position that one has reached in life as by the obstacles which he has overcome.
Author: Booker T. Washington

Quote: I am a Mormon because I love the Lord Jesus Christ. And as I exercise faith in Him, I am blessed with the Holy Spirit in my life.
Author: Jane Clayson

Quote: As soon as a religion comes to dominate it has as its opponents all those who would have been its first disciples.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: The friendship we share grows amidst the craggy rock pond; reeds of water spray fireflies scented with bonfires.
Author: Bradley Chicho

Quote: People will not remember what you did for living, they will remember how you touched them with kindness and loving.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: My father chose my name , and my last name was chosen by my ancestors . That's enough, I myself choose my way
Author: Ali Shariati

Quote: Just like a sailor who knows before reaching land that it is nearing, life too gives certain signals which indicate how closer you are to manifesting.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: I often wonder if God recognizes His own son the way we've dressed him up, or is it dressed him down?
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: An armed society is a polite society. Manners are good when one may have to back up his acts with his life.
Author: Robert A. Heinlein

Quote: For I have trained myself and am training myself always to be able to dance lightly in the service of thought
Author: Søren Kierkegaard

Quote: Two roads diverged in a wood, and I -I took the one less traveled by, And that has made all the difference.
Author: Robert Frost

Quote: Who we were and who we are are four different people, and the me from now doesn't relate to the me from then, let alone to the you from now.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'm in this wonderful place of life, where everything I'm doing is something I do because I enjoy it.
Author: Mike Huckabee

Quote: Everyone's allowed to be in love with the wrong person at some point. In fact, it's a mistake not to be.
Author: Harriet Evans

Quote: I look for a sign. Where to go next. you never know when you'll get one. Even the most faithless among us are waiting to be proven wrong.
Author: Jillian Lauren

Quote: I have left orders to be awakened at any time during national emergency, even if I'm in a cabinet meeting.
Author: Ronald Reagan

Quote: My name represents me, but it's not who I am. It's just a collection of letters. Unfortunately, none of them are love letters.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I slept through the award presentation for Napper of the Year. They had to wake me when I won. Winning was like a dream come true.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: ...it is well known that a vital ingredient of success is not knowing that what you're attempting can't be done.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: The power of hope! Even a lack of ambition can, for a time, pay off as a necessary facet, as long as hope outweighs it.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: A lot about Congress is about forming good working relationships with people, and humor can really help you do that.
Author: Linda Sanchez

Quote: Like the British Constitution, she owes her success in practice to her inconsistencies in principle.
Author: Thomas Hardy

Quote: This is where men and women are different, we can put aside petty competition for relationships - they can't. It interferes.
Author: Adriana Trigiani

Quote: The entire universe has been neatly divided into things to (a) mate with, (b) eat, (c) run away from, and (d) rocks.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: Humor has been the balm of my life, but it's been reserved for those close to me, not part of the public Lana.
Author: Lana Turner

Quote: You can use your mouth to speak the words I love you, or you can use your mouth to kiss me and transport love from your mind to my heart.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A wise parent humors the desire for independent action, so as to become the friend and advisor when his absolute rule shall cease.
Author: Elizabeth Gaskell

Quote: The mind is just like a muscle - the more you exercise it, the stronger it gets and the more it can expand.
Author: Idowu Koyenikan
Origin: Wealth for All: Living a Life of Success at the Edge of Your Ability

Quote: If you're bored with life - you don't get up every morning with a burning desire to do things - you don't have enough goals.
Author: Lou Holtz

Quote: There were things I wanted to tell him. But I knew they would hurt him. So I buried them, and let them hurt me.
Author: Jonathan Safran Foer

Quote: There are no classes in life for beginners: right away you are always asked to deal with what is most difficult.
Author: Rainer Maria Rilke

Quote: A novel is never anything but a philosophy expressed in images. And in a good novel the philosophy has disappeared into the images.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: Sometimes, if she simply remained quiet, and let the inadequacy of his excuses reverberate on the air, he became ashamed and backtracked.
Author: J.K. Rowling

Quote: Everybody has an angel hiding inside. When you die, your angel comes out. You can die, but not your angel. Your angel never dies.
Author: Jerry Spinelli

Quote: Courage and perseverance have a magical talisman, before which difficulties disappear and obstacles vanish into air.
Author: John Quincy Adams

Quote: We regard God as an airman regards his parachute; it's there for emergencies but he hopes he'll never have to use it.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: The discovery of a new dish does more for the happiness of the human race than the discovery of a star.
Author: Jean Anthelme Brillat- Savarin
Origin: The Physiology of Taste: Or, Meditations on Transcendental Gastronomy

Quote: A woman's got one life: She's got to reach out and grab it with both hands, or it'll pass her by and leave nothing but a smelly old fart in her face.
Author: Robin Schone

Quote: The moment a little boy is concerned with which is a jay and which is a sparrow, he can no longer see the birds or hear them sing.
Author: Eric Berne

Quote: If I have any worth, it is to live my life for God so as to teach these peoples; even though some of them still look down on me.
Author: Saint Patrick

Quote: What are five things you are grateful for? Right now? Open to gratitude and you will soften into joy.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: Keep me away from the wisdom which does not cry, the philosophy which does not laugh and the greatness which does not bow before children.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: My hope is that we continue to nurture the places that we love, but that we also look outside our immediate worlds.
Author: Annie Leibovitz

Quote: Success is getting and achieving what you want. Happiness is wanting and being content with what you get.
Author: Bernard Meltzer

Quote: Above all, never think you're not good enough. Never think that. In life people will take you at your own reckoning.
Author: Isaac Asimov

Quote: Love gives you wings. Icarus and the Challenger both had wings, and so did my first love letter, after I folded it up and flung it at my crush.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the best book I've ever written, and it still sucks

Quote: Be prepared, work hard, and hope for a little luck. Recognize that the harder you work and the better prepared you are, the more luck you might have.
Author: Ed Bradley

Quote: It took me years to figure out that upset was upset, and tumultuousness was not the same thing as passion. Love isn't drama.
Author: Deb Caletti
Origin: The Secret Life of Prince Charming

Quote: I want to protect innocent people from sin by locking them in cages, where the evil can't get to them.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: There are Two Typos of People in This World: Those Who Can Edit and Those Who Can't

Quote: I'm not out to compete with any one, I'm here to complete, by encouraging and inspiring souls through a text at a time
Author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

Quote: If, after I depart this vale, you ever remember me and have thought to please my ghost, forgive some sinner and wink your eye at some homely girl.
Author: H.L. Mencken

Quote: We are all connected; To each other, biologically. To the earth, chemically. To the rest of the universe atomically.
Author: Neil deGrasse Tyson

Quote: Sometimes it seemed to him that his life was delicate as a dandelion. One little puff from any direction, and it was blown to bits.
Author: Katherine Paterson

Quote: Youth is happy because it has the capacity to see beauty. Anyone who keeps the ability to see beauty never grows old.
Author: Franz Kafka

Quote: for some reason, dying men always ask the question they know the answer to. perhaps it's so they can die being right.
Author: Markus Zusak

Quote: The single best thing about coming out of the closet is that nobody can insult you by telling you what you've just told them.
Author: Rachel Maddow

Quote: What makes big boobs and perkiness so attractive to boys? I mean, really. Two round, mounds of fat and a fake smile. Yeah, winning attributes.
Author: Gena Showalter

Quote: And I got out of there without punching anyone, kicking anyone, or breaking down in tears. Some days the small victories are all you achieve.
Author: Molly Ringle

Quote: I love to compete. To me, business is the ultimate sport. It's always on. There is always someone trying to beat me.
Author: Mark Cuban

Quote: Success is doing what you want to do, when you want, where you want, with whom you want, as much as you want.
Author: Anthony Robbins

Quote: Some acts of faith, I believe, have the power to grant us something infinitely wiser than we imagine
Author: Ursula Hegi

Quote: The way to achieve your goals is step by step, you just need to build enough track, to be ahead of the train."~ John Milton Lawrence
Author: John Milton Lawrence

Quote: Crying is all right in its way while it lasts. But you have to stop sooner or later, and then you still have to decide what to do.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: My stomach lurched, an appetizer before the full portion of heartache I had a feeling was going to be served at some point soon.
Author: Gayle Forman

Quote: If knowledge is power, let's spread it as widely as possible and dilute it to deny those who would abuse it.
Author: Stuart Aken

Quote: The most important single ingredient in the formula of success is knowing how to get along with people.
Author: Theodore Roosevelt

Quote: [Marriage] happens as with cages: the birds without despair to get in, and those within despair of getting out.
Author: Michel de Montaigne

Quote: Today I bent the truth to be kind, and I have no regret, for I am far surer of what is kind than I am of what is true.
Author: Robert Brault

Quote: You don't love someone for their looks, or their clothes, or for their fancy car, but because they sing a song only you can hear.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: In Australia, even the darkest subject matter has a little pinch of humor. A little sweet to make the sour go down.
Author: Ben Mendelsohn

Quote: Where questions of religion are concerned, people are guilty of every possible sort of dishonesty and intellectual misdemeanor.
Author: Sigmund Freud

Quote: Nothing is my guiltiest pleasure. I love it. I love doing it. I love planning to do it, I love loafing and pottering and chilling and daydreaming.
Author: David Morrissey

Quote: Nothing that happens to you was meant to be. The only thing about you that was meant to be is you. Blaze your own trail.
Author: George Alexiou

Quote: It is a mistake for a sculptor or a painter to speak or write very often about his job. It releases tension needed for his work.
Author: Henry Moore

Quote: I used to want you so bad, I'm so through with that because honestly you turned out to be the best thing I never had!
Author: Beyoncé Knowles

Quote: Cats are puddles of cuteness. I stepped in one the other day that was so muddy I not only had to pet it, but cuddle with it for hours.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I will describe my eyes and then begin the story. My eyes are blue and resplendent. Now I will begin the story.
Author: Jonathan Safran Foer

Quote: How can sincerity be a condition of friendship? A taste for truth at any cost is a passion which spares nothing.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: Sixth grade was a big time, in my childhood, of hoops and friendship, and coming up with funny things.
Author: Adam Sandler

Quote: I have a friendship with Hezbollah, and I also have contacts outside of Lebanon, but it doesn't mean I follow anyone's agenda.
Author: Najib Mikati

Quote: Friendship, like love, is destroyed by long absence, though it may be increased by short intermissions.
Author: Samuel Johnson

Quote: In California, I do like to just chill out and go to the beach, but I love the energy here. I feel very productive when I'm in New York.
Author: Ashley Greene

Quote: So runs my dream, but what am I? An infant crying in the night an infant crying for the light and with no language but a cry.
Author: Alfred Lord Tennyson

Quote: For my part, whatever anguish of spirit it may cost, I am willing to know the whole truth; to know the worst and to provide for it.
Author: Patrick Henry

Quote: I value humor, kindness, and the ability to tell a good story far more than money, status, or the kind of car someone drives.
Author: Rebecca Wells

Quote: Anything can be done if you find friends to do it with. The lucky biographers find themselves drawn into a sort of friendship with their subject.
Author: Amity Shlaes

Quote: He hath never failed thee yet. Never will His love forget. O fret not thyself nor let Thy heart be troubled, Neither let it be afraid.
Author: Amy Carmichael

Quote: Life goal: Swim in a lake full of soup, and instead of bathing suits we'll wear Ziploc bags while we make love like we're feeding the homeless.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: In a world plagued with commonplace tragedies, only one thing exists that truly has the power to save lives, and that is love.
Author: Richelle E. Goodrich
Origin: Dandelions: The Disappearance of Annabelle Fancher

Quote: I just bought a bag of poetry, but it was mostly air. The author must have learned from the potato chip industry.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Friendship is a strong and habitual inclination in two persons to promote the good and happiness of one another.
Author: Eustace Budgell

Quote: I'm going to smile, and my smile will sink down into your pupils, and heaven knows what it will become.
Author: Jean- Paul Sartre

Quote: Love without hope will not survive. Love without faith changes nothing. Love gives power to hope and faith.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: My Ancestor Was an Ancient Astronaut

Quote: if you think they didn't go crazy in tiny rooms just like you're doing now without women without food without hope then you're not ready.
Author: Charles Bukowski
Origin: Love is a Dog from Hell

Quote: The philosopher whose dealings are with divine order himself acquires the characteristics of order and divinity.
Author: Plato

Quote: A little more persistence, a little more effort, and what seemed hopeless failure may turn to glorious success.
Author: Elbert Hubbard

Quote: See how she leans her cheek upon her hand. O, that I were a glove upon that hand That I might touch that cheek!
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: It's better to dare to dream big and achieve half of your dreams than to dream small dreams and achieve all
Author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

Quote: I'm going to keep going until I succeed - or die. Don't think I don't know how this might end. I've known it for years.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows

Quote: A short story is a love affair, a novel is a marriage. A short story is a photograph; a novel is a film.
Author: Lorrie Moore

Quote: Your life isn't behind you; your memories are behind you. Your life is ALWAYS ahead of you. Today is a new day - seize it!
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success. If you love what you are doing, you will be successful.
Author: Albert Schweitzer

Quote: Generally, people who are good at writing letters have no need to write letters. They've got plenty of life to lead inside their own context.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: You can elevate yourself to a level of higher consciousness simply by changing your thoughts, perceptions, and feelings.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Men love it. They have a sense of humor, whereas a lot of women are threatened or just don't get it.
Author: Lara Flynn Boyle

Quote: Love lasts about seven years. That's how long it takes for the cells of the body to totally replace themselves.
Author: Françoise Sagan

Quote: I like wearing a blindfold while watching movies, so that I can focus on the dialogue. My favorite flicks are the silent movies.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Only happy people have nightmares, from overeating. For those who live a nightmare reality, sleep is a black hole, lost in time, like death.
Author: Guy Sajer

Quote: Vanessa insisted that film was exactly like poetry. Nothing necessarily had to happen; you just had to feel something.
Author: Cecily von Ziegesar

Quote: I used the boos, and not the booze, as motivation. That led to applause, which I drank up like an alcoholic. I need a refill.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The bond that links your true family is not one of blood, but of respect and joy in each other's life.
Author: Richard Bach

Quote: I love a massage. I'd go every day if I could. I don't need to be wrapped in herbs like a salmon fillet, but I do love a massage.
Author: Jason Bateman

Quote: Writing- the profession in which you stare at a computer screen, stare out the window, type a few words, then curse repeatedly.
Author: Drew Goodman

Quote: You must learn to take a step back and visualize the whole piece. If you focus only on the thread given to you, you lose sight of what it can become.
Author: Colleen Houck

Quote: My formula for life is very simple: in the morning, wake up; at night, go to sleep. In between I try and occupy myself as best I can.
Author: Cary Grant

Quote: Well, it's simple to love someone, "she said. "But it's hard to know when you need to say it out loud.
Author: Rebecca Stead

Quote: Measure your life not by the dimension of your bank account but by the expansion of your kindness and love.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Every night, I have to read a book, so that my mind will stop thinking about things that I stress about.
Author: Britney Spears

Quote: Myth is much more important and true than history. History is just journalism and you know how reliable that is.
Author: Joseph Campbell

Quote: Sometimes you know in your heart you love someone, but you have to go away before your head can figure it out.
Author: Sharon Creech

Quote: False friendship, like the ivy, decays and ruins the walls it embraces; but true friendship gives new life and animation to the object it supports.
Author: Richard Burton

Quote: What glitters may not be gold; and even wolves may smile; and fools will be led by promises to their deaths.
Author: Lauren Oliver
Origin: Delirium Stories: Hana, Annabel, and Raven

Quote: To surrender to ignorance and call it God has always been premature, and it remains premature today.
Author: Isaac Asimov

Quote: No matter what he does, every person on earth plays a central role in the history of the world. And normally he doesn't know it.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: The truth is incontrovertible. Malice may attack it, ignorance may deride it, but in the end, there it is.
Author: Winston S. Churchill

Quote: I have more awareness of other people and, I hope, more sensitivity to their needs. I also find that I'm more direct and outspoken.
Author: Christopher Reeve

Quote: I always say be humble but be firm. Humility and openness are the key to success without compromising your beliefs.
Author: George Hickenlooper

Quote: Realize this - your anger with God does not drive a wedge between you and Him. It is your silence that drives the wedge. - Prodigal Life
Author: Pauline Creeden

Quote: I would be willing to do almost anything to make Art happy. I care about our friendship. The only thing I won't do is change the essence of my work.
Author: Paul Simon

Quote: Every night when I go to bed, I hope that I may never wake again, and every morning renews my grief.
Author: Franz Schubert

Quote: I've got a nice racket going. I make tennis ball swatters. My favorite score is love all. That's also how I live my life.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Think of yourself as on the threshold of unparalleled success. A whole, clear, glorious life lies before you. Achieve! Achieve!
Author: Andrew Carnegie

Quote: Snow floated down every once in a while, but it was frail snow, like a memory fading into the distance.
Author: Haruki Murakami

Quote: I can no more understand the totality of God than the pancake I made for breakfast understands the complexity of me
Author: Donald Miller

Quote: Using a mannequin and some rope, could you ride two bicycles at once? Next time, try three bikes. Then truly love someone, because that's even harder.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Even when we make mistakes, we hope others will love us in spite of our shortcomings - even if we don't deserve it.
Author: Joseph B. Wirthlin

Quote: Education is our passport to the future, for tomorrow belongs to the people who prepare for it today.
Author: Malcolm X

Quote: No matter how happily a woman may be married, it always pleases her to discover that there is a nice man who wishes that she were not.
Author: H.L. Mencken

Quote: My father told me once that the most important thing every man should know is what he would die for.
Author: Tana French

Quote: Sorrow is how we learn to love. Your heart isn't breaking. It hurts because it's getting larger. The larger it gets, the more love it holds.
Author: Rita Mae Brown

Quote: There can only be two basic loves... the love of God unto the forgetfulness of self, or the love of self unto the forgetfulness and denial of God.
Author: Augustine of Hippo

Quote: In a battle of believability, the winner is the one with the best body language, not the clearest logic.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Words are like eggs dropped from great heights; you can no more call them back than ignore the mess they leave when they fall.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Before hurting anyone, especially those who cannot protect themselves, feel their pain with your heart. Take care of them as your little child.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: If you hate a person, you hate something in him that is part of yourself. What isn't part of ourselves doesn't disturb us.
Author: Hermann Hesse
Origin: Demian: Die Geschichte von Emil Sinclairs Jugend

Quote: If you hang out with chickens, you're going to cluck and if you hang out with eagles, you're going to fly.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: It is born in mind that the tragedy of life does not lie in not reaching the goal. The tragedy of life lies in having no goal to reach.
Author: Benjamin E. Mays

Quote: There is another alphabet, whispering from every leaf, singing from every river, shimmering from every sky.
Author: Dejan Stojanovic

Quote: What one generation finds ridiculous, the next accepts; and the third shudders when it looks back on what the first did.
Author: Peter Singer

Quote: I guess that's just part of loving people: You have to give things up. Sometimes you even have to give them up.
Author: Lauren Oliver

Quote: An idealist is one who, on noticing that a rose smells better than a cabbage, concludes that it makes a better soup.
Author: H.L. Mencken

Quote: Pray, v. To ask that the laws of the universe be annulled in behalf of a single petitioner, confessedly unworthy.
Author: Ambrose Bierce

Quote: Real faith comes when you facing a problem you can't help, you can't change, and you can't work it out
Author: Cynthia A. Patterson

Quote: On the road to success, even little stones may cause you fall down! If you are not serious and careful, forget about reaching your target!
Author: Mehmet Murat ildan

Quote: IF YOU CHOKE YOUR POTENTIAL BEFORE IT HAS AN OPPORTUNITY TO BECOME A POSSIBILITY YOU WILL NEVER REACH YOUR DESTINY
Author: Mo Stegall

Quote: Its a mathematical fact that two negatives make a positive so even under adverse circumstances think positively.
Author: Amit Abraham

Quote: At first, they'll only dislike what you say, but the more correct you start sounding the more they'll dislike you.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: I always wear gloves when I wash my hands. That's also how I make love, and if you buy now I'll throw in an extra bar of soap for FREE.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The art of acceptance is the art of making someone who has just done you a small favor wish that he might have done you a greater one.
Author: Martin Luther King

Quote: Success ... seems to be connected with action. Successful men keep moving. They make mistakes, but they don't quit.
Author: Conrad Hilton

Quote: And think not you can direct the course of love, for love, if it finds you worthy, directs your course.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: Man must evolve for all human conflict a method which rejects revenge, aggression and retaliation. The foundation of such a method is love.
Author: Martin Luther King

Quote: At the end of the day, the most overwhelming key to a child's success is the positive involvement of parents.
Author: Jane D. Hull

Quote: Though money cannot acquire you happiness, it does not mean that both money and happiness cannot exist together.
Author: Stephen Richards
Origin: Think Your way to Success: Let Your Dreams Run Free

Quote: It is the absence of facts that frightens people: the gap you open, into which they pour their fears, fantasies, desires.
Author: Hilary Mantel

Quote: The irony of life is that those who wear masks often tell us more truths than those with open faces.
Author: Marie Lu

Quote: Lucky people will focus on what's in front of them rather than scrabbling about for what they're searching for.
Author: Steve Backley
Origin: The Champion in all of Us: 12 Rules for Success

Quote: You don't need batteries for an introduction. Buy my Networking in a Box today and see for yourself. (Handshakes sold separately.)
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Any kind of novelty or excitement drives up dopamine in the brain, and dopamine is associated with romantic love.
Author: Helen Fisher

Quote: One swallow does not make a summer, neither does one fine day; similarly one day or brief time of happiness does not make a person entirely happy.
Author: Aristotle

Quote: I love you. It hurts more than anything ever has, but I do. So don't you dare tell me I don't. Don't you ever say it again!
Author: Jenny Downham

Quote: I saw a bottle of conditioner the other day that said, "Family Size, "and I thought, That's odd, I didn't know too many families showered together.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: There are Two Typos of People in This World: Those Who Can Edit and Those Who Can't

Quote: [The decay of Logic results from an] untroubled assumption that the particular is real and the universal is not.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: The people I distrust most are those who want to improve our lives but have only one course of action.
Author: Frank Herbert

Quote: Science is an organized pursuit of triviality. Art is a casual pursuit of significance. Let's keep it in perspective.
Author: Vera Nazarian

Quote: I think what is important for things to be funny is if you the listener, or the reader, get a chance to supply the humor of it yourself.
Author: Ian Frazier

Quote: Goodbyes are only for those who love with their eyes. Because for those who love with heart and soul there is no such thing as separation.
Author: Rumi

Quote: We have not reached the consensus that to eat is a basic human right. This is an ethical crisis. This is a crisis of faith.
Author: Jean- Bertrand Aristide
Origin: Eyes of the Heart: Seeking a Path for the Poor in the Age of Globalization

Quote: You cannot live a nonviolent life as long as you are consuming violence. Please consider going vegan.
Author: Gary L. Francione

Quote: There's no one particular road that will lead you to success. I think everybody will find it differently.
Author: Marina and the Diamonds

Quote: I think humor is a very serious thing. I use it as a way of weakening the reader's defenses so that I can more easily take him to something more.
Author: William Collins

Quote: Movies become art after editing. Instead of just reproducing reality, they juxtapose images of it. That implies expression; that's art.
Author: Alejandro Gonzalez Inarritu

Quote: We think a wise person is someone who solves problems. Truth is, a wise person is someone who avoids problems.
Author: Prem Rawat

Quote: Most of the propositions and questions to be found in philosophical works are not false but nonsensical.
Author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

Quote: If the ignorance of nature gave birth to such a variety of gods, the knowledge of this nature is calculated to destroy them.
Author: Paul Henri Thiry d' Holbach

Quote: Sir, I admit your general rule, That every poet is a fool, But you yourself may serve to show it, That every fool is not a poet.
Author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge

Quote: Sunshine, if I ever disappear, please tell people that I ran after the Devil, trying to get my soul back.
Author: April Genevieve Tucholke
Origin: Between the Devil and the Deep Blue Sea

Quote: I have studied the astrological musings of the mystics, and I can conclude one thing: of all things cosmic, bowling is the best.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Suddenly it was too hard to be in his presence, too painful to know that he would belong to someone else.
Author: Julia Quinn

Quote: A woman, especially if she have the misfortune of knowing anything, should conceal it as well as she can.
Author: Jane Austen

Quote: To choose doubt as a philosophy of life is akin to choosing immobility as a means of transportation.
Author: Yann Martel

Quote: Earl Nightingale has inspired more people toward success and fortune than any other motivational speaker on the planet.
Author: Zig Ziglar

Quote: There is nothing more beautiful than someone who goes out of their way to make life beautiful for others.
Author: Mandy Hale
Origin: The Single Woman: Life, Love, and a Dash of Sass

Quote: The moral is that a career can be gone in an instant. And all you have in this world are the people you love.
Author: Ice Cube

Quote: The quality of a man's life is in direct proportion to his commitment to excellence, regardless of his chosen field of endeavor.
Author: Vince Lombardi Jr.

Quote: What is it you most dislike? Stupidity, especially in its nastiest forms of racism and superstition.
Author: Christopher Hitchens

Quote: Guarding knowledge is not a good way to understand. Understanding means to throw away your knowledge.
Author: Hanh Nhat Thich

Quote: Her dancing inspires me to move. I used to be like a statue, and now I am more like a mannequin. So much more fashionable, you know?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Without freedom, no art; art lives only on the restraints it imposes on itself, and dies of all others.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: I think a cool #startup would be a company that makes Finish line tape, for marathons. In the long run, it could be very profitable.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There is a candle in your heart, ready to be kindled. There is a void in your soul, ready to be filled. You feel it, don't you?
Author: Rumi

Quote: I'm not gonna give the British Government the joy of keeping taxing me. They don't tax art. And all my cars are just a collection of art.
Author: Jay Kay

Quote: I always look like I'm lying. I was born with a politician's face. You'll know I'm in love when I have a Vote For Me look in my eyes.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I am the washing machine of love. And if you have no idea what I mean, maybe it's time to let some laundry into your life.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When we are dealing with death we are constantly being dragged down by the event: Humor diverts our attention and lifts our sagging spirits.
Author: Allen Klein

Quote: Becoming well known (at least among your prospects & connections) is the most valuable element in the connection process.
Author: Jeffrey Gitomer

Quote: Dignity, and even holiness too, sometimes, are more questions of coat and waistcoat than some people imagine.
Author: Charles Dickens

Quote: When the writing is good, a book becomes a mirror. The reader will see an uncanny familiarity and respond accordingly.
Author: Jen Knox

Quote: This will never be a civilized country until we expend more money for books than we do for chewing gum.
Author: Elbert Hubbard

Quote: I ate a rainbow in a bowl, because it's better than eating rain soup. Food and water aren't supposed to be one and the same.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: So many chairs, and no time to sit

Quote: It really seems to me that in the midst of great tragedy, there is always the horrible possibility that something terribly funny will happen.
Author: Philip K. Dick

Quote: Any person who, with all the sincerity of heart, is in search for God, on land or in the sea, is worthy of respect.
Author: Riaz Ahmed Gohar Shahi

Quote: If a man is to shed the light of the sun upon other men, he must first of all have it within himself.
Author: Romain Rolland

Quote: My point is that love is the most powerful motivator in the world. It spurs mortals to greatness. Their noblest, bravest acts are done for love.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: Be compassionate ... and take responsibility for each other. If we only learned those lessons, this world would be a better place.
Author: Mitch Albom

Quote: And I'll tell her that I don't want my life to be samples and scraps. A taste of everything but a meal of nothing.
Author: Ally Condie

Quote: When you cultivate a godly thought life your soul will shine and you will exhibit the presence of the Lord in you.
Author: Elizabeth George

Quote: The task of the modern era was the realization and humanization of God - the transformation and dissolution of theology into anthropology.
Author: Ludwig Feuerbach
Origin: Principles of the Philosophy of the Future

Quote: The great thing about falling apart, is that you get to decide how to put yourself back together. Make good choices.
Author: Stacie Hammond

Quote: It's a big theme in my life, learning about myself and being a better person. I'm a work in progress; I have revelations every day.
Author: Rick Rubin

Quote: I know how syrupy this sounds, how dull, provincial, and possibly whitewashed, but what can I do? Happy childhoods happen
Author: Marisa de los Santos

Quote: There is something beautiful about all scars of whatever nature. A scar means the hurt is over, the wound is closed and healed, done with.
Author: Harry Crews

Quote: Can't you see? Every step I have taken, since I was that child on the bridge, has been to bring myself closer to you.
Author: Arthur Golden

Quote: Books should go where they will be most appreciated, and not sit unread, gathering dust on a forgotten shelf, don't you agree?
Author: Christopher Paolini

Quote: A Dragon Rose is a flying flower that breathes fire. A relationship isn't truly a romance if there isn't a tiny element of danger involved.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: He would ask nothing else from life if he would be allowed to protect and cherish her for the rest of his.
Author: Julie Anne Long
Origin: What I Did For a Duke

Quote: With words at your disposal, you can see more clearly. Finding the words is another step in learning to see.
Author: Robin Wall Kimmerer

Quote: At church, during communion, they give out free wine. Whoa! Talk about a great place to drink and meet women.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Bad art has the power to deform a people just as good art generates new reflection, growth, vision, and hope.
Author: Michel O'Brien

Quote: It is better, I think, to grab at the stars than to sit flustered because you know you cannot reach them.
Author: R.A. Salvatore

Quote: Love is the delightful interval between meeting a beautiful girl and discovering that she looks like a haddock.
Author: John Barrymore

Quote: Every tomorrow has two handles. We can take hold of it with the handle of anxiety or the handle of faith.
Author: Henry Ward Beecher

Quote: I'm a success today because I had a friend who believed in me and I didn't have the heart to let him down.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: Do you think we can be friends?" I asked. He stared up at the ceiling. "Probably not, but we can pretend.
Author: Priya Ardis

Quote: Before I could turn to look up, a voice boomed from the heavens: "What the heck is going on down there?
Author: Kat Falls

Quote: She said she loved me, and I believed her, because she was looking directly at another man when she said it.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Kill your darlings, kill your darlings, even when it breaks your egocentric little scribbler's heart, kill your darlings.
Author: Stephen King
Origin: On Writing: A Memoir of the Craft

Quote: I think hip-hop does a very good job of infusing comedy and humor and wit into music, a lot more than other genres.
Author: Carrie Brownstein

Quote: As contraries are known by contraries, so is the delights of presence best known by the torments of absence.
Author: Alcibiades

Quote: How could I be sleeping with this particular man.... Surely only true love could justify my lack of taste.
Author: Margaret Atwood

Quote: With no reason to hide these words I feel, and no reason to talk about the books I read, but still, I do.
Author: Morrissey

Quote: There is something pagan in me that I cannot shake off. In short, I deny nothing, but doubt everything.
Author: George Gordon Byron

Quote: So I placed my heart under lock and key To take some time, and take care of me But I turn around and you're standing here
Author: Deborah Cox

Quote: I think it's hard to learn democracy when we make children prisoners until they're nineteen years old.
Author: Mimsy Sadofsky

Quote: Two possibilities exist: either we are alone in the Universe or we are not. Both are equally terrifying.
Author: Arthur C. Clarke

Quote: Cynicism places the cynic at the center seat of judgement with the self appointed authority to criticize and condemn.
Author: Jayce O'Neal

Quote: I stood still, vision blurring, and in that moment, I heard my heart break. It was a small, clean sound, like the snapping of a flower's stem.
Author: Diana Gabaldon

Quote: I've come to realize that sometimes, what you love most is what you have to fight the hardest to keep.
Author: Kirsten Hubbard

Quote: To get people to notice you, you must be unique. If I were invisible, everybody would see me for who I am as a person.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I hope I inspire people who hear. Hearing people have the ability to remove barriers that prevent deaf people from achieving their dreams.
Author: Marlee Matlin

Quote: Sometimes it takes a heartbreak to shake us awake & help us see we are worth so much more than we're settling for.
Author: Mandy Hale
Origin: The Single Woman: Life, Love, and a Dash of Sass

Quote: If our Founding Fathers wanted us to care about the rest of the world, they wouldn't have declared their independence from it.
Author: Stephen Colbert

Quote: Soul mate romance dissolves the superficial and touches your deepest heart with the delightful power of love.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: I like to imagine that, on the day after my last, my library and I will crumble together, so that even when I am no more I'll still be with my books.
Author: Alberto Manguel

Quote: Man's naked form belongs to no particular moment in history; it is eternal, and can be looked upon with joy by the people of all ages.
Author: Auguste Rodin

Quote: We read each other through our eyes, and anatomically they are an extension of our brains. When we catch someone's eye, we look into a mind.
Author: Siri Hustvedt

Quote: Don't be too timid and squeamish about your actions. All life is an experiment. The more experiments you make the better.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
Origin: Journals of Ralph Waldo Emerson, with Annotations - 1841-1844

Quote: I would pour you a glass of wine, but wouldn't it be more romantic if you sipped it out of my armpit?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Story That Talks about Talking Is Like Chatter to Chattering Teeth, and Every Set of Dentures Can Attest to the Fact That No..

Quote: The most important thing in the Olympic Games is not winning but taking part; the essential thing in life is not conquering but fighting well.
Author: Pierre de Coubertin

Quote: She wanted to lose herself in him. To tie his arms around her like a tourniquet. If she showed him how much she needed him, he'd run away.
Author: Rainbow Rowell

Quote: I don't call you handsome, sir, though I love you most dearly: far too dearly to flatter you. Don't flatter me.
Author: Charlotte Bronte

Quote: Being taken for granted can be a compliment. It means that you've become a comfortable, trusted element in another person's life.
Author: Joyce Brothers

Quote: A fridge will keep your steaks fresh, but keeping a live cow in grandmother's room will keep the meat fresher. Let this be a lesson in love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When I saw you, I saw love. When I saw you naked, I saw lust. When I saw you with my clone in a dream, I saw the future.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Love is scary: it changes; it can go away. That's the part of the risk. I don't want to be scared anymore.
Author: Jenny Han
Origin: To All the Boys I've Loved Before

Quote: People don't like to think, if one thinks, one must reach conclusions. Conclusions are not always pleasant.
Author: Helen Keller

Quote: I am only responsible for my own heart, you offered yours up for the smashing my darling. Only a fool would give out such a vital organ
Author: Anaïs Nin

Quote: No school can supply an anti-liberal education, or a fascist education, as these terms are contradictory. Liberalism and education are one.
Author: George Seldes

Quote: Know from whence you came. If you know whence you came, there are absolutely no limitations to where you can go.
Author: James Baldwin

Quote: I'm very happy with my life. I am what I am. I don't worry about anything that I can't control. That's a really good lesson in life.
Author: Tom Watson

Quote: Civilized men are more discourteous than savages because they know they can be impolite without having their skulls split, as a general thing.
Author: Robert E. Howard

Quote: Your life experience is a moving picture, of which you are writer, director, performer, producer and critic.
Author: T.F. Hodge
Origin: From Within I Rise: Spiritual Triumph Over Death and Conscious Encounters with "The Divine Presence"

Quote: I don't want to take revenge or teach you a lesson, but you will bear the consequences of your actions by losing me.
Author: Sudeep Nagarkar
Origin: It Started With a Friend Request

Quote: The truth is, going against the internal stream of ignorance is way more rebellious than trying to start some sort of cultural revolution.
Author: Noah Levine

Quote: Emotion resulting from a work of art is only of value when it is not obtained by sentimental blackmail.
Author: Jean Cocteau

Quote: Probably it is impossible for humor to be ever a revolutionary weapon. Candide can do little more than generate irony.
Author: Lionel Trilling

Quote: No brain at all, some of them [people], only grey fluff that's blown into their heads by mistake, and they don't Think.
Author: A.A. Milne

Quote: The difference between successful people and really successful people is that really successful people say no to almost everything.
Author: Warren Buffett

Quote: There is something simply beautiful and simply innocent, in being human. It is just so innocent and beautiful. I love it.
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: My life is but a firefly's flicker, so I'd better use my brief moment to light up the darkness that covers her path.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When you think about Dada and the great moments in Modern Art, it's always the sense of when you're not sure that art is most likely to be occurring.
Author: Richard Phillips

Quote: I asked her if I was black or white. She replied "You are a human being. Educate yourself or you'll be a nobody!
Author: James McBride
Origin: The Color of Water: A Black Man's Tribute to His White Mother

Quote: That it would always be summer and autumn, and you always courting me, and always thinking as much of me as you have done through the past summertime!
Author: Thomas Hardy

Quote: ...and the vessel was not full, his intellect was not satisfied, his soul was not at peace, his heart was not still.
Author: Hermann Hesse

Quote: To know that we know what we know, and to know that we do not know what we do not know, that is true knowledge.
Author: Nicolaus Copernicus

Quote: I think books are like people, in the sense that they'll turn up in your life when you most need them.
Author: Emma Thompson

Quote: Proclaim your pride and bitterness loudly to the world, but to me speak softly, and tell me simply that she doesn't love you.
Author: Edmond Rostand

Quote: Books must be treated with respect, we feel that in our bones, because words have power. Bring enough words together they can bend space and time.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: I feel robbing a bank would be the highest form of performance art. No need to pay to see me work. The Federal Reserve is subsidizing it.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: As in nature, as in art, so in grace; it is rough treatment that gives souls, as well as stones, their luster.
Author: Thomas Guthrie

Quote: I would know you anywhere for my true love. Whoever I was and whoever you were, I would know you at once for my true love.
Author: Philippa Gregory

Quote: We might be wise to follow the insight of the enraptured heart rather than the more cautious reasoning of the theological mind.
Author: A.W. Tozer

Quote: He understood the way that you could sometimes fall right into them, as if each page was a hole into another world.
Author: George R.R. Martin

Quote: Lots of people want to ride with you in the limo, but what you want is someone who will take the bus with you when the limo breaks down.
Author: Oprah Winfrey

Quote: I'm living by example by continuing on with my career and having a full, rich life, and I am incidentally gay.
Author: Portia de Rossi

Quote: The measure of a person's strength is not his muscular power or strength, but it is his flexibility and adaptability.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Most people gaze neither into the past nor the future; they explore neither truth nor lies. They gaze at the television.
Author: Radiohead

Quote: Compassion is all inclusive. Compassion knows no boundaries. Compassion comes with awareness, and awareness breaks all narrow territories.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: It is not as a child that I believe and confess Jesus Christ. My hosanna is born of a furnace of doubt.
Author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

Quote: Success is not built on success. It's built on failure. It's built on frustration. Sometimes its built on catastrophe.
Author: Sumner Redstone

Quote: There is no greater power than that of a laugh and happiness is a force which can save a person from the horrors of the world.
Author: Hillary DePiano
Origin: The Love of Three Oranges: A Play for the Theatre That Takes the Commedia Dell'arte of Carlo Gozzi and Updates It for the New Millennium

Quote: It's not strength, it's PERCEPTION that makes you stronger. If you change how you SEE it, you'll change how you FEEL about it.
Author: Yvonne Pierre
Origin: The Day My Soul Cried: A Memoir

Quote: It is said that your life flashes before your eyes just before you die. That is true, it's called Life.
Author: Terry Pratchett

Quote: Even the ocean waves take their hellos to the people all the time. I should take my hellos down to the beach and sell waves to the tourists.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Yeah. I mean, acknowledging is easy. Something happened or it didn't. But understanding... that's where things get sticky.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: When you've learned to laugh at the things that should be laughed at, and not to laugh at those that shouldn't, you've got wisdom and understanding.
Author: L.M. Montgomery

Quote: In the long run what people think about shepherds and bakers becomes more important for them than their own destinies.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: There is no stress. It is a misinterpretation of a situation. Just change your perception and stress will melt away.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: The difference between a successful person and others is not a lack of strength, not a lack of knowledge, but rather a lack in will.
Author: Vince Lombardi Jr.

Quote: The lampshade on my head is for my bright ideas. I won't be able to convey them until Monday, when my curtain gets out of the dry cleaners.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: You may be the only person left who believes in you, but it's enough. It takes just one star to pierce a universe of darkness. Never give up.
Author: Richelle E. Goodrich
Origin: Smile Anyway: Quotes, Verse, & Grumblings for Every Day of the Year

Quote: You do not give your precious body to the billy clubs of Birmingham sheriffs, nor to the insidious activity of the streets.
Author: Ta- Nehisi Coates

Quote: People are more difficult to work with than machines. And when you break a person, he can't be fixed.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: Fiction is like a spider's web, attached ever so lightly perhaps, but still attached to life at all four corners.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: If it is nothingness that awaits us, let us make an injustice of it; let us fight against destiny, even though without hope of victory.
Author: Miguel de Unamuno

Quote: I didn't want to spoil the mood. This was probably the longest Daemon and I had ever spoken without some statement earning him the finger.
Author: Jennifer L. Armentrout

Quote: You can understand nothing about art, particularly modern art, if you do not understand that imagination is a value in itself.
Author: Milan Kundera

Quote: To live, to TRULY live, we must be willing to RISK. To be nothing in order to find everything. To leap before we look.
Author: Mandy Hale
Origin: The Single Woman: Life, Love, and a Dash of Sass

Quote: It's so hard to forget pain, but it's even harder to remember sweetness. We have no scar to show for happiness. We learn so little from peace.
Author: Chuck Palahniuk

Quote: Why do people say "grow some balls"? Balls are weak and sensitive. If you wanna be tough, grow a vagina. Those things can take a pounding.
Author: Sheng Wang

Quote: I keep my friends as misers do their treasure, because, of all the things granted us by wisdom, none is greater or better than friendship.
Author: Pietro Aretino

Quote: When people tell you that you are good for nothing, remember that God made the world from nothing and nothing can change into something anytime.
Author: Luffina Lourduraj

Quote: You can't substitute material things for love or for gentleness or for tenderness or for a sense of comradeship
Author: Mitch Albom

Quote: Finding one important thing in your life doesn't mean you have to give up all the other important things.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: I am in an altogether new world now. I can think of nothing more wonderful. It is a real touch of all that heaven means.
Author: Laura Hillenbrand
Origin: Unbroken: A World War II Story of Survival, Resilience, and Redemption

Quote: I don't want to make love last, I want to make love second to last. The last thing we'll do is cuddle.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Women should have nipples on their butts. From a design perspective, I think it would revolutionize the fashion industry.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Don't only practice your art, but force your way into its secrets, for it and knowledge can raise men to the divine.
Author: Ludwig van Beethoven

Quote: I've been fighting to be who I am all my life. What's the point of being who I am, if I can't have the person who was worth all the fighting for?
Author: Stephanie Lennox

Quote: People often say that motivation doesn't last. Well, neither does bathing - that's why we recommend it daily.
Author: Zig Ziglar

Quote: Four years of football are calculated to breed in the average man more of the ingredients of success in life than almost any academic course he takes.
Author: Knute Rockne

Quote: She's not a pothead. That thing on her neck is a vase. And anyway, I'm all for legalization. After all, why should surrealism be illegal?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I would rather be a superb meteor, every atom of me in magnificent glow, than a sleepy and permanent planet.
Author: Jack London

Quote: Over the years, I had nurtured the hope to be able to fly; to handle a machine as it rose higher and higher in the stratosphere was my dearest dream.
Author: A. P. J. Abdul Kalam

Quote: Conjugal love, or the friendship of spouses, can persist even after sexual desires have weakened, withered, and disappeared.
Author: Mortimer Adler

Quote: Sometimes you need a little crisis to get your adrenaline flowing and help you realize your potential.
Author: Jeannette Walls

Quote: Sometimes it's the same moments that take your breath away that breathe purpose and love back into your life.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: I've always been really dark, and drawn to darker humor. Nothing has been forced, and I don't say anything for shock value.
Author: Amy Schumer

Quote: Success or failure in business is caused more by the mental attitude even than by mental capacities.
Author: Walter Scott

Quote: You have reached the pinnacle of success as soon as you become uninterested in money, compliments, or publicity.
Author: Thomas Wolfe

Quote: The love which moves the world, according to common Christian belief, is God's love and the love of God.
Author: Mortimer Adler

Quote: One must always be careful of books, "said Tessa, "and what is inside them, for words have the power to change us.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: I think art is not an ornament or refinement at the fringes of human intelligence, I think it's at the center. It's at the core.
Author: Robert Pinsky

Quote: People will find transformation and transcendence in a McDonald's hash brown if it's all they've got.
Author: Patton Oswalt

Quote: Yesterday we obeyed kings and bent our necks before emperors. But today we kneel only to truth, follow only beauty, and obey only love.
Author: Kahlil Gibran
Origin: The Vision: Reflections on the Way of the Soul

Quote: Real courage is when you know you're licked before you begin, but you begin anyway and see it through no matter what.
Author: Harper Lee

Quote: If you hear how wonderful you are often enough, you begin to believe it, no matter how you try to resist it.
Author: Ben Carson

Quote: I can't give you a sure-fire formula for success, but I can give you a formula for failure: try to please everybody all the time.
Author: Herbert Bayard Swope

Quote: Are we biology or God or something higher? I know my heart beats and I listen to it. The beat is biology, but what is the song?
Author: James Frey

Quote: God is never tired of bringing the sun out every morning, taking it in the evenings and bringing out the moon.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: Do not let another day go by where your dedication to other people's opinions is greater than your dedication to your own emotions!
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: I wouldn't burden any decent system of faith by participating in it... I'm not agnostic. Just nonpartisan. Theological Switzerland, that's me.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: I would much rather be considered wise than smart. But, I still think it is wise to get an education.
Author: Destiny Booze

Quote: It is only goodness which gives extras, and so I say again that we have much to hope from the flowers.
Author: Arthur Conan Doyle

Quote: Dreams do come true, if only we wish hard enough. You can have anything in life if you will sacrifice everything else for it.
Author: J.M. Barrie

Quote: No book can ever be finished. While working on it we learn just enough to find it immature the moment we turn away from it
Author: Karl Popper

Quote: I am hopeful, though not full of hope, and the only reason I don't believe in happy endings is because I don't believe in endings.
Author: Edward Abbey
Origin: Postcards from Ed: Dispatches and Salvos from an American Iconoclast

Quote: You can't go into new life experiences without the understanding that yeah, you may fail, but knowing you might fail can't stop you from trying.
Author: Alice Dreger

Quote: You never know how much you really believe anything until its truth or falsehood becomes a matter of life and death to you.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: The first time you see something that you have never seen before, you almost always know right away if you should eat it or run away from it.
Author: Scott Adams

Quote: What I really want out of life is to discover something new: something mankind didn't know was possible to do.
Author: Elizabeth Holmes

Quote: Small wonder that spell means both a story told, and a formula of power over living men. -On Fairy Stories
Author: JRR Tolkien

Quote: Blunders, no, only friendship binds us to honesty - attracting crypts of mushrooms in the wake of our snowboards.
Author: Bradley Chicho

Quote: Let me tell ya. You gotta pay attention to signs. When life reaches out with a moment like this it's a sin if you don't reach back... I'm telling you.
Author: Matthew Quick

Quote: Everywhere I go, I am asked if I think university stifles writers. My opinion is that it doesn't stifle enough of them.
Author: Flannery O'Connor

Quote: We are like chameleons, we take our hue and the color of our moral character, from those who are around us.
Author: John Locke

Quote: Why anybody gets my sense of humor I never know, but I do know that when they do, I keep them as close as I possibly can.
Author: Joss Whedon

Quote: We must be willing to let go of the life we have planned, so as to have the life that is waiting for us.
Author: E. M. Forster

Quote: And that's what art is, a form in which people can reflect on who we are as human beings and come to some understanding of this journey we are on.
Author: Wendell Pierce

Quote: I don't know what good it is to know so much and be smart as whips and all if it doesn't make you happy.
Author: J.D. Salinger

Quote: I think having land and not ruining it is the most beautiful art that anybody could ever want to own.
Author: Andy Warhol

Quote: As water changes its shape according to the shape of the vessel, I change myself by changing my thoughts.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: It was unhealthy to get too attached. Such things were best reserved for people who had a life expectancy
Author: Matthew S. Williams

Quote: I am not afraid of tomorrow for I have seen yesterday, I have today and I know Him who holds tomorrow so I know tomorrow will be beautiful for me.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: Though my soul may set in darkness, it will rise in perfect light; I have loved the stars too fondly to be fearful of the night.
Author: Sarah Williams
Origin: Twilight Hours: A Legacy of Verse

Quote: I would not have you descend into your own dream. I would have you be a conscious citizen of this terrible and beautiful world.
Author: Ta- Nehisi Coates

Quote: What the world stigmatizes as romantic is often more nearly allied to the truth than is commonly supposed.
Author: Anne Brontë

Quote: You realize that trying to keep your distance from me will not lessen my affection for you. All efforts to save me from you will fail.
Author: John Green

Quote: If you keep thinking about what you want to do or what you hope will happen, you don't do it, and it won't happen.
Author: Desiderius Erasmus

Quote: ...there remained a strange formality between them, and her pleasure in his presence felt too much like missing him had felt during the last week.
Author: Robin McKinley

Quote: If there's a golf course in heaven, I hope it's like Augusta National. I just don't want an early tee time.
Author: Gary Player

Quote: Stop trying to be less of who you are. Let this time in your life cut you open and drain all of the things that are holding you back.
Author: Jennifer Elisabeth
Origin: Born Ready: Unleash Your Inner Dream Girl

Quote: He was an introverted kid, so I didn't send him to his room as punishment. No, I took him to a party.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: About here, she thought, dabbling her fingers in the water, a ship had sunk, and she muttered, dreamily half asleep, how we perished, each alone.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: We travel to see the reflection of our minds on the mirror of changes so that we may enrich ourselves.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Each time you say hello to a stranger, your heart acknowledges over and over again that we are all family.
Author: Suzy Kassem

Quote: Your soul is oftentimes a battlefield, upon your reason and your judgment wage war against your passion and your appetite.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: I had a microscopic eye for the blemish, for the grain of ugliness which to me constituted the sole beauty of the object.
Author: Henry Miller

Quote: Love does not consist of gazing at each other, but in looking outward together in the same direction.
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: When you are missing someone, time seems to move slower, and when I'm falling in love with someone, time seems to be moving faster.
Author: Taylor Swift

Quote: No art is less spontaneous than mine. What I do is the result of reflection and the study of the great masters.
Author: Edgar Degas

Quote: Love leads people to become lost in their own feelings and ignore the world, so it's no surprise their love for the world goes unrequited.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: Oh, sweetie, I'm sorry, you can't have a baby brother, because that would mean that Daddy had sex, and that's never going to happen again.
Author: Christopher Moore

Quote: For me, religion is like a rhinoceros: I don't have one, and I'd really prefer not to be trampled by yours.
Author: Silas Sparkhammer

Quote: Going to church doesn't make you a Christian any more than going to a garage makes you an automobile.
Author: Billy Sunday
Origin: Billy Sunday, the Man and His Message: With His Own Words Which Have Won Thousands for Christ

Quote: Nothing is generous. New knowledge is a valuable commodity. The more truth we have to work with, the richer we are.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: You should never assume. You know what happens when you assume. You make an ass out of you and me because that's how it's spelled.
Author: Ellen DeGeneres

Quote: Without God, life has no purpose, and without purpose, life has no meaning. Without meaning, life has no significance or hope.
Author: Rick Warren
Origin: The Purpose Driven Life: What on Earth Am I Here for?

Quote: Silent pictures show us how we lived and what our attitudes were. And as an art form, they can be wonderfully entertaining and often inspirational.
Author: Kevin Brownlow

Quote: We feel that even if all possible scientific questions be answered, the problems of life have still not been touched at all.
Author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

Quote: Libraries will get you through times of no money better than money will get you through times of no libraries.
Author: Anne Herbert

Quote: When each day is the same as the next, it's because people fail to recognize the good things that happen in their lives every day that the sun rises.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Women that can work a camera with ease often work men just as effortlessly for both require the same commitment to vanity and manipulation.
Author: Tiffany Madison

Quote: I've forgotten most of what I've read and, frankly, it never seemed very important to me or to the world.
Author: Leonard Cohen

Quote: It doesn't matter how wealthy you may be in material things, what matters is do you know what to do with those wealth?
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: Experience has shown, and a true philosophy will always show, that a vast, perhaps the larger, portion of truth arises from the seemingly irrelevant.
Author: Edgar Allan Poe

Quote: On your quest to spirituality it is often required to suspend your rationality; but true spirituality asks that you enhance your rationality.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Seven times have I despised my soul: The sixth time when she despised the ugliness of a face, and knew not that it was one of her own masks.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: Tomorrow is a new day; begin it well and serenely and with too high a spirit to be encumbered with your old nonsense.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: My mother is my friend who shares with me her bread all my hopelessness cured! Her company makes me secured!
Author: Israelmore Ayivor
Origin: The Great Hand Book of Quotes

Quote: I was smiling yesterday, I am smiling today and I will smile tomorrow. Simply because life is too short to cry for anything.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: The topic of compassion is not at all religious business; it is important to know it is human business, it is a question of human survival.
Author: Dalai Lama XIV

Quote: My concern is not whether God is on our side; my greatest concern is to be on God's side, for God is always right.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: Don't you think it's better to be extremely happy for a short while, even if you lose it, than to be just okay for your whole life?
Author: Audrey Niffenegger

Quote: Three things in human life are important: the first is to be kind; the second is to be kind; and the third is to be kind.
Author: Henry James

Quote: Science is like sex: sometimes something useful comes out, but that is not the reason we are doing it.
Author: Richard Feynman

Quote: Only those who have learned the power of sincere and selfless contribution experience life's deepest joy: true fulfillment.
Author: Tony Robbins

Quote: I think people should have fun. And don't get so down on yourself. Enjoy life and be the best person you can be.
Author: Keke Palmer

Quote: Money cannot buy peace of mind. It cannot heal ruptured relationships, or build meaning into a life that has none.
Author: Richard M. DeVos

Quote: To learn is not to know; there are the learners and the learned. Memory makes the one, philosophy the others.
Author: Alexandre Dumas

Quote: you might want to decide fast. We live in a dangerous world. If you see a chance to be happy, you have to fight for it, so later you have no regrets.
Author: Ilona Andrews

Quote: At that moment, the urge to be writing was stronger than any notion she had of what she might write.
Author: Ian McEwan

Quote: Schools are a fountain of knowledge: some students come to drink , some to sip and others just to gargle.
Author: Shiv Khera
Origin: You Can Win: A Step by Step Tool for Top Achievers

Quote: His priority did not seem to be to teach them what he knew, but rather to impress upon them that nothing, not even... knowledge, was foolproof.
Author: J.K. Rowling
Origin: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix

Quote: Whoever loves becomes humble. Those who love have , so to speak , pawned a part of their narcissism.
Author: Sigmund Freud

Quote: The sculptor produces the beautiful statue by chipping away such parts of the marble block as are not needed - it is a process of elimination.
Author: Elbert Hubbard

Quote: We ate well and cheaply and drank well and cheaply and slept well and warm together and loved each other.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: Honesty is the most single most important factor having a direct bearing on the final success of an individual, corporation, or product.
Author: Ed McMahon

Quote: My girlfriend bought me a collared shirt for my birthday, mainly so I don't get too far ahead of her when she takes me for a walk.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: What a blessing it is to love books as I love them;- to be able to converse with the dead, and to live amidst the unreal!
Author: Thomas Babington Macaulay
Origin: The Selected Letters Of Thomas Babington Macaulay

Quote: Accept whatever comes to you woven in the pattern of your destiny, for what could more aptly fit your needs?
Author: Marcus Aurelius

Quote: Reading furnishes the mind only with materials of knowledge; it is thinking that makes what we read ours.
Author: John Locke

Quote: Sport is one of the few spaces where people can learn about different cultures in a spirit of trust and friendship.
Author: Richard Attias

Quote: You can approach the act of writing with nervousness, excitement, hopefulness, or despair ... Come to it any way but lightly.
Author: Stephen King
Origin: On Writing: A Memoir of the Craft

Quote: It is important that when we make a resolution, or establish a goal, that we take the ACTION necessary to accomplish that goal.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: The Christian does not think God will love us because we are good, but that God will make us good because He loves us.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: I was just shy of reaching my goal. My goal was to be more extroverted, so being just shy meant I completely failed.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Once you can accept the universe as matter expanding into nothing that is something, wearing stripes with plaid comes easy.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: Although you may spend your life killing, You will not exhaust all your foes. But if you quell your own anger, your real enemy will be slain.
Author: Nagarjuna

Quote: If the person you are talking to doesn't appear to be listening, be patient. It may simply be that he has a small piece of fluff in his ear.
Author: A.A. Milne

Quote: I really do believe that God is love, one of deep affection and grace and forgiveness and inspiration.
Author: William P. Young

Quote: The greater part of our happiness or misery depends upon our dispositions, and not upon our circumstances.
Author: Martha Washington

Quote: Moral codes are like the ocean. Some people live by them, while others, such as myself, would rather live by a lake.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: There are Two Typos of People in This World: Those Who Can Edit and Those Who Can't
