Quote: Fidelity is a living, breathing entity. On wobbly footing, it can wander, becoming something different entirely.
Author: Kay Goodstadt

Quote: I know it's wrong - God, it's all kinds of wrong - but I just want to lie down with you and wake up with you, just once, just once ever in my life.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: We are not our mind or our thoughts. As long as we believe we are our mind, we are open to third party control.
Author: Joseph Rain

Quote: ...nothing wonderful lasted forever. Joy was as fleeting as a shooting star that crossed the evening sky, ready to blink out at any moment.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: I am no longer in love with her, that's certain, but maybe I love her. Love is so short, forgetting is so long.
Author: Pablo Neruda
Origin: Twenty Love Poems and a Song of Despair

Quote: Nervousness kill us... because we think we have only one opportunity that is in the Present and we don't think about the future! We loose our balance.
Author: Vikram Roy

Quote: It is not the possession of truth, but the success which attends the seeking after it, that enriches the seeker and brings happiness to him.
Author: Max Planck

Quote: The working class had imposed upon them a sterile and authoritarian educational system which mirrored the ethos of the corporate workplace.
Author: Anthony M. Platt

Quote: I hope to stand firm enough to not go backward, and yet not go forward fast enough to wreck the country's cause.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: Every sunrise is priceless and you can experience the richness that life holds only when you live life to the full instead of just being an onlooker.
Author: Stephen Richards
Origin: Think Your way to Success: Let Your Dreams Run Free

Quote: With every sunrise, I rise with joy. My heart dances with love. I begin a new life fresh like a flower.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: And this, our life, exempt from public haunt, finds tongues in trees, books in the running brooks, sermons in stones, and good in everything.
Author: William Shakespeare

Quote: If he loved with all the powers of his puny being, he couldn't love as much in eighty years as I could in a day.
Author: Emily Brontë

Quote: As you walk in God's divine wisdom, you will surely begin to see a greater measure of victory and good success in your life.
Author: Joseph Prince

Quote: In order to have faith in his own path, he does not need to prove that someone else's path is wrong.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Set your fantasies in the here and now and then, if challenged, claim to be writing Magical Realism.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: Children have never been very good at listening to their elders, but they have never failed to imitate them.
Author: James Baldwin

Quote: To catch affection, try being efficient by using a fishing net. You can't sit back and wait for romance to grow on trees.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: Good manners is the art of making those people easy with whom we converse. Whoever makes the fewest people uneasy is the best bred in the room.
Author: Jonathan Swift

Quote: When your only regret is if anyone thinks you regret anything - that is the definition of conviction.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: quote from Chase the Moon- Some people are just downright wicked, and sometimes evil wins - but not always.
Author: Lynn Hubbard

Quote: Remembering that you are going to die is the best way I know to avoid the trap of thinking you have something to lose.
Author: Steve Jobs

Quote: Your thoughts carry you wherever you want to go. Weak thoughts don't have the energy to carry you far!
Author: Israelmore Ayivor

Quote: It is a sad day when one looks back and sees that his largest regrets have become some of the most integral elements of his dreams.
Author: John Knowles

Quote: Life is to be lived, not controlled; and humanity is won by continuing to play in face of certain defeat.
Author: Ralph Ellison

Quote: Man is least himself when he talks in his own person. Give him a mask, and he will tell you the truth.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: A good problem is something you don't know how to solve. That's what makes it a good puzzle and a good opportunity.
Author: Paul Lockhart
Origin: A Mathematician's Lament: How School Cheats Us Out of Our Most Fascinating and Imaginative Art Form

Quote: If I were a mannequin, I'd know people would only want me for my body. But that's OK, because that's how it is now.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Friendship is also about liking a person for their failings, their weakness. It's also about mutual help, not about exploitation.
Author: Paul Theroux

Quote: There are a dozen views about everything until you know the answer. Then there's never more than one.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: I do not feel obliged to believe that the same God who has endowed us with sense, reason, and intellect has intended us to forgo their use.
Author: Galileo Galilei
Origin: Letter to the Grand Duchess Christina

Quote: Better than learning how to speak a foreign language, is to start speaking the truth. But few people will listen, because they just don't understand.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Too bad Americans can't export Awesome, because I have boxes and boxes of the stuff just lying around in my attic.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: Don't ask what the world needs. Ask what makes you come alive, and go do it. Because what the world needs is people who have come alive.
Author: Howard Thurman

Quote: I mined my mind, and I found no love. My heart is where excavation yields gold, and if you dig me as much as I dig you, we can both get rich.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: As comedians, we are all laughing because life is so horrible. Life is so difficult, and I cope with it by making jokes about absolutely everything.
Author: Joan Rivers

Quote: Half the world is composed of people who have something to say and can't, and the other half who have nothing to say and keep on saying it.
Author: Robert Frost

Quote: Sometimes you read a book so special that you want to carry it around with you for months after you've finished just to stay near it.
Author: Markus Zusak

Quote: In a world full of cruelty and hatred, be loving and kind so that you may transform the perception of life.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: If people did not love one another, I really don't see what use there would be in having any spring.
Author: Victor Hugo

Quote: Your job is to focus on my personal happiness, she said, & I've got big plans, so break time is over.
Author: Brian Andreas

Quote: Success isn't measured by money or power or social rank. Success is measured by your discipline and inner peace.
Author: Mike Ditka

Quote: Life is like yoga; the only way you can enjoy it is by relaxing into any position you happen to find yourself in.
Author: Jon Wakeham

Quote: It is in the knowledge of the genuine conditions of our lives that we must draw our strength to live and our reasons for living.
Author: Simone de Beauvoir

Quote: They say I'm old fashioned, and live in the past, but sometimes I think progress progresses too fast!
Author: Dr. Seuss

Quote: Look at everything always as though you were seeing it either for the first or last time: Thus is your time on earth filled with glory.
Author: Betty Smith

Quote: I do not, "I felt oddly appalled by her statement. "I'm an excellent liar. Ask my dentist. He swears I floss regularly.
Author: Darynda Jones

Quote: Blindly believing something often comes from societal conformity which is a sign of a lack of deep knowledge and imaginative consciousness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I think it [religion] is an art, the greatest one; an extension of the communion all the other arts attempt.
Author: Dodie Smith

Quote: Being dead wasn't supposed to hurt. Where was the fairness in that? If I was dead, the least the universe could do was make it painless
Author: Kiersten White

Quote: Well, I must endure the presence of a few caterpillars if I wish to become acquainted with the butterflies.
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: All humanity is one undivided and indivisible family. I cannot detach myself from the wickedest soul.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: There is nothing more notable in Socrates than that he found time, when he was an old man, to learn music and dancing, and thought it time well spent.
Author: Michel de Montaigne

Quote: Your path should be lighted with love and trust, your purpose should be clear, and your goal should be the light post.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Talent is a faucet. When it is on, one must write. Inspiration is a farce that poets have invented to give themselves importance.
Author: Jean Anouilh

Quote: A tragic irony of life is that we so often achieve success or financial independence after the chief reason for which we sought it has passed away.
Author: Ellen Glasgow

Quote: Have you noticed that whatever sport you're trying to learn, some earnest person is always telling you to keep your knees bent?
Author: Dave Barry

Quote: My feet are dense with dance. I move like I'm wearing concrete boots and I'm trying to tread water. If the music is salsa, I may start gargling.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: To understand life is to understand ourselves, and that is both the beginning and the end of education.
Author: Jiddu Krishnamurti
Origin: Education and the Significance of Life

Quote: Our memory is a more perfect world than the universe: it gives back life to those who no longer exist.
Author: Guy de Maupassant

Quote: I would like this to be a new day. I would hope now that we can focus on doing the people's business.
Author: Ernie Fletcher

Quote: Why did I hope we would be happy abroad? A change of environment is that traditional fallacy upon which doomed loves, and lungs, rely.
Author: Vladimir Nabokov

Quote: Love cannot be forced, love cannot be coaxed and teased. It comes out of heaven, unasked and unsought.
Author: Pearl S. Buck

Quote: The moment we cry in a film is not when things are sad but when they turn out to be more beautiful than we expected them to be.
Author: Alain de Botton

Quote: Some stories wait their turn to be told, others just tap you on the shoulder and insist you tell them.
Author: Michael Scott

Quote: what's right? If you want something, you have the right to take it. If you want to do something, you have the right to do it.
Author: Bret Easton Ellis

Quote: Oh what a wonderful soul so bright inside you. Got power to heal the sun's broken heart, power to restore the moon's vision too.
Author: Aberjhani
Origin: Songs from the Black Skylark zPed Music Player

Quote: Do you not see how necessary a world of pains and troubles is to school an intelligence and make it a soul?
Author: John Keats

Quote: I take no pride in hopeless longing; I wouldn't hold a stillborn aspiration. I'd want to have it, to make it, to live it.
Author: Ayn Rand

Quote: Love who you love while you have them. That's all you can do. Let them go when you must. If you know how to love, you'll never run out.
Author: Ann Brashares

Quote: Would you mind repeating that? I'm afraid I might have lost my wits altogether and just hallucinated what I've longed to hear.
Author: Jeaniene Frost

Quote: We dream to give ourselves hope. To stop dreaming - well, that's like saying you can never change your fate.
Author: Amy Tan

Quote: What childishness is it that while there's breath of life in our bodies, we are determined to rush to see the sun the other way around?
Author: Elizabeth Bishop

Quote: Human science fragments everything in order to understand it, kills everything in order to examine it.
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: Hide things everywhere. Forget about them. Find them randomly and feel surprised like a pirate finding buried treasure. Avoid scurvy. Love more.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Art is an invention of aesthetics, which in turn is an invention of philosophers... What we call art is a game.
Author: Octavio Paz

Quote: The humor section is the last place an author wants to be. They put your stuff next to collections of Cathy cartoons.
Author: David Sedaris

Quote: If you haven't the strength to impose your own terms upon life, then you must accept the terms it offers you.
Author: T.S. Eliot

Quote: The impossible could not have happened, therefore the impossible must be possible in spite of appearances.
Author: Agatha Christie

Quote: Enjoy the limitless bliss consciousness here and now. The reality of you lies much beyond your sensory perceptions and boundaries.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: I believe in the compelling power of love. I do not understand it. I believe it to be the most fragrant blossom of all this thorny existence.
Author: Theodore Dreiser

Quote: If we all worked on the assumption that what is accepted as true is really true, there would be little hope of advance.
Author: Orville Wright

Quote: Whatever belief we have actually stems from the thankfulness that we feel and this feeling further attracts more happy feelings towards us.
Author: Stephen Richards
Origin: Think Your way to Success: Let Your Dreams Run Free

Quote: Always set small, realistic goals that you know you can achieve first. But don't give up on the bigger ones that may seem too far from your reach.
Author: W.D. Lady

Quote: I would have been a black belt in Karate much sooner, but the store was sold out of Sharpie markers.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the story my great-grandfather told my father, who then told my grandfather, who then told me about how The Mythical Mr. Boo, Charles Manseur Fizzlebush Grissham III, better known as Mr. Fizzlebush, and Orafoura are all in fact me...

Quote: Clutching to your fading youth is like trying to hang on to a handful of smoke. Just breathe deeply and you'll be OK.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Life is a train that stops at no stations; you either jump abroad or stand on the platform and watch as it passes.
Author: Yasmina Khadra
Origin: Ce que le jour doit à la nuit

Quote: You cannot score a goal when you are sitting on the bench. To do so, you have to dress up and enter the game.
Author: Israelmore Ayivor

Quote: Walking the stacks in a library, dragging your fingers across the spines -- it's hard not to feel the presence of sleeping spirits.
Author: Robin Sloan

Quote: Failure is when you give up. A real winner is someone that doesn't give up, even when it feels like they are losing.
Author: Joshua Hartzell

Quote: I was born a heretic. I always distrusted people who know so much about what God wants them to do to their fellows.
Author: Susan B. Anthony

Quote: For all the books in his possession, he still failed to read the stories written plain as day in the faces of the people around him.
Author: Emma Donoghue

Quote: I never dreamed the sea so deep, The earth so dark; so long my sleep, I have become another child. I wake to see the world go wild.
Author: Allen Ginsberg

Quote: I believe that an art exhibition can be engaging, fun and deeply intellectually satisfying and serious. These are not contradictory concepts in art.
Author: Jeffrey Deitch

Quote: My family has been amazing, and they understand how blessed I am. They've been able to keep my sense of humor.
Author: Karen Duffy

Quote: There was something much greater she needed to feed her soul, and perhaps one day soon she would go...
Author: Danielle Steel

Quote: When Nelson Mandela walked free, the world sang with joy. Ever since, South Africa has stood as a beacon of hope for Africa.
Author: Ban Ki-moon

Quote: In the end, your past is not my past and your truth is not my truth and your solution - is not my solution.
Author: Zadie Smith

Quote: Knowledge subverts love: in proportion as we penetrate our secrets, we come to loathe our kind, precisely because they resemble us.
Author: Emil Cioran

Quote: The first method for estimating the intelligence of a ruler is to look at the men he has around him.
Author: Niccolò Machiavelli

Quote: I'll do humor about myself, I'll poke fun and everything, but that's me and I can do it to me. I think it's cruel to do it to somebody else.
Author: Delta Burke

Quote: Trust to some was placing all your insecurities and beliefs in one single person, and hoping he or she wouldn't squash them.
Author: Holly Hood

Quote: Books have to be read (worse luck, for it takes a long time); it is the only way of discovering what they contain.
Author: E.M. Forster

Quote: I can't die yet, doctor. Not yet. I have things to do. Afterwords I'll have a whole lifetime in which to die.
Author: Carlos Ruiz Zafón

Quote: She was ready to deny the existence of space and time rather than admit that love might not be eternal.
Author: Simone de Beauvoir

Quote: There is a difference between talented people and gifted people. Talented people are good AT something; Gifted people ARE that something.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: Happiness does not come from a job. It comes from knowing what you truly value, and behaving in a way that's consistent with those beliefs.
Author: Mike Rowe

Quote: Any word you have to hunt for in a thesaurus is the wrong word. There are no exceptions to this rule.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: ....but talking to a ghost about a demon when you're in a room full of people who can't see either of them is not to be recommended.
Author: Kerstin Gier

Quote: If you have a goal, write it down. If you do not write it down, you do not have a goal - you have a wish.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: All sacrifice and suffering is redemptive. It is used to either teach the individual or to help others. Nothing is by chance.
Author: A.J. Russell

Quote: You must not ever stop being whimsical. And you must not, ever, give anyone else the responsibility for your life.
Author: Mary Oliver

Quote: There are no things man was not meant to know. There are, perhaps, things man is too dumb to figure out, but that's a different problem.
Author: Michael Kurland

Quote: When in a relationship, a real man doesn't make his woman jealous of others, he makes others jealous of his woman.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: In my opinion, there are two things that can absolutely not be carried to the screen: the realistic presentation of the sexual act and praying to God.
Author: Orson Welles

Quote: People fear anyone who differs from what is considered normal, and in a small town the idea of normal can be as narrow as the streets.
Author: Elizabeth Chandler

Quote: I'm not good at talking. Can't I just nod my way through a conversation? It's better than nodding off.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: She asked me how I slept. Knowing she meant quality of sleep, I said I slept naked. It's true. Ask any of the joggers who saw me sleepwalking.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: anyone who's worth anything reads just what he likes, as the mood takes him, and with extravagant enthusiasm.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: The idea of authority, which they represented, was associated in our minds with a greater insight and a more humane wisdom.
Author: Erich Maria Remarque
Origin: All Quiet on the Western Front

Quote: It isn't for the moment you are struck that you need courage, but for that long uphill climb back to sanity and faith and security.
Author: Anne Morrow Lindbergh

Quote: I fell in love with her the moment she was late, though neither one of us knew it at the time because she hadn't arrived yet.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: I'd rather have cancer than a dishonest heart. Which isn't being pious. Just practical. Cancer may cool you, but the other's sure to.
Author: Truman Capote

Quote: You are not entitled to your opinion. You are entitled to your informed opinion. No one is entitled to be ignorant.
Author: Harlan Ellison

Quote: She walks in beauty, like the night of cloudless climes and starry skies; And all that's best of dark and bright meet in her aspect and her eyes...
Author: George Gordon Byron

Quote: It's true that laughter really is cheap medicine. It's a prescription anyone can afford. And best of all, you can fill it right now.
Author: Steve Goodier

Quote: The goal in life is not to try and live forever, but to create something that will forever in people's hearts.
Author: Karon Waddell

Quote: A relationship is a sales process, and sometimes you must buy to sell, and when you sell it is to the benefit of both of you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I never want you to deny anything about yourself because you have grown up thinking it's unacceptable or inconvenient for the people around you.
Author: Jennifer Elisabeth
Origin: Born Ready: Unleash Your Inner Dream Girl

Quote: And I sometimes think that a moment of touching is the difference between complete utter despair and the ability to carry on.
Author: Eleanor Cameron

Quote: There's truth and honor in a mustache. And that's why I started flying one on the flagpole outside of my house.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Titanic would never have sunk if it were made out of a sink.

Quote: America is the most grandiose experiment the world has seen, but, I am afraid, it is not going to be a success.
Author: Sigmund Freud

Quote: The problem with having a sense of humor is often that people you use it on aren't in a very good mood.
Author: Lou Holtz

Quote: There had to be dark and muddy waters so that the sun could have something to background it's flashing glory.
Author: Betty Smith

Quote: If I were not a physicist, I would probably be a musician. I often think in music. I live my daydreams in music. I see my life in terms of music.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: The certainty about the uncertain (in view to life) is that it will remain uncertain till the time its certain.
Author: Mayank Sharma

Quote: Poetry is not the most important thing in life... I'd much rather lie in a hot bath reading Agatha Christie and sucking sweets.
Author: Dylan Thomas

Quote: I resent the fact that a parental warning sticker has to be included on an album as cover art. To me that's censorship.
Author: Jeff Buckley

Quote: The most intriguing people you will encounter in this life are the people who had insights about you, that you didn't know about yourself.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: From today onwards, I am going to strive for the greatest purity of soul, that the rays of God's grace may be reflected in all their brilliance.
Author: St. Faustina Kowalska

Quote: When I was young I thought that money was the most important thing in life; now that I am old I know that it is.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: Every heart that has beat strongly and cheerfully has left a hopeful impulse behind it in the world, and bettered the tradition of mankind.
Author: Robert Louis Stevenson

Quote: Evil communication corrupts good manners. I hope to live to hear that good communication corrects bad manners.
Author: Benjamin Banneker

Quote: To achieve a higher consciousness, fill your heart with love and forget to judge, compete, or compare.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Men kick friendship around like a football, but it doesn't seem to crack. Women treat it like glass and it goes to pieces.
Author: Anne Morrow Lindbergh

Quote: Courage is the most important of all the virtues because without courage, you can't practice any other virtue consistently.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: To injure an opponent is to injure yourself. To control aggression without inflicting injury is the Art of Peace.
Author: Morihei Ueshiba

Quote: Let us embrace each other like we have the arms of two chairs. Let us dance like our legs are those of a table. We should do dinner sometime.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The more you feed your mind with positive thoughts, the more you can attract great things into your life.
Author: Roy T. Bennett

Quote: I'm addicted to warm Thanksgiving bird meat, but I should just quit cold turkey. To me, the beginning of December is like leftover November.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: There are essentially two things that will make you wise -- the books you read and the people you meet.
Author: Jack Canfield

Quote: Do not accept whatever comes. Do not accept whatever goes. You have infinite power. Exercise your choice.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: Is it easy? Usually not. But you don't forgive people for their benefit. You do it for your benefit.
Author: Andrew Matthews

Quote: Love cannot endure indifference. It needs to be wanted. Like a lamp, it needs to be fed out of the oil of another's heart, or its flame burns low.
Author: Henry Ward Beecher

Quote: She is a friend of my mind. She gather me, man. The pieces I am, she gather them and give them back to me in all the right order.
Author: Toni Morrison

Quote: The reason why the universe is eternal is that it does not live for itself; it gives life to others as it transforms.
Author: Lao Tzu

Quote: Burn worldly love, rub the ashes and make ink of it, make the heart the pen, the intellect the writer, write that which has no end or limit.
Author: Guru Nanak

Quote: I would actually write books totally full of nothing BUT kissing scenes, but apparently people like books to have, like, "plots" or whatever.
Author: Rachel Hawkins

Quote: To say that the first casualty of war is truth is to miss the rather more important point that a principal weapon of war is lies.
Author: Harry M. Collins
Origin: The Golem at Large: What You Should Know about Technology

Quote: Stories are important, the monster said. They can be more important than anything. If they carry the truth.
Author: Patrick Ness

Quote: The goal in life is not to try and live forever, but to create something that will live forever in people's hearts.
Author: Karon Waddell

Quote: Depending on the situation, sometimes you can know a person better in ten minutes than someone you have crossed paths with all your life.
Author: David Baldacci

Quote: rolf! what? are you really rolling on the floor laughing? well, please stay down there for a sec while I KICK YOUR ASS.
Author: David Levithan

Quote: She makes my heart melt. There is a limited supply of sips, so grab a straw and start slurping while you can.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When you come to see you are not as wise today as you thought you were yesterday, you are wiser today.
Author: Anthony de Mello

Quote: Being good in business is the most fascinating kind of art. Making money is art and working is art and good business is the best art.
Author: Andy Warhol

Quote: I buried the lasagna, because it was better than disposing of a dead body. I've been burned in a relationship, but never in an oven. I'll try harder.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I always like a woman in power in politics. I think they're pretty inspirational in terms of looks to begin with. It's very calculated.
Author: Chris Benz

Quote: Dreams won't always take you on a straight path to destiny, but they're usually related to what your soul wants for you.
Author: Kelly Cutrone
Origin: If You Have to Cry, Go Outside: And Other Things Your Mother Never Told You

Quote: I'm so sunburned I'm embarrassed, but you can't tell I'm blushing because I'm sunburned. I'm so ashamed I could just lie on the beach and die.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When everything goes to hell, the people who stand by you without flinching -- they are your family.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: My husband John Lennon was a very special man. A man of humble origin, he brought light and hope to the whole world with his words and music.
Author: Yoko Ono

Quote: You soak up my soul and mingle me. Each drop of my blood cries out to the earth. We are partners, blended as one.
Author: Rumi

Quote: You are essentially who you create yourself to be and all that occurs in your life is the result of your own making.
Author: Stephen Richards
Origin: Think Your way to Success: Let Your Dreams Run Free

Quote: Success is the child of drudgery and perseverance. It cannot be coaxed or bribed; pay the price and it is yours.
Author: Orison Swett Marden

Quote: Scars are not injuries, Tanner Sack. A scar is a healing. After injury, a scar is what makes you whole.
Author: China Miéville

Quote: We hold our dreams and ideals close to our hearts, where the promises are made to the future generations.
Author: John Rachel
Origin: A Long Night's Journey Into Daylight

Quote: Relationships are never about power, and one way to avoid the will to power is to choose to limit oneself- to serve.
Author: Wm. Paul Young

Quote: Jokes of the proper kind, properly told, can do more to enlighten questions of politics, philosophy, and literature than any number of dull arguments.
Author: Isaac Asimov

Quote: Blaming is so much easier than taking responsibility, because if you take responsibility ... then you might be to blame.
Author: Jennifer O'Neill
Origin: The Pursuit of Happiness: 21 Spiritual Rules to Sucess

Quote: You can't put much on paper before you betray your secret self, try as you will to keep things civil.
Author: Patricia Hampl
Origin: I Could Tell You Stories: Sojourns in the Land of Memory

Quote: Pursue not the outer entanglements; Dwell not in the inner void; Be serene in the oneness of things; And dualism vanishes by itself.
Author: Sengcan
Origin: Hsin- Hsin Ming: Verses on the Faith- Mind

Quote: Paradoxically though it may seem, it is none the less true that life imitates art far more than art imitates life.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: I was as unburdened as a piece of dandelion fluff, and he was the wind that stirred me about the world.
Author: Sarah J. Maas
Origin: A Court of Thorns and Roses

Quote: I refuse to believe that Hendrix had the last possessed hand, that Joplin had the last drunken throat, that Morrison had the last enlightened mind.
Author: Patti Smith

Quote: If all printers were determined not to print anything till they were sure it would offend nobody, there would be very little printed.
Author: Benjamin Franklin

Quote: I hope royalty continues forever. This is the thing that can contribute to peace throughout the world.
Author: Yayoi Kusama

Quote: Often romantic relationships fail because you are trying to get someone to fall in love with the YOU that you never discovered.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: Perhaps it's better if I live in your heart, where the world can't see me. If I'm dead, there will be no stain on our love.
Author: Greta Garbo

Quote: All sciences are vain and full of errors that are not born of Experience, the mother of all Knowledge.
Author: Leonardo da Vinci

Quote: Never say a humorous thing to a man who does not possess humor. He will always use it in evidence against you.
Author: Herbert Beerbohm Tree

Quote: Literature is the art of discovering something extraordinary about ordinary people, and saying with ordinary words something extraordinary.
Author: Boris Pasternak

Quote: If your doctrine changed for the better yet your character changed for the worse, you changed for the worse.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: You are, after all, what you think. Your emotions are the slaves to your thoughts, and you are the slave to your emotions.
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert

Quote: She still cared for me, and the best way I could make amends to her was to be happy. I do have a knack for finding great women.
Author: Craig Ferguson
Origin: American on Purpose: The Improbable Adventures of an Unlikely Patriot

Quote: They say a person needs just three things to be truly happy in this world: someone to love, something to do, and something to hope for.
Author: Tom Bodett

Quote: The greatness of a man is not in how much wealth he acquires, but in his integrity and his ability to affect those around him positively
Author: Bob Marley

Quote: You know, this is a war of ideology, a war of thoughts and of faith. And we need people to really stand for faith and trust, not hope and change.
Author: Sharron Angle

Quote: Do not think that one has to be sad in order to be militant, even though the thing one is fighting is abominable.
Author: Michel Foucault

Quote: The two most important requirements for major success are: first, being in the right place at the right time, and second, doing something about it.
Author: Ray Kroc

Quote: ...and that's when I get to wondering, what would happen if I told her she something good, ever day?
Author: Kathryn Stockett

Quote: How can you tell? That I like books, I mean. The look on your face when you walked in, somehow I doubted you were that impressed by me.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: We believe in ordinary acts of bravery, in the courage that drives one person to stand up for another.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: Failure is instructive. The person who really thinks learns quite as much from his failures as from his successes.
Author: John Dewey

Quote: When Eve ate the apple her knowledge increased. But God liked dumb women so Paradise ceased. Gwen Goodnight. Her Work.
Author: Jennifer Crusie

Quote: Art is the desire of a man to express himself, to record the reactions of his personality to the world he lives in.
Author: Amy Lowell

Quote: Fiction is art and art is the triumph over chaos... to celebrate a world that lies spread out around us like a bewildering and stupendous dream.
Author: John Cheever

Quote: The first ingredient in conversation is truth, the next good sense, the third good humor, and the fourth wit.
Author: William Temple

Quote: When you try hard to find happiness for other, you will unknowingly find yourself on the island of happiness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Letting go is the lesson. Letting go is always the lesson. Have you ever noticed how much of our agony is all tied up with craving and loss?
Author: Susan Gordon Lydon
Origin: The Knitting Sutra: Craft as a Spiritual Practice

Quote: The most important thing is being passionate about what you're doing and always give it your all. That is the key to success.
Author: Charlie White

Quote: Freedom means you are unobstructed in living your life as you choose. Anything less is a form of slavery.
Author: Wayne Dyer

Quote: I honestly think it is better to be a failure at something you love than to be a success at something you hate.
Author: George Burns

Quote: Atheism is a way of humility. It's to think oneself to be an animal, as we are actually and to allow oneself to become human.
Author: André Comte- Sponville

Quote: A peaceful feeling: A happy harmony or symphony of all of our character pieces working in powerful unison" from Cinderella In Focus
Author: H.L. Balcomb

Quote: I believe that words are strong, that they can overwhelm what we fear when fear seems more awful than life is good.
Author: Andrew Solomon
Origin: The Noonday Demon: An Atlas of Depression

Quote: Love is our true destiny. We do not find the meaning of life by ourselves alone - we find it with another.
Author: Thomas Merton

Quote: If you care about something you have to protect it - If you're lucky enough to find a way of life you love, you have to find the courage to live it.
Author: John Irving

Quote: I would rather go swimming with great white sharks than wade in romance 'cause I can never find the courage to ask her to dinner or even to dance.
Author: Adam Young (Owl City)

Quote: Don't blame me. Tell your mom to move closer. Tell her there's this new club called civilization and you guys should join.
Author: Becca Fitzpatrick

Quote: We are not necessarily doubting that God will do the best for us; we are wondering how painful the best will turn out to be.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: I stay cool, and dig all jive, that's the way I stay alive. My motto, as I live and learn, is dig and be dug in return.
Author: Langston Hughes

Quote: I neither knew nor cared whether my experience was insanity, dreaming, or magic; but was determined to gaze on brilliance and gaiety at any cost.
Author: H.P. Lovecraft

Quote: If God would have wanted us to live in a permissive society He would have given us Ten Suggestions and not Ten Commandments.
Author: Zig Ziglar

Quote: Restoration of friendship with Russia, our biggest neighbor, is necessary for our peace and economy.
Author: Bidzina Ivanishvili

Quote: My favorite things in life don't cost any money. It's really clear that the most precious resource we all have is time.
Author: Steve Jobs

Quote: Best friends are treasures. Hug them for their caring. Applaud their accomplishments. Laugh with them gratefully.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: The Bible is not my book nor Christianity my profession. I could never give assent to the long, complicated statements of Christian dogma.
Author: Abraham Lincoln

Quote: And humor has always been a weapon. You want to get even on somebody? You want to attack somebody? Make fun of them.
Author: Alan King

Quote: Perhaps evil is the crucible of goodness... and perhaps even Satan - Satan, in spite of himself - somehow serves to work out the will of God.
Author: William Peter Blatty

Quote: God is the name we give to the science we don't understand. Science is the name we give to the God we don't understand.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: I think the biggest challenge is to continue on the same path. I think it's easy to become complacent from the success you've had.
Author: Jason Derulo

Quote: The problem with winter sports is that -- follow me closely here -- they generally take place in winter.
Author: Dave Barry

Quote: I don't know why I started writing. I don't know why anybody does it. Maybe they're bored, or failures at something else.
Author: Cormac McCarthy

Quote: Two wrongs don't make a right, but don't three lefts make a right? Two wrongs don't make a right, but don't two negatives make a positive?
Author: Andrew Clements

Quote: The wealth required by nature is limited and is easy to procure; but the wealth required by vain ideals extends to infinity.
Author: Epicurus

Quote: What's money? A man is a success if he gets up in the morning and goes to bed at night and in between does what he wants to do.
Author: Bob Dylan

Quote: What if the kid you bullied at school, grew up, and turned out to be the only surgeon who could save your life?
Author: Lynette Mather

Quote: If loving someone is putting them in a straitjacket and kicking them down a flight of stairs, then yes, I have loved a few people.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: When a man is denied the right to live the life he believes in, he has no choice but to become an outlaw.
Author: Nelson Mandela

Quote: Sometimes no words come as a response, only shapes spring to mind. But after you tell me you love me, I can't very well reply, "Hexagon!
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Remember that a wish held fervently turns into belief, and a belief held diligently becomes reality.
Author: Jim Stovall

Quote: When someone you love says goodbye you can stare long and hard at the door they closed and forget to see all the doors God has open in front of you.
Author: Shannon L. Alder

Quote: Love recognizes no barriers. It jumps hurdles, leaps fences, penetrates walls to arrive at its destination full of hope.
Author: Maya Angelou

Quote: In an artwork you're always looking for artistic decisions, so an ashtray is perfect. An ashtray has got life and death.
Author: Damien Hirst

Quote: In the best, the friendliest and simplest relations flattery or praise is necessary, just as grease is necessary to keep wheels turning.
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: Certainly my personality, my sense of humor, my outlook on life was informed by the experiences of my parents and the stories they shared with me.
Author: Geddy Lee

Quote: You may not find the opportunity to succeed, but you can always find the opportunity to serve. Then serve to succeed.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I've cried, and you'd think I'd be better for it, but the sadness just sleeps, and it stays in my spine the rest of my life.
Author: Conor Oberst

Quote: We should always remember that sensitiveness and emotion constitute the real content of a work of art.
Author: Maurice Ravel

Quote: The moment the light of your being becomes bright, darkness will melt away to reveal the brightness of your consciousness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: We live in a time that hungers for HOPE; to believe in MIRACLES and DREAMS, for without these soul gems, humanity is ripped at the seams.
Author: Debi Tibbles
Origin: All Aboard! How Ollie Tibbles Became a Train

Quote: I love practical jokes and humor. That there's frankly no joke that I don't think is funny. I love practical jokes, but I don't like being scared.
Author: Mitt Romney

Quote: The police seemed to think I killed her, which is crazy, because I loved her like a thousand drops of blood dripping down a dagger.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: One of the greatest delusions in the world is the hope that the evils in this world are to be cured by legislation.
Author: Thomas Reed

Quote: Love is that splendid triggering of human vitality the supreme activity which nature affords anyone for going out of himself toward someone else.
Author: Jose Ortega y Gasset

Quote: Eratosthenes, the mapmaker who was the first man to accurately measure the size of the Earth, was a librarian.
Author: Ken Jennings
Origin: Maphead: Charting the Wide, Weird World of Geography Wonks

Quote: Any lustful fool can love a million women, but only a real man can love one woman cloned a million times.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: Love does not begin and end the way we seem to think it does. Love is a battle, love is a war; love is a growing up.
Author: James A. Baldwin

Quote: Everyone else trains just as hard as well and that there really is no such a thing as overnight success.
Author: Julie Benz

Quote: Success produces confidence; confidence relaxes industry, and negligence ruins the reputation which accuracy had raised.
Author: Ben Jonson

Quote: War is the greatest evil Satan has invented to corrupt our hearts and souls. We should honor our soldiers, but we should never honor war.
Author: Dean Hughes

Quote: Every day is a new day. It is better to be lucky. But I would rather be exact. Then when luck comes you are ready.
Author: Ernest Hemingway
Origin: The Old Man and the Sea

Quote: I am innocent! But only because the opportunity to partake in an activity that would render me guilty has not presented itself.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: In the end, it's not what we keep our children from that will save them. It's what we put into them in the first place.
Author: Marc Parent
Origin: Believing It All: Lessons I Learned from My Children

Quote: The smooth folds of her dress concealed a tumultuous heart, and her modest lips told nothing of her torment. She was in love.
Author: Gustave Flaubert

Quote: Following all the rules leaves a completed checklist. Following your heart achieves a completed you.
Author: Ray A. Davis

Quote: Painting is poetry that is seen rather than felt, and poetry is painting that is felt rather than seen.
Author: Leonardo da Vinci

Quote: Middle age has been defined as what happens when a person's broad mind and narrow waist change places.
Author: A.C. Grayling
Origin: The Heart of Things: Applying Philosophy to the 21st Century

Quote: A story is a letter that the author writes to himself, to tell himself things that he would be unable to discover otherwise.
Author: Carlos Ruiz Zafón

Quote: Some tourists think Amsterdam is a city of sin, but in truth it is a city of freedom. And in freedom, most people find sin.
Author: John Green

Quote: People who get involved with the success of something have to be given at least some share of that success.
Author: Michael Ironside

Quote: The only interesting thing about religion is how many people it's slaughtered. Communism and Nazism are religions as well, make no mistake about it.
Author: Lemmy Kilmister

Quote: Maybe that's what religion is, hurling yourself off a cliff and trusting that something bigger will take care of you and carry you to the right place.
Author: Maria Semple

Quote: The music of hope is everywhere, but to hear it, you need to ignore the muddy jangle of life's hassles.
Author: Christine M. Knight

Quote: She has often felt that her outsides were too dull for her insides, that deep within her there was something better than what everyone else could see.
Author: Myla Goldberg

Quote: I have a beard of fog that I wear on misty mornings. It's not cigarette smoke, but I'd understand if you wanted to shave it off and inhale it.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: No man is happy without a delusion of some kind. Delusions are as necessary to our happiness as realities.
Author: C.N. Bovee

Quote: IF YOU WANT TO CREATE A CHANGE, you must challenge not only the models of Unreality, but the paradigms that underwrite them.
Author: Stafford Beer

Quote: It is better to be respected than it is to be popular. Popularity ends on yearbook day, but respect lasts forever.
Author: John Bytheway

Quote: Truth does not become more true by virtue of the fact that the entire world agrees with it, nor less so even if the whole world disagrees with it.
Author: Maimonides

Quote: Sometimes it's easy to lose faith in people. And sometimes one act of kindness is all it takes to give you hope again.
Author: Randa Abdel- Fattah
Origin: Does My Head Look Big In This?

Quote: We are trying to prove ourselves wrong as quickly as possible, because only in that way can we find progress.
Author: Richard Feynman

Quote: No tears in the writer, no tears in the reader. No surprise in the writer, no surprise in the reader.
Author: Robert Frost

Quote: Courage is what it takes to stand up and speak; courage is also what it takes to sit down and listen.
Author: Winston S. Churchill

Quote: I love being able to sing for my job. I am blessed beyond words and I hope my fans can feel that while I'm on stage!
Author: Jordin Sparks

Quote: Desperation is the raw material of drastic change. Only those who can leave behind everything they have ever believed in can hope to escape.
Author: William S. Burroughs

Quote: As a woman I have no country. As a woman I want no country. As a woman, my country is the whole world.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: Those who are not shocked when they first come across quantum theory cannot possibly have understood it.
Author: Niels Bohr
Origin: Essays 1932-1957 on Atomic Physics and Human Knowledge

Quote: I don't know what they are called, the spaces between seconds- but I think of you always in those intervals.
Author: Salvador Plascencia

Quote: The thing everyone should realize is that the key to happiness is being happy for yourself and yourself.
Author: Ellen DeGeneres

Quote: We are built for the valley, for the ordinary stuff we are in, and that is where we have to prove our mettle.
Author: Oswald Chambers

Quote: But that was the problem with having the answers. It was only after you gave them that you realized they sometimes weren't what people wanted to hear.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: When I tried to understand consciousness, I found out how simple it was, but we try to make it so complicated.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Just remember: to be grateful and thank the people who are there and support you along the way is a great start to success.
Author: Meryl Davis

Quote: Finally, from so little sleeping and so much reading, his brain dried up and he went completely out of his mind.
Author: Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra

Quote: The presence of God is so important in the life of believers. There is abundance of all you need to make your life comfortable in His presence.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: Posterity! You will never know how much it cost the present generation to preserve your freedom! I hope you will make a good use of it.
Author: John Adams

Quote: And I'm dying to know, is it killing you like it's killing me? And the story of us looks a lot like a tragedy now.
Author: Taylor Swift

Quote: Yesterday we obeyed kings and bent our necks before emperors. But today we kneel only to truth, follow only beauty, and obey only love.
Author: Khalil Gibran

Quote: I wanted that future officer to weigh decisions with a supple mind and to be comfortable with nuance and uncertainty.
Author: Craig M. Mullaney
Origin: The Unforgiving Minute: A Soldier's Education

Quote: Everyday it gets easier to connect with an electronic device that it is to connect with real people.
Author: Pablo

Quote: I know the answer! The answer lies within the heart of all mankind! The answer is twelve? I think I'm in the wrong building.
Author: Charles M. Schulz

Quote: We had the experience but missed the meaning. And approach to the meaning restores the experience in a different form.
Author: T.S. Eliot

Quote: The cost of oblivious daydreaming was always this moment of return, the realignment with what had been before and now seemed a little worse.
Author: Ian McEwan

Quote: Regret is counterproductive. It's looking back on a past that you can't change. Questioning things as they occur can prevent regret in the future.
Author: Colleen Hoover

Quote: Knowing is not enough. You must accept My blessings in order to attain a better life. You must embrace a higher level of consciousness.
Author: Mary B. Morrison

Quote: Friends can make you feel that the world is smaller and less sneaky than it really is, because you know people who have similar experiences.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: When you connect to the silence within you, that is when you can make sense of the disturbance going on around you.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: I feel like I should probably ask you to leave. But I don't really want you to go. I want you to stay, but I know you shouldn't.- Hope
Author: Rachel Gibson

Quote: The evil that is in the world almost always comes from ignorance, and good intentions may do as much harm as malevolence if they lack understanding.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: Some day you will find out that there is far more happiness in another's happiness than in your own.
Author: Honoré de Balzac

Quote: A gift is pure when it is given from the heart to the right person at the right time and at the right place, and when we expect nothing in return
Author: Anonymous

Quote: He smiled. "How kind of you to confirm what I already know. Perhaps next you will introduce me to myself. I hear I am quite popular.
Author: Meredith Duran

Quote: Knocking on a door is so violent. Talk on the door. Try to get it to open up through communication, not violence.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: On the road to success some will always expect tragedy ... ditch your doubts and experience success with Cosmic Ordering.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: I thirst for love like a camel thirsts for water. I'm going through a desert right now, but I'm searching for the oasis of my life.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: If you didn't love him, this never would have happened. But you did. And accepting that love and everything that followed it is part of letting it go.
Author: Sarah Dessen

Quote: Love is a bicycle with two pancakes for wheels. You may see love as more of an exercise in hard work, but I see it as more of a breakfast on the go.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: That which we persist in doing becomes easier to do, not that the nature of the thing has changed but that our power to do has increased.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: You were never born to make money. You were born to enjoy life and be happy. Instead you learned to make money and forgot how to be happy.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Free your mind and be in flow of life's ups and downs. Be accepting of wherever you are on your journey
Author: Karon Waddell

Quote: When you depersonalize abrasive behavior and see it as a call for help you become a catalyst for the best kind of change.
Author: Marilyn Suttle

Quote: Write it on your heart you are the most beautiful soul of the Universe. Realize it, honor it and celebrate the life.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: In the calculus of feelings, you never really know how one person's absence will affect you more than another's.
Author: Gayle Forman

Quote: Love is the jelly to sunshine's peanut butter. And if I tell you that I'm in sandwich with you, I'm not just saying it to get in your Ziploc bag.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: As the world fights those who use violence to advance their agenda, engagement, not neutrality, is needed in our educational systems.
Author: Gregory S. Prince
Origin: Jr.,  Teach Them To Challenge Authority: Educating for healthy societies

Quote: I see now that my faith was becoming an ally rather than an enemy because I could vent anger freely, even toward God, without fearing retribution.
Author: Gerald L. Sittser
Origin: A Grace Disguised: How the Soul Grows through Loss

Quote: Perhaps I write for no one. Perhaps for the same person children are writing for when they scrawl their names in the snow.
Author: Margaret Atwood

Quote: I have lived with you and loved you, and now you are gone. Gone where I cannot follow, until I have finished all of my days.
Author: Victoria Hanley

Quote: I have always held the old fashioned opinion that the primary object of work of fiction should be to tell a story.
Author: Wilkie Collins

Quote: If having a soul means being able to feel love and loyalty and gratitude, then animals are better off than a lot of humans.
Author: James Herriot

Quote: Every day I think today could be my last day. My only fear is dying without telling her I love her one more time. All I pray for is one more time.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Breathtaking, splendid, wondrous, sublime, all those words describe you, exactly as you are. You are a work of art! Enjoy your beauty!
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: Dive again and again into the river of uncertainty. Create in the dark, only then can you recognize the light.
Author: Jyrki Vainonen

Quote: We as authors sign a pact with our readers; they'll go on reading because they trust us to play fair with them and deliver what we've promised.
Author: Pamela Glass Kelly
Origin: From Inspiration to Publication: How to Succeed as a Children's Writer: Advice from 15 Award Winning Writers

Quote: As I have said many times - my father was a great fan of Bill Dickey's and he certainly loved the Yankees. I hope that he would be pleased.
Author: George Steinbrenner

Quote: I have one desire now - to live a life of reckless abandon for the Lord, putting all my energy and strength into it.
Author: Elisabeth Elliot

Quote: I fight like a rocking chair in a boxing ring. That's also how I make love. I should probably sell popcorn at my shows to boost revenue.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: [A]ny species that exempts itself from the rules of competition ends up destroying the community in order to support its own expansion.
Author: Daniel Quinn
Origin: Ishmael: An Adventure of the Mind and Spirit

Quote: When I die, remember to remove my body from the cooler before you start making the hunch punch. But by all means, do get drunk on my memory.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If I had to choose between betraying my country and betraying my friend, I hope I should have the guts to betray my country.
Author: E.M. Forster
Origin: What I Believe and Other Essays

Quote: Tomorrow may be hell, but today was a good writing day, and on the good writing days nothing else matters.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: Love is illogical. You fall into it like a manhole. Then you're just stuck. You die in love more than you live in love.
Author: Tarryn Fisher

Quote: I'm beginning to think that to hope isn't the same as to expect something. To hope is to believe that life is an acceptable chaos.
Author: Goenawan Mohamad
Origin: Pagi dan Hal- Hal yang Dipungut Kembali

Quote: When you wage war on the public schools, you're attacking the mortar that holds the community together. You're not a conservative, you're a vandal.
Author: Garrison Keillor
Origin: Homegrown Democrat: A Few Plain Thoughts from the Heart of America

Quote: That's what I do. Watch movies and read. Sometimes I even pretend to write, but I'm not fooling anyone. Oh, and I go to the mailbox.
Author: Nicole Krauss

Quote: However many holy words you read, however many you speak, what good will they do you if you do not act on upon them?
Author: Gautama Buddha

Quote: Associate yourself with people of good quality, for it is better to be alone than to be in bad company
Author: Booker T. Washington

Quote: Your love is my diamond that I want to wear near my heart. Your hug is my heaven where I want to belong always.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I have tried to let you go and I cannot. I cannot stop thinking of you. I cannot stop dreaming about you.
Author: Erin Morgenstern

Quote: Anyone who wants to sell you overnight success or wealth is not interested in your success; they are interested in your money.
Author: Bo Bennett

Quote: Contrary to general belief, an artist is never ahead of his time but most people are far behind theirs.
Author: Edgard Varese

Quote: It is one of those lessons that every child should learn: Don't play with fire, sharp objects, or ancient artifacts.
Author: Patricia Briggs

Quote: It may happen sometimes that a long debate becomes the cause of a longer friendship. Commonly, those who dispute with one another at last agree.
Author: Elbert Hubbard

Quote: True success is a silence inner process that can empower the mind, heart and soul through strong aspiration for great achievement.
Author: Nur Sakinah Thomas

Quote: Better than chocolate, being with you last night. Silly me, I thought that nothing was better than chocolate.
Author: E. Lockhart

Quote: Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed, citizens can change the world. Indeed, it is the only thing that ever has.
Author: Margaret Mead

Quote: I wanted movement and not a calm course of existence. I wanted excitement and danger and the chance to sacrifice myself for my love.
Author: Leo Tolstoy

Quote: It takes guts to love with gusto. Most people love as if they wish they were invisible, and then they wonder why their affections go unnoticed.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I can do this... I can start over. I can save my own life and I'm never going to be alone as long as I have stars to wish on and people to still love.
Author: Jennifer Elisabeth
Origin: Born Ready: Unleash Your Inner Dream Girl

Quote: For God so loved the World that he gave his only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life.
Author: Jesus Christ

Quote: You measure the size of the accomplishment by the obstacles you have to overcome to reach your goals.
Author: Booker T. Washington

Quote: Nothing good comes in life or athletics unless a lot of hard work has preceded the effort. Only temporary success is achieved by taking short cuts.
Author: Roger Staubach

Quote: Life is about cherishing memories, getting lost in moments of beauty, and enjoying profound joy and happiness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I do feel strongly that string theory is our best hope for making progress at unifying gravity and quantum mechanics.
Author: Brian Greene

Quote: The Study of philosophy is not that we may know what men have thought, but what the truth of things is.
Author: Thomas Aquinas

Quote: Myth, mist, and mystery all add to the illusion of love. If you need me I'll be by the fog machine wearing a tunic and writing an epic poem in Greek.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I sold ten bags of hellos for five bags of goodbyes. I'd say that's a good profit. Or it was, before I blew all my goodbyes on ex lovers.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'm hard to love, but I love hard, like my heart is the sun yearning to tan your naked body. I promise I won't burn you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We Greeks believe that a man who takes no part in public affairs is not merely lazy, but good for nothing
Author: Thucydides

Quote: Be thou the rainbow in the storms of life. The evening beam that smiles the clouds away, and tints tomorrow with prophetic ray.
Author: Lord Byron

Quote: If you believe in yourself and have dedication and pride - and never quit, you'll be a winner. The price of victory is high but so are the rewards.
Author: Paul Bryant

Quote: Love is always open arms. If you close your arms about love you will find that you are left holding only yourself.
Author: Leo Buscaglia

Quote: All great things must first wear terrifying and monstrous masks, in order to inscribe themselves on the hearts of humanity.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: Remember you are the voice for those who cannot talk; you are the protector of those who cannot protect themselves.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: But then what does it matter whence comes the gentle nudge that jars the soul into motion and sets it rolling, doomed never again to stop?
Author: Vladimir Nabokov

Quote: If anybody is looking to rent a dancing partner for an evening, I have one left in stock. That one is me, and I am on sale 'til Tuesday at two.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Everyone in those days expected that art students were wild, licentious characters. We didn't know how to be, but we sure were anxious to learn.
Author: Norman Rockwell

Quote: I must judge for myself, but how can I judge, how can any man judge, unless his mind has been opened and enlarged by reading.
Author: John Adams
Origin: Diary and Autobiography of John Adams: Volumes 1-4, Diary (1755-1804) and Autobiography

Quote: I want to be the best version of myself for anyone who is going to someday walk into my life and need someone to love them beyond reason.
Author: Jennifer Elisabeth
Origin: Born Ready: Unleash Your Inner Dream Girl

Quote: Being happy doesn't mean that everything is perfect. It means that you've decided to look beyond the imperfections.
Author: Gerard Way

Quote: Books are all the dreams we would most like to have and like dreams they have the power to change consciousness.
Author: Victor Nell
Origin: Lost in a Book: The Psychology of Reading for Pleasure

Quote: Don't kid yourself that you're going to live again after you're dead; you're not. Make the most of the one life you've got. Live it to the full.
Author: Richard Dawkins

Quote: I have always felt that doubt was the beginning of wisdom, and the fear of God was the end of wisdom.
Author: Clarence Darrow

Quote: remembering is a great invention of the mind, and if you try hard enough you can remember anything, whether it really happened or not.
Author: Rodman Philbrick

Quote: No matter how your heart is grieving, if you keep on believing, the dreams that you wish will come true.
Author: Walt Disney Company

Quote: Darling, has not the count just told us that all human wisdom is summed up in two words? Wait and hope.
Author: Alexandre Dumas

Quote: Sometimes a book isn't a heartbreaking work of staggering genius. Sometimes it's the only story you knew how to tell.
Author: Tahereh Mafi

Quote: You don't always have to be a leader and be as vocal as I am. I'm sure some people would love it if I didn't talk as much as I did.
Author: Chris Paul

Quote: Laws of nature have no physical properties of mass /energy. They are platonic truths in transcendent realm that create & govern the Universe.
Author: Deepak Chopra

Quote: I think that sense of humor is important in marriage. A sense of humor gets people through marriage.
Author: Kyle Chandler

Quote: The dictionary is the only place that success comes before work. work is the key to success, and hard work can help you accomplish anything.
Author: Vince Lombardi Jr.

Quote: A person will sometimes devote all his life to the development of one part of his body - the wishbone.
Author: Robert Frost

Quote: I want to try making things right because picking up the pieces is way better than leaving them the way they are.
Author: Simone Elkeles

Quote: ...convinced that in trying to please all, he had pleased none, and had lost his ass into the bargain.
Author: Aesop

Quote: At the time, my life just seemed too complete, and maybe we have to break everything to make something better out of ourselves.
Author: Chuck Palahniuk

Quote: So he tasted the deep pain that is reserved only for the strong, just as he had tasted for a little while the deep happiness.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: You can grow like a tall tree, when you enjoy the sun, wind, rain, storms and the stars in the dark nights.
Author: Amit Ray

Quote: Girls had never been important. I'd had a girlfriend or two and had liked them a lot but it wasn't love, because my first love was tennis.
Author: Boris Becker

Quote: I remember I laughed so hard I cried. But my response was half appropriate, because I was at a funeral.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: They say that just before you die your whole life flashes before your eyes, but that's not how it happened for me.
Author: Lauren Oliver

Quote: Have you lost your hope? Have you remained inside the fog? Don't worry; even if you can't find it, a new hope will come and find you!
Author: Mehmet Murat ildan

Quote: Writing is not lying, nor is it theft. It is a journey and search for transparency between one's words and one's soul.
Author: Richard Flanagan

Quote: Though the mills of God grind slowly, yet they grind exceeding small; Though with patience He stands waiting, with exactness grinds He all.
Author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

Quote: I think that we're all mentally ill. Those of us outside the asylums only hide it a little better - and maybe not all that much better after all.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: Life is like a landscape. You live in the midst of it but can describe it only from the vantage point of distance.
Author: Charles Lindbergh

Quote: So far as it depends on the course of this government, our relations of good will and friendship will be sedulously cultivated with all nations.
Author: John Tyler

Quote: Nothing in the universe can travel at the speed of light, they say, forgetful of the shadow`s speed.
Author: Howard Nemerov

Quote: When you get up in the morning, you have two choices - either to be happy or to be unhappy. Just choose to be happy
Author: Norman Vincent Peale

Quote: You don't need to wait for inspiration to write. It's easier to be inspired while writing that while not writing...
Author: Josip Novakovich

Quote: a wise woman puts a grain of sugar in everything she says to a man, and takes a grain of salt with everything he says to her.
Author: Helen Rowland

Quote: Stop waiting for the right person to come into your life. Be the right person to come to someone's life
Author: Leo Babauta

Quote: Let us be grateful to people who make us happy, they are the charming gardeners who make our souls blossom.
Author: Marcel Proust

Quote: You can disagree with another person's opinions. You can disagree with their doctrines. You can't disagree with their experience.
Author: Krista Tippett

Quote: We are living in a time when flowers are trying to live on flowers, instead of on good rain and black loam.
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: To live is to choose. But to choose well, you must know who you are and what you stand for, where you want to go and why you want to get there.
Author: Kofi Annan

Quote: Falling in love with humans is like walking into a pantry and realizing you're trapped in it without Whip Cream, and Cherries.
Author: AainaA-Ridtz

Quote: Poor is the man who thinks money makes him wealthy. Love is the true treasure, and the more you give away, the more you have.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Nobody gets everything in this life. You decide your priorities and you make your choices. I'd decided long ago that any cake I had would be eaten.
Author: Donald E. Westlake

Quote: Few people know so clearly what they want. Most people can't even think what to hope for when they throw a penny in a fountain.
Author: Barbara Kingsolver

Quote: The man with toothache thinks everyone happy whose teeth are sound. The poverty stricken man makes the same mistake about the rich man.
Author: George Bernard Shaw

Quote: I didn't tell him that the diagnosis came three months after I got my first period. Like: Congratulations! You're a woman. Now die.
Author: John Green

Quote: Love does not consist in gazing at each other, but in looking outward together in the same direction.
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupery

Quote: In the name of the United States and President Bush, I want to thank the Mexican people, President Fox and his government for their friendship.
Author: Tony Garza

Quote: To believe in nothing is as ridiculous as to believe in everything. Reason and factual evidence may convert a belief into knowledge.
Author: Felix Alba- Juez

Quote: The value of things is not the time they last, but the intensity with which they occur. That is why there are unforgettable moments and unique people!
Author: Fernando Pessoa

Quote: Not every difficult and dangerous thing is suitable for training, but only that which is conducive to success in achieving the object of our effort.
Author: Epictetus

Quote: Sometimes you wake up from a dream. Sometimes you wake up in a dream. And sometimes, every once in a while, you wake up in someone else's dream.
Author: Richelle Mead

Quote: It all comes down to who is by your side and who is willing to stand up for love even when it seems impossible.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: Many have died; you also will die. The drum of death is being beaten. The world has fallen in love with a dream. Only sayings of the wise will remain.
Author: Kabir

Quote: After all, when you come right down to it, how many people speak the same language even when they speak the same language?
Author: Russell Hoban

Quote: Be the kind of person who catches the shit before it hits the fan, not the one who scrapes it off afterwards.
Author: Jonas Eriksson

Quote: The greatest thing about where my life is right now is it's very relaxed and chill. I'm just hanging out, being myself and doing my work.
Author: Lucas Grabeel

Quote: Every man knows that he will die: and nobody believes it. On that paradox stand not only a host of religions but the entity of a sane being.
Author: John Myers Myers

Quote: ...an optimistic mind-set finds dozens of possible solutions for every problem that the pessimist regards as incurable.
Author: Robert Anton Wilson
Origin: Cosmic Trigger: Die letzten Geheimnisse der Illuminaten oder An den Grenzen des erweiterten Bewusstseins

Quote: Like Alexander the Great and Caesar, I'm out to conquer the world. But first I have to stop at Walmart and pick up some supplies.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: The Titanic would never have sunk if it were made out of a sink.

Quote: Humor writing requires a rhythm and timing, as well as some kind of connection to the reader, and I think that's how I tap into it.
Author: Kristan Higgins

Quote: Unfortunates, who ought to begin with God, do not have any hope in him till they have exhausted all other means of deliverance.
Author: Alexandre Dumas

Quote: Art begins with resistance - at the point where resistance is overcome. No human masterpiece has ever been created without great labor.
Author: Andre Gide

Quote: I want to say something so embarrassing about September that even the leaves start blushing and turning red.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: I Want Two apply for a job at our country's largest funeral home, and then wear a suit and noose to the job interview.

Quote: As far as playing jazz, no other art form, other than conversation, can give the satisfaction of spontaneous interaction.
Author: Stan Getz

Quote: Last night my shadow exploded into hundreds of fluttering black birds, foreshadowing my love taking flight under the cover of camouflage.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: To read is to empower, To empower is to write, To write is to influence, To influence is to change, To change is to live".
Author: Jane Evershed

Quote: Acknowledgement is possession. When you acknowledge, think or have conviction in something, it actually will come true.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: Good works is giving to the poor and the helpless, but divine works is showing them their worth to the One who matters.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: We live on an island surrounded by a sea of ignorance. As our island of knowledge grows, so does the shore of our ignorance.
Author: John Archibald Wheeler

Quote: The artist's world is limitless. It can be found anywhere, far from where he lives or a few feet away. It is always on his doorstep.
Author: Paul Strand

Quote: Remember this, - where there is life there is hope. You're alive. Embrace this, because YOU CAN DO ANYTHING while there is breath in your body.
Author: Lola Jaye
Origin: By The Time You Read This

Quote: Einstein said that if quantum mechanics were correct then the world would be crazy. Einstein was right - the world is crazy.
Author: Daniel M. Greenberger

Quote: A girl has to have a beautiful smile, Beautiful eyes and she should have a good sense of humor. She should be honest, loving and trustworthy.
Author: Justin Bieber

Quote: When the bright angel dominates, out comes a great work of art, a Michelangelo David or a Beethoven symphony.
Author: Madeleine L'Engle

Quote: I hate to be a failure. I hate and regret the failure of my marriages. I would gladly give all my millions for just one lasting marital success.
Author: J. Paul Getty

Quote: The greatest happiness is when the eye discovers beauty where neither then mind conceived of nor the hand intended any.
Author: Orhan Pamuk

Quote: Art and religion first; then philosophy; lastly science. That is the order of the great subjects of life, that's their order of importance.
Author: Muriel Spark

Quote: Guys ask me, don't I get burned out? How can you get burned out doing something you love? I ask you, have you ever got tired of kissing a pretty girl?
Author: Tommy Lasorda

Quote: The greatest discovery of my generation is that a human being can alter his life by altering his attitudes.
Author: William James

Quote: I often wear camouflaged pants so when I walk I look like a floating torso. I love with the same air of mystery.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Her and I, we have a two chairs and a table kind of love. You should pull up a feeling and have a seat.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The more defects a man may have, the older he is, the less lovable, the more resounding his success.
Author: Marquis de Sade

Quote: You cannot be with someone just because you don't want to hurt him. You have your own happiness to think about.
Author: Melissa de la Cruz

Quote: The world's greatest achievers have been those who have always stayed focussed on their goals and have been consistent in their efforts.
Author: Roopleen
Origin: Words to inspire the winner in YOU

Quote: A loving heart, determination, faith, courage, trust, belief, truth, and a solid soul create the wings with which we fly.
Author: A.D. Posey

Quote: Life is the greatest of all mysteries, and though I seek to solve its many riddles, my deepest fear is that I will succeed.
Author: Brian Rathbone

Quote: Letting go means to come to the realization that some people are a part of your history, but not a part of your destiny.
Author: Steve Maraboli

Quote: What light is to the eyes - what air is to the lungs - what love is to the heart, liberty is to the soul of man.
Author: Robert Green Ingersoll

Quote: The love we have in our youth is superficial compared to the love that an old man has for his old wife.
Author: Will Durant

Quote: Sometimes, the only soul that can mend a broken heart is the one that broke it. For they are the ones holding all the pieces.
Author: Patti Roberts

Quote: One of the most difficult things he'd ever done was turn away and leave her standing in the shadows.
Author: Rachel Gibson
Origin: I'm In No Mood For Love

Quote: If we find ourselves with a desire that nothing in this world can satisfy, the most probable explanation is that we were made for another world.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: My daddy said, that the first time you fall in love, it changes you forever and no matter how hard you try, that feeling just never goes away.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: I hope I can compete in one or two Olympics in my career. Of course I would like to win a medal, but just being there would be awesome.
Author: Patrick Chan

Quote: Past, I am letting you go. Future, I will see you tomorrow. Present, I love you, live in you, celebrate you, and will never let you go.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Time is standing still, but we are running away from it and complaining that time is slipping away from us.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I love writing novels, even if only a few thousand people read them. Here's my soul; I hope it appeals to your soul.
Author: Mark O'Donnell

Quote: I'm here not because I am supposed to be here, or because I'm trapped here, but because I'd rather be with you than anywhere else in the world.
Author: Richard Bach
Origin: The Bridge Across Forever: A True Love Story

Quote: Once you do away with the idea of people as fixed, static entities, then you see that people can change, and there is hope.
Author: bell hooks

Quote: No matter where it is in the sky... No matter where you are in the world... the moon is never bigger than your thumb. -John
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: I ran three miles, staggered into the lobby, and took the elevator back to my apartment. No point to overdoing this exercise junk. --Stephanie Plum
Author: Janet Evanovich

Quote: The fallen angel becomes a malignant devil. Yet even that enemy of God and man had friends and associates in his desolation; I am alone.
Author: Mary Shelley

Quote: The lesson we are indebted to Egypt for, our future generations learned that in the face of oppression silence is never golden.
Author: Aysha Taryam
Origin: The Opposite of Indifference: A Collection of Commentaries

Quote: Quiet is peace. Tranquility. Quiet is turning down the volume knob on life. Silence is pushing the off button. Shutting it down. All of it. - Amir
Author: Khaled Hosseini

Quote: It is difficult to say what is impossible, for the dream of yesterday is the hope of today and the reality of tomorrow.
Author: Robert H. Goddard

Quote: After soul searching, I found myself. Then I found myself giving of myself to a charity that finds missing children. It's great to be found.
