Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I want to stand as close to the edge as I can without going over. Out on the edge you see all kinds of things you can't see from the center.
Author: Kurt Vonnegut

Quote: We can't undo a single thing we have ever done, but we can make decisions today that propel us to the life we want and towards the healing we need.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: Fuck it... That's really the attitude that keeps a family together, it's not "we love each other", it's just "fuck it, man.
Author: Louis C.K.

Quote: It's amazing how quickly nature consumes human places after we turn our backs on them. Life is a hungry thing.
Author: Scott Westerfeld

Quote: Life has no meaning. Each of us has meaning and we bring it to life. It is a waste to be asking the question when you are the answer.
Author: Joseph Campbell

Quote: You just have to go after what you want and if it doesn't want you back then so be it; it doesn't deserve you anyways.
Author: Nicole Richie

Quote: For art to exist, for any sort of aesthetic activity to exist, a certain physiological precondition is indispensable: intoxication.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche

Quote: A painter's tastes must grow out of what so obsesses him in life that he never has to ask himself what it is suitable for him to do in art.
Author: Lucian Freud

Quote: For though, I walk through the valley of shadows of Death, I will never fear. For You are in Me and I know You will never let me Go.
Author: Jestoni Revealed

Quote: There's not an instruction manual on how to deal with success, so you just have to rely on having great friends and a good team.
Author: Bryan Adams

Quote: There are people in the world so hungry, that God cannot appear to them except in the form of bread.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: For the funeral I needed a plus one, so I rented a hooker. And then I rented a movie. Rest in peace Grandpa, or whoever you were.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Nothing great will ever be achieved without great men, and men are great only if they are determined to be so.
Author: Charles de Gaulle

Quote: Sometimes it's a form of love just to talk to somebody that you have nothing in common with and still be fascinated by their presence.
Author: David Byrne

Quote: Adults are always asking little kids what they want to be when they grow up 'cause they're looking for ideas.
Author: Paula Poundstone

Quote: It is characteristic of all deep human problems that they are not to be approached without some humor and some bewilderment.
Author: Freeman Dyson

Quote: What about a compromise? I'll kill them first, and if it turns out they were friendly, I'll apologize.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: I'll stand by you forever. Or at least until noon, and then I'll go stand under the cabana. Isn't love amazing?
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: In the bible it says you have to forgive seventy times seven. I want you all to know, I'm keeping a chart.
Author: Hillary Rodham Clinton

Quote: The world as we have created it is a process of our thinking. It cannot be changed without changing our thinking.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: I think anyone who has a passion for what they love to do, and who pursue it, is inspirational for me.
Author: Colin Morgan

Quote: There is no true reality. It is just an interplay of your consciousness, awareness, thoughts, and actions.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Nothing so fortifies a friendship as a belief on the part of one friend that he is superior to the other.
Author: Honore de Balzac

Quote: I'm not mean, I'm honest. Nobody is ever straightforward. But sometimes people need to hear the truth.
Author: Jessica Warman

Quote: She bats her eyelashes like I'm throwing baseballs at them. I must be as romantic as Pete Rose's last name.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Write like no one is reading 3

Quote: Most books on witchcraft will tell you that witches work naked. This is because most books on witchcraft were written by men.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: Humor is richly rewarding to the person who employs it. It has some value in gaining and holding attention, but it has no persuasive value at all.
Author: John Kenneth Galbraith

Quote: Consciousness is the awareness of the interaction and interdependence among mind, body, spirit, and the universe where it resides.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Poetry is the language of intensity. Because we are going to die, an expression of intensity is justified.
Author: C.D. Wright
Origin: Cooling Time: An American Poetry Vigil

Quote: Tomorrow will never call to ask your opinion; you don't control it. Stop allowing today's possibilities to be robbed by tomorrow's insecurities.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: The smallest minority on earth is the individual. Those who deny individual rights cannot claim to be defenders of minorities.
Author: Ayn Rand

Quote: She'd fallen into a deep silence once, when the sun appeared, and it was then he'd wondered most what she was thinking.
Author: Veronica Rossi

Quote: Trees shaped like deer should not be ridden like benches if they get stuck up in other trees. No hunting farming allowed. Fishing only.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: The most important thing I gained from my travels was the knowledge that one could achieve anything with determination and an ounce of luck.
Author: Stefan Waydenfeld

Quote: I also hold very strong personal convictions about censorship. I don't believe in forbidden knowledge.
Author: Andrea Cremer

Quote: When I go off the grid, my main source of light will be fireflies. Oh, and the glow that will come from the epic love poem I am writing for you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Be not angry that you cannot make others as you wish them to be, since you cannot make yourself as you wish to be.
Author: Thomas à Kempis

Quote: Happiness is a good business these days, more you talk crap about happiness the large number of crowd you will gather.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: I'll stand by you. And by stand I mean cower in your shadow. It's probably cold there, so I'm going to knit myself a warm cat sweater to wear.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Each affects the other, and the other affects the next, and the world is full of stories, but the stories are all one.
Author: Mitch Albom
Origin: The Five People You Meet in Heaven

Quote: I love him in ways that I can't explain to other people. They don't understand... it's not their fault.
Author: Jennifer Elisabeth

Quote: The greatest movement for social justice our country has ever known is the civil rights movement and it was totally rooted in a love ethic.
Author: bell hooks

Quote: Every man is a damn fool for at least five minutes every day; wisdom consists in not exceeding the limit.
Author: Elbert Hubbard
Origin: The Roycroft Dictionary Concocted by Ali Baba and the Bunch on Rainy Days

Quote: Eyes can only capture objects that already seen in mind. And mind can only see things that already written in heart.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: My Ancestor Was an Ancient Astronaut

Quote: No, our science is no illusion. But an illusion it would be to suppose that what science cannot give us we can get elsewhere.
Author: Sigmund Freud

Quote: I want a moon canoe, because have you ever tried paddling through dirt? Love is a journey, and I try to travel as efficiently as I can.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If you wake up tired, you've been chasing dreams. If you go to bed tired, your making your dreams happen.
Author: Benny Bellamacina

Quote: To live greatly, we must develop the capacity to face trouble with courage, disappointment with cheerfulness, and triumph with humility.
Author: Thomas S. Monson
Origin: Pathways To Perfection: Discourses Of Thomas S. Monson

Quote: A new word. Bright with possibilities. A flawless pearl to turn over and over in my hand, then put away for safekeeping.
Author: Jennifer Donnelly

Quote: The moment our lips met, I knew with pure and piercing certainty that I would have waited for him forever.
Author: Leigh Bardugo

Quote: If you're a nobody, just imagine a lot of celebrities are in love with you. Narcissism is the best cure for attention deficit disorder.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: Your world of poverty can be recreated to that of affluence simply by speaking the Prince's language.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: Be happy with being you. Love your flaws. Own your quirks. And know that you are just as perfect as anyone else, exactly as you are.
Author: Ariana Grande

Quote: Only the ship is made of books, its sails thousands of overlapping pages, and the sea it floats upon is dark black ink.
Author: Erin Morgenstern

Quote: Think of what starlight And lamplight would lack Diamonds and fireflies If they couldn't lean against Black. . . .
Author: Mary O'Neill

Quote: Do you want to know why men name their penis? So the most important decisions in their life aren't made by a stranger.
Author: Linda Howard

Quote: The test of success is not what you do when you are on top. Success is how high you bounce when you hit the bottom.
Author: George S. Patton Jr.

Quote: I think I'm mouth blind and that's why all food tastes bland. The only things that have any flavor are the words I love you.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Love one another and help others to rise to the higher levels, simply by pouring out love. Love is infectious and the greatest healing energy.
Author: Sai Baba

Quote: The function of prayer is not to influence God, but rather to change the nature of the one who prays.
Author: Søren Kierkegaard

Quote: Men say they love independence in a woman, but they don't waste a second demolishing it brick by brick.
Author: Candice Bergen

Quote: Water, water, everywhere, And all the boards did shrink; Water, water, everywhere, Nor any drop to drink.
Author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
Origin: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner

Quote: I love new clothes. If everyone could just wear new clothes everyday, I reckon depression wouldn't exist anymore.
Author: Sophie Kinsella

Quote: Being single doesn't mean you're weak, it means that you're strong enough to wait for the right person.
Author: Niall Horan

Quote: The meme for blind faith secures its own perpetuation by the simple unconscious expedient of discouraging rational inquiry.
Author: Richard Dawkins

Quote: Is there any conflict between science and religion? There is no conflict in the mind of God, but often there is conflict in the minds of men.
Author: Henry B. Eyring

Quote: The thing that is really hard, and really amazing, is giving up on being perfect and beginning the work of becoming yourself.
Author: Anna Quindlen

Quote: There are memories that time does not erase... Forever does not make loss forgettable, only bearable.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: He died not for men, but for each man. If each man had been the only man made, He would have done no less.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: It's easier to hide your smoking habit on a foggy day. Let that be a lesson for you and your secret lover.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Whenever You're Gone, I'm Here For You

Quote: That's the thing about love It can take you up to the mountaintop and can drop you And the impact will either kill you or make you a new person
Author: Kehinde Sonola

Quote: We talk a lot about hope, helping, and teamwork. Our whole message is that we are more powerful together.
Author: Victoria Osteen

Quote: You're only here for a short visit. Don't hurry, don't worry. And be sure to smell the flowers along the way.
Author: Walter Hagen

Quote: She wasn't bitter. She was sad, though. But it was a hopeful kind of sad. The kind of sad that just takes time.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: I am beginning to learn that it is the sweet, simple things of life which are the real ones after all.
Author: Laura Ingalls Wilder

Quote: If you learn how to value time, you will have enough. If you don't value time, then you will suffer from the lack of time.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: A good [short story] would take me out of myself and then stuff me back in, outsized, now, and uneasy with the fit.
Author: David Sedaris

Quote: Never try to impress a woman, because if you do she'll expect you to keep up the standard for the rest of your life.
Author: W. C. Fields

Quote: Don't think you can frighten me by telling me that I am alone. France is alone. God is alone. And the loneliness of God is His strength.
Author: George Bernard Shaw

Quote: In love, unlike most other passions, the recollection of what you have had and lost is always better than what you can hope for in the future.
Author: Stendhal

Quote: Beauty is no quality in things themselves: It exists merely in the mind which contemplates them; and each mind perceives a different beauty.
Author: David Hume
Origin: Of the Standard of Taste and Other Essays

Quote: Your experiences will be yours alone. But truth and best friendship will rarely if ever disappoint you.
Author: Anne Lamott

Quote: Death, especially violent death, will turn the meanest bastard in the world into a nice guy. Why is that?
Author: Laurell K. Hamilton

Quote: I would argue that nothing gives life more purpose than the realization that every moment of consciousness is a precious and fragile gift.
Author: Steven Pinker

Quote: If your success is not on your own terms, if it looks good to the world but does not feel good in your heart, it is not success at all.
Author: Anna Quindlen

Quote: It's all right to love someone who doesn't love you back, as long as they're worth you loving them. As long as they deserve it.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: No one who achieves success does so without acknowledging the help of others. The wise and confident acknowledge this help with gratitude.
Author: Alfred North Whitehead

Quote: We will restore science to its rightful place and wield technology's wonders to raise health care's quality and lower its cost.
Author: Barack Obama

Quote: When I think of Simone now, I think of butterfly wings. Beautiful and excruciatingly delicate. Touch them once and they might disintegrate.
Author: Nick Sagan

Quote: Our dilemma is that we hate change and love it at the same time; what we really want is for things to remain the same but get better.
Author: Sydney J. Harris

Quote: Only the living can read. This means that when I write, my target market is people of the future. Greetings, people of the moon!
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: At even one penny, this book would be overpriced. In fact, free is too expensive, because you'd still waste time by reading it.

Quote: What good has impatience ever brought? It has only served as the mother of mistakes and the father of irritation.
Author: Steve Maraboli

Quote: Whatever people in general do not understand, they are always prepared to dislike; the incomprehensible is always the obnoxious.
Author: Letitia Landon

Quote: The soul is placed in the body like a rough diamond, and must be polished, or the luster of it will never appear.
Author: Daniel Defoe

Quote: We fill our lives with meaning by serving endlessly and by learning to transcend our consciousness to a higher consciousness.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: My advice to you is get married: if you find a good wife you'll be happy; if not, you'll become a philosopher.
Author: Socrates

Quote: Cherish your visions and your dreams as they are the children of your soul, the blueprints of your ultimate achievements.
Author: Napoleon Hill

Quote: There are different kinds of humor, some is sarcastic, some introspective. Introspective fit my personality better.
Author: Rita Rudner

Quote: Be a bit of a challenge; not because you're playing games but because you realize you're worth the extra effort.
Author: Mandy Hale
Origin: The Single Woman: Life, Love, and a Dash of Sass

Quote: Too many people seem to believe that silence was a void that needed to be filled, even if nothing important was said.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: In God's eyes, a man who teaches one truth and nothing else is more righteous than a man who teaches a million truths and one lie.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: I know I was writing stories when I was five. I don't know what I did before that. Just loafed, I suppose.
Author: P.G. Wodehouse

Quote: There's nothing like deep breaths after laughing that hard. Nothing in the world like a sore stomach for the right reasons.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: You can recognize a small truth because its opposite is a falsehood. The opposite of a great truth is another truth.
Author: Niels Bohr

Quote: We often concentrate on the negative side of humanity. However, humanity is growing and maturing everyday and showing signs of a better future.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I wash my hands of those who imagine chattering to be knowledge, silence to be ignorance, and affection to be art.
Author: Khalil Gibran

Quote: Love is so unconditional; love liberates; love is the reason why I do what I do, and so I think it is the greatest gift we have.
Author: BeBe Winans

Quote: Literature can remind us that not all life is already written down: there are still so many stories to be told.
Author: Colum McCann

Quote: The reason for the unreason with which you treat my reason , so weakens my reason that with reason I complain of your beauty.
Author: Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra

Quote: Do not do what you cannot continue to deliver. For, remember, the world wants to see a continuity of delivery of set standards...!
Author: Sujit Lalwani

Quote: Beware the religion that turns you against another one. It's unlikely that it's really religion at all.
Author: Joan D. Chittister
Origin: God Speaks in Many Tongues: Meditate with Joan Chittister

Quote: It is not true that everyone is special. It is true that everyone was once special and still possesses the ability to recover it.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: She was the most beautiful thing I had ever seen, a tiny, bloody angel in the snow, and they were going to destroy her.
Author: Maggie Stiefvater

Quote: Just let go of the need to care about whether it happens or not, then you are free from fear and can then concentrate on focusing.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: Things will change: you won't feel this way forever. And anyway, sometimes the hardest lessons to learn are the ones your soul needs most.
Author: Kelly Cutrone
Origin: If You Have to Cry, Go Outside: And Other Things Your Mother Never Told You

Quote: Some people claim that marriage interferes with romance. There's no doubt about it. Anytime you have a romance, your wife is bound to interfere.
Author: Groucho Marx

Quote: Faith is what makes life bearable, with all its tragedies and ambiguities and sudden, startling joys.
Author: Madeleine L'Engle
Origin: Walking on Water: Reflections on Faith and Art

Quote: I often have said that to be a college president, you need a thick skin, a good sense of humor, and nerves like sewer pipes.
Author: Gordon Gee

Quote: I've found that there is always some beauty left -- in nature, sunshine, freedom, in yourself; these can all help you.
Author: Anne Frank
Origin: The Diary of a Young Girl

Quote: They are orphans again, with no true home but each other and whatever life they can make together on the other side of the sea.
Author: Leigh Bardugo

Quote: There is a loftier ambition than merely to stand high in the world. It is to stoop down and lift mankind a little higher.
Author: Henry Van Dyke

Quote: I had to learn to live without you and I couldn't make sense of it, because I left so much of me inside of you.
Author: Robert M. Drake

Quote: It's not my job to make you happy. It's your job to learn that only those who quit selfishly seeking their own happiness find it.
Author: Richelle E. Goodrich
Origin: Smile Anyway: Quotes, Verse, & Grumblings for Every Day of the Year

Quote: One need not be a Chamber - to be Haunted - One need not be a House - The Brain has Corridors - surpassing Material Place -
Author: Emily Dickinson

Quote: I know nothing in the world that has as much power as a word. Sometimes I write one, and I look at it, until it begins to shine.
Author: Emily Dickinson

Quote: I couldn't stand here, hanging on, when the very thing I held disappeared more with each passing day.
Author: Becca Fitzpatrick

Quote: Think as though the beauty of your life depends on your thoughts. Live as though your life is the portrait of your thoughts.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I can't use my intellect to figure out how to bypass my intellect. Love lies through the spirit, not the mind, and love never lies.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: it is (often) the quiet gesture which carries the most significance - the one which suddenly directs the symphony.
Author: Mary Anne Radmacher

Quote: Dance through life flinging kindness like shimmering rainbows. Find your bliss by sharing your heart.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: The primary cause of unhappiness is never the situation, but you thoughts about it. Be aware of the thoughts you are thinking.
Author: Eckhart Tolle
Origin: A New Earth: Awakening to Your Life's Purpose

Quote: You could just as well say that an agnostic is a deeply religious person with at least a rudimentary knowledge of human fallibility.
Author: Carl Sagan

Quote: I want my kids to have the things in life that I never had when I was growing up. Things like beards and chest hair.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: I decided on the spot that I would be an artist, and I assure you, it was no ordinary artist I had in mind.
Author: Henry Ossawa Tanner

Quote: She'd secretly had a crush on him since they were twelve years old. Last summer, she'd fallen for him hard.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: I think music is what language once aspired to be. Music allows us to face God on our own terms because it reaches beyond life.
Author: Simon Van Booy

Quote: Right. Because if you have trouble putting ketchup and mustard on a hot dog, you should totally move on to saving lives.
Author: Huntley Fitzpatrick

Quote: When you release a trauma on one level of your energetic being, you will experience relief on all other levels simultaneously.
Author: Dashama Konah Gordon
Origin: Journey to Joyful: Transform Your Life with Pranashama Yoga

Quote: Doubt is a question mark; faith is an exclamation point. The most compelling, believable, realistic stories have included them both.
Author: Criss Jami

Quote: Whatever you are looking for is also looking for you. You see, don't only look. Be available and ready when it shows up
Author: Sahndra Fon Dufe

Quote: To be idle is a short road to death and to be diligent is a way of life; foolish people are idle, wise people are diligent.
Author: Buddha

Quote: You only have to do a very few things right in your life so long as you don't do too many things wrong.
Author: Warren Buffett

Quote: If God is so big He holds the world in His hands, but He also lives in our hearts . . . shouldn't He show through?"- Anonymous wisdom from a child
Author: Jason Spade

Quote: The paperback is very interesting but I find it will never replace the hardcover book -- it makes a very poor doorstop.
Author: Alfred Hitchcock

Quote: Far away, our dreams have nothing to do with what we do. The wind carries the night, and passes on, aimless.
Author: Mahmoud Darwish

Quote: As I was driving down Beach Blvd., I saw a building that said, "Self Storage, "and I thought, "I wonder if my ego could possibly fit in just one unit.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This is the story my great-grandfather told my father, who then told my grandfather, who then told me about how The Mythical Mr. Boo, Charles Manseur Fizzlebush Grissham III, better known as Mr. Fizzlebush, and Orafoura are all in fact me...

Quote: Gravity disappears again, and we rise up off the floor like spooks from a grave. It's like the Rapture in here every thirty seconds.
Author: Mary Roach
Origin: Packing for Mars: The Curious Science of Life in the Void

Quote: To think what is true, to sense what is beautiful and to want what is good, hereby the spirit finds purpose of a life in reason.
Author: Johann Gottfried Herder

Quote: Never marry at all, Dorian. Men marry because they are tired, women, because they are curious: both are disappointed.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: We are all hungry and thirsty for concrete images. Abstract art will have been good for one thing: to restore its exact virginity to figurative art.
Author: Salvador Dali

Quote: The difference between the right word and the almost right word is the difference between lightning and a lightning bug.
Author: Mark Twain
Origin: The Wit and Wisdom of Mark Twain

Quote: You give but little when you give of your possessions. It is when you give of yourself that you truly give.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: Vodka in the shape of a human body would be an excellent dancing partner. I'm a bring my own chaser kind of lover.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: WE ALMOST NEVER think of the present, and when we do, it is only to see what light it throws on our plans for the future.
Author: Antonio R. Damasio

Quote: Our sole purpose on this earth is to add value to others. It doesn't make sense to just exist in people's lives or to be a drain on them, does it?
Author: Rob Liano

Quote: When enter the whole new world, men will deal with new science. To embrace a new science, men need to get used to new wisdom.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: My Ancestor Was an Ancient Astronaut

Quote: My heart is locked away in a cage surrounded by ribs. That's to protect it, and to keep the world safe. It's currently serving a life sentence.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: We rehearse for the big death through the little death of orgasm, through erotic living. Death as transfiguration
Author: Peter Redgrove

Quote: The trouble with most people is that they think with their hopes or fears or wishes rather than with their minds.
Author: Will Durant

Quote: Experience teaches us that it is much easier to prevent an enemy from posting themselves than it is to dislodge them after they have got possession.
Author: George Washington

Quote: Everybody is identical in their secret unspoken belief that way deep down they are different from everyone else.
Author: David Foster Wallace

Quote: She had always wanted words, she loved them; grew up on them. Words gave her clarity, brought reason, shape.
Author: Michael Ondaatje

Quote: I want him to be happy. And I want you to be happy, too. Even if you can only find that happiness without me.
Author: S.J. Watson

Quote: Faith is a process of leaping into the abyss not on the basis of any certainty about where we shall land, but rather on the belief that we shall land.
Author: Carter Heyward

Quote: The greatest challenge of the day is: how to bring about a revolution of the heart, a revolution which has to start with each one of us?
Author: Dorothy Day

Quote: You are the beloved conscious reflection of this universe. You are here to enjoy the beauty and joy of life.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: How ghastly for her, people actually thinking, with their brains, and right next door. Oh, the travesty of it all.
Author: Gail Carriger

Quote: I think, therefore a single fertilized egg cell can replicate itself into trillions of specialized and exquisitely organized cells.
Author: David Self

Quote: She cuts me deep with her words, with her withholding of words, and with her knife. I'm not sure which is the most painful.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: But I couldn't help myself, couldn't help the way I felt as I recalled the bliss and rush of a vampire's bite.
Author: Richelle Mead

Quote: To finish the moment, to find the journey's end in every step of the road, to live the greatest number of good hours, is wisdom.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: Love is like the sea. It's a moving thing, but still and all, it takes its shape from the shore it meets, and it's different with every shore.
Author: Zora Neale Hurston

Quote: All teachings are mere references. The true experience is living your own life. Then, even the holiest of words are only words.
Author: Ming- Dao Deng

Quote: There is no abstract art. You must always start with something. Afterward you can remove all traces of reality.
Author: Pablo Picasso

Quote: If it's true that our species is alone in the universe, then I'd have to say the universe aimed rather low and settled for very little.
Author: George Carlin

Quote: To give pleasure to a single heart by a single act is better than a thousand heads bowing in prayer.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: People take different roads seeking fulfillment and happiness. Just because they're not on your road doesn't mean they've gotten lost.
Author: Dalai Lama XIV

Quote: I want to meet a guy named Art. I'd take him to a museum, hang him on the wall, criticize him, and leave.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: There are too many books in the world to read in a single lifetime; you have to draw the line somewhere.
Author: Diane Setterfield

Quote: Make your own Bible. Select and collect all the words and sentences that in all your readings have been to you like the blast of a trumpet.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: Whatever games are played with us, we must play no games with ourselves, but deal in our privacy with the last honesty and truth.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
Origin: The Essential Writings of Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: As lovers, the difference between men and women is that women can love all day long, but men only at times.
Author: W. Somerset Maugham

Quote: Know that the same spark of life that is within you, is within all of our animal friends, the desire to live is the same within all of us...
Author: Rai Aren

Quote: If you have not done things worthy of being written about, at least write things worthy of being read.
Author: Giacomo Casanova

Quote: Then we shan't regard anyone as a lover of knowledge or wisdom who is fussy about what he studies...
Author: Plato

Quote: I don't know about your true form, but the weight of your ego sure is pushing the crust of the earth toward the breaking point.
Author: Jim Butcher

Quote: Stability was overrated. Crises and adventures, on the other hand, could actually teach you something.
Author: Sarah Addison Allen

Quote: How keen everyone is to make this world their home forgetting its impermanence It's like trying to see and name constellations in a fireworks display.
Author: Nadeem Aslam

Quote: Real education must ultimately be limited to men who insist on knowing. The rest is mere sheep herding.
Author: Ezra Pound

Quote: Accept the things to which fate binds you, and love the people with whom fate brings you together, but do so with all your heart.
Author: Marcus Aurelius

Quote: Somehow, we'll find it. The balance between whom we wish to be and whom we need to be. But for now, we simply have to be satisfied with who we are.
Author: Brandon Sanderson

Quote: Down the road, I'll probably have a kid or two or three. And there will probably be political events or spiritual things to comment on, and humor.
Author: Alanis Morissette

Quote: You have to write the book that wants to be written. And if the book will be too difficult for grown-ups, then you write it for children.
Author: Madeleine L'Engle

Quote: She fixed a smile that she hoped looked authentic. Pretending to be content continued to be hard work.
Author: Stacy Hawkins Adams

Quote: Do nothing, and nothing happens. Life is about decisions. You either make them or they're made for you, but you can't avoid them.
Author: Mhairi McFarlane

Quote: Likings arise when one has no earthly reason for liking - the most wildly improbable marriages and uncommon friendship.
Author: Patrick O'Brian

Quote: You see I usually find myself among strangers because I drift here and there trying to forget the sad things that happened to me.
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

Quote: What strange phenomena we find in a great city, all we need do is stroll about with our eyes open. Life swarms with innocent monsters.
Author: Charles Baudelaire

Quote: If people but knew their own religion, how tolerant they would become, and how free from any grudge against the religion of others.
Author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
Origin: The Bowl of Saki: Thoughts for Daily Contemplation from the Sayings and Teachings of Hazrat Inayat Khan

Quote: True love begins when you accept yourself in your totality. Then, and only then, can you completely love another.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: Life is too short to be little. Man is never so manly as when he feels deeply, acts boldly, and expresses himself with frankness and with fervor.
Author: Benjamin Disraeli

Quote: Urgent optimism is the desire to act immediately to tackle an obstacle, combined with the belief that we have a reasonable hope of success.
Author: Jane McGonigal

Quote: I never found beauty in longing for the impossible and never found the possible to be beyond my reach.
Author: Ayn Rand

Quote: Half of the American people have never read a newspaper. Half never voted for President. One hopes it is the same half.
Author: Gore Vidal

Quote: Don't sacrifice yourself too much, because if you sacrifice too much there's nothing else you can give and nobody will care for you.
Author: Karl Lagerfeld

Quote: The size of your sighs tell how deeply you're in love. How I feel is very much like a stressed and distressed midget trying to breathe.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: My reputation is too important to put it aside for purposes of some friendship. We have a job to do.
Author: Stephanie Tubbs Jones

Quote: It is strange how a scrap of poetry works in the mind and makes the legs move in time to it along the road.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: Lord, be my rock of safety, the stronghold that saves me. For the honor of your name lead me and guide me.
Author: Anonymous

Quote: Chanel is an institution, and you have to treat an institution like a whore - and then you get something out of her
Author: Karl Lagerfeld

Quote: We had a whirlwind romance. That's what happens when you date a tornado. Hold on, I have to stop tweeting for a bit because Kansas keeps calling.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: A painter should begin every canvas with a wash of black, because all things in nature are dark except where exposed by the light.
Author: Leonardo da Vinci

Quote: Flaming enthusiasm, backed up by horse sense and persistence, is the quality that most frequently makes for success.
Author: Dale Carnegie

Quote: In everything I write, I'm always striving to hit the right mix of light and darkness, humor and pain, fun and seriousness.
Author: Greg van Eekhout

Quote: I have never voted in my life... I have always known and understood that the idiots are in a majority so it's certain they will win.
Author: Louis- Ferdinand Céline

Quote: Booksellers are the most valuable destination for the lonely, given the numbers of books written because authors couldn't find anyone to talk to.
Author: Alain de Botton

Quote: Faith does not need to push the river because faith is able to trust that there is a river. The river is flowing. We are in it.
Author: Richard Rohr

Quote: I don't understand it. Jack will spend any amount of money to buy votes but he balks at investing a thousand dollars in a beautiful painting.
Author: Jackie Kennedy

Quote: If I am never to have you again after this night, this moment, you will remain the wife of my soul. Keeper of my heart.
Author: Penelope Williamson

Quote: To know how to grow old is the master work of wisdom, and one of the most difficult chapters in the great art of living.
Author: Herman Melville

Quote: How does one become a butterfly? They have to want to learn to fly so much that you are willing to give up being a caterpillar.
Author: Trina Paulus

Quote: The significant problems we have cannot be solved at the same level of thinking with which we created them.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: People are just too hopeful, and sometimes hope is the biggest weapon of all to use against us. People will believe anything.
Author: Edwidge Danticat

Quote: But often life asks much of you, and you either honor life by answering with all your heart, or you cower your way into your grave.
Author: James Clemens

Quote: The book is a film that takes place in the mind of the reader. That's why we go to movies and say, "Oh, the book is better.
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: Sleep is a little death, dreams the whisperings of the Other, who would drag us all into his eternal night.
Author: George R.R. Martin

Quote: The zipper displaces the button and a man lacks just that much time to think while dressing at dawn, a philosophical hour, and thus a melancholy hour.
Author: Ray Bradbury

Quote: When you stop blaming others for where you are in life, that is when you can start to manifest your dream life!
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: Every time you are tempted to react in the same old way, ask if you want to be a prisoner of the past or a pioneer of the future.
Author: Deepak Chopra

Quote: Just that I have loved you, even when I was nothing and no one to you, when you didn't know my name and barely knew my face.- Leo
Author: Sherry Thomas

Quote: As bronze may be much beautified by lying in the dark damp soil, so men who fade in dust of warfare fade fairer, and sorrow blooms their soul.
Author: Wilfred Owen

Quote: Because that was then and this is now. Because the past is gone, even though it defines the present.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: A perfect person is easy to love. But when somebody likes all your imperfections, well, that's when you know they really mean it.
Author: Michelle Dalton

Quote: Only Irish coffee provides in a single glass all four essential food groups: alcohol, caffeine, sugar and fat.
Author: Alex Levine

Quote: Happiness is not in the mere possession of money; it lies in the joy of achievement, in the thrill of creative effort.
Author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

Quote: I do a lot of inspirational talks for kids, to motivate them to change their lives and give them hope.
Author: Adam Beach

Quote: I have always had more dread of a pen, a bottle of ink, and a sheet of paper than of a sword or pistol.
Author: Alexandre Dumas

Quote: I have accepted fear as part of life - specifically the fear of change... I have gone ahead despite the pounding in the heart that says: turn back....
Author: Erica Jong

Quote: Should graffiti be judged on the same level as modern art? Of course not: It's way more important than that.
Author: Banksy

Quote: Whatever their future, at the dawn of their lives, men seek a noble vision of man's nature and of life's potential.
Author: Ayn Rand

Quote: Let us beware of saying that death is the opposite of life. The living being is only a species of the dead, and a very rare species.
Author: Friedrich Nietzsche
Origin: The Gay Science: with a Prelude in Rhymes and an Appendix of Songs

Quote: Poetry, she thought, wasn't written to be analyzed; it was meant to inspire without reason, to touch without understanding.
Author: Nicholas Sparks

Quote: To live is to change, to acquire the words of a story, and that is the only celebration we mortals really know.
Author: Barbara Kingsolver

Quote: Stop complaining. Plot your course and start your journey. Adjust your sail. Success is waiting to welcome you.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: I definitely have guys that I'm friends with that I have a crush on, and you don't want to ruin the friendship.
Author: Miranda Cosgrove

Quote: The deep observation of nature can transform your consciousness into a higher consciousness that will awaken your true being.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Art to me is an anecdote of the spirit, and the only means of making concrete the purpose of its varied quickness and stillness.
Author: Mark Rothko

Quote: A wedding anniversary is the celebration of love, trust, partnership, tolerance and tenacity. The order varies for any given year.
Author: Paul Sweeney

Quote: To be fully seen by somebody, then, and be loved anyhow - this is a human offering that can border on miraculous.
Author: Elizabeth Gilbert
Origin: Committed: A Skeptic Makes Peace with Marriage

Quote: She's twelve hours in the future, and exactly half a world away. No matter how hard I try, I will always be a part of her past.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Go higher and higher, until it becomes impossible to bring you down, I wanna use a microscope to locate you, don't even dream of coming down.
Author: Michael Bassey Johnson

Quote: I have a lucky perfume. I love beautiful smells, but I save one of my favorite perfumes to wear only when I feel like I need some extra luck.
Author: Gretchen Rubin

Quote: For this was the round of love: fear which leads on desire, tenderness and fury, and that brutal anguish which triumphantly follows pleasure.
Author: Françoise Sagan

Quote: Bike lane: the section of the road that accommodates wide loads and has speed bumps to protect drunk drivers.
Author: Bauvard

Quote: When you feel someone else's pain and joy as powerfully as if it were your own, then you know you really loved them.
Author: Ann Brashares
Origin: Girls In Pants: The Third Summer of the Sisterhood

Quote: It is in your hands to make life miserable or happy. No religion, spiritual leaders or knowledge will ever make you fully satisfied.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: The waltz is a very important part of my life. It's a very important way for me to express my positiveness, bringing humor to the world.
Author: Andre Rieu

Quote: She took refuge on the firm ground of fiction, through which indeed there curled the blue river of truth.
Author: Henry James

Quote: The average man, who does not know what to do with his life, wants another one which will last forever.
Author: Anatole France

Quote: The key to success is to keep growing in all areas of life - mental, emotional, spiritual, as well as physical.
Author: Julius Erving

Quote: I gave her a hundred dollar bill. She said, "Thanks, how can I repay you?" I replied, "Two fifties would be good, but three fifties would be better.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I don't want my love with her to wither like grapes on a vine, so I'll water it with romance to turn it into wine.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I am charging you with the protection of my mother and friends, not to mention keeping my younger self off the Internet. He is as dangerous as Opal.
Author: Eoin Colfer

Quote: I knew it, but I knew you didn't know I knew it, so I knew to not let you know I knew it by acting like I didn't know it.
Author: Jarod Kintz

Quote: There seems to be no lengths to which humorless people will not go to analyze humor. It seems to worry them.
Author: Robert Benchley

Quote: Love isn't in a hurry like a flurry of flowery words on paper. It's lush and slow to grow its aroma in the garden of time.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: It was books that made me feel that perhaps I was not completely alone. They could be honest with me, and I with them.
Author: Cassandra Clare

Quote: In some not too distant tomorrow the radiant stars of love and brotherhood will shine over our great nation with all their scintillating beauty.
Author: Martin Luther King Jr.
Origin: The Autobiography of Martin Luther King, Jr.

Quote: Your personal brand should be like water: not only clear, but transparent to the public. People thirst for that, and they will drink you up.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I used to think how lucky she was to have me, but now I realize that's backwards. A spirit of gratitude yields patience, love, and forgiveness.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I'm direct, I'm unpretentious and I'm pretty dogged, and I hope I've got a capacity to laugh at myself and not take myself too seriously.
Author: John Howard

Quote: A rock pile ceases to be a rock pile the moment a single man contemplates it, bearing within him the image of a cathedral.
Author: Antoine de Saint- Exupéry

Quote: The secret code of success is patience, a virtue that can not be replaced. It takes time to build great dreams.
Author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

Quote: I told her I'd wait forever for her, but that was before I found somebody else who'd give me a ride home.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: What and how much had I lost by trying to do only what was expected of me instead of what I myself had wished to do?
Author: Ralph Ellison

Quote: The universe doesn't give you what you ask for with your thoughts - it gives you what you demand with your actions.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: When she tried to seduce me, I got suspicious, thinking she was just after my massive fortune. Then I relaxed, when I remembered I'm poor.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I just want you to know that you're very special... and the only reason I'm telling you is that I don't know if anyone else ever has.
Author: Stephen Chbosky
Origin: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

Quote: For it was not into my ear you whispered, but into my heart. It was not my lips you kissed, but my soul.
Author: Judy Garland

Quote: You mean other than the wings? I once ate nine snicker bars in a row without barfing. It was a record.
Author: James Patterson

Quote: If I die with a zillion dollars and you die with zero, our net worth is worthless. All that matters is the love we level across our lives.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Do not despise your own place and hour. Every place is under the stars, every place is the center of the world.
Author: John Burroughs

Quote: And don't tell me the end justifies the means because it doesn't. We never reach the end. All we ever get is means. That's what we live with.
Author: Nick Harkaway

Quote: A philosopher is a blind man in a dark room looking for a black cat that isn't there. A theologian is the man who finds it.
Author: H.L. Mencken

Quote: What is that you express in your eyes? It seems to me more than all the print I have read in my life.
Author: Walt Whitman

Quote: The opposite of the religious fanatic is not the fanatical atheist but the gentle cynic who cares not whether there is a god or not.
Author: Eric Hoffer

Quote: No matter what your history has been, your destiny is what you create today. What are you going to create?
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: If I were a character in one of my books, I'd be the optimistic one, believing the best and urging others to do the same.
Author: Stacy Hawkins Adams

Quote: ... [They] took it upon themselves to start the laborious process of cranking up life again, after death has stopped us all in its tracks.
Author: Diane Setterfield

Quote: Never waste any amount of time doing anything important when there is a sunset outside that you should be sitting under!
Author: C. JoyBell C.

Quote: That should be the measure of success for everyone. It's not money, it's not fame, it's not celebrity; my index of success is happiness.
Author: Lupe Fiasco

Quote: Smirking, he says, "Whatever spell you just tried to cast on me, it didn't work, so I think you need to go back to Hogwarts.
Author: Jenny Han
Origin: To All the Boys I've Loved Before

Quote: Some way some how i'm going to be happy i'm going to laugh i'm going to prosper, i feel good that i remain positive thru these mess up times!!!
Author: jojo1980

Quote: The opposite of a correct statement is a false statement. But the opposite of a profound truth may well be another profound truth.
Author: Niels Bohr

Quote: I'm an only child, and therefore I gave birth to my parents, because if it weren't for me, they wouldn't even be parents.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: If you plan on being anything less than you are capable of being, you will probably be unhappy all the days of your life.
Author: Abraham Maslow

Quote: Chaos is more freedom; in fact, total freedom. But no meaning. I want to be free to act, and I also want my actions to mean something.
Author: Audrey Niffenegger

Quote: Lock up your libraries if you like; but there is no gate, no lock, no bolt that you can set upon the freedom of my mind.
Author: Virginia Woolf

Quote: There is nothing inhuman, evil, or irrational which does not give some comfort, provided it is shared by a group.
Author: Erich Fromm

Quote: I'd been willing to kill for the people I loved for a very long time; now I had to start living for them.
Author: Laurell K. Hamilton

Quote: Sometimes, I feel the past and the future pressing so hard on either side that there's no room for the present at all.
Author: Evelyn Waugh

Quote: I water fake plants, because I'm growing a garden of fake mustaches. Lest no man (or woman) question my ability as a lover.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. Specifically ages 18-81.

Quote: Don't assume, ask. Be kind. Tell the truth. Don't say anything you can't stand behind fully. Have integrity. Tell people how you feel.
Author: Warsan Shire

Quote: There is something good in all seeming failures. You are not to see that now. Time will reveal it. Be patient.
Author: Sivananda Saraswati

Quote: We may place blame, give reasons, and even have excuses; but in the end, it is an act of cowardice to not follow your dreams.
Author: Steve Maraboli

Quote: We real cool. We Left school. We Lurk late. We Strike straight. We Sing sin. We Thin gin. We Jazz June. We Die soon.
Author: Gwendolyn Brooks

Quote: I just developed a gun that shoots mustaches. Sometimes a disguise can be deadly, especially if it's your love you're trying to camouflage.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: People seldom see the halting and painful steps by which the most insignificant success is achieved.
Author: Anne Sullivan

Quote: I think you are wrong to want a heart. It makes most people unhappy. If you only knew it, you are in luck not to have a heart.
Author: L. Frank Baum

Quote: Read. Read anything. Read the things they say are good for you, and the things they claim are junk. You'll find what you need to find. Just read.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: What is true of the individual will be tomorrow true of the whole nation if individuals will but refuse to lose heart and hope.
Author: Mahatma Gandhi

Quote: Perhaps the rare and simple pleasure of being seen for what one is compensates for the misery of being it.
Author: Margaret Drabble

Quote: I would rather be able to appreciate things I cannot have than to have things I am not able to appreciate.
Author: Elbert Hubbard

Quote: An excuse becomes an obstacle in your journey to success when it is made in place of your best effort or when it is used as the object of the blame.
Author: Bo Bennett

Quote: Why do people always expect authors to answer questions? I am an author because I want to ask questions. If I had answers, I'd be a politician.
Author: Eugène Ionesco

Quote: I wish, when I was first born, the first thing I said was "Quote" so the last thing I said before I died would be "Unquote".
Author: Steven Wright

Quote: She said we all not only could know everything. We do. We just tell ourselves we don't to make it all bearable.
Author: Neil Gaiman

Quote: But at night, when the library lamps are lit, the outside world disappears and nothing but the space of books remains in existence.
Author: Alberto Manguel

Quote: Faith is not Desire. Faith is Will. Desires are things that need to be satisfied, whereas Will is a force. Will changes the space around us,...
Author: Paulo Coelho

Quote: A good book ... leaves you wanting to reread the book. A great book compels you to reread your own soul.
Author: Richard Flanagan
Origin: The Narrow Road to the Deep North

Quote: Knowledge without application is simply knowledge. Applying the knowledge to one's life is wisdom - and that is the ultimate virtue
Author: Kasi Kaye Iliopoulos
Origin: Living in Light, Love & Truth: You Can Positively Change Your Life by Living in Light, Love, & Truth- Awareness + Reflection + Learning + Application

Quote: It reminds me why I chose Dauntless in the first place: not because they are perfect, but because they are alive. Because they are free.
Author: Veronica Roth

Quote: The artist's job is not to succumb to despair but to find an antidote for the emptiness of existence.
Author: Woody Allen

Quote: Its never to late to get back on your feet though we won't live forever make sure you accomplish what you were put here for
Author: Abigail Adams
Origin: My Dearest Friend: Letters of Abigail and John Adams

Quote: ... the greatest menace to our capacity for contemplation is the incessant fabrication of tawdry empty stimuli which kill the receptivity of the soul.
Author: Josef Pieper

Quote: Being a mom is what life is about. I hope people realize what the priorities in life should be and know not everything has to be perfect.
Author: Kourtney Kardashian

Quote: Understanding is the reward of faith. Therefore, seek not to understand that you may believe, but believe that you may understand.
Author: Augustine of Hippo

Quote: Intelligence is the capacity to perceive the essential, the what is; and to awaken this capacity, in oneself and in others, is education.
Author: Jiddu Krishnamurti
Origin: Education and the Significance of Life

Quote: One is often so busy doing life that it is easy to avoid evaluating whether you are putting your energy in the direction you value most.
Author: Deborah Day

Quote: And of course I'm in the press all the time. So many books have been written about me; Into thin air, up in the air, Gone with the wind-
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: It's easier to fake it. When you fake it for sixteen years, it becomes part of you, something you don't think about.
Author: Alex Flinn

Quote: There are no secrets to success. It is the result of preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.
Author: Colin Powell

Quote: All architecture is great architecture after sunset; perhaps architecture is really a nocturnal art, like the art of fireworks.
Author: Gilbert K. Chesterton

Quote: Only by examining our personal biases can we truly grow as artists; only by cultivating empathy can we truly grow as people.
Author: Jen Knox

Quote: i held it up, and tried to channel happy dog thoughts toward Cerberus- Alpo commercials, cute little puppies, fire hydrants.
Author: Rick Riordan

Quote: Lucy: You learn more when you lose Charlie Brown: Well then I must be the smartest person in world!!!
Author: Charles M. Schulz

Quote: Never be afraid to tell me anything," he whispered against her hair. "No matter how ashamed you might feel. I'll never judge you, Rachel. I love you.
Author: Maya Banks

Quote: Music is the social act of communication among people, a gesture of friendship, the strongest there is.
Author: Malcolm Arnold

Quote: If there were a master of stupidity in this world, I would really love to listen to his success story.
Author: Toba Beta
Origin: Betelgeuse Incident: Insiden Bait Al- Jauza

Quote: Knowledge is the essence of organized information systems. Wisdom is the essence of knowledge and experience.
Author: Debasish Mridha

Quote: Inspiration is external and motivation is internal. It is up to me to provide the switch and you to flip it on!
Author: Tricia Cunningham
Origin: The Reverse Diet: Lose 20, 50, 100 Pounds or More by Eating Dinner for Breakfast and Breakfast for Dinner

Quote: he is both the source of my happiness and the one i want to share it with. i have to believe that's a sign.
Author: John Green

Quote: A lot of people ask me if I were shipwrecked, and could have only one book, what would it be? I always say, "How to Build a Boat.
Author: Stephen Wright

Quote: They didn't understand what they were doing. I'm afraid that will be on the tombstone of the human race.
Author: Michael Crichton

Quote: Love is like breakfast with Mildred. Who's Mildred? How the heck should I know? I don't eat breakfast.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: Love quotes for the ages. And the ageless sages.

Quote: We have a hope of succeeding if we learn from our past mistakes and pull together to make the hard choices.
Author: Carl Levin

Quote: If things start happening, don't worry, don't stew, just go right along and you'll start happening too.
Author: Dr. Seuss

Quote: Scientific People, unscientific mind; why are we dividing the world which could shine? Between religion and science, all what matters is human lives.
Author: Santosh Kalwar
Origin: A Very First Book Of Poems: Heartbreak

Quote: Wherever there's a gathering of people, there is networking going on. My favorite place to network is the cemetery.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Our limitations and success will be based, most often, on your own expectations for ourselves. What the mind dwells upon, the body acts upon.
Author: Denis Waitley

Quote: It is one of life's bitterest truths that bedtime so often arrives just when things are really getting interesting.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: Live authentically. Why would you continue to compromise something that's beautiful to create something that is fake?
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: All men have their frailties; and whoever looks for a friend without imperfections, will never find what he seeks.
Author: Cyrus the Great

Quote: Here lies one from a distant star, but the soil is not alien to him, for in death he belongs to the universe.
Author: Clifford D. Simak

Quote: Art is accusation, expression, passion. Art is a fight to the finish between black charcoal and white paper.
Author: Gunter Grass

Quote: Friendship is a disinterested commerce between equals; love, an abject intercourse between tyrants and slaves.
Author: Oliver Goldsmith

Quote: Remember that the best relationship is one in which your love for each other exceeds your need for each other.
Author: Dalai Lama XIV

Quote: To cherish what remains of the Earth and to foster its renewal is our only legitimate hope of survival.
Author: Wendell Berry

Quote: Alone. Yes, that's the key word, the most awful word in the English tongue. Murder doesn't hold a candle to it and hell is only a poor synonym.
Author: Stephen King

Quote: I'm going to paraphrase Thoreau here... rather than love, than money, than faith, than fame, than fairness... give me truth.
Author: Jon Krakauer

Quote: Her happiness floated like waves of ocean along the coast of her life. She found lyrics of her life in his arms but she never sung her song.
Author: Santosh Kalwar

Quote: I believe that a simple and unassuming manner of life is best for everyone, best both for the body and the mind.
Author: Albert Einstein

Quote: I am writing in the garden. To write as one should of a garden one must write not outside it or merely somewhere near it, but in the garden.
Author: Frances Hodgson Burnett

Quote: My dad instilled in me a great sense of humor. I wasn't bullied at school because my outward attitude was confident, and that helps.
Author: Warwick Davis

Quote: When you find yourself in need of spiritual nourishment, it is in the opportunities to serve others that you will find the abundance you seek.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: We know enough at this moment to say that the God of Abraham is not only unworthy of the immensity of creation; he is unworthy even of man.
Author: Sam Harris

Quote: Happiness is a strange thing. It is something I tend to recognize only after it has passed, when I realize I miss it.
Author: Claire Holden Rothman

Quote: Just because you love someone, doesn't mean you have to be involved with them. Love is not a bandage to cover wounds.
Author: Hugh Elliott

Quote: Memories aren't stored in the heart or the head or even the soul, if you ask me, but in the spaces between any given two people.
Author: Jodi Picoult

Quote: Let us be grateful to the people who make us happy; they are the charming gardeners who make our souls blossom.
Author: Marcel Proust

Quote: It turns out that an eerie type of chaos can lurk just behind a facade of order - and yet, deep inside the chaos lurks an even eerier type of order.
Author: Douglas R. Hofstadter
Origin: Metamagical Themas: Questing for the Essence of Mind and Pattern

Quote: My heart is breaking, "she says. "I want to be strong for you right now but the thought of you leaving is killing me inside.
Author: Pittacus Lore

Quote: Many people will walk in and out of your life, but only true friends will leave footprints in your heart
Author: Eleanor Roosevelt

Quote: I am powerful in my love for myself. The truth of my being is I love myself exactly as I am. I honor my empowered heart.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree
Origin: The Spiritual Girl's Guide to Dating: Your Enlightened Path to Love, Sex, & Soul Mates

Quote: I drive as fast as four tire swings hanging from a tree branch in the middle of winter. I also make love with as much speed and rotation.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: When you realize there is something you don't understand, then you're generally on the right path to understanding all kinds of things.
Author: Jostein Gaarder

Quote: There is no mystery-- that's the beauty of it. We are entirely explicable to each other, and yet we stay. What a miracle that is.
Author: Kamila Shamsie

Quote: If you don't design your own life plan, chances are you'll fall into someone else's plan. And guess what they have planned for you? Not much.
Author: Jim Rohn

Quote: Every generation imagines itself to be more intelligent than the one that went before it, and wiser than the one that comes after it.
Author: George Orwell

Quote: It is a defect of God's humor that he directs our hearts everywhere but to those who have a right to them.
Author: Tom Stoppard

Quote: All resistance is a rupture with what is. And every rupture begins, for those engaged in it, through a rupture with oneself.
Author: Alain Badiou

Quote: To show you I love you, I bought you an antique watch. You can tell it's old because it doesn't even work. I got a great deal on it.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Look at me. We aren't them lauren. You're not your mother or father any more than I'm my mother. You're you and I'm me and I love you.
Author: Elizabeth Scott

Quote: Every other artist begins with a blank canvas, a piece of paper the photographer begins with the finished product.
Author: Edward Steichen

Quote: There are two motives for reading a book; one, that you enjoy it; the other, that you can boast about it.
Author: Bertrand Russell

Quote: The purpose of life is to live it, to taste experience to the utmost, to reach out eagerly and without fear for newer and richer experience.
Author: Eleanor Roosevelt

Quote: You cannot build a dream on a foundation of sand. To weather the test of storms, it must be cemented in the heart with uncompromising conviction.
Author: T.F. Hodge
Origin: From Within I Rise: Spiritual Triumph Over Death and Conscious Encounters with "The Divine Presence"

Quote: Modernity is the transient, the fleeting, the contingent; it is one half of art, the other being the eternal and the immovable.
Author: Charles Baudelaire

Quote: Perhaps it takes a purer faith to praise God for unrealized blessings than for those we once enjoyed or those we enjoy now.
Author: A.W. Tozer

Quote: We can have in life but one great experience at best, and the secret of life is to reproduce that experience as often as possible.
Author: Oscar Wilde

Quote: If you share your soup, I'll share my wisdom. I brought a spoon, but did you bring a pen? How are you going to take notes, you fool!
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: A Story That Talks about Talking Is Like Chatter to Chattering Teeth, and Every Set of Dentures Can Attest to the Fact That No..

Quote: If you truly love a book, you should sleep with it, write in it, read aloud from it, and fill its pages with muffin crumbs.
Author: Anne Fadiman

Quote: One of the greatest tragedies in mankind's entire history may be that morality was hijacked by religion.
Author: Arthur C. Clarke

Quote: When faced with a hurdle then give it all you've got to jump over it because it can't be done in two stages.
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: I come from the New York theatre world, and I have a lot of gay male friends, so this friendship of Will and Grace's isn't such a stretch.
Author: Debra Messing

Quote: Trying to remember a dream from a decade ago is like trying to catch fog in a coffee filter. I could subsist on morning mist.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Love has no limitations. It cannot be measured. It has no boundaries. Although many have tried, love is indefinable.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: Plus, in one of his e-mails, the guy said he didn't like pancakes. What kind of asshole doesn't like pancakes?
Author: A.J. Jacobs
Origin: The Guinea Pig Diaries: My Life as an Experiment

Quote: I hope I make people feel better. I hope I take people out of their situations a little bit and make them happier. That's really why I do what I do.
Author: Ellen DeGeneres

Quote: Be as careful of the books you read, as of the company you keep; for your habits and character will be as much influenced by the former as the latter.
Author: Paxton Hood

Quote: We cannot prevail by our own might or strength, we need to plug on to the source of our strength so that we will remain resourceful always.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: Everything in life had a purpose, and unless it achieved that purpose, it was just taking up space on the planet and wasting everybody's time.
Author: Jeannette Walls

Quote: Tell me not in mournful numbers, Life is but an empty dream! For the soul is dead that slumbers, And things are not what they seem.
Author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

Quote: I thought about how mothers feed their babies with tiny little spoons and forks so I wondered, what do Chinese mothers use? Toothpicks?
Author: George Carlin

Quote: Everything that can be thought at all can be thought clearly. Everything that can be said can be said clearly.
Author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

Quote: Still reading but learning a lot about true education and the process of guiding our children in their educational pursuits.
Author: Oliver DeMille

Quote: The jump is so frightening between where I am and where I want to be... because of all I may become I will close my eyes and leap!
Author: Mary Anne Radmacher

Quote: It is difficult to obtain the friendship of a cat. It is a philosophical animal... one that does not place its affections thoughtlessly.
Author: Theophile Gautier

Quote: We're born alone, we live alone, we die alone. Only through our love and friendship can we create the illusion for the moment that we're not alone.
Author: Orson Welles

Quote: Your life is a show and you're the star so don't let anyone walk on set and treat you like an extra.
Author: Lucas Mascotto- Carbone

Quote: I hope that no more groans of wounded men and women will ever go to the ear of the Great Spirit Chief above, and that all people may be one people.
Author: Chief Joseph

Quote: The quality of our thoughts and emotions impact our body more than the quality of the food which we eat.
Author: Maddy Malhotra
Origin: How to Build Self- Esteem and Be Confident: Overcome Fears, Break Habits, Be Successful and Happy

Quote: There's a difference between preferring books to parties and preferring sixteen cats to seeing the light of day.
Author: Lauren Morrill

Quote: We must transcend the illusion that money or power has any bearing on our worthiness as children of God.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Life, the Truth, and Being Free

Quote: Excuse me, Captain. Are you two going to weep salty tears of admiration over a helmet all night, or do we have matters to discuss?
Author: Eoin Colfer

Quote: Going through an illness and then death of a close friend has changed my attitudes to friendship enormously.
Author: Jane Green

Quote: There are only two reasons why you leave someone you're still in love with - either it's the right thing to do, or it's the only thing to do.
Author: Tiffany Reisz

Quote: The uniform enhanced his athletic body, and my thoughts drifted to how magnificent he would look with his uniform puddled around his feet.
Author: Maria V. Snyder

Quote: Friendship is not by force but by choice. You can never please everybody, he who aims to please everybody will end up pleasing nobody.
Author: Stella Oladiran

Quote: Knowledge was like candy: you never turned it down, especially if you didn't have to work too hard to get it.
Author: Robert Liparulo

Quote: Using your mind is a faster method to getting what you want. I mean, all you have to do is sit there. What could be easier?
Author: Stephen Richards

Quote: With eyes closed, a kiss is genderless. Now that mustaches are in fashion, some women are finding more hipster love.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Technically, I am unarmed. But no one should ever underestimate the harm that fingernails can do. Especially if the target is unprepared.
Author: Suzanne Collins

Quote: We have nothing to lose, nothing to gain, nothing we desired anymore- except to make our lives into a work of art.
Author: Lana Del Rey

Quote: Things don't always work out the way we hope. You just have to pick yourself up and find a new direction to go in.
Author: Joelle Charbonneau

Quote: Her beauty took my breath away, and allowed the spring breeze to fill my lungs with honeysuckle, jasmine, and desire.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: What made me run away was doubtless not so much the fear of settling down, but of settling down permanently in something ugly.
Author: Albert Camus

Quote: We pray for the big things and forget to give thanks for the ordinary, small (and yet really not small) gifts.
Author: Dietrich Bonhoeffer
Origin: Life Together: The Classic Exploration of Christian Community

Quote: I used language because I wanted to offer content that people - not necessarily art people - could understand.
Author: Jenny Holzer

Quote: You've got to show the world who you are before it tells you. Otherwise you become victim to someone you're not.
Author: Chris Colfer
Origin: Struck By Lightning: The Carson Phillips Journal

Quote: I told the joke, but someone else got the high five. That's like me drinking a cup of coffee and a guy in a coma waking up. Go back to bed, buddy.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: I am heartbroken, but I have been heartbroken before, and this might be the best for which I can hope.
Author: Lemony Snicket

Quote: Ghosts don't haunt us. That's not how it works. They're present among us because we won't let go of them.
Author: Sue Grafton

Quote: I have found the paradox, that if you love until it hurts, there can be no more hurt, only more love.
Author: Daphne Rae

Quote: I can't imagine the scientists wanting me to walk into the lab and start fiddling around with some big bowl of electrons they had out.
Author: Jim Benton
Origin: Okay, So Maybe I Do Have Superpowers

Quote: The greatest joys in life are found not only in what we do and feel, but also in our quiet hopes and labors for others.
Author: Bryant McGill

Quote: The Theist tells us that the truth is god exists, the Atheist tells us that the truth is there is no god, while the truth tells us we don't know.
Author: Kodai Okuda

Quote: My cat is ignorant of the law. But then so am I. That means I am not his master, because we are both slaves.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Knowledge is as infinite as the universe. The man who claims to know all only reveals to all that he really knows nothing.
Author: Suzy Kassem
Origin: Rise Up and Salute the Sun: The Writings of Suzy Kassem

Quote: Truth is neither in the scripture nor in the words of prophets. It is in your heart, feel it, discover it and expand with it.
Author: Amit Ray
Origin: OM Sutra: The Pathway to Enlightenment

Quote: Choose joyful abundance in your heart and be unbounded, free, and relaxed. Be relentless with your choice and you'll make your mark.
Author: Amy Leigh Mercree

Quote: The one thing we can never get enough of is love. And the one thing we never give enough of is love.
Author: Henry Miller

Quote: Just as despair can come to one only from other human beings, hope, too, can be given to one only by other human beings.
Author: Elie Wiesel

Quote: You look at yourself and you accept yourself for who you are, and once you accept yourself for who you are you become a better person.
Author: Oprah Winfrey

Quote: Marry me, he says. I got all my own teeth, I wash twice a year an I'll cut you in fer half the business here.
Author: Moira Young

Quote: Without causality in the world, there is no point in educating people, or making any moral or political appeal.
Author: Felix Alba- Juez
Origin: The Perception of Time... and its Measurement

Quote: It was time to let go of the mad desire to remember. It was time to start living whatever life would come. In the present, not the past.
Author: Adi Alsaid

Quote: An expert is one who knows more and more about less and less until he knows absolutely everything about nothing.
Author: Nicholas Murray Butler

Quote: Of life's two chief prizes, beauty and truth, I found the first in a loving heart and the second in a laborer's hand.
Author: Kahlil Gibran

Quote: I became convinced that noncooperation with evil is as much a moral obligation as is cooperation with good.
Author: Martin Luther King Jr.
Origin: The Autobiography of Martin Luther King, Jr.

Quote: For an apple you can't reach up and pick, you have to climb that tree; the tree won't bend down for you!
Author: Mehmet Murat ildan

Quote: History is a guide to navigation in perilous times. History is who we are and why we are the way we are.
Author: David McCullough

Quote: your right standing with God and your connection to Him remains your strongest defense in the day of calamity.
Author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

Quote: The only thing that makes life possible is permanent, intolerable uncertainty: not knowing what comes next.
Author: Ursula K. Le Guin

Quote: Successful people don't have fewer problems. They have determined that nothing will stop them from going forward.
Author: Ben Carson
Origin: Gifted Hands: The Ben Carson Story

Quote: The scent of Florida honeysuckle uplifted in a spring breeze reminds me of your love, and how fresh it was until it blew past me into my past.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: Before you criticize a man, walk a mile in his shoes. That way, when you do criticize him, you'll be a mile away and have his shoes.
Author: Steve Martin

Quote: It's quite difficult to write about female friendship without it seeming to be a very niche subject. It's a difficult balance.
Author: Samantha Harvey

Quote: If you do not breathe through writing, if you do not cry out in writing, or sing in writing, then don't write, because our culture has no use for it.
Author: Anais Nin

Quote: Love is much nicer to be in than an automobile accident, a tight girdle, a higher tax bracket or a holding pattern over Philadelphia.
Author: Judith Viorst

Quote: Writers Are Insane. For months we are lone wolves locked in our caves. Then overnight we become publicity hounds. It's a schizophrenic business.
Author: Robert Mykle

Quote: But, in her life, nothing was going to happen. Such was the will of God! The future was a dark corridor, and at the far end the door was bolted.
Author: Gustave Flaubert

Quote: The inner revolution will not be televised or sold on the Internet. It must take place within one's own mind and heart.
Author: Noah Levine

Quote: But just remember: a woman's like a rose; if you treat her right, she'll bloom, if you don't, she'll wilt.
Author: Eric Wilson

Quote: I think great humor lies in playing the truth of a situation. I see myself as a performer and that applies to a Greek drama or a modern comedy.
Author: Brendan Coyle

Quote: so I wait for you like a lonely house till you will see me again and live in me. Till then my windows ache.
Author: Pablo Neruda

Quote: I never feel any pressure about a film. What is meant to happen will happen. I have seen failure as well as success several times.
Author: Akshay Kumar

Quote: I can't really act the way I want to act, or say what I want to say all the time. And a lot of times, I cover that up with a smile.
Author: Hilary Duff

Quote: The most painful thing is losing yourself in the process of loving someone too much, and forgetting that you are special too.
Author: Ernest Hemingway

Quote: I'm not crying because of you; you're not worth it. I'm crying because my delusion of who you were was shattered by the truth of who you are.
Author: Steve Maraboli
Origin: Unapologetically You: Reflections on Life and the Human Experience

Quote: We try to fix the outside so much, but our control of the outer world is limited, temporary, and often, illusory.
Author: Matthieu Ricard
Origin: Happiness: A Guide to Developing Life's Most Important Skill

Quote: I sacrificed a lot, in terms of friendship and family, from working so much at such a young age, but I wouldn't be where I am if I hadn't.
Author: Sasha Grey

Quote: The more that you read, the more things you will know. The more that you learn, the more places you'll go.
Author: Dr. Seuss
Origin: I Can Read With My Eyes Shut!

Quote: They who can give up essential liberty to obtain a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.
Author: Benjamin Franklin
Origin: Memoirs of the life & writings of Benjamin Franklin

Quote: The steady soul and the ego pretender / walk with their arms round each other's shoulders / through the mirage.
Author: Jay Woodman

Quote: My cabinet was made by hand. My applause is also made by hand, and I stood there clapping the whole time the carpenter was making my cabinet.
Author: Jarod Kintz
Origin: This Book is Not FOR SALE

Quote: My best advice to anyone who wants to raise a happy, mentally healthy child is: Keep him or her as far away from a church as you can.
Author: Frank Zappa

Quote: She had one of those goofy smiles that made you wonder if she was too stupid to know that life sucks most of the time.
Author: Darcia Helle

Quote: It matters not how strait the gate, How charged with punishments the scroll, I am the master of my fate: I am the captain of my soul.
Author: William Ernest Henley

Quote: I touch the tip of my finger to his lips. "There are secrets in here, " I say. "I want them out." He tries to bite my finger. I steal it back.
Author: Tahereh Mafi

Quote: it is impossible to build one's own happiness on the unhappiness of others. This perspective is at the heart of Buddhist teachings.
Author: Daisaku Ikeda

Quote: I've been working hard to become the kind of man she needs, the kind of man she already believes me to be.
Author: Colleen Houck
